title: METHOD, DEVICE, AND APPARATUS WITH MULTI-MODAL BASE MODEL TRAINING
abstract: [0000] A processor-implemented method including generating a token data set based on document information of a target document, generating a first chunk including first token data determined based on the token data set, generating first summary token data for the first chunk, generating a second chunk based on second token data and the first summary token data, the second token data being determined based on the token data set, and training a multi-modal base model based on the second chunk.

title: MODULAR COOKING SYSTEM
abstract: A modular cooking system for cooking food using interchangeable cooking modules includes a main body which defines a plurality of bays, each of which is open on a front side of the main body. Each one of a plurality of front cooking modules is receivable into an associated bay of the plurality of bays. Each front cooking module is configured to perform an associated cooking function. The front cooking modules may include, for example, a conventional oven, a convection oven, a microwave, a sous vide device, a pressure cooker, an air fryer, a deep fat fryer, a stovetop-style burner, or the like.

title: ENHANCED CONTEXT AWARE CONTENT RETRIEVAL USING LOGICAL MODELING
abstract: Context aware content retrieval can be performed and enhanced. Document manager (DM) can determine respective full, summary, and/or partial versions of respective electronic documents, and respective VI scores and respective token sizes associated therewith, based on analysis of the documents and initial queries. In connection with a received query, from the group of respective versions of respective electronic documents, DM can determine a group of respective candidate versions of respective electronic documents based on respective VI scores and token sizes, first VI score criterion, and first threshold token size. From the candidate group, DM can determine a subgroup of respective versions of respective electronic documents based on respective VI scores and token sizes, second VI score criterion, and second threshold token size that can correspond to a maximum token size limit that can be input into an AI-based model. Updates can be performed based on feedback information.

title: ROTOR ASSEMBLY, AND MOTOR AND COMPRESSOR EQUIPPED WITH SAME
abstract: The present invention provides a rotor assembly, and motor and compressor equipped with same, the rotor assembly comprising, first- and second-stage rotor cores, and permanent magnets, wherein: an inner core is provided with a plurality of inner core holes formed to at least partially overlap, in the circumferential direction, with one side end of a permanent magnet; a first outer core is provided with a plurality of first outer core holes provided between the plurality of permanent magnets, and at least partially overlapping, in the radial direction, with the plurality of permanent magnets; and a second outer core is provided with a plurality of second outer core holes provided between the plurality of permanent magnets, and at least partially overlapping, in the radial direction, with the plurality of permanent magnets and in communication with the first outer core holes.

title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE, OPERATION METHOD OF ELECTRONIC DEVICE, AND STORAGE MEDIUM
abstract: An electronic device according to an aspect of the present disclosure comprises: a display for displaying a three-dimensional space screen including a virtual space representing an indoor space and an object corresponding to a home appliance disposed in the indoor space; and a processor for displaying a recipe card including recipe information on the display, wherein the processor controls the recipe information to be transmitted to a home appliance associated with the recipe information when a first input for the recipe card and a second input for a predetermined area in the virtual space are received.

title: CLOTHES TREATMENT APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING SAME
abstract: A clothes treatment apparatus according to the present disclosure comprises: a housing; a tub provided inside the housing; a drum provided inside the tub and accommodating laundry; a heater for heating the air; a fan for blowing the air heated by the heater into the tub; a discharge device including a discharge flow path for guiding the air discharged from the tub to the outside of the housing; a humidity sensor provided in the discharge flow path; and a control unit for driving the heater and the fan to perform a drying cycle, wherein the control unit terminates the drying cycle on the basis of the weight of the laundry accommodated in the drum when the humidity sensor is identified to be abnormal during the drying cycle, and terminates the drying cycle on the basis of a humidity value detected by the humidity sensor when the humidity sensor is identified to be normal during the drying cycle.

title: ANALYTICS SERVICES BUILT ON AI/ML FOUNDATIONAL SERVICE
abstract: A method of wireless communication at a network entity and related apparatus are provided. In the method, an analytics entity associated with the network entity receives a first message for an analytics service from a service requesting entity. The analytics service is associated with one of a network data analytics function (NWDAF), a management data analytics function (MDAF), a radio access network (RAN) analytics, or a network analytics. The analytics entity further communicates, with a model foundational service associated with the network entity, analytics information of at least one model function of a set of model functions associated with a model for the analytics service; and sends to the service requesting entity analytics data for the analytics service. The analytics data is based on at least one model function.

title: SURFACE CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: A surface cleaning apparatus (100), comprising a main unit (101) and a cleaning head (102) movably connected to the main unit. The cleaning head (102) comprises a housing (1) and a cover (9) arranged on the housing (1), wherein the housing (1) and the cover (9) jointly define a suction cavity (5); an agitator (4) configured to clean a surface to be cleaned is provided in the suction cavity (5); the cover (9) comprises a main body (91) and an upper cover plate (92) pivotally mounted on the main body (91); and a scraping member (3) is provided on the upper cover plate (92), and the scraping member (3) is arranged in front of the agitator (4) in an advancing direction. A driving structure (8) is configured to drive the upper cover plate to rotate around a rotating shaft structure, such that the scraping member (3) moves between a first position and a second position. The scraping member (3) is configured to be located away from said surface when in the first position and be brought into contact with said surface when in the second position. When a user uses a reciprocating mopping action, water stains on a floor can be cleaned by means of a simple structure, thereby improving the cleaning effect.

title: FLOATING SCRAPING STRIP ASSEMBLY, CLEANING MODULE, CLEANING DEVICE, AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: The present invention relates to a floating scraping strip assembly which can be arranged in a cleaning device and comprises: a fixed support; a floating support mounted on the fixed support and slidably fitting with the fixed support, such that the floating support can move relative to the fixed support; and a scraping strip mounted on one side of the floating support.

title: CARRIER ASSEMBLY, MOBILE DEVICE ASSEMBLY, AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: A carrier assembly, a mobile device assembly, and a cleaning system, the carrier assembly being applied to carrying an accessory of a mobile device, and the mobile device comprising a manipulator. The carrier assembly comprises a carrying base. The carrying base is provided with a carrying groove, and the shape of the carrying groove matches at least part of the shape of the accessory. One of a suctioning member and a suctioned member is mounted on the bearing base by means of a fixing structure, and the other is provided on the accessory. The suctioning member and the suctioned member attract each other so that the accessory is located in the carrying groove in a posture to be clamped. The manipulator is configured to clamp the accessory in the posture to be clamped, or release the clamped accessory in the carrying groove.

title: GRIPPING ASSEMBLY, MOBILE DEVICE, AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: A gripping assembly (100), wherein the gripping assembly (100) is applied to a mobile device, the mobile device comprises a manipulator (210), and the gripping assembly (100) comprises: a connecting base (110), a fixing structure (120) is formed on and/or mounted on the connecting base (110), the fixing structure (120) is configured for being detachably connected to a piece to be gripped (400), the connecting base (110) is further provided with a gripping portion (111), a shape of the gripping portion (111) matches a shape of the manipulator (210), and the manipulator (210) is configured for engaging or releasing the gripping portion (111). Also provided are a mobile device and a cleaning system.

title: CLEANING ASSEMBLY, SELF-MOVING DEVICE, AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: The present application discloses a cleaning assembly, a self-moving device, and a cleaning system. The cleaning assembly is applied to a self-moving device. The self-moving device comprises a manipulator. The cleaning assembly comprises a connecting base and a cleaning element. The cleaning element is connected to the connecting base. The connecting base is provided with a clamping portion. The shape of the clamping portion matches the shape of the manipulator. The manipulator is configured to clamp or release the clamping portion.

title: FLOATING SCRAPER ASSEMBLY, CLEANING MODULE, CLEANING DEVICE, AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: A floating scraper assembly (1), a cleaning module, a cleaning device, and a cleaning system. The floating scraper assembly (1) can be disposed in the cleaning module, and comprises: a fixed bracket (15); a floating bracket (11), mounted on a fixed bracket (15) and slidably fitted with the fixed bracket (15), the floating bracket (11) comprising a first main body part (111) and a second main body part (112) spaced apart and disposed opposite each other, and the first main body part (111) being connected to the second main body part (112); and a scraping strip (12), mounted on one side of the first main body part (111). The floating scraper assembly (1) can improve the cleaning performance of the cleaning device, and has reduced costs and prolonged service life.

title: ROBOT AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: The present application provides a robot and a control method therefor. The robot comprises a body, a main driving wheel, and an obstacle crossing wheel apparatus. The main driving wheel is arranged on the body and is at least used for providing driving force for the body. The obstacle crossing wheel apparatus is arranged on the body. The obstacle crossing wheel apparatus is configured to raise a front end of the body when the robot is in a pre-obstacle-crossing state.

title: POLYCYCLIC COMPOUNDS AND ANTITUMOR USE THEREOF
abstract: Provided in the present invention are polycyclic compounds and the antitumor use thereof. The compounds are compounds represented by formula (P) and pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof. The compounds are useful, for example, in the treatment of diseases or disorders associated with increased activation of PI3Kα (e.g. cancer). Also provided in the present invention are a composition containing the compounds, and a use method thereof and a preparation method therefor.

title: HETEROCYCLIC COMPOUND, PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR, AND USE THEREOF IN PREPARATION OF VAV1 DEGRADATION AGENT
abstract: Provided are a heterocyclic compound, a preparation method therefor, and a use thereof in the preparation of a VAV1 degradation agent, relating to the field of pharmaceutical chemistry. The compound can be used as a VAV1 degradation agent for preparing a drug for preventing and/or treating diseases such as autoimmune diseases, inflammation, and cancer. The compound has good degradation activity against VAV1, good oral pharmacokinetics, and good efficacy, and has broad application prospects.

title: POLYCYCLIC COMPOUND CONTAINING CARBOXYLIC ACID AND USE THEREOF
abstract: Provided are a polycyclic compound containing a carboxylic acid and a use thereof, belonging to the field of medicinal chemistry, and specifically relating to a compound represented by formula (I), a stereoisomer or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, a preparation method therefor, a pharmaceutical composition containing the compound, and a use thereof in the treatment of diseases.

title: ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVE SHIELDING PLATE, ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVE SHIELDING HOUSING, ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVE HEATING DEVICE, AND SENSOR DEVICE
abstract: An electromagnetic wave shielding plate (4) comprises: a first electromagnetic wave shielding layer (41) that has conductivity; a second electromagnetic wave shielding layer (42) that has conductivity and is disposed so as to be opposite of the first electromagnetic wave shielding layer (41); and a third electromagnetic wave shielding layer (43) that has conductivity and is disposed so as to be opposite of the second electromagnetic wave shielding layer (42) at a position opposite from the first electromagnetic wave shielding layer (41) with respect to the second electromagnetic wave shielding layer (42). The electromagnetic wave shielding layers are each disposed such that a distance d1 between the first electromagnetic wave shielding layer (41) and the second electromagnetic wave shielding layer (42) and a distance d2 between the second electromagnetic wave shielding layer (42) and the third electromagnetic wave shielding layer (43) are respectively included in the ranges of d1 = λ × (180° × M ± 13°)/(√(εr1 × μr1) × 360°) and d2 = λ × (90° × N ± 72°)/(√(εr2 × μr2) × 360°).

title: USE OF HEPARIN TRISACCHARIDE COMPOUND IN PREPARATION OF DRUG FOR TREATING CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE
abstract: A trisaccharide compound having a core structure of Glc(1→4)IdoA(1→4)GlcNS and a use thereof in the preparation of a drug for treating COPD. The trisaccharide compound has almost no anticoagulant activity, does not have platelet factor 4 binding activity, and exhibits an extremely low bleeding risk during treatment.

title: GATA TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR PROTEOLYSIS TARGETING CHIMERA COMPOUND AND PREPARATION METHOD AND USE THEREOF
abstract: [0000] The present disclosure discloses a GATA transcription factor proteolysis targeting chimera compound, a preparation method and a use thereof. The compound has a structure represented by formula I. The compound has a binding capacity with a GATA transcription factor at nanomolar level, a significant degradation effect on the GATA transcription factor, and a remarkable inhibitory effect on the tumor growth, which can be effectively used in the preparation of a drug for degrading the GATA transcription factor, a drug for treating the GATA transcription factor abnormalities, and a drug for treating cancer. [0000]

title: CONTAINER WITH DENESTING FEATURES
abstract: [0000] A container for holding one or more products may comprise a plurality of panels at least partially extending around an interior of the container. The plurality of panels may comprise a bottom panel, at least one end panel extending upwardly from the bottom panel, and at least one side panel extending upwardly from the bottom panel and at least partially defined between a first edge and a second edge. The container may include denesting features including an extending portion defined along the first edge.

title: Verfahren und Steuereinheit zum Betreiben eines Lagerbehälters, Lagerbehälter, Verfahren und Steuereinheit zum Betreiben eines mobilen Endgeräts, mobiles Endgerät, Verfahren und Steuereinheit zum Betreiben eines Haushaltgeräts, Haushaltgerät, Verfahren und Steuereinheit zum Betreiben eines Haushaltgerätesystems, externe Zentraleinrichtung
abstract: Die Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren zum Betreiben eines Lagerbehälters (100), wobei der Lagerbehälter (100) drahtlos mit einem mobilen Endgerät (205) koppelbar oder gekoppelt ist. Das Verfahren umfasst einen Schritt des Aufbauens einer Drahtlosverbindung zwischen dem mobilen Endgerät (205) und dem Lagerbehälter (100). Zusätzlich umfasst das Verfahren einen Schritt des Empfangens von Daten von dem mobilen Endgerät (205), insbesondere wobei die Daten eine Information über in dem Lagerbehälter (100) zu lagernde und/oder lagernde Lebensmittel repräsentiert. Zusätzlich umfasst das Verfahren einen Schritt des Speicherns der Daten in einer Speichereinrichtung einer Komponente des Lagerbehälters (100).

title: PALATABLE CHEWABLE COMPOSITIONS WITH IMPROVED TASTE MASKING
abstract: [0000] The present disclosure is directed to improved palatable chewable composition products that contain at least one encapsulated primary ingredient. Encapsulation prevents unpalatable flavors or unpleasant odors from the primary ingredients during ingestion. The disclosed palatable chewable compositions maintain palatability through manufacturing and shelf life.

title: REMEDYING LOST CIRCULATION
abstract: A lost circulation composition is flowed to a lost circulation zone within a wellbore formed in a subterranean formation. The lost circulation composition includes volcanic ash, an epoxy resin, and a curing agent. The curing agent includes nitrogen. The curing agent crosslinks the epoxy resin to form a plug at the lost circulation zone. The plug prevents fluid from flowing from the wellbore into the subterranean formation through the plug at the lost circulation zone.

title: Anti-MuSK Antibody Conjugates
abstract: The present disclosure relates to antibody peptide conjugates with a means to bind MuSK, such as an anti-MuSK antibody, and a PRAD peptide. The present disclosure also relates to an antibody-drug conjugate including an anti-Musk antibody and a drug, and optionally a PRAD peptide.

title: CHEWABLE COMPOSITIONS
abstract: [0000] Chewable compositions having a Fast Melt texture are provided. The compositions include a primary ingredient. The primary ingredient may be an active pharmaceutical ingredient, dietary supplement, or food. The compositions may include a hydrocolloid present at about 0.5% to about 15% by weight; and a bulk matrix present at about 65% to about 99.5% by weight that contains sugars or sugar alcohols and includes grained particles. The bulk matrix may include reducing sugars, non-reducing sugars, or combinations thereof, with the ratio of non-reducing to reducing sugars selected to control graining, hardness, and dissolving behavior. The compositions may include emulsifiers, sweeteners, flavors, colorants, stabilizers, buffering agents, or insoluble solids such as calcium carbonate. Methods of making the chewable compositions are also provided, including forming a hydrocolloid gel matrix, combining the matrix with a primary ingredient, heating the mixture, forming chewable units, and aging the units for 2-4 weeks to develop the Fast Melt texture.

title: TISSUE-DERIVED COMPOSITIONS WITH RETAINED BIOACTIVE SUBSTANCES AND METHODS FOR MAKING AND USING SAME
abstract: [0000] Devitalized tissue-derived compositions contain extracellular matrix (ECM), devitalized endogenous cells and/or one or more endogenous bioactive substances (e.g., cellular components, including extracellular vesicles (e.g., exosomes)) and are capable of storage at room temperature. Because native cells are devitalized, but intentionally not removed from these compositions, beneficial proteins and other substances contained in the devitalized endogenous cells and endogenous extracellular vesicles are retained in the compositions and available and accessible in quantities comparable to viable cryopreserved tissue-derived compositions and greater than conventional decellularized tissue-derived graft materials. Lyophilizing renders the devitalized tissue-derived compositions capable of storage at ambient temperatures, without the need for freezing or refrigeration. Methods for producing and using the devitalized tissue-derived compositions, either alone or with other materials and substances are also provided. In exemplary embodiments, bone tissue samples are subjected to initial freeze-thaw cycles to devitalize, but retain, endogenous cells and extracellular vesicles contained therein.

title: AUGMENTED REALITY-ENHANCED BEAUTY MIRROR
abstract: An augmented reality-enhanced beauty mirror includes an enclosure having at least one mirrored surface, a processor, a display system operatively coupled to the processor, and a memory operatively coupled to the processor. The memory stores processor-readable instructions that, when executed by the processor, cause the processor to cause display, via the display system and at a first time, of an overlay such that the overlay is visible to a user concurrently with the user viewing a reflection of the user in the mirrored surface. At a second time subsequent to the first time, and in response to detecting a movement of the user, a position of the displayed overlay is modified.

title: TRANSFORMER-BASED NEURAL NETWORK IMAGE UPSCALING
abstract: Apparatuses, systems, and techniques to implement transformer-based neural network image upscaling are disclosed. In at least one embodiment, one or more neural networks may implement a transformer-based neural network to generate high resolution image data based, at least in part, on one or more mis-aligned self-attention windows to be applied to one or more lower resolution versions of the higher resolution image data.

title: CLOTHES TREATMENT APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING SAME
abstract: A clothes treatment apparatus according to an embodiment comprises: a housing; a tub provided inside the housing; a drum provided inside the tub and accommodating laundry; a hot air supply device including a heater for heating air, a fan for blowing the air heated by the heater into the tub, and a fan driving device for providing a driving force to the fan; a temperature sensor provided in the hot air supply device and sensing the temperature of the heated air; a discharge device including a discharge flow path for guiding the air discharged from the tub to the outside of the housing; and a control unit for driving the hot air supply device to perform a drying cycle, wherein the control unit may determine whether the discharge flow path is clogged on the basis of an average power consumption of the fan driving device and the amount of temperature change of the heated air over time.

title: CLOTHES PROCESSING APPARATUS
abstract: This clothes processing apparatus comprises a housing, a tub provided inside the housing, and a drying device provided above the tub, the drying device comprising a hot air supplier for supplying heated air into the tub and a discharge device comprising a duct configured to discharge air discharged from the tub to the outside of the housing. The drying device comprises: a base plate which covers lower portions of the hot air supplier and the discharge device and comprises a non-combustible material; and a side base which is coupled to the base plate to cover at least one side portion of the hot air supplier and the discharge device and comprises a material different from the material of the base plate. The base plate comprises a base portion provided at a height lower than a lower end of the side base.

title: CLOTHING TREATMENT DEVICE
abstract: This clothing treatment device comprises: a housing; a tub disposed inside the housing; a dryer device including a hot air supply device disposed on top of the tub and for supplying heated air into the tub, and a discharge device for discharging air discharged from the tub to the outside; and a coupling assembly detachably coupled to the discharge device, wherein the dryer device includes a rear case forming a rear surface of the dryer device and including a recessed accommodation unit, and the coupling assembly includes a coupling unit to which an exhaust pipe for guiding air discharged from the discharge device can be coupled and which is disposed inside the accommodation unit.

title: WATER HEATER APPLIANCE FREEZE PREVENTION IN RECREATIONAL VEHICLES
abstract: A water heater appliance includes a cabinet, and a heat exchanger positioned within the cabinet. A combustion chamber is positioned within the cabinet. The combustion chamber includes a burner assembly. The combustion chamber is in thermal communication with the heat exchanger. The water heater appliance also includes an inlet and an outlet coupled to the cabinet, and a freeze prevention circuit. The freeze prevention circuit is configured to detect a specified temperature within the water heater appliance and activate one of a heater and the heat exchanger of the water heater appliance in response to the detection of the specified temperature.

title: VOICE RECOGNITION MODULE AND DISHWASHER INCLUDING SAME
abstract: A dishwasher according to an embodiment of the present disclosure may comprise: a case; a tub disposed inside the case and forming a washing chamber; a door rotatably coupled to the case; and a voice recognition module disposed at the door or adjacent to the door and allowing a user voice input. A voice hole of the voice recognition module may be configured to be inclined forward at a designated angle with respect to the lower surface of the door or the case. In an open state and a closed state of the door, the voice hole of the voice recognition module may be configured such that a designated angle formed by the voice hole is maintained constant.

title: DISHWASHER INCLUDING RAIL ASSEMBLY
abstract: A dishwasher according to an embodiment disclosed herein may comprise: a case; a tub provided inside the case and including a washing chamber; a basket which is arranged movably inside the tub and accommodates dishes, the basket comprising a plurality of wires arranged in a grid pattern; and a rail assembly disposed on a side surface of the tub and configured to support the movement of the basket. The rail assembly may include: a fixed rail coupled to the side surface of the tub; a first guide member coupled to the inside of the fixed rail and including a plurality of first ball bearings; a first moving rail that can slide relative to the fixed rail via the plurality of first ball bearings; a second guide member coupled to the inside of the first moving rail and including a plurality of second ball bearings; and a rail bracket coupled to the second moving rail and partially covering the plurality of second ball bearings.

title: DISHWASHER AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: A dishwasher according to one embodiment of the present disclosure may comprise: a main body forming a washing chamber; a sump body disposed at the lower side of the washing chamber so as to accommodate washing water; a spray unit disposed to spray the washing water into the washing chamber; a drain pump for draining the washing water accommodated in the sump body; a circulation pump for transferring, to the spray unit, the washing water accommodated in the sump body; a turbidity sensor disposed in the sump body; at least one processor including a processing circuit; and a memory including one or more storage media for storing instructions. At least one operation can include: a water supply operation of supplying the water until at least a part of the bottom surface of the washing chamber is submerged; a first drain operation of draining a part of the washing water within the sump body by using the drain pump; a spray operation of spraying the washing water into the washing chamber for a set time by using the circulation pump; and a second drain operation of additionally draining the washing water by using the drain pump.

title: DISH WASHER AND WASH WATER FILTER MODULE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a dishwasher and a wash water filter module that secure a wide filtering area and thus provide a higher filtering force by forming a filtering mesh constituting the wash water filter module to have a cross-section in a wave shape having a plurality of valleys and ridges, and effectively detach food residues adhered to a filtering surface by a suction force during a drainage cycle as a suction force component acting on the food residues in a vertical direction of the filtering surface is increased by forming the filtering mesh to include a truncated cone shape with an expanding inclined angle that allows an inner diameter and an outer diameter of a horizontal cross-section to gradually increase downward.

title: Kapseln für die Spülmaschine fürs Waschen und Spülen von Obst und Gemüsen, sowie Beeren, Pilzen, Salaten und Kräutern
abstract: Die Erfindung betrifft eine wasserlösliche Kapsel zur Reinigung frischer Lebensmittel in haushaltsüblichen Spülmaschinen. Die Kapsel besteht aus einer biologisch abbaubaren Folie und enthält eine Wirkstoffkombination aus Natriumcarbonat, Essigsäure und Natriumchlorid. Diese Stoffe ermöglichen die Entfernung von Pestizidrückständen, Krankheitserregern und Oberflächenverunreinigungen durch chemische und mechanische Prozesse. Bei Kontakt mit Wasser kommt es zu einer Reaktion unter Freisetzung von Kohlendioxid, wodurch die Reinigungswirkung durch Mikroblasen zusätzlich unterstützt wird. Die Erfindung ermöglicht eine hygienische und umweltschonende Reinigung frischer Lebensmittel ohne Einsatz aggressiver Chemikalien.

title: WASHING APPARATUS HAVING ENERGY SAVING MODE AND WASHING METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A washing apparatus is disclosed. The apparatus comprises: memory for storing information about washing options set for each of a plurality of washing courses; at least one processor; and at least one sensor. When a user command for executing one washing course among the plurality of washing courses is received in an energy saving mode, the at least one processor may: identify the turbidity of washing water; reduce a washing temperature set for the washing course on the basis of the turbidity; and change the remaining options in order to compensate for the washing performance at the reduced washing temperature. Accordingly, energy can be saved while maintaining the characteristics of the selected course.

title: NANO SUBSTRATE INCLUDING NOVEL METAL OXIDE AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING SAME
abstract: The present invention relates to a substrate for biomolecule detection in which metal oxide nanowires are formed on a substrate based on metal oxide nanoparticles and a polymer composition.

title: WATER HEATER APPLIANCE INLET TEMPERATURE INDICATION IN RECREATIONAL VEHICLES
abstract: [0000] A water heater appliance includes a cabinet, and a heat exchanger positioned within the cabinet. The water heater appliance also includes an inlet coupled to the cabinet. The inlet is fluidly coupled to an inlet tube. The inlet tube includes an inlet temperature sensor. A controller is positioned within the cabinet. The controller is in signal communication with the inlet temperature sensor. The water heater appliance also includes a control panel in signal communication with the controller. The control panel includes a display. A method of operating the water heater appliance includes the controller receiving a set-point temperature from the control panel, determining an inlet temperature via the inlet temperature sensor, and indicating the inlet temperature on the display of the control panel via an inlet temperature indicator.

title: WASHING APPARATUS AND BUBBLE GENERATION DEVICE THEREOF, STERILIZATION AND DEODORIZATION METHOD AND DEVICE, AND STORAGE MEDIUM
abstract: A washing apparatus and a bubble generation device thereof, a sterilization and deodorization method and device, and a storage medium. The bubble generation device comprises: a gas dissolving chamber (10), a special gas generation module (20), and a bubble generator (30). The gas dissolving chamber (10) is provided with a liquid inlet (11), a liquid outlet (12), and a first gas inlet (13). The special gas generation module (20) is used for providing a gas medium, and is connected to the first gas inlet (13). The bubble generator (30) is connected to the liquid outlet (12).

title: GASKET PART SELECTION VIA IMAGE PROCESSING
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatuses for performing image processing. One apparatus includes at least one electronic processor and at least one memory storing instructions executable by the at least one electronic processor. The at least one electronic processor is configured, through execution of the instructions, to receive a cross-section image of a gasket, the gasket having one or more defects, generate one or more modified representations of the gasket represented in the cross-section image, the one or more modified representations of the gasket representing the gasket without the one or more defects, and identify, based on the one or more modified representations of the gasket, a replacement gasket.

title: CLOTHES TREATMENT APPARATUS
abstract: This clothes treatment apparatus comprises: a housing; a tub provided inside the housing; a discharge device provided at the upper side of the tub, and having a discharge port for discharging, to the outside of the housing, air discharged from the tub; a discharge filter mounted inside the discharge device; and a humidity sensor which measures the humidity of air having passed through the discharge filter, and which is inclined with respect to the direction in which the air having passed through the discharge filter flows toward the discharge port. The humidity sensor includes: a sensing unit for converting humidity information into an electronic signal; a sensor cover which accommodates the sensing unit and which has a cover hole; and a sensor housing which has an inflow hole and on which the sensor cover is mounted. The sensing unit measures the humidity of air that sequentially passes through the inflow hole of the sensor housing and the cover hole of the sensor cover.

title: WATER HEATER APPLIANCE FREEZE PREVENTION IN RECREATIONAL VEHICLES
abstract: A water heater appliance includes a freeze prevention circuit. A method of operating the water heater appliance includes monitoring an inlet temperature via an inlet temperature sensor and an outlet temperature via an outlet temperature sensor, detecting one of the inlet temperature and the outlet temperature below a first temperature threshold, activating a freeze prevention mode, providing a notification of the activation of the freeze prevention mode, and heating, via one or both of an inlet heater and an outlet heater, a respective one or both of an inlet tube and/or an outlet tube. The method also includes detecting one of the inlet temperature and the outlet temperature above a second temperature threshold and deactivating the freeze prevention mode.

title: DIVERTER ASSEMBLY FOR A WASHING MACHINE APPLIANCE
abstract: A washing machine appliance includes a wash tub positioned within a cabinet and defining a wash chamber, a wash basket rotatably mounted within the wash tub for receiving a load of clothes, a dispensing assembly mounted within the cabinet for selectively adding wash fluid into the wash tub, the dispensing assembly defining a plurality of dispenser inlets, and a diverter assembly for selectively directing the wash fluid through one or more of the plurality of dispenser inlets. The diverter assembly includes a diverter manifold defining a diverter inlet and a plurality of diverter outlets, a diverter disk mounted to the diverter manifold, the diverter disk being rotatable to selectively couple the diverter inlet to one or more of the plurality of diverter outlets, and a hydraulically actuated indexing mechanism mechanically coupled to the diverter disk for selectively rotating the diverter disk.

title: BUBBLE GENERATION APPARATUS AND WASHING DEVICE
abstract: The present application discloses a bubble generation apparatus and a washing device. The bubble generation apparatus comprises: a bubble generation module, a gas dissolving space being formed in the bubble generation module, the bubble generation module being provided with a gas inlet, a liquid inlet, and a liquid outlet which are separately communicated with the gas dissolving space, and a liquid entering from the liquid inlet and gas entering from the gas inlet being subjected to gas dissolution in the gas dissolving space and then the resulting gas-dissolved liquid flowing to the liquid outlet; and a breather module, an exhaust space being formed in the breather module, and the exhaust space being provided with an exhaust inlet and an exhaust outlet.

title: BUBBLE GENERATION DEVICE AND WASHING APPARATUS
abstract: Disclosed in the present application are a bubble generation device and a washing apparatus. The bubble generation device comprises a bubble generation module, wherein the bubble generation module is provided with a liquid inlet, a gas inlet and a liquid outlet which are in communication with a gas dissolution space; liquid entering through the liquid inlet passes through a liquid intake channel, is mixed, in the gas dissolution space, with gas entering through the gas inlet and then flows toward the liquid outlet; the liquid inlet and the liquid outlet are both located at the bottom of the gas dissolution space; and the liquid intake channel is configured to extend upward relative to the liquid inlet to communicate with the gas dissolution space.

title: Drink Maker with Clog-Resistant Dispenser
abstract: A drink maker is provided with a clog-resistant dispenser. The drink maker includes a mixing vessel, a spout, a grate, and a dispenser assembly. The mixing vessel is configured to contain a drink product. The spout includes an opening in the mixing vessel. The grate is configured to at least partly cover the spout. The dispenser assembly includes a seal and a plurality of protruding members. The seal is configured to close a flow from the spout in a closed position and open the flow from the spout in an open position. The plurality of protruding members extend from the seal and at least partially extend into the spout through the grate when the seal is in a closed position.

title: LID ASSEMBLY SYSTEM FOR COMPOSTER
abstract: Various embodiments are described herein for an apparatus for producing compost. The apparatus or composter assembly may include a dual lid system. The dual lid system can include a first lid configured to allow waste to enter a crushing assembly before being transferred to a composting assembly; a second lid configured to allow waste to bypass the crushing assembly and enter the composting assembly directly; and a control unit configured to receive input from a user or an algorithm to determine which of the first or second lids should be opened based on the type of waste being processed.

title: WASHING MACHINE AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF
abstract: The present invention relates to a washing machine and a control method thereof. The washing machine of the present invention: recognizes a first weight of laundry accommodated in a drum and a material of the laundry, on the basis of a current detected by a current detection unit when a motor rotates before a washing cycle; recognizes a first correction value and a second correction value corresponding to the first weight and the material of the laundry; recognizes a second weight of the laundry on the basis of a current detected by the current detection unit when the motor rotates after a drainage cycle; corrects the second weight on the basis of the recognized first correction value; recognizes a third weight of the laundry on the basis of a current detected by the current detection unit when the motor rotates after a dehydration cycle; corrects the third weight on the basis of the recognized second correction value; recognizes a final weight of the laundry on the basis of the first weight and at least one of the corrected second weight and the corrected third weight; and outputs information on the recognized final weight of the laundry through an output interface.

title: REFRIGERATOR, AUTOMATIC REFRIGERATOR DOOR OPENING SYSTEM, AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: A refrigerator according to an embodiment may comprise: a main body; a plurality of doors rotatably coupled to the main body; at least one door opening device for independently opening each of the plurality of doors; a sensor that is provided on one door among the plurality of doors and senses a user or a user input; and a processor that generates a processed signal by processing an output signal obtained from the sensor, generates a trigger signal on the basis of the intensity of the processed signal being equal to or greater than a preset threshold, determines to open at least two doors including the one door among the plurality of doors on the basis of a generation pattern of the trigger signal of a reference duration, and controls the at least one door opening device to open the at least two doors on the basis of determining to open the at least two doors.

title: AI-POWERED COLLABORATIVE PLATFORM FOR GENERATION OF DESIGN PLANS
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus for generating and modifying architectural design plans using user commands, sketches, or drawings. The system incorporates an AI engine and a GAN engine to optimize design layouts based on user inputs, design considerations, and client-specific requirements. The system can automatically analyze design elements such as rooms, airflow paths, structural components, and spatial configurations to suggest improvements or flag inconsistencies. The system incorporates context-aware capabilities to evaluate how user-intended changes influence the overall design and its surrounding environment. Users can interact through various devices, providing input through gestures, text, or voice, while the system offers real-time feedback on conflicts, improvements, and compliance issues. Collaborative features enable multiple stakeholders to contribute, and the system provides a detailed, compliant design that adapts to design considerations including geographical, environmental, and technological requirements while maintaining high design integrity and flexibility throughout the process.

title: DISHWASHER AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A dishwasher according to an embodiment of the present disclosure may comprise: a main body including a washing chamber; a turbidity sensor for detecting turbidity in a washing cycle or a rinsing cycle; and a processor electrically connected to the turbidity sensor. The processor may be configured to: acquire two or more turbidity values from the turbidity sensor during the washing cycle or the rinsing cycle; input the acquired turbidity values into a rinsing prediction model so as to estimate a turbidity value in a subsequent rinsing cycle; and compare the estimated turbidity value with a preset turbidity value so as to determine whether to additionally perform a rinsing cycle after the subsequent rinsing cycle.

title: DISHWASHER
abstract: This dishwasher comprises: a tub forming a washing chamber; an inflow duct provided such that air discharged from the washing chamber flows therethrough; a heat transfer device for drying the air flowing through the inflow duct; a discharge duct provided such that the air flowing in the heat transfer device flows therethrough; a connecting duct which connects the inflow duct and the discharge duct and accommodates the heat transfer device, and of which the bottom collects condensate water; and a self-priming pump which is disposed to be higher than the bottom of the connecting duct, and which pumps the condensate water in the connecting duct.

title: CLOTHING TREATMENT APPARATUS
abstract: Provided is a clothing treatment apparatus. The clothing treatment apparatus comprises: a tub; a drying device which is provided above the tub, removes humidity from air discharged from the tub, and supplies dry air to the tub; and a filter assembly which can be detachably mounted on the drying device, wherein the filter assembly comprises: a filter case; a filter detachably provided in the filter case; and a cleaning member which is provided in the filter case so as to remove foreign substances from the filter while the filter is separated from the filter case, the cleaning member comprising a first cleaning portion provided to clean lint in a first region of the filter, and a second cleaning portion provided to clean lint in the first region of the filter and a second region located on at least one side of the first region.

title: CLOTHES TREATMENT APPARATUS
abstract: This clothes treatment apparatus includes a tub and a drying device. The drying device comprises: a drying base including a water collection part; a heat exchanger accommodated in the drying base; a filter disposed on a first side of the heat exchanger; a supply fan which is disposed on a second side opposite to the first side of the heat exchanger, and which is for blowing, to the tub, air heat-exchanged by means of the heat exchanger; and a fan duct which accommodates the supply fan, and which includes a duct drain part allowing, on the basis of the occurrence of overflow of water from the water collection part, the water flowing, due to the overflow, from the water collection part into the fan duct to flow into the tub.

title: DETECTION APPARATUS AND AUTONOMOUS MOBILE DEVICE
abstract: A detection apparatus and an autonomous mobile device. The detection apparatus comprises: a laser assembly, used for emitting at least one beam of first-type line laser toward a first region, and emitting at least one beam of second-type line laser toward a second region, wherein the energy of the first-type line laser is greater than that of the second-type line laser; and a collection assembly, used for collecting first-type information, corresponding to the first-type line laser, of the first region, and collecting second-type information, corresponding to the second-type line laser, of the second region.

title: EVALUATING CONVERSATIONAL AGENT RESPONSE QUALITY USING QUERY SENTIMENT
abstract: [0000] Determination of implicit feedback from users with regard to query responses, and updating AI-based model, conversational agent (CA), or content retrieval process based on such feedback can be performed. In response to query from user, CA, employing the model, can provide query response to user. In response to query response, CA can receive, from user, a message that can be another query or a statement. Interaction manager (IM) can determine respective similarity scores between message and previous query-query response pair to determine QCS based on respective similarity scores. IM can determine average aspect based sentiment score (SS) of message based on analysis of message, and determine CASS based on QCS and SS. IM can determine whether message represents positive or negative feedback with respect to query response based on CASS and threshold CASS(s). IM can update model, content retrieval process, or CA based on such feedback.

In response to query response, CA can receive, from user, a message that can be another query or a statement. Interaction manager (IM) can determine respective similarity scores between message and previous query-query response pair to determine QCS based on respective similarity scores. IM can determine average aspect based sentiment score (SS) of message based on analysis of message, and determine CASS based on QCS and SS. IM can determine whether message represents positive or negative feedback with respect to query response based on CASS and threshold CASS(s). IM can update model, content retrieval process, or CA based on such feedback.

title: SMART MULTIFUNCTION AIR PURIFICATION AND VENTILATION
abstract: An air purification and ventilation system. The system includes an outdoor air monitor configured to measure one or more properties of an outdoor environment. The system further includes an indoor air monitor configured to measure one or more properties of an indoor environment. The system further includes a means for ventilating fluidly coupled to at least one outdoor air intake channel communicatively coupled to the outdoor air monitor and the indoor air monitor, configured to ventilate outside air to the indoor environment. The system further includes one or more air purification modules fluidly coupled to at least one indoor air intake channel communicatively coupled to the outdoor air monitor and the indoor air monitor, configured to purify air. The system further includes a plurality of motorized dampers communicatively coupled to the outdoor air monitor and the indoor air monitor, configured to move in position to direct airflow through the system.

title: Centralized Home Monitoring System

title: REMOTE CONTROL DEVICE AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A remote control device according to an embodiment of the present disclosure may comprise: an input unit including one or more buttons configured to receive a user input; a processor configured to generate a control signal of an external device; a power supply unit configured to supply power to the processor; an energy harvester capable of generating power; and a switch configured to electrically connect or disconnect the power supply unit and the processor. The energy harvester may be configured to generate power in response to the user input and to supply the generated power to the switch.

abstract: The present disclosure relates to an electronic device provided in a vehicle and a control method thereof, and, more particularly, to an electronic device for providing recommended content on the basis of context information and user interaction, and a control method thereof.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR TRAINING GROUP CLASSIFICATION MODEL FOR CONTENT RECOMMENDATION AND RECOMMENDING CONTENT BY USING TRAINED MODEL IN CONTENT STREAMING SYSTEM
abstract: The present invention relates to a method and device for recommending content in a content streaming system. The method for recommending content in a content streaming system may comprise the steps of: acquiring information about recently viewed contents by a first user, wherein the information about recently viewed contents includes information about N contents recently viewed by the first user, and N is a natural number; acquiring a first embedding vector corresponding to the information about recently viewed contents by using the information about recently viewed contents and a vectorization model; acquiring a first group number corresponding to the first embedding vector by inputting the first embedding vector to a group classification model; determining, in a preset band list, a first recommendation band corresponding to the first group number, wherein the band includes a plurality of contents of which at least one of genres, production companies, countries, directors, actors, viewing ages, or channels is the same; and determining a first re-ranked recommendation band by reranking, on the basis of the information about contents recently viewed by the first user, a recommendation order of contents included in the first recommendation band, wherein the first re-ranked recommendation band is included in a final recommendation band list for the first user.

title: FAN-SHAPED SUPPORT PLATFORM
abstract: A fan-shaped support platform, comprising a support portion (1), which comprises a plurality of stacked support plates (11), the support plates being rotatably connected together at one end; among two adjacent support plates, the lower support plate is provided with a first limiting member, and the upper support plate is provided with a second limiting member; in an expanded state, when the upper support plate rotates to one side to reach a predetermined included angle, the upper support plate drives the second limiting member to come into contact with the first limiting member, causing the lower support plate to rotate to the same side. The fan-shaped support platform further comprises a first mounting base (2) and a second mounting base (3), which are respectively mounted on the body of an object to be installed on and an opening and closing door of said object, so as to synchronously expand the support portion when the opening and closing door of said object is opened. In the fan-shaped support platform, by means of the cooperation between the first limiting member and the second limiting member, the rotation of the upper support plate automatically drives the lower support plate to rotate, eliminating the need to provide an additional component, and thereby greatly reducing assembly costs.

title: METHOD FOR CONTROLLING INTELLIGENT TERMINAL AND RELATED APPARATUS
abstract: The present application provides a method for controlling an intelligent terminal and a related apparatus, which can improve the flexibility and convenience of controlling an intelligent terminal, and reduce the learning cost for a user to learn and utilize functions of the intelligent terminal. The method is applicable to a first intelligent terminal, and comprises: the first intelligent terminal receives a target control operation; the first intelligent terminal determines, on the basis of the target control operation and a natural language intent text set, a target intent corresponding to the target control operation, the natural language intent text set being determined by the first intelligent terminal on the basis of capability description information of a second intelligent terminal; the first intelligent terminal generates a target instruction on the basis of the target intent; and the first intelligent terminal sends the target instruction to the second intelligent terminal, so as to control the second intelligent terminal to perform an operation corresponding to the target instruction.

title: AIR CONDITIONER AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: An air conditioner according to one embodiment of the present disclosure can: periodically acquire cycle data including at least one from among operating time of a heating mode, outdoor temperature, outdoor humidity, evaporation temperature, and condensation temperature by using at least one sensor; periodically predict the surface blocking rate of an outdoor heat exchanger on the basis of the periodically acquired cycle data by using a frost index determination model; and determine, on the basis of the periodically predicted surface blocking rate of the outdoor heat exchanger, whether to enter a defrosting mode.

title: DISPLAY DEVICE
abstract: A display device is provided. The display device includes: a display panel, where the display panel includes: a bendable area including at least a display area of the display panel; a bonding area including a part of a non-display area of the display panel; and a folding area located between the bendable area and the bonding area; and a supporting film, where the supporting film is adhered to a back surface of the display panel, the supporting film includes a first film portion and a second film portion, an orthographic projection of the first film portion on the display panel overlaps with the bendable area, and an orthographic projection of the second film portion on the display panel overlaps with the bonding area, where a material of the first film portion is different from a material of the second film portion.

title: COATING LAYER INCLUDING BIO-BASED RESIN AND HOME APPLIANCE INCLUDING THE SAME
abstract: A refrigerator may include a main body, a door connected to the main body and configured to open and close to respectively open and close the main body, and a storage compartment disposed in the main body to store food. wherein an exterior material of the main body may include: a frame including a metal material, a primer layer disposed on the frame, a base layer disposed on the primer layer and including a first bio-based resin, a clear layer disposed on the base layer and including a second bio-based resin, and the base layer and/or the clear layer may contain biomass and an inorganic additive.

title: ENCODER POSITION DETECTION USING LED DRIVER FAULT DETECTION
abstract: [0000] A laundry appliance and corresponding method are provided. The laundry appliance includes a cabinet including a controller operably coupled to a user interface panel via other features, and communicatively coupled to an operational component. The controller is configured to receive a user input for selecting an operational cycle for operating the operational component. The resulting position of an input selector with a position encoder as set by user input is encoded as a grey code position using open and short fault detection of an LED matrix driver associated with the controller. An associated microcontroller requests the matrix driver to check for opens and shorts. Voltages on specific pins are read by the matrix driver to detect an open or short condition. The combinations of open and short conditions on designated pins determines the corresponding position of the user input to the associated controller.

title: WASHING MACINE AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A washing machine is disclosed. One or more processors, when instructions are individually or collectively executed, cause a washing machine to: in a normal mode, perform washing by performing a first number of times of stirring cycles during a first washing section, and performing a laundry untangling cycle during a second washing section; and in an energy saving mode, perform washing by performing a second number of times of stirring cycles during the first washing section, in which the second number of times is different from the first number of times, and performing a soaking cycle during at least a part of the second washing section.

title: DIVERTER ASSEMBLY FOR A WASHING MACHINE APPLIANCE
abstract: A washing machine appliance includes a wash tub positioned within a cabinet and defining a wash chamber, a wash basket rotatably mounted within the wash tub for receiving a load of clothes, a dispensing assembly mounted within the cabinet for selectively adding wash fluid into the wash tub, the dispensing assembly defining a plurality of dispenser inlets, and a diverter assembly for selectively directing the wash fluid through one or more of the plurality of dispenser inlets. The diverter assembly includes a diverter inlet, a diverter disk mounted adjacent the diverter inlet and defining a plurality of flow tubes, the diverter disk being rotatable to aligning one of the plurality of flow tubes with the diverter inlet and couple the diverter inlet to one of the plurality of dispenser inlets, and a drive motor mechanically coupled to the diverter disk for selectively rotating the diverter disk.

title: WASHING MACHINE AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING SAME
abstract: The washing machine comprises: a memory for storing instructions; at least one processor including processing circuitry; a driving unit including a motor for driving the washing machine; a water supply unit including a pipe for supplying water to the washing machine; a drainage unit including a pipe for discharging water from the washing machine; and a sensor unit including at least one sensor, wherein the at least one processor individually or collectively executes the instructions such that the washing machine performs a water supply operation upon receiving a command for washing, acquires acceleration data and water level data through the sensor unit, acquires a first acceleration through the sensor unit if a preset event related to the motor occurs, acquires a second acceleration if the current water level of the washing machine exceeds a threshold water level, performs a first drainage operation if the second acceleration exceeds a threshold acceleration, acquires a third acceleration if a washing operation starts after the first drainage operation, and performs a second drainage operation on the basis of the difference between the first acceleration and the third acceleration.

title: SYSTEMS AND COMPUTING DEVICES HAVING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AI) AGENTS TRAINED VIA USER INTERFACES AND CONFIGURED TO MANAGE COMPUTING DEVICE PROCESSES AND RELATED METHODS
abstract: [0000] Systems and computing devices having Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents trained via a user interface and configured to manage computing device processes and related methods are disclosed. According to an aspect, a computing device includes an AI manager configured to train an AI agent for implementing actions in a process. The AI manager is also configured to determine perception of one or more objects or data within an environment. Further, the AI manager determines a confidence metric for a first action for interacting with the objects or data within the environment based on a data model associated with the process, and/or for implementing a second action based on the data model associated with the process. The AI manager presents the confidence indicator or confidence metric for implementing the first action and/or the second action, and trains the artificial intelligence agent to implement the first action and/or the second action.

title: HANDLING OF VOICE OR EMERGENCY SERVICES IN NEW GENERATION NETWORK
abstract: In an aspect of the disclosure, a method, a computer-readable medium, and an apparatus are provided. The apparatus may be a user equipment (UE). The UE receives a network feature support information element from a core network during a procedure. The network feature support information element indicates whether an emergency services fallback to an older generation network is supported for one or more combinations of radio access technology (RAT) and core network. The UE determines whether the emergency services fallback is supported for a current combination of RAT and core network serving the UE based on the network feature support information element. The UE initiates a procedure and transmits a request message to the network for requesting emergency services when emergency services are requested and the emergency services fallback is supported for the current combination.

title: STATION FOR CLEANING ROBOT AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A station to which a cleaning robot is docked disclosed herein, comprises: a cleaning chamber for cleaning a pad provided on the cleaning robot; a gray water chamber for storing water introduced from the cleaning chamber; a first pump for transferring water from the cleaning chamber to the gray water chamber; a second pump which is connected to the gray water chamber and a drain pipe and pumps water in the gray water chamber to discharge the water through the drain pipe; a no-load sensor for detecting a no-load state of the second pump; and a control unit which recognizes whether the state of the second pump is the no-load state on the basis of detection information detected by the no-load sensor during the operation of the first pump and the second pump, and controls to stop the first pump on the basis of the state of the second pump being the no-load state.

title: CONSTRAINING NEURAL NETWORK PARAMETER, ACTIVATION, AND GRADIENT DYNAMIC RANGE
abstract: Layer normalization within a neural network is replaced with scaling operations for stable optimization and reduced training time at a lower computational cost. The dynamic range of at least one of neural network parameters, activations, and/or gradients are constrained to a predetermined range to improve quantization and training stability without requiring calibration.

title: Vegetal Concrete Masonry Unit and Method and System for Manufacture Thereof
abstract: A vegetal concrete masonry unit and method and system for manufacturing thereof are disclosed. The masonry unit comprises treated crop residues (e.g., paddy straw, wheat straw, bagasse), a binder of hydrated lime, ground granulated blast furnace slag (GGBFS), and low-content alkali activator (2.5-20% by mass), and aggregates in a mass ratio of 1:0.1:1.5 to 1:5:5, achieving compressive strengths of 2-20 MPa and densities of 950-1900 kg/m3. The method involves alkali-treating residues at 0.1-10M NaOH for 15-1500 minutes, passing through a screw press, mixing with binder and aggregates to form C-A-S-H and N-A-S-H gels, and high-pressure molding (2-10 MPa). The system includes silos, a retention tank/screw press, pan mixer, and hydraulic press. This sustainable bio-composite utilizes agricultural/industrial wastes, reduces emissions by 80%, is energy efficient, enhances compatibility and mechanical performance, and provides thermal insulation for eco-friendly building blocks and panels.

title: CLEANER
abstract: This cleaner comprises: a housing; a pad rotating device which is provided to rotate a cleaning pad, and is movable to a first position and a second position that is farther from the center of the housing than a distance from the center of the housing at the first position; and a pad moving device for moving the position of the cleaning pad, wherein the pad moving device comprises: a movement driving source; a transmission lever which is rotatable in a first direction by receiving power from the movement driving source; a guide lever which is coupled to the pad rotating device and is rotatable in a second direction opposite to the first direction on the basis of rotation of the transmission lever; and an elastic body provided to elastically support the guide lever. The transmission lever comprises a first coupling portion which is coupled to a first end of the elastic body and moves in conjunction with the rotation of the transmission lever, and the guide lever comprises a second coupling portion which is coupled to a second end of the elastic body and is moved by the elastic force of the elastic body.

title: STATION AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: A station, according to one aspect of the disclosed invention, in which a cleaner including a mop cloth is docked may comprise: a water supply container for storing water supplied to a cleaner; a sewage container for storing sewage generated when a mop cloth is washed; a first sensor for detecting the water level of the water supply container; a second sensor for detecting the water level of the sewage tank; a connection terminal which is detachably provided at the station, and which outputs a predetermined signal when a water supply and drain device for supplying the water from a water supply source to the water supply container, and discharging the water of the sewage container to the outside is coupled to the station; a power device for supplying power to the water supply and drain device through the connection terminal; and a control unit for determining whether the station and the water supply and drain device are coupled, on the basis of a first output of the first sensor, a second output of the second sensor and whether the predetermined signal is output, and controlling the power device so as to supply power to the water supply and drain device when it is determined that the station and the water supply and drain device are coupled.

title: MIXING APPLIANCE INDEXING ASSEMBLY
abstract: A mixing appliance includes a base and a drive assembly. The drive assembly includes a motor and a drive shaft. The motor is configured to rotate the drive shaft. Furthermore, the mixing appliance includes an indexing assembly. The indexing assembly includes a gearset. The gearset includes a first gear and a second gear. The first gear is rotatable by the drive assembly. The second gear is configured to be intermittently engaged by the first gear during rotation of the first gear. Additionally, the second gear is rotatable by the first gear during intermittent engagement of the second gear by the first gear. Furthermore, the indexing assembly includes a rotatable member. The rotatable member is rotatable by the second gear. Moreover, the rotatable member is configured to manipulate food content.

title: CLEANER
abstract: This cleaner comprises: a housing including a suction port; a brush holder provided to be elastically deformed; a side brush disposed on the brush holder and provided to rotate so as to guide, toward the suction port, foreign substances on a surface being cleaned; a rotatable frame which is coupled to the side brush and rotates to rotate the side brush; a driving device which is disposed in the housing and provided to rotate the rotatable frame; and a movable frame which can be rotatably coupled to the rotatable frame, wherein, in the brush holder, the side brush, the rotatable frame, the driving device, and the movable frame, when the movable frame is coupled to the rotatable frame and the rotatable frame is rotated by the driving device, the movable frame moves vertically and pushes the brush holder to elastically deform the brush holder in order to lift the side brush, and thus, the side brush can be spaced apart from the surface being cleaned.

title: CLEANING ASSEMBLY, FLOOR BRUSH ASSEMBLY, BASE STATION AND CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: The present application relates to a cleaning assembly, a floor brush assembly, a base station and a cleaning apparatus. The cleaning assembly is configured to clean a roller brush, and the cleaning assembly comprises: a scrubbing member, which comprises a scrubbing plate, the scrubbing plate being provided with protrusions, and the protrusions being arranged on the side of the scrubbing plate facing the roller brush and extending into the roller brush; and a driving component, which is configured to drive the scrubbing member to reciprocatingly move in the axial direction of the roller brush. The scrubbing member can reciprocatingly scrub the roller brush in the axial direction thereof, so as to simulate a hand-scrubbing action. Moreover, in conjunction with the rotation of the roller brush, the scrubbing member can perform all-around cleaning on the roller brush without dead zones; and the protrusions extend into the roller brush and operate in tandem with the reciprocating motion of the scrubbing plate, such that bristles of the roller brush can be separated, allowing the scrubbing member to more deeply clean dirt trapped within the bristles, thereby improving the effect and efficiency of cleaning the roller brush.

title: METHODS FOR OPERATING A MIXING APPLIANCE
abstract: A method for operating a mixing appliance includes receiving data indicative of a first operational parameter associated with the drive assembly rotation of the mixing appliance. Additionally, the method includes determining the first operational parameter based on the received data. Furthermore, the method includes operating the motor to adjust a second operational parameter associated with the drive assembly rotation based on the determined first operational parameter. The first operational parameter is different from the second operational parameter.

title: BATTERY MEMBER AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING BATTERY MEMBER
abstract: The present invention provides a battery member in which adhesiveness between a metal layer and an adhesive layer laminated on the metal layer is improved, and in which adhesive force between the metal layer and the adhesive layer is enhanced. A battery member according to the present invention has a laminated structure in which at least a metal-containing first layer and a composition-containing second layer are laminated. The composition contains component (A): a modified propylene-based polymer that is modified by an unsaturated carboxylic acid anhydride, component (B): an unmodified propylene-based polymer, component (C): an olefin-based elastomer containing at least one of an ethylene-α-olefin random copolymer and a propylene-α-olefin random copolymer in which propylene unit content in all constituent units is greater than 50 mass% and no greater than 91 mass%, and component (D): an inorganic zinc compound.

title: ELECTROSTATIC CHARGE IMAGE DEVELOPING TONER SET, ELECTROSTATIC CHARGE IMAGE DEVELOPER SET, TONER CARTRIDGE SET, PROCESS CARTRIDGE, IMAGE FORMING APPARATUS, AND IMAGE FORMING METHOD
abstract: [0000] The electrostatic charge image developing toner set contains a fluorescent toner that contains a fluorescent colorant and has a brightness of 75 or more, and a non-fluorescent toner that contains no fluorescent colorant, in which an amount of Na<+> on a surface of the fluorescent toner, that is measured by an ion chromatography method, is 0.005 mg/L or more and 0.050 mg/L or less, and a difference between the amount of Na<+> on the surface of the fluorescent toner and an amount of Na<+> on a surface of the non-fluorescent toner, that are measured by the ion chromatography method, is 0.050 mg/L or more, where the amount of Na<+> is an amount of Na<+> detected by a method in which 0.5 g of the fluorescent toner or the non-fluorescent toner is weighed, and then added to 100 g of deionized water at 30° C.±1° C., the mixture is dispersed by ultrasonic waves for 30 minutes, and then filtered through a filter, and the filtrate is analyzed by the ion chromatography method.

title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND CONTROL METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: This electronic device for supplying charging power to a robot, comprises: a memory including one or more storage media storing instructions; a sensor unit including a power sensor for sensing internal power of the electronic device and a docking sensor for sensing whether the robot is docked; and at least one processor communicatively connected to the memory and the sensor unit, wherein the instructions, when executed individually or collectively by the at least one processor, cause the electronic device to: obtain a voltage value through the power sensor while operating in a normal mode for performing a charging function for the robot; and if the voltage value is less than a threshold voltage value, change the normal mode to a first sleep mode or a second sleep mode on the basis of docking data from the docking sensor, wherein the first sleep mode is a mode in which the charging function is not performed while power is not supplied to the sensor unit, and the second sleep mode is a mode in which the charging function is not performed while power is supplied to the sensor unit.

title: BASE STATION AND CLEANING SYSTEM
abstract: A base station, configured to dock with a cleaning device. The base station comprises a base station body, a charging module, and a power supply module. The charging module comprises an electrode assembly. The electrode assembly comprises a movable arm, an elastic member, and an electrode plate. The movable arm is movably connected to the base station body. The elastic member is configured to apply a force to the connected movable arm in a direction away from the base station body. The electrode plate comprises an elastic portion, and the elastic portion is configured to abut against a charging terminal of the cleaning device. The power supply module is disposed on the base station body, and is configured to supply power to the charging module.

title: ACTIVATED CARBON PRODUCTION FOR SELECTIVE CARBON DIOXIDE CAPTURE
abstract: A method of preparing activated carbon (AC) from seed shells of Balanites aegyptiaca comprising: comminuting the seed shells to form a powder having a particle size of about 50 mesh to about 300 mesh; admixing the powder with solid state potassium hydroxide (KOH) at a ratio by weight of KOH powder of about 1.5:1 to about 2.5:1; forming a slurry of the obtained mixture in water under stirring for a duration of from about 1 hour to about 5 hours; drying the obtained slurry and deagglomerating the residual solid fraction thereof; subjecting the deagglomerated solid fraction to carbonization by heating said fraction under an inert atmosphere; and, cooling and neutralizing the product of said carbonization.

title: STATION AND CLEANING DEVICE
abstract: Disclosed are a station for a robot cleaner having a wet mop and a cleaning device comprising same. The cleaning device comprises a robot cleaner comprising a detachable wet mop, and a station to which the robot cleaner can be docked, wherein the station comprises: a water supply container for storing water; a heating device for heating water supplied from the water supply container; a pump connected to the water supply container; and a solution container which is connected to the pump and stores liquid to be supplied to the water supply container. The pump can operate in a first mode for sucking in the liquid from the solution container and pumping the liquid to the water supply container, and a second mode for sucking in the water from the water supply container and pumping the water to the heating device.

title: ELECTRONIC FLOW-CONTROL ASSEMBLY AND SYSTEM
abstract: Devices, system and methods for flow regulating using an electronic flow-control assembly (EFCA) is provided. An EFCA includes a controller, a pump, a valve and a sensor. The valve is configured to receive a valve control signal from the controller and modulate a flow characteristic of a flow. The pump is configured to receive a pump control signal from the controller and modulate the flow characteristic of the flow. The sensor is configured to measure the flow characteristic of the flow and transmit a measurement signal associated with the measured flow characteristic to the controller. The controller is configured to receive an input reference signal, compare the measurement signal to the input reference signal, adjust the valve control signal and the pump control signal, and simultaneously send the adjusted valve control signal to the valve and the adjusted pump control signal to the pump.

title: STATION AND CLEANING DEVICE
abstract: This cleaning device comprises: a robot cleaner comprising a main body and a wet mop separably mountable on the lower portion of the main body; and a station provided so that the robot cleaner is mounted thereon. The station comprises: a base comprising a cleaner seating portion on which the robot cleaner is mounted, and a side wall portion upwardly extending from the cleaner seating portion; a wash chamber provided so as to correspond to the wet mop so as to wash the wet mop while the robot cleaner is mounted on the station; a drying device comprising a drying fan for blowing dry air to the wash chamber so as to dry the wet mop; and a blowing device comprising a blower fan provided so as to blow air. The side wall portion comprises an inner wall facing the robot cleaner when the robot cleaner is mounted on the station, and the blowing device is positioned higher than the inner wall so as to blow air to the inner wall, and is provided so as to blow air downward toward the base.
