title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE, METHOD, AND NON-TRANSITORY COMPUTER-READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM FOR DISCARDING IDENTIFICATION INFORMATION ABOUT EXTERNAL ELECTRONIC DEVICE
abstract: This electronic device may comprise a first communication circuit, a second communication circuit, a memory for storing instructions, and at least one processor including processing circuitry. The instructions, when executed individually or collectively by the at least one processor, may cause the electronic device to: receive a user input for releasing registration of an external electronic device; transmit, to the external electronic device, a request signal for discarding first identification information on the basis of receiving the user input; discard second identification information on the basis of identifying that a response signal, indicating that the first identification information has been discarded, is received from the external electronic device; report the second identification information to a second server device on the basis of identifying that the response signal, indicating that the first identification information has been discarded, is not received from the external electronic device; and discard the second identification information after reporting the second identification information.

title: HUB DEVICE, METHOD, AND NON-TRANSITORY COMPUTER-READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM FOR CONTROLLING ELECTRONIC DEVICE
abstract: This hub device may comprise a first communication circuit, a second communication circuit, a memory for storing instructions, and at least one processor including processing circuitry. The instructions, when executed individually or collectively by the at least one processor, may cause the hub device to: receive a broadcast signal from an end device; determine whether at least one condition associated with at least one of the hub device, the end device, or an external hub device is satisfied; transmit, to the external hub device, information about the end device such that a device driver is installed, when the at least one condition is satisfied; request, from a server device, data about a virtual device driver for communicating with the device driver installed in the external hub device; install the virtual device driver on the basis of receiving the data; and communicate, by using the virtual device driver, with the device driver installed in the external hub device.

The instructions, when executed individually or collectively by the at least one processor, may cause the hub device to: receive a broadcast signal from an end device; determine whether at least one condition associated with at least one of the hub device, the end device, or an external hub device is satisfied; transmit, to the external hub device, information about the end device such that a device driver is installed, when the at least one condition is satisfied; request, from a server device, data about a virtual device driver for communicating with the device driver installed in the external hub device; install the virtual device driver on the basis of receiving the data; and communicate, by using the virtual device driver, with the device driver installed in the external hub device.

title: BED HAVING FEATURES FOR DETERMINATION OF SLEEP APNEA SEVERITY
abstract: A device may include: a bed. A sensor may be configured to configured to: sense pressure applied to the bed; and transmit a pressure stream. A plurality of temperature sensors arranged across the bed can be configured to: sense temperature in a particular location of the bed; and transmit a datastream of the sensed temperature. A computing system comprising can be configured to: receive the pressure stream; receive each of the datastreams; identify an apnea event; generate a sequence of heart rate values for the user for cardiac activity; generate a sequence of skin temperature values for the user; determine a change in heart rate; determine a change in skin temperature within the second time window; determine a relationship between the change in heart rate and the change in skin temperature; and determine a severity score for the apnea event based on the relationship.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR USING WASTE HEAT GENERATED BY DIGITAL PROCESSING COMPONENTS
abstract: Provided are systems and methods for managing a processing load of a processing module and thermal energy produced by the processing load. In one example, a method includes identifying a hot water profile that contains usage information of hot water from a hot water tank that serves as a heat sink for the thermal energy. A determination may be made as to whether it is economically desirable to increase or decrease the processing load based on factors such as an economic value generated by the processing load, a cost of energy needed to support the processing load, and an economic value of the thermal energy transferred to the hot water tank based on the hot water profile. The processing load may be dynamically modulated by a local or remote controller in response to the economic desirability of increasing or decreasing the processing load as well as other possible parameters.

title: ENERGY SAVING BY COLOR REPLACEMENT IN VIDEOS
abstract: [0001] Apparatuses and methods are described including techniques for processing color data of a video. Techniques include obtaining an input color segment containing colors of collocated video pixels. In a first color space, a set of color segments is searched to find segments that consume less power than that consumed by the input color segment. If such a set of color segments is found, to preserve energy, the input color segment is replaced with the closest color segment from that set. If such a set of color segments is not found, in a second color space, a color segment is determined that minimizes power consumption and the distance to the input color segment. Then, to preserve energy, the input color segment is replaced with the determined color segment providing that it consumes less power than that consumed by the input color segment.

title: Methods and devices for generating 3d images
abstract: A computer-implemented method for generating a 3D image based on a 2D image. The method comprises obtaining a 2D image (S402) from a collection of 2D images (S400); determining a value for a selection metric (S404) for the obtained 2D image, where the selection metric is indicative of suitability of the 2D image for generating a 3D image and the selection metric is at least in part based on a depth map for the 2D image; selecting the 2D image when the determined value indicates that the 2D image is suitable for generating a 3D image (S408); and generating a 3D image for the selected 2D image. Optionally, the method further comprises generating depth embeddings for the 2D image; where the depth embeddings are usable to generate a depth map comprising a depth value for each pixel in the 2D image; the selection metric comprises a depth cluster tightness metric and determining a value of this metric comprises using the depth embeddings to determine at least one of the depth cluster tightness metric, where the tightness metric evaluates similarity of depth values of pixels in each layer of the obtained image. [Fig. 4]

title: VIDEO CUT DETECTION IMPROVEMENTS USING WINDOWING
abstract: [0001] A method comprising obtaining (700) two consecutive pictures of a video sequence; computing (701) a first histogram of a first of the two consecutive pictures and a second histogram of a second of the two consecutive pictures; obtaining (702) a plurality of weighting curves, each weighting curve weighting a value of each bin of an histogram in function of a bin number; for each weighting curve of the plurality: applying (704) the weighting curve to the first and the second histograms to obtain weighted first and second histograms; summing (705) values of bins of the weighted first histogram to obtain a first sum and summing values of bins of the weighted second histogram to obtain a second sum; obtaining (706) a ratio of sums from the first sum and the second sum; and, calculating (707) an evidence value from the first sum, the second sum and the ratio; and, determining (708) that a scene cut occurs between the first and the second pictures based on at least one of the evidence values.

title: 一种液喷式咖啡装置
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型公开了一种液喷式咖啡装置，包括底座、罩体、过滤壳以及供液模组，罩体和底座连接以形成能够容置咖啡液的第一容腔，过滤壳设置于罩体内，过滤壳内具有能够容置咖啡豆的第二容腔，第二容腔位于第一容腔的上方，过滤壳上设置有多个分别连通第一容腔和第二容腔的第一滴液孔，供液模组设置于底座，供液模组的输入端位于第一容腔，供液模组的输出端延伸至第二容腔内或者第二容腔的上方，供液模组用于将第一容腔的咖啡液传输至第二容腔输出，本设计能够充分对咖啡豆利用，同时提升咖啡品质，保障咖啡风味。

title: 冷饮制备装置及方法
abstract: [0001] 本发明公开了一种冷饮制备装置及方法，涉及厨房设备技术领域，旨在解决传统冷饮制备等待时间长、制冷管路易因残液结冰堵塞的问题。该装置包括冷媒系统和出液系统，冷媒系统的蒸发器设有相邻设置的第一盘管和第二盘管，第一盘管与压缩机、冷凝单元形成冷媒循环回路；出液系统包括饮料发生器和气泵，饮料发生器与第二盘管进口连通，气泵出口与第二盘管进口连通。该方法通过冷媒循环制冷，使饮品流经第二盘管完成冷却，停液后通气吹扫管路残液。本发明无需预制冰块或冰水，可即时制取冷饮，同时有效防止管路结冰堵塞，运行稳定可靠。

title: 一种豆仓结构及饮品设备
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型公开了一种豆仓结构及饮品设备，底座和多个豆仓，所述底座固定设置于研磨装置上；所述豆仓底部开设有与所述研磨装置连通的下料口；多个豆仓相互独立且包括主豆仓和至少一个辅豆仓，所述辅豆仓与所述主豆仓通过配合部配接，所述主豆仓可拆卸地安装于所述底座上，且所述主豆仓具有容纳主物料的第一容腔，所述辅豆仓可拆卸地安装于所述底座上，且所述辅豆仓具有容纳辅物料的第二容腔，其中，所述第一容腔的容积大于所述第二容腔的容积。本实用新型能够盛放更多的主豆品，避免了主豆品频繁加豆。

title: 一种方便安装的打蛋器
abstract: 本实用新型属于打蛋器领域，具体涉及一种方便安装的打蛋器，包括外壳，所述外壳的上端固定安装有把手，所述把手的外侧固定连接有两个对称分布的固定罩，所述固定罩上设置有稳定机构，所述外壳的下端内部通过轴承安装有两个对称分布的驱动轴，所述驱动轴的内部滑动连接有六角轴，所述六角轴的下端固定连接有转轴，所述六角轴的上端固定连接有连接轴，所述驱动轴的内壁上部固定连接有方杆架。本实用新型通过在驱动轴的内部加设按钮、移动架和限位架等结构，可以通过弹簧的弹力推动移动架内部的限位架滑入到连接轴的环槽内部，便可完成对转轴的安装，在安装完成后按钮突出在驱动轴的外侧，从而便可直观的观察是否安装完成。

title: 自主清洁机器人及边刷
abstract: [0001] 本公开提供了一种自主清洁机器人和边刷。自主清洁机器人和边刷包括：驱动装置，配置为移动所述自主清洁机器人在待清洁表面上行进；马达；以及边刷，由所述马达驱动进行旋转来搅动待清洁表面上的碎屑，所述边刷包括：轮毂，配置为结合至所述马达的驱动轴；臂部，所述臂部的数量为两个，相对于所述轮毂，两个臂部位于所述轮毂的同一侧，且相对于所述轮毂向外延伸；以及刷毛束，每个臂部配置有一个刷毛束，其中，每个臂部包括第一段和第二段，第一段以轮毂为起点进行延伸，第二段以第一段为起点进行延伸，刷毛束附接至第二段，第一段和第二段迎着边刷的工作旋转方向进行弯折，并且在水平方向中，第一段的弯折角度与第二段的弯折角度不同。

title: 自移动式表面清洁机器人
abstract: [0001] 本公开提供一种自移动式表面清洁机器人，包括：主体；边刷组件；马达，用于使边刷组件绕旋转轴旋转；其中边刷组件包括：轮毂，配置为与自移动式表面清洁机器人的马达啮合；两个臂，每个臂从远离边刷组件旋转轴的方向向外延伸，每个臂相对于垂直于边刷组件的旋转轴线的平面成角度；所述两个臂配置为在所述轮毂的半圆侧间隔地倾斜布置，所述倾斜的方向与轮毂的单向旋转方向相反；每个臂包括从远离旋转轴的轮毂向外延伸的连接段和从远离旋转轴的连接段向外延伸的自由段，并且所述自由段的横截面面积大于所述连接段的横截面面积；以及两个刷毛束，每个刷毛束分别连接到两个臂中的一个，并从两个臂中的一个向外延伸。

title: 水下机器人控制方法、装置、水下机器人及存储介质
abstract: [0001] 本发明涉及水下机器人技术领域，公开了水下机器人控制方法、装置、水下机器人及存储介质，构建覆盖当前水下环境的初始全局规划路径；控制水下机器人沿初始全局规划路径移动，并进行清扫对象和障碍物的识别，更新清扫对象的分布概率热力图和障碍物地图；基于分布概率热力图，当存在清扫对象分布密度大于当前路径所在第一区域的第二区域时，以第二区域为目标位置，基于水下机器人的运行状态、分布概率热力图和障碍物地图进行局部路径规划；控制水下机器人按规划的局部路径移动至第二区域，并返回沿初始全局规划路径移动的步骤；以使水下机器人主动趋向清扫对象分布密度大的区域进行优先清扫，提高了工作效率。

title: 厨电物联网的埋点方法
abstract: [0001] 本申请公开了一种厨电物联网的埋点方法，该方法包括：获取厨电物联网中应用全量埋点策略采集的传感器时序数据和操作日志；基于传感器时序数据和所述操作日志，确定初始埋点策略，在厨电物联网中应用初始埋点策略进行数据采集，并在初始埋点策略的应用时长达到预设时长后，获取预设数据分析任务的数据使用反馈作为初始埋点策略对应的初始反馈数据；获取预定义的埋点调整动作集合；将初始埋点和初始反馈数据确定为当前决策环境信息，并根据当前决策环境信息从埋点调整动作集合中确定出目标埋点调整动作；根据目标埋点调整动作对初始埋点策略进行调整，得到目标埋点策略并应用。本申请能够动态地调整厨电物联网的埋点策略，提高了埋点准确性。

title: 远程升级指令下发方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质
abstract: 本申请提供一种远程升级指令下发方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质，涉及智能家居技术领域，方法包括：接收终端设备上报的升级进度信息；其中，升级进度信息包括开始下载消息和下载完成消息；根据开始下载消息和下载完成消息的数量，以及预设的最大并发下载数量，动态调整下发远程升级指令的批次大小；按照调整后的远程升级指令的批次大小，向终端设备下发远程升级指令。本申请提供的远程升级指令下发方法，能够实时感知当前正在进行下载的设备数量，并以此为依据，结合预设的资源服务器最大并发承载能力，动态调整后续升级指令的下发批次大小；这种基于实际负载的自适应调控机制，能够在保障升级成功率的前提下实现整体升级效率的最大化。

title: 任务节点的确定方法、设备、介质及分布式系统
abstract: 本申请公开了一种任务节点的确定方法、设备、介质及分布式系统，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该任务节点的确定方法包括：通过接收分布式系统发送的待执行任务，并确定待执行任务的任务属性，确定分布式系统的第一状态数据，并基于第一状态数据，分别确定多个节点的负载评分；基于多个节点的负载评分和待执行任务的任务属性，从多个节点中确定目标节点。该方法通过待执行任务的跨节点动态调度实现集群负载的平衡，避免了局部过载与资源浪费并存，不仅显著提升了分布式系统的整体效率与稳定性，还提升了集群资源利用率，降低任务失败率。
full_text: 任务节点的确定方法、设备、介质及分布式系统 本申请公开了一种任务节点的确定方法、设备、介质及分布式系统，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该任务节点的确定方法包括：通过接收分布式系统发送的待执行任务，并确定待执行任务的任务属性，确定分布式系统的第一状态数据，并基于第一状态数据，分别确定多个节点的负载评分；基于多个节点的负载评分和待执行任务的任务属性，从多个节点中确定目标节点。该方法通过待执行任务的跨节点动态调度实现集群负载的平衡，避免了局部过载与资源浪费并存，不仅显著提升了分布式系统的整体效率与稳定性，还提升了集群资源利用率，降低任务失败率。

title: 一种咖啡机的压粉结构
abstract: [0001] 本发明提供了一种咖啡机的压粉结构，涉及咖啡机技术领域，包括上基座，上基座上通过下压组件设置有压板，下压组件用于使压板上下移动，压板可转动地设置在下压组件底部；布粉结构，设置于下压组件上，具有盘体和若干个设置于盘体下的布粉杆，压板上形成有若干避让孔，避让孔与对应布粉杆适配，布粉结构可活动地设置在下压组件上；切换结构，设置于下压组件上，具有位于盘体和压板中间一侧的阻挡块；阻挡块和布粉杆具有第一状态和第二状态。可以通过切换结构调整阻挡块的位置，以此切换布粉杆与压板的相对位置，实现布粉工序与压粉工序的快速切换，无需更换作业工具，简化咖啡制备的操作流程。

title: 一种手冲咖啡指引台以及手冲咖啡装置
abstract: 本实用新型一种手冲咖啡指引台以及手冲咖啡装置，包括：重力检测装置和显示装置，所述重力检测装置设有秤板，所述秤板用于放置萃取容器组件，所述重力检测装置与所述程序控制模块电性连接，所述摄像头朝向所述秤板，所述程序控制模块与所述显示屏电性连接，所述显示屏可显示所述程序控制模块生成的注水轨迹和所述程序控制模块生成且可沿注水轨迹移动的指引点，本实用新型的技术方案可以确保用户在能特定时间内，沿着所述注水轨迹注入预定的水量，从而在咖啡粉萃取过程中保持水流稳定和匀速绕圈轨迹，以保证咖啡粉被有效萃取。

title: 制造柔性陶瓷纤维和聚合物复合材料的方法
abstract: 本申请公开并要求保护制造柔性陶瓷纤维（FlexiramicsTM）和聚合物复合材料的方法。当与FlexiramicsTM和单独的纳米纤维分别对比时所得的复合材料具有改进的机械强度（拉伸）。此外复合材料比单独的聚合物具有更好的性质，例如更低的阻燃性、更高的热传导率和更低的热膨胀。可使用若干不同的聚合物（热固性材料和热塑性材料两种）。FlexiramicsTM具有独特的物理特性并且可将复合材料用于许多工业和实验室应用。

title: 一种冲煮头恒温系统
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型涉及咖啡冲煮设备，本实用新型公开了冲煮头恒温系统，包括多重腔体冲煮头和锅炉系统，多重腔体冲煮头用于调节冲煮头的温度，锅炉系统用于控制锅炉的温度，三级调节机构是通过转动凸轮，把第二顶杆顶起，使密封杆下腔体与冲煮头腔相通，通过压力的作用将水从出液口经出液通道流出；再次转动凸轮归位时，由于第二顶杆弹簧的作用将第二顶杆归位，同时密封住连接口，使密封杆下腔体与冲煮头腔隔绝；归位时凸轮将下面的泄压第二顶杆顶开将多余的水从泄压口泄出。

title: 一种茶咖一体机系统
abstract: 本申请公开了一种茶咖一体机系统，包括液路系统、控制系统、供电系统和机械结构，其中，液路系统包括：咖啡液供应模块，用于咖啡的萃取和输出；热水供应模块，用于提供热水作为饮品原料或清洁介质；台面冷藏原料供应模块，用于冷藏并输出粘稠液态原料；台下冷藏原料供应模块，用于冷藏并输出常规液态原料；常温原料供应模块，用于常温存储并输出原料；蒸汽清洁模块，用于产生高温蒸汽以清洁和消杀管路；循环加热模块，用于对冷原料进行加热；出饮模块，用于将调制完成的饮品输出至盛接容器；清洗模块，用于控制清洁液体的输入，实现管路清洗、消毒、排空等功能；排水系统，用于收集并排放设备内各模块产生的废水。

title: 智能厨房的控制方法、装置及智能厨房
abstract: 本申请提供了一种智能厨房的控制方法、装置及智能厨房，应用于至少安装有两个联动的智能设备的智能厨房，所述控制方法包括响应于手势控制指令，获取各个智能设备各自对应的手势点云数据；分别以各个智能设备为坐标系中心，对各个智能设备各自对应的手势点云数据进行空间关联度处理，得到各个智能设备各自对应的空间关联度；从各个智能设备各自对应的空间关联度中，筛选出大于预设阈值的空间关联度作为目标空间关联度，将目标空间关联度对应的智能设备作为目标设备；控制目标设备执行手势控制指令。上述方法可以实现确定手势控制指令对应的目标设备的精确是被与控制，避免多设备间信号串扰和误操作。
full_text: 智能厨房的控制方法、装置及智能厨房 本申请提供了一种智能厨房的控制方法、装置及智能厨房，应用于至少安装有两个联动的智能设备的智能厨房，所述控制方法包括响应于手势控制指令，获取各个智能设备各自对应的手势点云数据；分别以各个智能设备为坐标系中心，对各个智能设备各自对应的手势点云数据进行空间关联度处理，得到各个智能设备各自对应的空间关联度；从各个智能设备各自对应的空间关联度中，筛选出大于预设阈值的空间关联度作为目标空间关联度，将目标空间关联度对应的智能设备作为目标设备；控制目标设备执行手势控制指令。上述方法可以实现确定手势控制指令对应的目标设备的精确是被与控制，避免多设备间信号串扰和误操作。

title: 推定装置及び推定方法
abstract: [0001] 【課題】食物の撮影環境に関係なく新鮮度の推定精度を安定化すること。 【解決手段】本開示の推定装置２は、第１の照明状態とされた食物を撮像した第１の画像と、第２の照明状態とされた食物を撮像した第２の画像とを取得する画像取得部１０１と、第１の画像と第２の画像との間で画素値を差分して差分画像を生成する画像生成部１０２と、差分画像を学習モデルに入力することによって、食物の新鮮度を推定した推定結果を出力する推定部１０４と、を備える。 【選択図】図１

title: 一种萃取咖啡机及其控制方法
abstract: 本发明公开了一种萃取咖啡机及其控制方法，萃取咖啡机包括萃取组件、第一加热组件、蒸汽嘴、第二加热组件和饮水组件；第一加热组件与萃取组件连接，并向萃取组件供应加热后的萃取用水；第二加热组件与第一加热组件连接，并且第一加热组件向第二加热组件供应热水，第二加热组件对第一加热组件供应的热水继续加热，获取水蒸气，水蒸气通过蒸汽嘴输出；第一加热组件可同时向萃取组件和第二加热组件供应热水；水源组件向第一加热组件和/或萃取组件供应水流。本发明的萃取咖啡机，至少解决背景技术中提及的咖啡机上的多种功能的串行工作模式效率低下的问题。

title: 一种出液结构及净饮咖啡一体机
abstract: 本实用新型涉及一种出液结构及净饮咖啡一体机，包括壳体和咖啡嘴，该咖啡嘴安装在壳体中，而壳体的底部设有供咖啡嘴的出液头插设的第一出液口，所述壳体包括方形的出液本体，该出液本体的正面内凹而形成用于容置咖啡嘴的安装槽，上述壳体还包括通过磁吸组件连接在上述出液本体正面的前盖，该前盖遮蔽上述安装槽。与现有技术相比，本实用新型只需将前盖取下即能拆卸安装槽中的咖啡嘴，而咖啡嘴安装完成后只需将前盖吸附在出液本体的正面上即能完成安装，操作方便，能有效提升用户的使用体验。

title: 一种多加热区段PID的温度误差补偿方法及系统
abstract: [0001] 本发明涉及过程温度控制技术领域，具体为一种多加热区段PID的温度误差补偿方法及系统，包括：通过执行热传递辨识与动态建模，建立描述各加热区段间热耦合效应的耦合传递函数矩阵；基于矩阵计算出前馈补偿传递函数；实时监测第一加热区段的控制输出作为预测性扰动，利用前馈补偿传递函数计算出前馈补偿信号，并与第二加热区段的主控制信号叠加，生成最终加热驱动信号，主动抵消过程区段的热力学干扰；通过在线评估补偿的残余耦合度，对主PID控制器参数执行自适应整定。本发明通过结合前馈补偿与自适应反馈，解决多变量过程温度控制系统的耦合干扰问题，有效消除温度超调与振荡，显著提升过程温度控制系统的精度、动态响应性能与长期鲁棒性。

title: 智能马桶余热利用快速加热模块
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型提供一种智能马桶余热利用快速加热模块，包括马桶座，所述马桶座固定在地板上，所述马桶座的内部底部设置有排放口，所述马桶座内部冲水管与马桶座后方的抽水箱相连，所述抽水箱的内部设置有抽水泵和蓄水箱，用于抽水与储存清洁水，所述马桶座的上端面通过连接件转动连接有马桶盖与马桶圈，所述马桶圈内侧设置有加热组件，所述马桶座与抽水箱内部设置有余热利用组件。本实用新型，在马桶座的下方设置导热板，利用导热板吸收已使用的热水的热量，传递给未使用的冲洗水进行初步加热，以实现热能的回收利用，减少了热量排放，同时减少了加热冲洗水所需的时间与能源。

title: 智能家居设备的控制方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质
abstract: 本发明涉及智慧家庭技术领域，提供一种智能家居设备的控制方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质。其中，智能家居设备的控制方法包括：接收到语音指令；其中，语音指令携带针对目标智能家居设备的第一调控意图；基于大语言模型的模型控制协议层，根据语音指令，得到针对目标智能家居设备的控制指令；基于控制指令，对目标智能家居设备进行调控，以实现第一调控意图。本发明可以高效、准确地实现不同厂商设备间的互联互通。

title: 一种智能暖菜装置
abstract: 本申请涉及一种智能暖菜装置，包括主控制器、若干个子暖菜板，所述主控制器上设置有电源接口和若干个与暖菜板数量相同的工作接口，所述电源接口用于外接电源实现对所述主控制器的供电，所述工作接口与所述子暖菜板之间设置有连接线，所述子暖菜板和所述工作接口之间通过连接线实现与所述主控制器电连接，且所述连接线与所述工作接口可拆卸连接，所述主控制器用于对所述子暖菜板的工作状态进行调节，本申请具有便于对菜肴进行保温或加热的效果。

title: 家电设备的能耗显示方法、装置、设备、介质及程序产品
abstract: [0001] 本申请公开了一种家电设备的能耗显示方法、装置、设备、介质及程序产品，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该方法包括：通过显示家电设备的能耗界面；能耗界面包括户型界面和悬浮于户型界面显示的能耗信息界面；其中，户型界面显示有三维户型模型，三维户型模型中包括至少一个房间区域、以及布置在房间区域内的至少一个家电设备的虚拟设备图标和总能耗；能耗信息界面包括能耗信息、节能模式控件、错峰用电控件中的至少两种；响应于用户对三维户型模型中目标家电设备的总能耗的操作，显示目标家电设备的能耗分布信息；该方法实现了使用户能够直观感知设备能耗状态，并且简化了查看设备能耗的操作，提高了用户体验感。

title: 便携咖啡壶
abstract: [0001] 一种便携咖啡壶，包括壶体，所述壶体的外壁上设有收纳槽；手柄，所述手柄通过一转轴可转动地连接在所述壶体上，其可外展于壶体的外壁，及收纳于壶体的收纳槽内。相比于现有技术，本实用新型的便携咖啡壶的手柄可以相对于壶体转动并收纳，使用方便，便于携带。

title: 一种基于圆波导模态的管道铺设路径智能微波检测装置及方法
abstract: 本发明提供了一种基于圆波导模态的管道铺设路径智能微波检测装置及方法，包括：馈源喇叭，用于与待测金属管道的端部连接，实现微波信号的无泄漏传输；微波信号源，用于产生特定频段的激励信号；FPGA控制系统，用于控制所述微波信号源的信号发射与接收时序，并采集、处理波导端口处的时域电压波信号；其中，所述FPGA控制系统通过所述馈源喇叭向所述待测金属管道内激励纯净的TE11主模微波，并采集反射波与传输波的时域电压波信号，通过提取波峰特征及时间信息，反演管道的拐角位置、管段长度及总路径。装置结构简单、成本低、安装便捷，具有广泛的工程应用前景。

title: VACUUM PUMPS WITH INTERNAL OIL TEST
abstract: [0000] The present invention provides vacuum pumps and methods with internal oil health test function to assess condition of the oil contained within the vacuum pumps, and to determine if an oil change is needed. The vacuum pump may include an oil tank for containing oil; a motor for producing vacuuming power; and an inlet to be connected either directly or indirectly to a vacuum gauge, together with a built-in module or function configured for conducting an internal oil health test to assess condition of the oil contained within the oil tank.

title: IMPROVED SYSTEM FOR HEATING WATER FOR A COFFEE MACHINE AND METHOD OF HEATING WATER IN A COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: An espresso coffee machine is described, the machine comprises: a pump (1) configured to receive water at a first pressure (p1) and to emit water at a second pressure (p2); a limescale trap (2) configured to receive, at a limescale trap inlet, water at the second pressure (p2), at a second temperature (t2) and at a second hardness (d2) and to provide, at a limescale trap outlet, a fluid at a third hardness (d3) which is less than the second hardness (d2); and a throughflow heating device (3) configured to receive, at the inlet, the fluid from the limescale trap (2) and to supply, at the outlet, a fluid at a fourth temperature (t4), which is substantially equal to a temperature of use for extracting an espresso coffee or for frothing a beverage by emitting steam, wherein the limescale trap (2) comprises a heating boiler configured to provide, at a heating boiler outlet, a fluid at a third temperature (t3), which is higher than the second temperature (t2).

title: DMRS FOR PDCCH
abstract: A method for wireless communication at a user equipment (UE) and related apparatus are provided. In the method, the UE receives a configuration for a control resource set (CORESET) and monitors for a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) transmission in the CORESET. The CORESET spans multiple symbols. A first number of demodulation reference signal (DMRS) transmissions in a first symbol of the multiple symbols is higher than a second number of DMRS transmissions in any symbol of the remaining symbols in the multiple OFDM symbols, and the DMRS density in the first symbol is based on the number of symbols in the multiple OFDM symbols or the minimum aggregation level for the DMRS transmissions.

title: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE DEVICE FOR MIXTURE-OF-OPINIONS WITH FINE-TUNING AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A method for controlling an artificial intelligence (AI) device can include receiving a query, obtaining a plurality of ancillary opinions generated by a plurality of ancillary language models in response to the query, in which each of the plurality of ancillary opinions includes a chain-of-thought reasoning path derived by a corresponding one of the plurality of ancillary language models and an answer to the query, constructing an aggregated input sequence including the query and the plurality of ancillary opinions, and generating, by a fine-tuned main large language model, a final response based on the aggregated input sequence. Also, the fine-tuned main large language model is fine-tuned to synthesize the plurality of ancillary opinions to derive the final response.

title: ACCESS CONTROL PARAMETER ADAPTATION
abstract: The apparatus may be a wireless device such as a user equipment (UE) configured to receive a set of value ranges associated with a set of access control parameters, initiate, based on the set of value ranges, an access attempt associated with an establishment of a connection with a radio access network (RAN), and output an indication of the access attempt associated with the establishment of the connection with the RAN. The apparatus may be a network device such as a network node or base station configured to transmit, to a UE, a set of value ranges associated with a set of access control parameters and obtain, based on the set of value ranges, an indication of an access attempt associated with an establishment of a connection with the network node.

title: VACUUM CLEANER WITH IMPROVED NOZZLE DESIGN
abstract: A nozzle assembly designed for use on a vacuum cleaner includes a pivotable outlet configured for engagement with a suction tube of the vacuum cleaner, and a suction chamber coupled to the pivotable outlet via a base structure. The suction chamber includes a first sealing structure extending beneath the suction chamber and along a front-facing edge of the suction chamber, a second sealing structure extending beneath the suction chamber and along a rear-facing edge of the suction chamber, at least one agitator between the first sealing structure and the second sealing structure, and a suction port through a bottom surface of the suction chamber.

title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Agent Recommendation System
abstract: [0000] Systems and methods for the generation of a recommendation using a machine-learned model. The method can include receiving, from a client device, a user query. Additionally, the method can include determining, using a machine-learned model operating on a computing system, an input tool based on the user query. Moreover, the method can include receiving, from the client device, additional information, the additional information being uploaded using the input tool. Furthermore, the method can include processing, by the machine-learned model, the user query and the additional information to select a content item associated with a content provider. Subsequently, the method can include presenting the content item on a graphical user interface.

title: STANDALONE ON-DEMAND SIB1 CONFIGURATIONS
abstract: Standalone OD-SIB1 configurations are described. An apparatus is configured to receive, from a network node, a MIB indicative of an UL WUS configuration. The apparatus is configured to provide, for the network node, an UL WUS in accordance with the UL WUS configuration. The apparatus is configured to receive, from the network node and based on the UL WUS configuration, a SIB1. The received SIB1 is associated with the UL WUS. Another apparatus is configured to transmit, for a UE, a MIB indicative of an UL WUS configuration. The apparatus is configured to receive, from the UE, an UL WUS in accordance with the UL WUS configuration. The apparatus is configured to transmit, for the UE and based on the UL WUS configuration, a SIB1.

title: EXTENDED MASK AND BUFFER TECHNIQUES FOR VIDEO COMPRESSION AND DECOMPRESSION
abstract: [0000] A computer-implemented method for encoding a video frame includes selecting a block from a plurality of blocks within the video frame, identifying a reference block within a reference boundary region of the video frame, the reference boundary region being defined by a fixed mask, and the reference boundary region being less than all of the video frame, determining prediction parameters based on a relationship between the selected block and the identified reference block, and encoding, with an encoder, the prediction parameters and an indicator of the fixed mask into a bitstream.

title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) System that uses a Vision-and-Language Model (VLM) to Improve Energy Conservation and to Increase Efficiency of Energy Consumption in Households
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) system that uses a Vision-and-Language Model (VLM) or a Large Multi-Modalities Model (LMMM) to improve energy conservation and to increase efficiency of energy consumption in households. Video cameras capture live video from rooms in the household, and feed them into the VLM; which also monitors or receives copies of email messages and instant messages that were sent and received by household residents. The VLM generates unique insights and proposals on how to reduce energy consumption or how to improve energy efficiency in the household. The energy-saving insights, that were generated by the VLM, are transferred to a Home Automation Device or to a Smart Home hub unit, which is triggered by the VLM-generated outputs to remotely control devices and appliances in the household. Innovative capabilities of AI are harnessed, in combination with Computerized Vision and Natural Language Processing, to deduce energy-saving proposals and to automatically implement them.

title: FIXED ROUTE DETECTION AND MOBILITY OPTIMIZATION
abstract: [0000] A method for wireless communication at a user equipment (UE) and related apparatus are provided. In the method, the UE identifies an update to the initial route for the UE based on a first end of an initial route and a second end of the initial route. The UE further selects a subset of network cells from a set of network cells for communication with a network entity based on the update to the initial route. Following this selection, the UE communicates with the network entity using the selected subset of network cells.

title: TIME DOMAIN PDCCH DMRS PATTERN WITH A LONG CORESET
abstract: A method for wireless communication at a user equipment (UE) and related apparatus are provided. In the method, the UE receives a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) transmission in a control resource set (CORESET) spanning multiple symbols from a network entity. The PDCCH transmission includes multiple demodulation reference signals (DMRS) and has a DMRS pattern based on the duration of the CORESET. The DMRS pattern is in at least one of the time domain or the frequency domain. The UE further performs a channel estimation based on the DMRS.

title: VARIANT AGNOSTIC MULTI-PHASE HARDWARE ENABLED BUILT-IN SELF-TEST (BIST)
abstract: [0000] Apparatus, methods, and computer program products for wireless communication are provided. An example method may include identifying whether each of a set of processing cores is functional or non-functional, where the set of processing cores is associated with a testing process at the device. The example method may further include selecting a subset of processing cores in the set of processing cores for the testing process based on whether each of the set of processing cores is functional or non-functional, where each of the subset of processing cores is functional. The example method may further include outputting an indication of the selection of the subset of processing cores for the testing process.

title: ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL TARGET SELECTION WITH MULTIPLE SOURCES
abstract: Aspects presented herein may improve the overall performance of an adaptive cruise control (ACC) by enabling the ACC to utilize information from multiple resources for identifying and selecting an ACC target and/or selecting potential ACC target (s). In one aspect, a vehicle detects whether a lane change is indicated based on at least one of navigation information or an activation of a turn signal. The vehicle identifies, based on lane marker information and the detection of whether the lane change is indicated, a lane center for an ACC. The vehicle selects, based on the identified lane center, an ACC target, or determines, based on the identified lane center, a lateral offset for the ACC target. The vehicle outputs an indication of the selection of the ACC target or the determination of the lateral offset for the ACC target.

title: RADIO LINK FAILURE (RLF) AVOIDANCE
abstract: [0000] A wireless node may one or more memories, individually or in combination, having instructions. title: POLAR ENCODING WITH PHASE ERROR PROTECTION
abstract: A wireless node may one or more memories, individually or in combination, having instructions. title: SYSTEM INFORMATION VERSION INDICATION
abstract: Certain aspects of the present disclosure provide techniques for indicating a version of system information (SI). An example method, performed at a wireless node, generally includes obtaining at least one first physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH), storing information associated with at least one first version of system information (SI), the first version being conveyed in the at least one first PDSCH, obtaining, via a physical downlink channel, an indication of a second version of the SI, wherein the second version is to be obtained by the wireless node via a second PDSCH, wherein the physical downlink channel comprises a PDSCH or a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH), and performing one or more actions based on a comparison of the at least one first version and the second version.

title: BRUSH ROLL WITH A COMBINED BRISTLE AND FLAP STRUCTURE
abstract: A vacuum cleaner includes a nozzle assembly at a distal end of the vacuum cleaner and a brush roll coupled to the nozzle assembly. The brush roll includes a cylindrical core, a compliant flap coupled to the cylindrical core and extending away from the cylindrical core in a radial direction, and a plurality of bristles extending away from the cylindrical core in a radial direction and directly adjacent to the compliant flap. The compliant flap extends along a path around at least a portion of a circumference of the cylindrical core and along a length of the cylindrical core, and the plurality of bristles also extend along the same path as the compliant flap.

title: PATH FINDING PROCESSING INDICATION USING AN ASSOCIATED ID IN AI/ML POSITIONING
abstract: Aspects presented herein may improve the overall performance of artificial intelligence (AI) or machine learning (ML) (AI/ML) positioning, such as AI/ML positioning that specifies first path information, by promoting/ensuring there is a consistency for path finding methods/algorithms between different AI/ML related operations (e.g., between AI/ML training, data collection, and inference, etc.). For example, in one aspect of the present disclosure, a wireless device communicates, with a network entity, an assignment of a plurality of identifiers (IDs) for a plurality of path processing operations, where each ID corresponds to one path processing operation in the plurality of path processing operations. The wireless device communicates, with the network entity, a list of path processing operations supported or applied by the wireless device based on the plurality of IDs.

title: SPANNING INTRA PREDICTION MODE INFORMATION FROM RECONSTRUCTED CODING UNITS
abstract: Systems and method directed to spanning intra prediction mode information using reconstructed coding unis. One example is directed to a computer-implemented method for video encoding or decoding including deriving intra prediction mode -IPM- information from one or more reconstructed samples of a coding unit, storing the IPM information in an IPM buffer corresponding to the coding unit, and encoding or decoding a picture including the coding unit based on the IPM buffer.

title: NEURAL NETWORK-BASED FILM GRAIN ANALYSIS
abstract: [0001] Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are disclosed for using a neural network (NN)-based film grain (FG) analysis. For example, a device may include a processor that is configured to perform one or more of the following. The device (e.g., a video processing device) may obtain a grainy video. The grainy video may be a video source with film grain. The device may feed the grainy video to a film grain analysis neural network (FGA-NN) module. The FGA-NN module may include a feature extraction network (e.g., a backbone) and at least one task-specific head. At least one task-specific head may be configured for a prediction task. For example, the prediction task may include a classification task and/or a regression task. The device may obtain at least one film grain characteristic (FGC) parameter based on an output of the FGA-NN module.

title: 一种防水型砂浆混凝土复合料及其制备方法
abstract: [0001] 本发明提供了一种防水型砂浆混凝土复合料及其制备方法，属于防水砂浆混凝土技术领域。本发明将水泥、细集料、水性增强树脂、耐水树脂、固化剂、分散剂及水进行复合得到，该复合料可以根据需要进行地面、墙面或屋顶刷涂制备防水砂浆混凝土防水层，也可以根据尺寸要求制得防水型砂浆混凝土面板，单次施工即可形成出色的砂浆混凝土致密层，实现较优的耐水、防水效果，且特殊树脂与固化剂的参与提升了防水砂浆混凝土的力学性能和增韧性能，提高抗裂能力。

title: 一种锁止机构及厨师机
abstract: 本实用新型涉及家电技术领域，尤其涉及一种锁止机构及厨师机。锁止机构中，所述导向件包括座体和设置在所述座体上的导柱，所述导柱上设有第一导孔；所述锁扣件包括锁座和设置在所述锁座上的第一柱体，所述第一柱体上设有对接槽，所述按钮滑动插接在所述对接槽中，所述第一柱体滑动插接在所述第一导孔中；所述第一弹性件安装在所述锁座上且与所述座体抵接；所述第一弹性件用于带动所述第一柱体在所述第一导孔中沿第一方向移动，以使得所述锁座与所述限位块锁接；所述按钮用于带动所述第一柱体在所述第一导孔中沿第二方向移动，以使得所述锁座脱离所述限位块。本实用新型中，该锁止机构的结构简单、制造成本低、操作便捷。

title: 便于制作意式咖啡的咖啡装置
abstract: 本实用新型涉及咖啡机技术领域，特别涉及便于制作意式咖啡的咖啡装置。本实用新型的便于制作意式咖啡的咖啡装置，其包括为包装袋以及圆柱形的底杯，底杯设置有顶端开口的内腔且其底壁开设有若干贯穿孔；底杯的内腔内设置有咖啡粉，咖啡粉与底杯的内腔的内壁相抵，并且咖啡粉顶端面低于底杯；包装袋具备隔气性，底杯及咖啡粉位于包装袋内。本实用新型达到的效果为，能够确保咖啡粉的压实度统一且符合期望值，并且咖啡粉的新鲜度能够长时间保持，便于制作意式咖啡。

title: 一种消解装置
abstract: 本实用新型公开了一种消解装置，包括消解仪本体，所述消解仪本体顶部设有多个加热孔，且加热孔内置有第一加热模块，所述加热孔内部放置有试管，与所述试管匹配的设有支架组件，所述消解仪本体上表面靠近加热孔处固定有竖板，且竖板顶端固定连接有横板。本实用新型中，设置消解仪本体、支架组件、竖板、横板、电动伸缩杆、壳体、搅拌组件、侧盒和风扇，利用支架组件能放置多个试管，试管插入消解仪本体的加热孔消解完成后，可通过支架组件将多个试管同时取出并放入侧盒中，利用风扇对试管冷却，有利于试管快速冷却后进行水质检测，不需要在加热孔内部等待试管冷却，并且通过支架组件同时拿取多个试管，可避免烫伤检测人员。

title: MANUAL COFFEE TAMPING DEVICE WITH SCREW MECHANISM
abstract: [0001] ABSTRACT A manually operated coffee tamping device configured to apply a compressive force to ground coffee within a portafilter for espresso preparation. The device comprises a locking element configured to be secured to the portafilter using a locking interface, and a tamping element configured to couple to the locking element via a screw mechanism. The screw mechanism can convert a rotation force applied on the tamping element into a linear force for compressing the coffee grounds. The locking element counteracts the compressing force through the locking interface, eliminating the need for an external support surface when tamping. The device improves tamping consistency, reduces user effort, and provides ergonomic advantages.

The device improves tamping consistency, reduces user effort, and provides ergonomic advantages.

title: DID IoT DID-based IoT-linked smart beverage dispenser
abstract: 본 발명은 DID(Digital Information Display) 기반 IoT(Internet of Things) 연동형 스마트 음료 디스펜서에 관한 것으로, 저전력으로 커피를 추출 할 수 있으며, IoT 기반으로 원격 관리 및 유지보수를 할 수 있으며, DID 광고 기능을 탑재할 수 있는 DID 기반 IoT 연동형 스마트 음료 디스펜서 시스템에 관한 것이다. 이를 위해 본 발명은 디스플레이부를 통하여 광고가 송출될 수 있고, 커피를 포함한 음료가 토출될 수 있는 디스펜서본체모듈; 내부에 커피를 포함한 음료가 저장되어 있고 디스펜서본체모듈과 결합되어 음료를 공급할 수 있는 음료컨테이너모듈; 디스펜서본체모듈과 결합되어 디스펜서본체모듈에 물, 음료를 포함한 유체를 공급하고, 배출할 수 있도록 하는 배관모듈; 디스펜서본체모듈과 무선통신을 통하여 정보를 송수신할 수 있는 통합관리서버를 포함하는, DID 기반 IoT 연동형 스마트 음료 디스펜서 시스템를 제공한다.

title: 自动饮料制备机中的水泵的优化控制
abstract: 一种自动饮料制备机，包括：冲泡组件，包括能容纳粉末产品的冲泡室；液压线路，包括泵和流量计，流量计用于测量供应至冲泡室的冲泡液体的量；以及电子控制单元，被配置为存储在饮料制备循环期间控制泵的操作所需的功能数据以及基于所存储的功能数据在预冲泡阶段和冲泡阶段中的一者或两者期间通过实施以下控制中的一个或两个控制来控制泵：预冲泡阶段：对泵进行开环控制，以使得泵在所存储的小于全功率的预冲泡电功率处操作，从而使得供应至冲泡室的冲泡液体的流量随时间变化；冲泡阶段：基于由流量计测量的冲泡液体的流量对泵进行闭环控制，从而使得从初始冲泡流量达到所存储的目标冲泡流量并随后维持所存储的目标冲泡流量。

title: 扫地机路径规划方法、装置、扫地机及存储介质
abstract: 本申请涉及智能家居技术领域，提供一种扫地机路径规划方法、装置、扫地机及存储介质，方法包括：确定扫地机的当前位置和扫地机的目标位置；根据扫地机的当前位置和扫地机的目标位置，对扫地机的整个工作区域对应的上层地图进行算法调用，从扫地机的整个工作区域对应的所有分区中确定待经过分区；根据每个待经过分区对应的底层地图，规划扫地机在每个待经过分区中的子路径；将所有待经过分区的子路径进行串联处理，获得从当前位置到目标位置之间的完整路径。本申请的方案，在环境复杂或者工作区域较大的情况，提高了扫地机路径规划的效率和准确性。

title: 空调控制方法及设备
abstract: 本申请公开了一种空调控制方法及设备，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该空调控制方法包括：通过在预设时间范围内，基于用户生物识别结果、空调的位置、空调已启动的功能或环境信息中的一项或多项，确定当前的防直吹场景；控制空调执行与防直吹场景对应的空调参数调整策略；该方法实现了基于防直吹场景自动调整对应的空调参数，不仅提高了空调的智能化程度，还提高了用户的使用体验。

title: 防水性外贴片制冰控制模块
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型涉及制冰装置配件技术领域，且公开防一种防水性外贴片制冰控制模块，该控制模块包括外贴片、元件板、电路外壳和底壳，所述元件板表面设置有按键模块，所述电路外壳安装在所述元件板外部，所述电路外壳表面设计有触点，所述触点的数量与位置均与所述按键模块对应，所述触点的外表面有向所述按键模块方向按动的运动自由度；所述电路外壳的外表面设置有外贴片，所述外贴片在与所述触点位置相对应处开设有挖空结构，内部设置有由弹性材料制成的按键胶帽，所述按键胶帽与所述外贴片连接处密封；该设备解决了现有技术中控制模块难以完全避免冷凝水与电机的直接接触，或使用涂层但涂层容易脱落的问题。

title: PUMP AND BEVERAGE SUPPLY DEVICE
abstract: This pump comprises: a suction-side pressure gauge and a discharge-side pressure gauge that are provided on a suction side and a discharge side of a flow path; and a control unit that generates a control command for an electromagnet of a resonance actuator in accordance with a suction-side pressure and a discharge-side pressure detected by the suction-side pressure gauge and the discharge-side pressure gauge, and controls the pressure of fluid which is discharged from a pump chamber.
full_text: PUMP AND BEVERAGE SUPPLY DEVICE This pump comprises: a suction-side pressure gauge and a discharge-side pressure gauge that are provided on a suction side and a discharge side of a flow path; and a control unit that generates a control command for an electromagnet of a resonance actuator in accordance with a suction-side pressure and a discharge-side pressure detected by the suction-side pressure gauge and the discharge-side pressure gauge, and controls the pressure of fluid which is discharged from a pump chamber.

title: PUMP AND BEVERAGE SUPPLYING DEVICE
abstract: In the present invention, when a piston operates in a pump chamber volume-increasing direction, a first closing part of a first valve body separates from a first valve seat in a first valve chamber and moves to a first position where the first closing part is not in contact with a first tapered surface, and as a result, a suction valve opens. When the piston operates in a pump chamber volume-decreasing direction, a second closing part of a second valve body separates from a second valve seat in a second valve chamber and moves to a second position where the second closing part is not in contact with a second tapered surface, and as a result, a discharge valve opens.

When the piston operates in a pump chamber volume-decreasing direction, a second closing part of a second valve body separates from a second valve seat in a second valve chamber and moves to a second position where the second closing part is not in contact with a second tapered surface, and as a result, a discharge valve opens.

title: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE DEVICE FOR CREATING ANIMATABLE 4D PORTRAIT AVATARS WITH MORPHABLE MULTI-VIEW DIFFUSION MODELS AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: [0000] A method for controlling an artificial intelligence (AI) device can include receiving a set of reference images of a subject and encoding them into reference latents. The method estimates 3D morphable model (3DMM) parameters to derive pose and expression conditioning signals. A plurality of synthetic images are generated from different viewpoints using a morphable multi-view diffusion model. Generating the synthetic images includes executing an iterative reverse diffusion process on generated latents and applying stochastic conditioning by randomly sampling a subset of the reference latents and a subset of the generated latents to condition the model. The method further includes decoding the generated latents and training a 4D avatar model based on the reference and synthetic images. The 4D avatar model can utilize 3D Gaussian splatting augmented with expression-dependent appearance model information to enable real-time animation.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR BREWING A BEVERAGE
abstract: A system and method for brewing a beverage, the system comprising: a brewing compartment including a brewing chamber with a first opening opposite a second opening, a portioning means, a plunging mechanism, and a conveying assembly; the first opening is configured to receive a dose of grounds and the second opening is configured to deliver a brewed beverage; the portioning means is configured to portion a dose of grounds from a supply of grounds and to place the dose of grounds into the brewing chamber, in particular through the first opening; the conveying assembly is embedded in the system and comprises a filter; the conveying assembly is configured to be moved reciprocally between at least a first position and a second position; in the first position, the filter is essentially aligned with the second opening and is configured to receive and hold the dose of grounds from the portioning means.

title: TARGET SIMULATOR FOR A RADAR SENSOR
abstract: The invention relates to a target simulator for a radar sensor, the target simulator having a receiving module for receiving radar signals in the form of radar radiation, a modification module for modifying the received radar signals and a transmitting module for transmitting the modified radar signals in the form of radar radiation, characterised in that the modification module has at least one radar chip for generating a first conversion signal and at least one second radar chip for generating a second conversion signal, wherein the modification module is configured to mix the first conversion signal with the received radar signals and thus generate radar signals with a reduced frequency, to process the radar signals with a reduced frequency so that processed radar signals are created, and to mix the second conversion signal with the processed radar signals and thus generate the modified radar signals.

title: PUMP AND BEVERAGE SUPPLY DEVICE
abstract: This pump comprises: a flow path through which a fluid flows; a pump chamber provided on the flow path; a piston serving as a volume-changing member that operates so as to reduce or increase the volume of the pump chamber; and a housing that accommodates the flow path, the pump chamber, and the piston therein. The flow path is formed by coupling a plurality of blocks disposed in the housing, and communicating holes provided in each of the plurality of blocks. Among the plurality of blocks, at least a block disposed adjacent to a wall surface (side surface) of the housing is fixed to a block fixing part (side surface plate) disposed on an inner side of the housing relative to the block.

title: Zielsimulator für einen Radarsensor
abstract: Die Erfindung betrifft einen Zielsimulator für einen Radarsensor, wobei der Zielsimulator ein Empfangsmodul zum Empfangen von Radarsignalen in Form von Radarstrahlung, ein Modifikationsmodul zum Modifizieren der empfangenen Radarsignale und ein Sendemodul zum Aussenden der modifizierten Radarsignale in Form von Radarstrahlung aufweist, dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass das Modifikationsmodul wenigstens einen Radarchip zum Erzeugen eines ersten Konvertierungssignals und wenigstens einen zweiten Radarchip zum Erzeugen eines zweiten Konvertierungssignals aufweist, wobei das Modifizierungsmodul eingerichtet ist, das erste Konvertierungssignal mit den empfangenen Radarsignalen zu mischen und so Radarsignale mit reduzierter Frequenz zu generieren und die Radarsignale mit reduzierter Frequenz zu bearbeiten, so dass bearbeitete Radarsignale entstehen und das zweite Konvertierungssignal mit den bearbeiteten Radarsignalen zu mischen und so die modifizierten Radarsignale zu generieren.

title: FILM GRAIN SYNTHESIS FREQUENCY SHAPING
abstract: Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are disclosed for film grain synthesis frequency shaping. As described herein, a device may include a processor that is configured to perform one or more of the following. The device may obtain a model parameter set. The model parameter set may be, or may include, a cutoff frequency. Based on the model parameter set (e.g., the cutoff frequency), the device may generate a soft frequency window. The soft frequency window may be at least one of a 2D low-pass window, a separable 2D low-pass window, or a low-pass 20 frequency window. The device may generate a synthetic grain based on the soft frequency window. For example, the device may generate the synthetic grain based on (e.g., applying) an inverse transform of the soft frequency window. The inverse transform may be associated with a discrete cosine transform (DCT).

title: 情報処理システム、情報提示システム

title: 一种咖啡机自动冲泡机构
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型公开了一种咖啡机自动冲泡机构，具体涉及咖啡机技术领域，包括安装在咖啡机冲煮头下方的碗座，所述碗座内部开设有冲泡腔室，冲泡腔室内部嵌设有粉碗，所述粉碗底端开设若干个上宽下窄的微孔阵列，在碗座底端镶嵌有朝向碗座底端的超声波微型震子，所述粉碗顶端设有挂置在碗座顶端的分水罩，分水罩底端伸入至粉碗内腔，在分水罩底端开设有贯穿的分水孔，分水孔边缘处与分水罩底端边缘处留有间隙。本实用新型通过动态水流控制，利用分水板可旋转调节水流角度，配合倾斜分水微孔，使热水覆盖咖啡粉的路径更复杂，减少通道效应，避免咖啡局部过萃或萃取不足。

title: 智能设备的语音控制方法、装置和存储介质
abstract: [0001] 本申请公开了一种智能设备的语音控制方法、装置和存储介质，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该智能设备的语音控制方法，包括：响应于用户终端发送的控制语音信息，对控制语音信息进行语音识别，获取控制语音信息对应的文本信息；根据文本信息，确定目标设备标识、待执行动作标识和待执行功能文本；判断目标设备标识对应的设备功能集合中是否存在与待执行功能文本相同的目标功能名称；若否，则对待执行功能文本进行拆分提取，获取文本要素；在设备功能集合中确定与文本要素匹配的目标功能名称；根据目标设备标识、待执行动作标识和目标功能名称，向目标设备发送所生成的控制指令；提高了语音控制的执行效率和执行成功率，提升了用户的使用体验。

title: 一种压力咖啡机用弹性二次分水网
abstract: [0001] 本实用新型公开了一种压力咖啡机用弹性二次分水网，包括分水网体、锥形弹簧和小上盖，分水网体的顶面中部连接有锥形弹簧，且锥形弹簧的大直径端朝上设置，小上盖设置在锥形弹簧的顶端；小上盖的底面边沿一体成型有向下凸起的内翻折边，锥形弹簧的顶部大直径端胀紧在内翻折边的内壁，锥形弹簧能可靠压紧咖啡粉，有利于防止咖啡粉上部的粉粒移动，锥形弹簧压缩后不占轴向空间，整体结构占用空间小，适合不同粉量的咖啡粉使用，通用性好，适用性强，同时也方便取放操作，改善咖啡出品，制造成本低。

title: 电子设备、中框的加工方法及电子设备的组装方法
abstract: 本申请涉及电子设备防水技术领域，尤其涉及电子设备、中框的加工方法及电子设备的组装方法。电子设备包括中框、电路板、按键组件和连接件，中框具有收容空间，电路板设置于收容空间内。中框的侧壁设置有容置槽和过线孔，过线孔连通收容空间与容置槽，按键组件包括感应部，感应部安装于容置槽。连接件的一端与按键组件电连接，另一端穿过过线孔与电路板电连接。其中，过线孔内填充有密封件，密封件封堵过线孔的孔壁与连接件之间的间隙。本申请在中框设置过线孔，使连接件穿越中框进入收容空间与电路板连接，且在过线孔内填充密封件进行封堵，实现防水，从而实现降低电子设备的结构复杂程度及密封成本的同时保证电子设备的防水效果。

title: 多源信息融合的铁路机车车轮踏面损伤智能诊断方法及系统
abstract: 本申请属于铁路机车车轮损伤检测技术领域，涉及一种多源信息融合的铁路机车车轮踏面损伤智能诊断方法及系统，通过采集的多源数据全面提取时域、频域、时频域特征形成多维度特征向量的同时，基于工况特征构建工况权重函数，结合不同工况对损伤信号频谱的影响规律修正频谱能量，然后通过工况自适应注意力子模块，结合工况特征计算各传感器对应特征的注意力权重，加权求和后生成适配工况的初步融合特征，再通过传感器交互建模子模块分析各传感器特征间的关联关系，生成修正特征，将初步融合特征与修正特征按预设比例加权融合，得到最终融合特征；确保融合特征能够精准反映不同工况下的损伤状态，有效降低工况波动带来的误判风险。
full_text: 多源信息融合的铁路机车车轮踏面损伤智能诊断方法及系统 本申请属于铁路机车车轮损伤检测技术领域，涉及一种多源信息融合的铁路机车车轮踏面损伤智能诊断方法及系统，通过采集的多源数据全面提取时域、频域、时频域特征形成多维度特征向量的同时，基于工况特征构建工况权重函数，结合不同工况对损伤信号频谱的影响规律修正频谱能量，然后通过工况自适应注意力子模块，结合工况特征计算各传感器对应特征的注意力权重，加权求和后生成适配工况的初步融合特征，再通过传感器交互建模子模块分析各传感器特征间的关联关系，生成修正特征，将初步融合特征与修正特征按预设比例加权融合，得到最终融合特征；确保融合特征能够精准反映不同工况下的损伤状态，有效降低工况波动带来的误判风险。

title: 冰箱除霜方法、装置、存储介质及设备
abstract: [0001] 本申请公开了一种冰箱除霜方法、装置、存储介质及设备，涉及智能家居/智慧家庭技术领域，该冰箱除霜方法包括：基于冰箱内的毫米波雷达采集的雷达数据，确定冰箱内的冰霜厚度，再确定当前气候温度和冰箱的外表面温度，并基于当前气候温度、冰箱的外表面温度、季节调整系数以及预设的基础阈值，确定除霜阈值；基于该冰霜厚度和除霜阈值进行是否进行除霜操作的判定，并在确定进行除霜操作后，按照当次判定的结果启动相应的除霜模式进行除霜。该方法解决了定时器控制导致的不必要除霜和除霜不及时的问题，提高了除霜的准确性和效率，保证了冰箱的保鲜效果和能耗，避免了不必要的除霜操作，简化了除霜操作的操作流程，提高了用户的使用体验。

title: System and method for cleaning a space using an autonomous cleaning robot
abstract: A system for removing trash items from a space includes employing an autonomous robot to detect trash within the space, to approach the trash item upon detection and to remove the trash item from the space. The autonomous robot may have two or more trash bins with each trash bin being designated to be filled with a particular category of trash. The categories of trash may be different from one another. The autonomous robot is configured to detect the trash category of the trash item that will be picked up and, after picking up the trash item, to insert it in the appropriate trash bin. This way, the autonomous robot can collect and sort trash items according to their kind. A pan with sweeper arms can be used by the robot for collecting a trash item. In another approach, a trash item can be suctioned by the robot using vacuum.

title: Italian coffee machine and use method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses an Italian coffee machine and a using method of the Italian coffee machine in the technical field of coffee machines. Wherein the Italian coffee comprises a hot extraction mechanism, a steam mechanism and a bean grinding mechanism, and a heater on a hot extraction pipe of the hot extraction mechanism is used for heating water, so that a brewing head performs hot extraction on the coffee. A steam pipe of the steam mechanism is used for conveying high-temperature steam to a steam nozzle, the steam nozzle sprays out the high-temperature steam, and therefore the Italian coffee machine can make various fancy coffee. The bean grinding mechanism comprises an outer grinding core and a movable grinding core, and coffee beans enter a bean grinding gap between the outer grinding core and the movable grinding core and are ground into coffee powder. Therefore, the Italian coffee machine can prepare freshly ground coffee so as to meet various coffee requirements of users. The using method of the Italian coffee machine comprises five different working modes of hot extraction, water drinking, steam and temperature adjustment, the requirements of users for different coffee beverages or water drinking can be met, and the using scene of the Italian coffee machine is greatly expanded.

title: Multifunctional Italian coffee machine and use method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a multifunctional coffee machine and a using method thereof in the technical field of coffee machines. The multifunctional coffee machine comprises a water supply mechanism capable of providing normal-temperature water and ice water, an extraction mechanism and a steam mechanism. A first brewing head and a second brewing head of the extraction mechanism are used for hot extraction of coffee and cold extraction of coffee respectively. The steam mechanism is used for providing high-temperature steam, so that a user can foam milk or heat beverages. The multifunctional Italian coffee machine further comprises a bean grinding mechanism which can grind coffee beans in real time so as to provide high-quality coffee powder, and coffee drinks with more mellow flavor can be made. The use method of the multifunctional coffee machine comprises five different working modes, so that the multifunctional Italian coffee machine can adapt to various different use scenes.

title: Multi-position extraction coffee machine and control method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a multi-position extraction coffee machine and a control method thereof.The multi-position extraction coffee machine comprises a first extraction assembly and a second extraction assembly, the first extraction assembly is connected with a first heating assembly, and an extraction solvent heated by the first heating assembly is conveyed to the first extraction assembly; the first extraction assembly is connected with a first heating assembly, the second extraction assembly is connected with a second heating assembly, an extraction solvent heated by the second heating assembly is conveyed to the second extraction assembly, the drinking assembly is connected with the second heating assembly, and hot water obtained by heating of the second heating assembly is conveyed to the drinking assembly; the water source assembly is configured to provide water flow for the first extraction assembly, the second extraction assembly, the first heating assembly, the second heating assembly and the drinking water assembly. The second extraction assembly is additionally arranged, the number of the coffee extraction assemblies is increased, coffee can be extracted at multiple positions at the same time, and the increasingly loved requirement of people for coffee drinks is met.

title: Waterproof anticorrosive paint and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of high-performance coatings, in particular to a waterproof anticorrosive coating and a preparation method thereof. The problem that the high-compactness waterproof requirement and the long-acting anti-corrosion requirement of the coating are difficult to consider at the same time is solved. The coating is prepared by mixing a component A and a component B, polyvinyl alcohol is subjected to dual grafting through n-octanal and perfluorooctyltriethoxysilane, and the problem that polyvinyl alcohol is poor in water resistance is solved from the molecular level; the graphene oxide loaded with benzotriazole is used for constructing a synergistic corrosion prevention mechanism of physical barrier and chemical corrosion inhibition; a high-density interpenetrating network structure is constructed through organic bismuth catalysis; the stearic acid modified nano titanium dioxide and a specific grading shearing orientation process are matched, so that excellent water resistance, salt fog resistance and high adhesive force of the coating are realized.

title: High-precision metering and conveying equipment for waterproof paint
abstract: The utility model discloses waterproof coating high-precision metering and conveying equipment, and relates to the technical field of waterproof coating production, the metering device comprises a stirring box, a vertical frame is installed at the upper end of the stirring box, one side of the vertical frame and one end of the vertical frame are connected with a clamping frame, a material storage box is movably installed in the clamping frame, and the material storage box is connected with a conveying belt. A first placement frame is arranged on one side of the exterior of the stirring box, the transition box and the stirring box are connected through a pipeline, after weighing is completed, an electric push rod is used for driving a push plate to move, raw materials in the transition box are pushed into the stirring box, at the moment, a second electromagnetic valve is opened, and a first electromagnetic valve is closed; if the raw materials in the transition box exceed the metering value, the second electromagnetic valve is closed after the specified raw materials are discharged, then the first electromagnetic valve is opened, the redundant raw materials enter the temporary storage box and are temporarily stacked, and after the raw materials in the temporary storage box reach a certain value, the raw materials are conveyed back to the material storage box through the return pipe and the second hose by the water pump.

title: Cooking control method, cooking control device and automatic cooking equipment
abstract: The invention relates to a cooking control method, a cooking control device and automatic cooking equipment, and belongs to the technical field of cooking control. The method is applied to the automatic cooking equipment and comprises the following steps: acquiring real-time blood glucose data acquired by continuous blood glucose monitoring equipment, and adjusting cooking parameters of the automatic cooking equipment from preset cooking parameters to first cooking parameters based on the real-time blood glucose data; and determining a predicted blood glucose change rate and an actual blood glucose change rate of the real-time blood glucose data, and adjusting cooking parameters of the automatic cooking equipment from a first cooking parameter to a second cooking parameter based on an error in response to the fact that the error between the actual blood glucose change rate and the predicted blood glucose change rate in the same time period exceeds a preset threshold value. According to the method, the cooking parameters can be automatically adjusted according to the real-time blood glucose data of the user and the blood glucose change rate of the real-time blood glucose data, and the purpose of accurately controlling the blood glucose generation index of the cooked food is achieved, so that the method adapts to the blood glucose condition of the user, and the blood glucose management requirement of the user is met.

title: Solid waste recovery equipment for waterproof roll production
abstract: The invention discloses solid waste recovery equipment for waterproof coiled material production, and relates to the technical field of solid waste recovery, the solid waste recovery equipment comprises a crushing bin and further comprises a coiled material crushing mechanism, the coiled material crushing mechanism is arranged in the crushing bin, and the coiled material crushing mechanism comprises two connecting rotating shafts rotationally connected to the interior of the crushing bin; a plurality of crushing cutter heads are fixedly arranged on the surfaces of the two connecting rotating shafts in a sleeving mode, the two groups of crushing cutter heads are arranged in a staggered mode, a motor is fixedly connected to the back face of the crushing bin, and a driving gear is fixedly connected to an output shaft of the motor; the rear ends of the two connecting rotating shafts are fixedly connected with a first driven gear and a second driven gear correspondingly, the second driven gear is meshed with the driving gear, the first driven gear is meshed with the second driven gear, and the diameter of the first driven gear is smaller than that of the second driven gear. The problem that a crushing gap of a crushing roller is blocked due to adhesion of coiled materials is solved.

title: Flame-retardant waterproof roll as well as preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention provides a flame-retardant waterproof roll as well as a preparation method and application thereof, and belongs to the technical field of waterproof rolls. The flame-retardant waterproof coiled material sequentially comprises a modified magnesium oxide flame-retardant coating and a coiled material base body from top to bottom, wherein the modified magnesium oxide flame-retardant coating is formed by curing a modified magnesium oxide flame-retardant coating containing modified magnesium oxide, expanded graphite and aluminum hydroxide. By innovatively adopting modified magnesium oxide, aluminum hydroxide and expanded graphite to construct a synergistic flame-retardant system, organic combination of multiple flame-retardant mechanisms is realized, so that the flame-retardant grade of the coiled material reaches the B1 grade of the GB 8624-2012 standard, and the coiled material shows excellent fireproof safety, is suitable for engineering scenes with relatively high requirements on fire prevention and water prevention, and has a wide application prospect.

title: Remote control intelligent planning sweeping robot
abstract: The utility model provides a remote control intelligent planning floor sweeping robot, which relates to the technical field of floor sweeping robots and comprises a robot body chassis, a robot body top cover is fixedly mounted at the top of the robot body chassis, and a first square hole is formed in the surface of the robot body top cover. Second square holes are formed in the positions, located on the two sides of the first square hole, of the surface of a top cover of the robot body, front wheels and side sweeping brushes are fixedly connected to the bottom of a chassis of the robot body, and infrared sensors are symmetrically and fixedly connected to the outer arc edge of the chassis of the robot body. According to the utility model, through the main control chip, the wireless communication module, the positioning module and the navigation module in the disc of the remote control assembly, the effects of receiving a remote control instruction from a mobile phone APP, feeding back state information of the remote control assembly to the APP, and positioning and navigating the remote control assembly at the same time can be achieved. Therefore, the sweeping robot can be connected to a home router to realize remote communication with a mobile phone.

title: Intelligent control method of air conditioning equipment, electronic equipment, medium and program product
abstract: The invention provides an intelligent control method of air conditioning equipment, electronic equipment, a medium and a program product, and relates to the technical field of smart home/smart home. The method comprises the steps that the refrigeration and dehumidification processes of the air conditioner equipment are controlled from multiple dimensions, when one dimension is temperature correction and a temperature correction function is started, if the outdoor temperature of the space where the air conditioner equipment is located is smaller than or equal to the first preset temperature, the first temperature difference between the indoor temperature of the space and the set temperature of the air conditioner equipment is obtained; if the humidity in the space is smaller than the first preset humidity, the first temperature difference is within the first preset temperature difference range, and the set temperature is within the preset temperature range, the temperature compensation value of the air conditioner equipment is obtained according to air conditioner parameters, and the temperature compensation value of the air conditioner equipment is calculated according to the set temperature and the temperature compensation value. And the target temperature of the air conditioning equipment is obtained, so that the air conditioning equipment is controlled to reach the target temperature. According to the method, energy conservation of the air conditioner can be achieved from multiple dimensions.

title: Image recognition method based on multiple modes, storage medium and electronic device
abstract: The invention discloses an image recognition method based on multiple modes, a storage medium and an electronic device, and relates to the technical field of smart home, and the image recognition method based on multiple modes comprises the steps: determining a text feature vector of text input information and a visual feature vector of visual input information; determining a regional feature vector corresponding to the visual feature vector according to the correlation score of the text feature vector and the target feature vector; wherein the target feature vector is a feature vector at each spatial position in the visual feature vector, and the regional feature vector is related to text input information semantics; and matching the text feature vector with the regional feature vector to obtain a cross-modal matching result of the text input information and the visual input information. By adopting the technical scheme, the problem of low output result accuracy caused by separation of visual language large model area perception and semantic understanding is solved. And the accuracy of the output result of the visual language large model is improved.

title: MANUFACTURING DEVICE FOR COMPRESSED COFFEE BEAN BLOCK
abstract: A compressed coffee bean block manufacturing apparatus can include a main unit; a supply unit providing coffee beans to a supply area located within the main unit; a storage unit that receives the coffee beans in a storage space device from the supply area and transports the coffee beans to a compression area on one side of the supply area; and a compression and discharge unit that compresses and shapes the coffee beans in the compression area into a coffee bean block and then transports the coffee bean block to a discharge area on one side of the compression area for ejection, wherein the supply unit compresses or cracks the coffee beans before providing the coffee beans to the supply area.

title: LARGE PRE-TRAINED NEURAL NETWORKS FOR ONLINE MAP GENERATION AND AUTO-LABELING
abstract: [0000] A method of generating high definition (HD) maps for a vehicle based on standard definition (SD) maps includes, using a processor, receiving an SD map corresponding to an environment, receiving one or more aerial images corresponding to the environment, predicting and labeling features contained within the SD map using at least one pairing of the SD map and a respective aerial image of the one or more aerial images, generating a first HD map based on the predicted and labeled features contained within the SD map and the one or more aerial images, and transmitting the first HD map to the vehicle for use in controlling autonomous driving functions.

title: Auto leveling tamping machine
abstract: [0001a] [본 발명은 오토 레벨링 탬핑 머신에 관한 것으로서, 보다 상세하게는 탬핑부와, 레벨링부를 통해 각각 커피 입자의 분포, 커피 표면의 평탄화, 커피의 압축이 이루어지는데, 이 세 단계가 자동화되면 커피 추출 과정의 모든 변수들이 통제되어 일관된 품질을 유지할 수 있고, 자동화된 머신의 도구들을 통해 항상 일정한 품질의 커피를 제공할 수 있으며, 이는 고객의 만족도를 높이고 재방문율을 높이는 데 기여하며, 브랜드 이미지 개선에도 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있는 특징이 있다.]

title: METHOD OF GRADIENT-BASED BAYESIAN INFORMATION CRITERION COMPRESSION OF DECISION TREES
abstract: [0001] A computer-implemented method of compressing a decision tree by pruning its structure, wherein the decision tree is configured to determine a classification of its input, the method comprising the steps of: Receiving trained decision tree comprising a plurality of nodes, wherein each inner node is associated with a branching function. Outputting a score for each class label based on the traversed paths and the outputs of the reached leaf nodes and inner leaf nodes. Determining based on the outputs and the parameters of the Decision Tree a Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC). Optimizing at least the parameter of the probabilistic branching functions and the first parameters by minimizing a loss function based on the Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC), wherein the optimization is performed using gradient descent.

title: Brewing system and full-automatic coffee machine
abstract: The utility model provides a brewing system and a full-automatic coffee maker, the brewing system comprises a framework, the framework comprises a first side plate, a second side plate and a top plate, the first side plate and the second side plate are opposite, the top plate is connected with the first side plate and the second side plate, the first side plate is provided with a slag outlet, and a convex arc part is formed in the middle of the first vertical edge of the first side plate; the powder pressing head assembly is arranged at the top of the framework; the brewing cavity assembly is arranged in the framework and comprises a brewing cavity body and a residue pushing rod, and a residue scraping component is arranged at the top of the brewing cavity body; the power assembly is fixed to the framework and drives the brewing cavity to do reciprocating motion in the vertical direction, the brewing cavity is provided with an extraction position, a powder receiving position and a slag scraping position from top to bottom in the reciprocating motion process, and at the slag scraping position, a slag scraping component rotates under the action of the convex arc part, and slag cakes are pushed out of the slag outlet. The brewing cavity is always vertical, so that the uniformity of filling powder and pressed powder cakes is ensured, and the quality of coffee liquid is improved; and the brewing system is compact in overall structure, small in occupied space and high in universality.

title: Waterproof grade evaluation method for waterproof engineering
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of waterproof engineering, particularly discloses a waterproof grade evaluation method for waterproof engineering, solves the subjectivity problem of waterproof grade evaluation result deviation caused by lack of dynamic monitoring in waterproof grade evaluation, and improves the periodical evaluation accuracy of a waterproof engineering stage. The method comprises the steps of 1, calculating a waterproof safety coefficient according to a reference crack width value, and setting a re-waterproof performance index value of each waterproof grade evaluation index of a current waterproof project based on the waterproof safety coefficient; establishing a waterproof evaluation system based on the waterproof grade evaluation indexes; 2, dividing a waterproof evaluation grade standard range through a waterproof grade evaluation index range of the waterproof project; 3, performing real-time analysis on the engineering waterproof state in each construction stage, and calculating actual weight values of a plurality of waterproof grade evaluation indexes in the current construction stage; and 4, inputting the actual weight values of the plurality of waterproof grade evaluation indexes into the waterproof evaluation system to generate an actual waterproof evaluation value.

title: Waterproof coating mixing kettle
abstract: The utility model provides a waterproof paint mixing kettle which comprises a kettle body, a centrifugal part, a plurality of stirring parts, a gear set and a motor, the centrifugal part is coaxially and rotatably arranged in the kettle body and used for enabling materials in the kettle body to flow in the radial direction, and the stirring parts are all arranged in the kettle body and annularly distributed on the outer side of the centrifugal part. The stirring parts are used for enabling materials in the kettle body to axially flow, the gear set is mounted at the tops of the centrifugal part and the stirring parts, the gear set is used for enabling the plurality of stirring parts to rotate and revolve around the centrifugal part, and the motor is mounted at the top of the kettle body and used for driving the centrifugal part and the gear set to rotate. According to the utility model, the centrifugal part rotates and is matched with the gear set to drive the stirring part to revolve and rotate, so that materials can be subjected to radial, axial and circumferential pushing force and stirring force, and the technical effects of fully mixing the materials and improving the mixing efficiency are realized.

title: Monitoring method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses a monitoring method and device, electronic equipment and a storage medium, and relates to the technical field of smart home, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining door opening and closing behavior data of a target object; according to the door opening and closing behavior data and at least one predetermined high-frequency door opening time period, the door opening behavior of the target object is monitored, and a monitoring result is generated; wherein the at least one high-frequency door opening time period is determined based on historical door opening and closing behavior data of the target object; and when the monitoring result indicates that the door opening behavior of the target object deviates from the at least one high-frequency door opening time period, generating and sending reminding information. According to the method provided by the invention, when the system monitors that the door opening behavior deviates from the time periods determined based on the personal habits, the reminding is generated, so that false alarms caused by individual work and rest differences are remarkably reduced, the monitoring accuracy and the care pertinence are improved, and meanwhile, the energy efficiency of the system is optimized by reducing unnecessary monitoring activities.

title: Test case updating method and device, storage medium and electronic equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a test case updating method and device, a storage medium and electronic equipment. The test case updating method comprises the steps that historical data of network service operation on target equipment and response data of defense service records configured on the target equipment are acquired; determining a plurality of corresponding relations between a plurality of network attack modes contained in the historical data and a plurality of defense strategies contained in the response data; a first test case set is constructed based on the multiple corresponding relations, the first test case set comprises multiple test cases, and each test case is used for simulating a test scene; and updating the target test case set on the target equipment according to the test result of the first test case set. By adopting the technical scheme, the problem that a traditional test method depends on a predefined attack mode and a manually configured test case and cannot cover various complex test scenes is solved.

title: Recommendation information determination method and device, storage medium and electronic equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a recommendation information determination method and device, a storage medium and electronic equipment, and relates to the technical field of smart home, the recommendation information determination method comprises the steps of determining equipment resources of target equipment, and determining an adjustment strategy of a target model corresponding to the equipment resources, the equipment resources at least comprise one of computing resources and storage resources, and the adjustment strategy comprises one of full parameter adjustment and partial parameter adjustment; performing parameter adjustment on the target model according to the adjustment strategy, and inputting first feature information of a target object into the parameter-adjusted target model, so that the parameter-adjusted target model outputs a recommendation information set corresponding to a target page according to the first feature information; determining score information of each piece of recommendation information in the recommendation information set based on a recommendation strategy; and determining target recommendation information in the recommendation information set according to the score information of each piece of recommendation information.

title: Material management method and device and storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses a material management method and a storage medium, and the method comprises the steps: reading the label information of a plurality of material piles in a preset region, and obtaining the image data of the plurality of material piles, the label information comprising identity information and position information; performing point cloud analysis according to the image data of the plurality of material piles to determine material quantity information of each material pile; associating the position information, the identity information and the material quantity information of each material pile to determine the material information of each material pile; and mapping the material information of the plurality of material piles to a pre-constructed inventory map to obtain a material management map of the plurality of material piles. Through a multi-sensor fusion technology, identity information, quantity information and position information of the materials are comprehensively and accurately obtained, and accurate management of the material information is realized.

title: Multi-device collaborative food material management method and device
abstract: The invention provides a multi-device collaborative food material management method and device, and relates to the technical field of smart homes. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring initial food material data; performing data fusion processing on the initial food material data acquired through the data acquisition mode corresponding to the at least one intelligent device to obtain target food material data; under the condition that a recipe recommendation condition is triggered, generating a target recipe in a target format based on the target food material data; wherein the target format is a recommendation format corresponding to each intelligent device; and issuing the target recipe to each intelligent device, so that each intelligent device recommends the target recipe according to the corresponding recommendation format. According to the invention, through cooperative processing of data acquisition, fusion processing, intelligent generation and multi-terminal distribution, an'information isolated island 'among household equipment is effectively broken, and unified management of food material data among multiple equipment and scene-adaptive recipe recommendation service are realized.

title: Coffee composition with effects of improving immunity and resisting tumors
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of medicines and foods, in particular to a coffee composition capable of improving immunity, and the coffee composition can be used for preparing medicines or foods for improving immunity and resisting tumors. The coffee composition comprises an araliaceae plant extract and coffee. The araliaceae plants are one or more of ginseng, pseudo-ginseng or American ginseng. Wherein the araliaceae plant extract accounts for 2-12 parts, and the coffee accounts for 20-100 parts. The coffee composition can also comprise extracts of the following raw materials in parts by weight: 2 to 5 parts of codonopsis pilosula, 2 to 5 parts of astragalus membranaceus, 2 to 10 parts of Chinese date, 2 to 10 parts of medlar, 2 to 10 parts of ginger and 2 to 10 parts of liquorice. The coffee composition disclosed by the invention has obvious activity of improving immunity and resisting tumors.

title: Clamp for waterproof roll detection
abstract: The utility model provides a waterproof coiled material detection clamp, which comprises a lower seat body, an upper seat body and a locking screw rod, the upper seat body and the lower seat body are respectively provided with a detachable clamping plate, the two clamping plates are respectively provided with sawteeth, the upper seat body and the lower seat body are respectively provided with an installation groove, and the clamping plates are provided with installation parts. Mounting rods, movable rods and first springs are further arranged on the upper seat body and the lower seat body respectively, mounting holes are formed in the mounting parts, the first springs drive the mounting rods to extend into the mounting grooves and penetrate through the mounting holes, the moving direction of the movable rods is perpendicular to the moving direction of the mounting rods, wedge-shaped parts are arranged on the movable rods, and sliding grooves matched with the wedge-shaped parts are formed in the mounting rods; when the movable rod moves, the wedge-shaped part pushes the mounting rod to be away from the mounting groove and retreat from the mounting hole. The technical problem that an existing clamp is inconvenient to clean after sticky substances adhere to the clamp is solved, and the technical effects that the clamping plate can be conveniently detached for cleaning, and the sticky substances are prevented from affecting the stability of the clamping plate for clamping the waterproof coiled material are achieved.

title: Modular power manager for connecting a power grid to an appliance with a battery
abstract: An apparatus includes a housing. The housing has an interface portion configured to complementarily fit with an interface portion of an appliance. The apparatus includes a communication interface configured to be removably coupled with the appliance. The apparatus includes a power interface configured to be removably coupled with the appliance. The apparatus includes a processor configured to identify an appliance type of the appliance based on appliance communications and generate a signal based on the appliance type. The apparatus includes an AC interface configured to be coupled with an AC grid. The apparatus includes a battery. The apparatus includes a multi-mode inverter configured to receive power from the AC grid and/or the battery and send power to the appliance, based on the signal. The communication interface, the power interface, the processor, the AC interface, the battery, and the multi-mode inverter are each at least partially disposed in the housing.
