title: Elastic epoxy resin grouting material as well as preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention provides an elastic epoxy resin grouting material and a preparation method and application thereof, the elastic epoxy resin grouting material comprises a first component and a second component, the first component comprises bisphenol F epoxy resin, an epoxy resin reactive diluent, an alcohol non-reactive diluent, a reactive phase separation toughening agent and an interface treating agent; the second component comprises a quaternary Mannich reaction curing agent, a chain extender, a compound curing aid and an amine moisture stabilizer, the quaternary Mannich reaction curing agent is prepared from cardanol, N-aminoethyl piperazine, paraformaldehyde and polypropylene glycol diglycidyl ether through a Mannich reaction and has the structure shown in the formula (I), n is 5-10, n is 1-10, n is 1-10, and n is 1-10. The reactive phase separation toughening agent comprises any one of carboxyl-terminated nitrile rubber, amino-terminated nitrile rubber and polyether sulfone; the compound curing aid comprises a tertiary amine curing agent and organic acid.

title: Experimental device for automatically preparing reaction type coating
abstract: The invention provides an automatic preparation experiment device for a reaction type coating. The automatic preparation experiment device comprises a rack, a reaction kettle, a weighing assembly, a temperature control assembly, a discharging assembly, a stirring assembly and a cleaning assembly. The weighing assembly is matched with the temperature control assembly, the heating part is switched between the first position and the second position, in-situ weighing of the reaction kettle is achieved, and heating sleeve cable interference and mechanical arm transfer risks are avoided. The discharging assembly drives a discharging hopper to automatically move to the position above a feeding port through a translation part and a lifting part, and precise and controllable automatic feeding is achieved. The stirring assembly cooperatively controls the stirring paddle to extend into the kettle body for stirring through the lifting part and the rotary driving part. The cleaning assembly moves the stirring paddle to the position above the cleaning container through translation and immerses the stirring paddle into a cleaning agent, and automatic cleaning of the stirring paddle is achieved. The reaction type coating preparation experiment device integrates the functions of automatic discharging, stirring, reacting and cleaning, full-process automatic operation of a reaction type coating preparation experiment is achieved, and the high-throughput experiment requirement is met.

title: Self-cleaning method and device for intelligent electric appliance
abstract: The invention discloses a self-cleaning method and device for an intelligent electric appliance, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining an oil stain content value in a drainage pipeline in the drainage process of the intelligent electric appliance; if the greasy dirt content value is greater than or equal to the preset greasy dirt content threshold, controlling the drainage pump and the electromagnetic valve to close; the pressure intensity of the water storage chamber is greater than that of the air storage chamber; detecting a first accumulative closing time length of the electromagnetic valve in real time; under the condition that the first accumulative closing duration is larger than or equal to the first preset closing duration, the accumulative closing frequency of the electromagnetic valve is obtained, and the electromagnetic valve is controlled to be opened; water in the water storage chamber flows into the drainage pipeline through the electromagnetic valve so as to flush oil stains in the drainage pipeline; according to the accumulated closing times and the preset closing times, a real-time cleaning strategy is generated, and oil stains in the drainage pipeline are cleaned based on the real-time cleaning strategy. According to the invention, the oil stain in the drainage pipeline is cleaned by adopting a controllable water hammer effect, and the self-cleaning effect of the intelligent electric appliance is improved.

According to the invention, the oil stain in the drainage pipeline is cleaned by adopting a controllable water hammer effect, and the self-cleaning effect of the intelligent electric appliance is improved.

title: Household appliance control system and method and computer readable storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses a household appliance control system and method and a computer readable storage medium, and relates to the technical field of household appliance control, the household appliance control system comprises at least one control module and a plurality of household appliances in communication connection with the control module, and control software of each household appliance is deployed in the control module. The control software is used for performing operation decision processing on the household appliances; the control module is used for acquiring operation data of the to-be-controlled household appliance under the condition of detecting that the control condition of the household appliance is triggered, and inputting the operation data into control software of the to-be-controlled household appliance to generate a control command of the to-be-controlled household appliance; and sending the control command of the to-be-controlled household appliance to the to-be-controlled household appliance so as to control the operation of the to-be-controlled household appliance. The production cost of the household appliance can be reduced.

title: Sweeping robot protection part with buffer structure
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of floor mopping robots, and discloses a floor mopping robot protection piece with a buffer structure, which comprises an equipment top shell, an equipment bottom shell is clamped at the bottom of the equipment top shell, and a floor mopping robot assembly is fixedly connected at the top of the equipment bottom shell. A side edge buffering structure composed of an extending sleeve, a second buffering spring and a sliding supporting block arranged on the installation base is also very effective, when the side face of the sweeping robot is collided, a side edge protection plate can bear impact force, then the sliding supporting block is pushed to slide in the extending sleeve, and the side edge protection plate is protected. The sliding direction of the sliding supporting block is guaranteed through the limiting sliding grooves in the extension sleeves, the buffering process is more stable, the four extension sleeves and the second buffering springs are circumferentially distributed at equal intervals with the top shell of the equipment as the center, and the impact force of the side face can be coped with in all directions as well; and the side edge of the sweeping robot is protected from being damaged.

title: IMPROVED SECURITY MONITORING SYSTEM
abstract: There is provided a security monitoring system for monitoring of a premises, the security monitoring system comprising: a control unit, and an electrical discharge detector configured to detect electrical discharges in electrical wiring of the premises. There is also provided a method of operating a security monitoring system of a premises, the method comprising: detecting, by an electrical discharge detector of the security monitoring system, an electrical discharge in electrical wiring of the premises; and in response to the detection, transmitting an action signal to one or more devices.

title: HEATING ASSEMBLY FOR A KITCHEN DEVICE
abstract: A heating assembly (100) for a kitchen device (10) is provided, the heating assembly (100) being mounted in a cavity (12) for receiving water to be heated, and including a heating element (120) for heating the water in the cavity (12), an electrode (130) for contact with the water in the cavity (12), a power source (140) connected to the heating element (120) and the electrode (130) for creating an electric potential between the heating element (120) and the electrode (130) with the heating element (120) having an anodic potential. A kitchen device (10) having the heating assembly (100) is also provided as well as a method of operating the kitchen device (10).

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR CONFIGURING A PLANNER OF A TECHNICAL SYSTEM
abstract: Computer-implemented method for configuring a planner (61), wherein the planner (61) is configured for providing trajectory signals (t) for controlling a technical system (100, 200), the method comprising the steps of: • Providing a feasibility function (ĥ) to the planner (61), wherein the feasibility function (ĥ) is configured to determine a feasibility value for a trajectory signal (t), wherein the feasibility value indicates a minimal cost of a soft-constrained model predictive control optimization used by a controller (62) of the technical system (100, 200) for controlling the technical system (100, 200), wherein the controller (62) is configured for controlling the technical system (100, 200) based on trajectory signals provided by the planner (61); • Including the feasibility function (ĥ) as a term in a cost function of the planner (61) thereby configuring the planner (61), wherein the planner (61) provides a trajectory signal (t) based on the cost function, wherein the term may be weighted by a predefined weight.

title: KITCHEN APPLIANCE
abstract: Disclosed herein is a kitchen appliance comprising a main body having an attachment site for a component; wherein, said attachment site is adapted with an inductive transmitter and the component is adapted with a inductive receiver; wherein the inductive transmitter is configured to inductively couple with the inductive receiver when the component is at a threshold distance from the attachment site to thereby induce a threshold potential in the inductive receiver; and wherein the inductive transmitter is configured to inductively couple with the inductive receiver to induce an attachment potential when the component is connected to the attachment site in an attachment position; wherein, wherein the inductive receiver is electrically coupled with a sensory output device; wherein output from the sensory output device energized by the threshold potential is user discernable from output from the sensory output device energized by the attachment potential.

title: Beverage Pod Construction
abstract: [0000] Beverage pod material includes filter material and coating material. The filter material includes water-permeable material and is configured for formation into a beverage pod. The coating material is applied to at least a portion of at least one side of the filter material and can include, for example, polyethylene terephthalate. The filter material can be formed into a holder and a lid, configured to hold beverage brewing material and cover an open end of the holder, respectively. The coating material can be applied to at least a portion of the lid and/or the holder, such as to an entire surface or in a pattern on a surface. A beverage pod includes the beverage pod material and beverage brewing material arranged in the holder. The lid is fixed to the holder to close the open end of the holder and enclose the beverage brewing material.

title: METHOD FOR ADAPTING TRAINED GENERATIVE MACHINE LEARNING MODELS
abstract: Broadly speaking, embodiments of the present techniques provide a method for adapting trained generative machine learning, ML, models to produce high-quality and high-resolution images, even when the models were trained using training images of a lower resolution. The generative model may be any diffusion-based model.

title: DISTRIBUTED PROCESSING OF COLOR DATA ACROSS MULTIPLE COLOR SPACES
abstract: [0001] Apparatuses and methods are described including techniques for processing color data. Where, for at least one of the input colors, the processing includes operations performed in multiple color spaces to reduce computational complexity.

title: ENCODING AND DECODING INFORMATION FOR GENERATION OF DYNAMIC THREE-DIMENSIONAL (3D) CLOTHING
abstract: [0001] Encoding and decoding information for generation of dynamic three-dimensional (3D) clothing. For example, a method includes receiving, with a decoder, a plurality of parameters indicating a body motion, a body shape, and a characteristic of a clothing material and generating, with the decoder, a dynamic three-dimensional clothing based on the plurality of parameters, wherein the dynamic three-dimensional clothing is dynamic with respect to the body motion and the body shape.

title: Operation method and device, cleaning equipment, storage medium and program product
abstract: The invention provides an operation method and device of cleaning equipment, the cleaning equipment, a storage medium and a program product, and the method comprises the steps: responding to the operation state of the cleaning equipment, and obtaining influence parameters generated by at least two types of influence factors of the cleaning equipment in the operation process of the cleaning equipment; wherein the different types of influence factors are respectively used for indicating different influences of the operation of the cleaning equipment on the target object; based on the influence parameters of the at least two types of influence factors, target operation parameters of the cleaning equipment are determined; and operating the cleaning equipment according to the target operating parameters. According to the embodiment of the invention, the influence of the operation of the cleaning equipment on the target object can be reduced.

title: Waterproof connection structure of multi-interface data recorder
abstract: The utility model discloses a waterproof connection structure of a multi-interface data recorder, which comprises a recorder body, a plurality of interfaces are arranged on the recorder body, protective rings are arranged at the interfaces, a plurality of protective rings are connected onto the recorder body, connecting rings are inserted into the protective rings, joints are arranged inside the connecting rings, and the connecting rings are connected with the recorder body. A plurality of balls are circumferentially arranged between the connecting ring and the corresponding protective ring, a push ring is elastically connected to the outer side of the protective ring, a pressing ring is arranged on the inner curved surface of the push ring, the pressing ring and the balls are located on the same plane, and a contact ring is connected to the inner curved surface of the protective ring. According to the data recorder, the connecting ring is inserted into the protection ring, meanwhile, connection between the connector and the interface is achieved, the locking relation between the connecting ring and the protection ring is controlled through the push ring, effective sealing of all the interfaces of the data recorder is achieved, and the situation that the service life of an electronic element is affected due to moisture permeation is avoided.

title: Voice reminding method and device, equipment, medium and program product
abstract: The invention provides a voice reminding method, device and equipment, a medium and a program product, and relates to the technical field of smart home/smart home. The method comprises the steps that target control equipment and a control instruction of the target control equipment are determined according to a first voice instruction, the first voice instruction comprises an equipment identifier of the first voice equipment, and the control instruction comprises a target use function of the target control equipment and a starting time point of the target use function; sending the control instruction to the target control equipment, and receiving a first feedback instruction of the control instruction received by the target control equipment; and when the first feedback instruction is received, according to the device identifier of the first voice device and/or the device identifier of the second voice device of the last interaction of the user, determining a third voice device for performing voice reminding according to the first feedback instruction so as to initiate voice reminding. According to the method, the voice prompt reach rate can be improved.

title: Homographic deformation CNN for robust 3D perception
abstract: A computer-implemented method and system relate to an image encoder that receives a digital image as input. The image encoder generates a weight map using the prior feature map. A prior feature map is generated using pixels of the digital image. A weight map is generated based on Lie data associated with the digital image. The homography is interpolated between the two planar projections of the digital image using at least the weight map and the homography matrix. The homography matrix provides a mapping between two planar projections of the digital image. A homography kernel is generated by applying homography to the convolution kernel. A homographic transform kernel is applied to the prior feature map to convolve different planar regions appearing in the digital image, and a new feature map is generated for computer vision tasks involving three-dimensional (3D) perception.

title: GEO-oriented marketing content intelligent generation and optimization method
abstract: The invention discloses a GEO-oriented marketing content intelligent generation and optimization method, particularly relates to the technical field of intelligent marketing content generation, and is used for solving the problem that in the existing marketing content generation process, commodity facts, activity rules, application ranges and timeliness boundaries are difficult to be restrained in a unified manner, and the generation efficiency is poor. And the problems of fact drift, range extrapolation, aging distortion and multi-source content mixed introduction of the generated content are easily caused. Commodity information, activity rules, application scenes, region rules and question and answer records are uniformly collected and split, a marketing fact graph is constructed, and target fact sub-graph extraction, candidate content skeleton generation, answer recombination evaluation and published content correction are combined. Therefore, the purpose of carrying out unified constraint on the fact source, the applicable boundary, the aging relationship and the version relationship in the marketing content generation process is achieved, the problems of fact drift, range extrapolation, aging distortion and content mixed introduction are effectively reduced, and the consistency of the generated content, the target question sentence and the publishing scene is improved.

title: Home automatic layout method and device and storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses an automatic home layout method and device and a storage medium, and relates to the technical field of artificial intelligence, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining the house type structure information of a target space and the commodity information of candidate home commodities, and then determining an effective layout region of each candidate home commodity, screening out a feasible home commodity set from the candidate home commodities based on the effective layout area; based on a preset sorting strategy, sorting the commodities in the feasible household commodity set to obtain a sorting result; determining a to-be-arranged target commodity combination from the feasible household commodity set according to a sorting result; and performing layout optimization on the to-be-arranged target commodity combination by taking the layout region set as a search space, and outputting a layout scheme meeting a preset cost threshold value. According to the method and the device, the problems of low generation efficiency and slow response speed of the automatic home layout scheme in the prior art are solved, and the technical effect of remarkably improving the scheme generation speed on the premise of ensuring the layout rationality is realized.

title: Method and device for determining main and central network equipment, and electronic equipment
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of smart home, and provides a method and a device for determining main and central network equipment, and electronic equipment. The method for determining the main and central network equipment comprises the following steps: receiving a priority number distributed by a cloud server; wherein the cloud server distributes a priority number for the central network equipment after receiving an access request of the central network equipment for the equipment interconnection local area network, and the equipment interconnection local area network adopts a main and standby central network architecture; according to the priority number, determining that the own priority is the highest in the device interconnection local area network by searching the priority numbers of other central network devices in the device interconnection local area network; and setting the device as a main central network device of the device interconnection local area network. According to the invention, automatic election of the main hub network equipment in the main and standby hub networks can be efficiently and reliably realized.

title: Fault early warning unified management method and device and fault early warning unified management platform
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of fault early-warning management, and provides a fault early-warning unified management method and device and a fault early-warning unified management platform, and the method comprises the steps: creating a virtual device rule for each physical device under each multi-source heterogeneous monitoring cloud system, the virtual device rule comprising virtual device operation parameters of the physical devices, and the virtual device operation parameters of the physical devices; the virtual equipment operation parameters are virtual parameters having a mapping relationship with actual equipment operation parameters of the physical equipment; configuring an early warning calculation rule based on the virtual equipment operation parameters; for each physical device, acquiring a first parameter value of an actual device operation parameter of the physical device; based on the mapping relation, mapping the first parameter value into a second parameter value of the virtual equipment operation parameter; and generating an early warning prompt based on the second parameter value and the early warning calculation rule. Unified early warning management of each physical device under the multi-source heterogeneous monitoring cloud system is realized, and the operation complexity of operation and maintenance personnel is greatly reduced.

title: Smart home interactive recommendation method and device, storage medium and electronic device
abstract: The invention discloses a smart home interactive recommendation method and device, a storage medium and an electronic device, and the method comprises the steps: determining a recommendation statement content rule matched with a user interaction stage according to the current user interaction stage; based on the recommendation statement content rule, determining recommendation statement content according to preset user historical behavior data and preset multi-dimensional home context data; and outputting the recommended statement content to user interaction equipment according to the user interaction stage. According to the scheme of the embodiment of the invention, the interaction efficiency between the user and the smart home in the smart home environment can be improved.

title: Service calling method and device, storage medium and electronic device
abstract: The invention discloses a service calling method and device, a storage medium and an electronic device, and relates to the technical field of smart home, and the service calling method comprises the steps: based on a received service calling request, analyzing a micro-service contained in a to-be-called service corresponding to the service calling request; according to the workflow of the to-be-called service, determining a calling relationship between the at least two micro-services; based on the calling relationship, searching a second class loader corresponding to the called micro-service from a public class loader through a first class loader of the caller micro-service; and calling the second class loader by utilizing the public class loader through the first class loader. According to the technical scheme provided by the embodiment of the invention, a plurality of micro-service instances can be loaded into the same Java virtual machine, so that a reserved memory can be shared, different instances are loaded into the same process, and the performance loss is reduced.

title: DESIGNATED GOODS RECOMMENDATION METHOD AND APPARATUS
abstract: [0001a] [전자 장치에 의해 수행되는 지정상품 추천 방법이 개시된다. 지정상품 추천 방법은 상표에 대한 상품 정보를 수신하는 단계, 상품 정보로부터 사용자 벡터를 생성하는 단계, 사용자 벡터에 기초하여 데이터베이스로부터 복수의 지정상품 후보를 결정하는 단계, 복수의 지정상품 후보 각각의 클러스터 정보를 획득하는 단계, 각각의 클러스터 정보에 기초하여 언어 모델을 사용하여 각 클러스터에 포함된 지정상품과 상품 정보 간의 의미적 관련성을 평가하여 각 클러스터에 포함된 지정상품을 정제하는 단계, 정제된 각 클러스터에서 지정상품의 점수를 계산하는 단계 및 지정상품의 점수에 기초하여 추천상품을 결정하는 단계를 포함한다.]

title: Non-excavation repairing treatment method for leakage of kitchens, bathrooms and bathrooms
abstract: The invention discloses a kitchen and bath leakage non-excavation repairing treatment method. The method comprises the following steps of construction preparation, pipeline fixation, pipe sealing treatment, hidden water outlet treatment, floor tile gap cleaning, non-excavation capillary crystallization construction, non-excavation reactive crystallization construction and temporary seam protection. According to the specific implementation mode, for kitchens, bathrooms and bathrooms with the water leakage condition, special flexible materials are used for emphatically treating weak links such as through-wall pipelines, floor drains, internal and external corners and toilet bowls, and on the premise that a decorative layer is not damaged on the whole, a natural-permeation water-based permeation type inorganic waterproof agent is adopted for the ground, and the waterproof effect is achieved. According to the technical measure of non-excavation leakage repairing treatment of the building indoor deep-layer permeation curing non-damage waterproof agent (patent number: 2013105118293), the waterproof agent generates a water-insoluble colloid and crystal mixture through a chemical reaction in a structural layer to block capillary pores and capillary seam leakage water channels, the structural layer and a waterproof layer are scientifically repaired, and the waterproof effect is improved. Therefore, the water leakage problem is cured.

title: VIRTUAL INTRA PREDICTION MODE SELECTION IN MULTIPLE TRANSFORM SET SELECTION
abstract: A device (e.g., video encoder or video decoder) may determine transform sets for MTSS. For example, an MTSS indication (e.g., MTSS flag) may be obtained. The MTSS flag may be used to determine a transform set. A histogram of gradients (HoG) may be obtained. A VIPM (e.g., first VIPM) may be obtained, for example, based on the HoG. Whether the MTSS indication is enabled may be determined. Based on a determination that the MTSS indication is not enabled, a mode-specific transform set corresponding to VIPM may be obtained. Inverse transform may be performed based on the obtained transform set.

title: Desk treasure hub driving motor protection structure system meeting IP54 requirement
abstract: The utility model discloses a district wheel hub driving motor protection structure system meeting IP requirements, which comprises a casing, a support arm arranged on the top of the casing, an end cover arranged between the casing and the support arm and arranged on the lower portion of the support arm, an aluminum support fixedly arranged on the inner side of the end cover, and a rotating shaft arranged in the middle of the casing. The upper and lower ends of the rotating shaft are respectively sleeved with a front-end bearing and a rear-end bearing. The utility model has the beneficial effects that a first heavy labyrinth structure full of grease is formed between the oil storage tank of the aluminum bracket and the groove on the back surface of the end cover, and a second heavy labyrinth is formed between the annular upright post of the supporting arm and the annular upright post of the end cover, so that the grease in the first heavy labyrinth cannot be damaged by splashed water, and the dustproof and waterproof effects are further achieved.

title: Italian coffee machine
abstract: The Italian coffee machine comprises a main machine, a high-pressure air source and an air path system, the main machine comprises a water bin and a coffee extraction bin which are communicated through a one-way valve mechanism, the input end of the air path system is communicated with the output end of the high-pressure air source, and the output end of the air path system is communicated to the water bin. The gas path system can depressurize the high-pressure gas and convey the depressurized low-pressure gas to the top of the water sump; the gas path system comprises a high-pressure pipeline, a gas pressure reduction mechanism and a low-pressure pipeline, the input end of the high-pressure pipeline is connected with the output end of the high-pressure gas source, the output end is connected with a high-pressure cavity of the gas pressure reduction mechanism, the low-pressure cavity of the gas pressure reduction mechanism is connected with the input end of the low-pressure pipeline, and the output end of the low-pressure pipeline is communicated to the water sump. The Italian coffee machine integrates an automatic puncturing structure, a pressure reduction structure, a balance valve structure and a pressure relief structure, and is high in functionality, simple and attractive in overall appearance, small in size and small in occupied space.

title: Waterproof roll surface film covering device
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of film covering production and processing, and discloses a waterproof roll surface film covering device which comprises a support body, the top of the support body is in sliding connection with a film covering fixed-width plate, the bottom of the support body is in sliding connection with a roll material fixed-width plate, and the inner walls of the two roll material fixed-width plates are rotationally connected with roll material rotating wheels. And springs are arranged on the inner walls of the two film covering and width fixing plates, one ends of the four springs are fixedly connected with sliding blocks, the outer walls of the four sliding blocks are fixedly connected with film positioning rollers, and grasping mechanisms are arranged at the bottoms of the film covering and width fixing plates. According to the film laminating machine, the coiled material width fixing plates at the two ends are linked through the second rotating shaft rod and the second rotating plate, linkage is achieved, the second hydraulic rod provides power for the coiled material width fixing plates, and therefore the film laminating machine can adapt to film laminating of waterproof reels of various widths, the coiled material pulleys provide conveying power for coiled materials, and the effect that the coiled materials are conveyed in a directional mode and film laminating is accurate and stable is achieved.

title: Energy-saving batching process of modified asphalt coiled material
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of energy-saving batching, in particular to an energy-saving batching process of a modified asphalt coiled material, which comprises the following steps: configuring a first number of glue preparation tanks and a second number of curing tanks; controlling the first number of glue preparation tanks to circularly operate according to a preset staggered time sequence, wherein the circular operation of each glue preparation tank comprises a glue preparation stage and a transfer stage; controlling the second number of curing tanks to sequentially receive the intermediate materials from different glue making tanks according to a preset receiving time sequence; wherein the staggered time sequence of the glue preparation tanks is configured as follows: when one glue preparation tank starts a transfer stage, at least another glue preparation tank is in a glue preparation stage; and the receiving time sequence of the curing tanks is configured as follows: after the previous curing tank finishes receiving, the next curing tank begins to receive the intermediate material from the next glue making tank capable of outputting. According to the invention, the tank collaborative time sequence and temperature control can be optimized, and high-efficiency, energy-saving and high-quality flexible production can be realized with less equipment.

title: Weather-resistant anti-crack waterproof building coating as well as preparation method and construction method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a weather-resistant anti-crack waterproof building coating as well as a preparation method and a construction method thereof, and relates to the technical field of building protection materials. The weather-resistant, crack-resistant and waterproof building coating disclosed by the invention is prepared from a water-based fluorocarbon emulsion, an acrylate copolymer, epoxy resin, composite modified nano titanium dioxide, maleic anhydride grafted sepiolite, chopped basalt fibers, an ettringite generating agent, an ultraviolet light absorber, an antioxidant, a polycarboxylic acid type water reducing agent, a defoaming agent, a coalescing agent and deionized water. The weather-resistant anti-crack waterproof building coating can meet the protection requirement of a building outer wall under the outdoor complex working condition, the synergistic performance of weather resistance, durability, crack resistance, seepage prevention and high adhesion is achieved, the prepared protective coating is good in stability and long in service life, external erosion such as ultraviolet rays, rainwater and temperature changes can be effectively resisted, the problems of cracking, falling off, aging and the like of the coating are solved, and the weather-resistant anti-crack waterproof building coating is suitable for large-scale popularization and application. The protection period of the building exterior wall is prolonged.

title: Pre-paved waterproof coiled material as well as preparation method and use method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a pre-paved waterproof coiled material and a preparation method and a use method thereof, and belongs to the technical field of building waterproof coiled materials, the pre-paved waterproof coiled material comprises a substrate layer serving as a main waterproof sheet and a pressure-sensitive adhesive layer covering at least one surface of the substrate layer; and a functional release coating overlying a surface of the pressure sensitive adhesive layer facing away from the substrate layer; wherein the functional anti-sticking coating is formed by thermocuring coating slurry, and the thickness of the functional anti-sticking coating is 20-200 microns; the coating slurry comprises alkoxy silicon-based terminated polymer resin, a pretreated porous material, a cement inorganic cementing material, a filler and a functional auxiliary agent; the pretreated porous material is a granular porous material of which the surface is coated with a hydrolyzable closing layer, and particles of the porous material are completely or partially embedded into the functional anti-sticking coating.

title: Waterproof structure of building flat roof
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of building waterproofing, in particular to a building flat roof waterproof structure. The roof structure comprises a roof structure top plate. A cement perlite slope making layer, a 20-thickness cement mortar leveling layer, a polystyrene board heat preservation layer, a 30-thickness cement mortar leveling layer, a bentonite waterproof layer, a glass fiber square grid, a 30-thickness cement mortar protection layer, a steel wire mesh C20 concrete and a roof floor tile device layer are sequentially arranged on the upper portion of the roof structure top plate from bottom to top. And the thickness of the bentonite waterproof layer is 20-30 mm. And the thickness of the steel wire mesh C20 concrete is 60mm. According to the technical scheme, the problems that in the prior art, roof water seepage and indoor water leakage are easily caused due to the fact that a waterproof coiled material is adopted for roof water prevention and cannot be tightly bonded with a roof base layer are solved.

title: Gravel filling type in-situ leaching uranium mining well permeation channel waterproof process and special device
abstract: The invention belongs to a water insulation process, and particularly relates to a gravel filling type in-situ leaching uranium mining well permeation channel water insulation process and a special device. A gravel filling type in-situ leaching uranium mining well permeation channel waterproof technology comprises the following steps that firstly, a packer is installed; and 2, injecting agent plugging. The method has the remarkable effects that a permeation channel of the open hole ultra-deep construction section is blocked, a waterproof water-resisting layer is built, a leaching agent and leaching liquid are blocked by the water-resisting layer during migration in the leaching mining process, the flowing direction of the leaching agent to a target layer is changed, the leaching mining efficiency and benefit are improved, and the leaching mining cost is reduced. And meanwhile, the influence of mining on ore beds of adjacent mining areas or vertically overlapped mining areas is avoided.

title: Intelligent vacuum deposition box for semiconductor crystal and process of intelligent vacuum deposition box
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of semiconductor preparation, and discloses an intelligent vacuum deposition box for semiconductor crystals and a process thereof, the intelligent vacuum deposition box comprises a deposition box body, a heating assembly is mounted in the deposition box body, a crucible is mounted at the bottom of the deposition box body, and a cover plate is further mounted on the deposition box body. The bearing plate is driven by the driving motor to rotate, the deflection angle of the bearing plate is dynamically increased through mechanical transmission by means of a linkage structure of the vortex-shaped guide sliding rail, the synchronous rod and the balls, additional driving parts do not need to be arranged in a vacuum environment, and the working efficiency is greatly improved. The problem of signal transmission attenuation, delay or malfunction of an additional driving source in a vacuum environment can be effectively avoided, the risk that the driving source penetrates through the vacuum chamber to damage the sealing performance is reduced, the stability of the vacuum environment is guaranteed, the hidden danger that a lubricating medium of the driving source volatilizes to pollute a workpiece and a deposition environment can be reduced, and the service life of the driving source is prolonged. And the operation reliability and the deposition quality of the equipment can be improved.

title: PERSONALIZED IMAGE GENERATION
abstract: Broadly speaking, the present techniques generally relate to a method and apparatus for generating personalized images. In particular, the present techniques provide an image generation system which generates an output image based on user selected content and style as well as a method for training the image generation system. Advantageously, the present techniques, include the use of adapters which are combinable with the image generation model to personalize the output image. The present techniques also include a hypernetwork to produce weight coefficients for merging subject/content and style adapters. The present techniques optionally further comprise an automatic evaluation protocol of the generated image based on a multimodal large language model.

title: SERVER AND METHOD FOR MANAGING CONTENT INSTALLED IN HOME APPLIANCE
abstract: The present invention relates to technology related to a server and a method for managing content installed in a home appliance. The server for managing content installed in a home appliance according to an embodiment of the present invention comprises: a server communication unit for communicating with a first home appliance and receiving an experience history of first content installed in the first home appliance; a server control unit for using the experience history to set a usage group of the first home appliance, and controlling the management of the first content installed in the first home appliance according to a content management rule applying to the usage group; and a database for storing the usage group and the experience history.

title: FEW-SHOT OBJECT DETECTION WITH VISION-LANGUAGE MODELS
abstract: [0000] A fine-tuned model for few-shot object detection is output. A dataset of K-shot classes is created for fine-tuning a pretrained vision language model (VLM). Concept alignment is performed between the dataset of K-shot classes and the VLM. Fine-tuning is performed on the VLM using the dataset of K-shot classes with pseudo-negative federated loss to generate a few-shot object detection (FSOD) model. The FSOD model is output for use in object detection of the K-shot classes in image data received from one or more sensors.

title: A METHOD FOR GENERATING A DISCRIMINATIVE LARGE VISION-LANGUAGE MODEL
abstract: Broadly speaking, embodiments of the present techniques provide a method for transforming a generative large vision language model, LVLM, into a discriminative large vision language model, LVLM.

title: DIMD WITH ALTERNATIVE FILTER KERNELS
abstract: [0001] A decoding method is disclosed. Gradients for a current block are first obtained by filtering samples in a neighboring template of the current block, wherein obtaining gradients for a current block comprises substituting at least one of a Sobel filter or an edge detection filter by a generic filter. A histogram of oriented gradients (HoG) is then obtained for the current block based on the gradients. An intra mode is selected for the current block based on the HoG. The current block is then decoded using the selected intra mode.

title: INTERACTION OF QUANTIZATION CONSTRAINED CORRECTION WITH ZEROING-OUT OF COEFFICIENTS
abstract: Method and apparatus are described wherein a filtered reconstructed image block from a prediction block and a reconstructed prediction residual is obtained and a Quantization Constrained correction is applied to the filtered reconstructed image block, wherein the Quantization Constrained correction applied depends on whether at least one part of transformed coefficients decoded for the image block have been zeroed out during encoding of the image block. In some embodiments, QC correction is skipped for these transformed coefficients. In some variants, scanning of the transformed coefficients is adapted for the image block.

title: Lithium battery heating safety boundary construction method in low-temperature environment
abstract: A lithium battery heating safety boundary construction method in a low-temperature environment comprises the following steps: carrying out a battery thermal runaway experiment at a low temperature to obtain a thermal runaway trigger boundary temperature of a large surface of a battery; carrying out a battery heating temperature rise experiment at low temperature to obtain temperature change difference characteristics of the large surface of the battery and the tab; building a battery temperature rise simulation model under the condition of low-temperature top-speed heating by utilizing experimental data; the battery temperature rise characteristics under different boundary conditions are analyzed, corresponding tab temperatures at different environment temperatures and different heating rates during thermal runaway triggering are calculated based on thermal runaway triggering boundary temperatures of a battery large surface in a thermal runaway experiment, and a battery safety temperature boundary is constructed in a fitting manner. According to the method, on the basis of experimental means and finite element simulation, the influence rule of different low-temperature environment temperatures and different tab heating rates on battery temperature rise is obtained, a battery safety temperature boundary model is constructed and used for guiding the heating process, and the thermal runaway phenomenon can be effectively avoided.

title: Pre-charging system and mower
abstract: The utility model provides a pre-charging system and a mower, and the pre-charging system comprises a capacitive load unit which comprises a plurality of capacitive loads; the power supply module is connected with each capacitive load through a plurality of first current paths and supplies power to the capacitive loads; and the constant current module is connected with each capacitive load through a plurality of second current paths. According to the pre-charging system provided by the invention, the power supply module is connected with each capacitive load through the plurality of first current paths and supplies power to the capacitive loads, the constant current module is configured to output the pre-charging current to the capacitive loads through the second current paths, and the first current paths are configured to be conducted after the capacitive loads are pre-charged. The pre-charging requirement of a plurality of capacitive loads can be met by using one constant current module. Meanwhile, the constant current module is used for pre-charging, the pre-charging current is controllable, the pre-charging speed and the pre-charging efficiency can be greatly improved, and compared with a scheme using a pre-charging resistor, the loss of the constant current module is lower.

title: Roof structure
abstract: The utility model belongs to the field of buildings, and provides a roof structure which comprises a base layer, a reinforcing layer, an isolating layer and a light reflecting layer, the reinforcing layer is arranged on the upper surface of the base layer and used for reinforcing the base layer, the isolating layer is arranged on the upper surface of the reinforcing layer and used for isolating the reinforcing layer from the outside, and the light reflecting layer is arranged on the upper surface of the isolating layer and used for reflecting light. The reflector reflects sunlight. According to the roof structure, the problems that the mineral aggregate of an old asphalt base layer roof containing the mineral aggregate is prone to falling off, and a coiled material is difficult to be directly arranged on the base layer can be solved, and the installed light reflecting layer is firmer under the condition that the original base layer is not disassembled.

title: Surface cleaning device for file box processing
abstract: The utility model relates to the field of file box processing, and discloses a surface cleaning device for file box processing, which comprises a supporting table for supporting, the top end of the supporting table is fixedly connected with a mounting frame, the middle part of the top end of the mounting frame is fixedly connected with a cleaning water tank, and the left side of the bottom end of the cleaning water tank is fixedly connected with a lower discharge pipe. A water pump is fixedly connected to the exterior of the lower discharging pipe, a traction water frame is slidably connected to the interior of the mounting frame, drainage pipes are fixedly connected to the two sides of the interior of the traction water frame, a connecting water pipe is fixedly connected to the rear side of the top end of the traction water frame, and a conveying hose is fixedly connected to the bottom end of the lower discharging pipe; the bottom end of the conveying hose is fixedly connected to the top end of the connecting water pipe, and an overturning traction assembly is installed on the rear side of the top end of the installation frame. According to the file box flushing device, the effect of flushing the file box is improved, and the efficiency of processing multiple surfaces of the file box is guaranteed.

title: Glue mixing device
abstract: The utility model provides a glue mixing device. The glue mixing device comprises a shell, the material conveying mechanisms are constructed to convey different types of raw material rubber, and each material conveying mechanism comprises a storage tank arranged on the shell and constructed to store one of the raw material rubber; the conveying mechanism is communicated with the discharging end of the storage tank and is configured to convey the raw material glue in the corresponding storage tank; the mixing mechanism is configured to be communicated with the output ports of the conveying mechanisms of the plurality of material conveying mechanisms so as to receive the various raw material glues and mix the raw material glues to form a mixed glue solution; and the control module is arranged on the shell and is configured to control the conveying amount of the raw material rubber conveyed by the conveying mechanism based on the set parameters.

title: Bending fatigue tester for building protective film
abstract: The utility model discloses a bending fatigue tester for a building protective film. The bending fatigue tester comprises a base, and a bending mechanism, a transmission mechanism and a driving mechanism which are arranged on the base, the bending mechanism comprises a pair of long-strip-shaped clamping plates capable of swinging up and down in a reciprocating mode, the center positions of the clamping plates are rotationally connected with rotating shafts, and the rotating shafts are installed on the side faces of the base respectively. The transmission mechanism comprises a main shaft, two cranks installed at the two ends of the main shaft respectively and two connecting rods connected with the cranks respectively, the upper ends of the connecting rods are connected to the eccentric positions of the clamping plates respectively, and the cranks, the connecting rods and the clamping plates which are connected mutually form two crank rocker mechanisms respectively. The bending fatigue testing device is used for carrying out bending fatigue testing on the building protective film and determining whether various performance indexes of a building protective film product still meet requirements or not after the building protective film product is bent, twisted and deformed along with a metal roof.

title: Roof waterproof repairing structure
abstract: The utility model discloses a repairing structure for a leakage roof, which comprises a cement mortar interface layer, a waterproof roll and a protective film, the cement mortar interface layer, the waterproof roll and the protective film are sequentially arranged on a concrete roof, the waterproof roll is laid on the surface of the cement mortar interface layer in a wet manner, the protective film is laid on the surface of the waterproof roll, and a layer of neat cement paste is painted between the protective film and the waterproof roll to serve as a middle interface layer. The waterproof structure is convenient to construct, has a reflective heat insulation function, can reduce solar radiation heat absorption of a building, and is suitable for roof repairing projects with limited load capacity and energy-saving requirements.

title: Method and device for accessing intelligent household electrical appliance to household system, and related equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a method and a device for accessing an intelligent household electrical appliance to a household system, and related equipment. The method comprises the following steps: broadcasting query information of equipment to be accessed; wherein the to-be-accessed equipment query information comprises a preset bit query command for a preset equipment identification code; if response access information of to-be-accessed equipment for the equipment query information is obtained and a communication address allocation condition is met, allocating a communication address to the to-be-accessed equipment according to the response access information and a preset communication address allocation rule; wherein the response access information comprises the preset equipment identification code of the equipment to be accessed. According to the scheme disclosed by the invention, the actually existing to-be-accessed device can be queried, and the query efficiency of the to-be-accessed device is improved.

title: Building material fluid equipment heating method and system based on multi-dimensional data analysis
abstract: The invention discloses a building material fluid equipment heating method and system based on multi-dimensional data analysis, and particularly relates to the field of industrial heating, comprising data acquisition and sensor deployment, data preprocessing, multi-dimensional data analysis and control strategy design. Through data acquisition and sensor deployment, the working state of the fluid equipment is monitored in real time, accurate data is provided for subsequent analysis, then, data preprocessing and establishment of a multi-dimensional data analysis model reveal the interaction relationship among physical fields in the fluid equipment, a scientific basis is provided for optimizing the heating process, and the working state of the fluid equipment is monitored in real time. And finally, according to a control strategy designed according to a multi-dimensional data analysis result, precise control over the heating process of the fluid equipment is achieved, and the energy efficiency and the production efficiency are improved.

title: Anti-aging waterproof coiled material and preparation process thereof
abstract: The invention discloses an anti-aging waterproof coiled material and a preparation process thereof, and relates to the technical field of waterproof coiled materials prepared from high-molecular compounds. According to the waterproof coiled material, linear low-density polyethylene serves as a matrix, and an antioxidant, a light stabilizer, an ultraviolet absorbent, a synergistic agent, a rare earth cerium complex, carbon black and other components are added in a matched mode. The preparation process comprises the steps of mixing ingredients, premixing and melting, extrusion molding, online rheology monitoring and temperature dynamic adjustment, cooling and shaping and the like. According to the invention, through construction of a multi-component synergistic anti-aging system, the components play a protection role in different stages and different paths of polymer degradation, and a three-dimensional protection network is formed; the prepared waterproof coiled material has excellent ultraviolet aging resistance and thermo-oxidative aging resistance, the product quality stability is high, the comprehensive performance is balanced, the service life is long, and the waterproof coiled material has good application prospects and economic value.

title: Portable coffee filter cup structure and Italian coffee machine thereof
abstract: The utility model discloses a portable coffee filter cup structure and an Italian coffee machine thereof, and belongs to the technical field of coffee equipment, the portable coffee filter cup structure comprises a cup body with a filter cavity, a powder ejecting assembly is arranged in the filter cavity, and the powder ejecting assembly comprises a movable top plate and a supporting column arranged at the lower end of the movable top plate; the device further comprises an elastic element which is arranged on the supporting column in a sleeving mode. Through the synergistic effect of the movable top plate and the elastic element, self-adaptive adjustment of the stroke of the brewing net is achieved, the problem that powder is splashed when the powder amount is too small or blocked when the powder amount is too large is effectively solved, and extraction uniformity and stability are remarkably improved. Meanwhile, a mixing and filtering space is arranged, so that coffee liquid is roughly filtered, then secondarily mixed and finely filtered, full contact of grease and micro powder is promoted, and the purity and taste mellowness of the liquid are enhanced. In addition, after brewing is completed, the elastic element drives the movable top plate to automatically reset, the linkage structure promotes the powder residues to be rapidly separated from the inner wall of the filter cavity, and the powder residues are convenient to clean.

title: Coffee extraction method that allows coffee extraction by area of the group head
abstract: 본 발명은 커피를 추출하는 브로그룹이나 그룹헤드의 영역별 커피추출이 가능한 커피추출 방법에 관한 것으로, 더욱 상세하게는 커피 그룹헤드를 적어도 2개의 영역으로 분할하고, 각 영역별로 커피 추출수의 추출압력, 추출유량, 추출온도 및 추출시간을 개별 제어하여 커피를 추출하는 방법에 관한 것이다. 이를 위한 본 발명에서 제안하는 브로그룹 또는 그룹헤드의 영역별 커피추출이 가능한 커피 추출 방법은 포터필터를 담긴 커피를 적어도 2개의 영역으로 분할하고, 분할된 영역별로 커피 추출수의 추출압력, 추출유량, 추출시간 및 추출온도 중 적어도 하나를 개별 제어하는 다단 커피추출 프로파일을 불러오거나 생성하는 단계; 및 불러오거나 생성한 다단 커피추출 프로파일에 따라 각 영역별로 커피 추출수의 추출압력, 추출유량, 추출시간 및 추출온도를 설정하고, 설정한 커피 추출수의 추출압력, 추출유량, 추출시간 및 추출온도에 따라 각 영역별로 커피를 추출하는 단계;를 포함한다.

title: Industrial brush assembly
abstract: The utility model discloses an industrial brush assembly, which belongs to the technical field of industrial production, and comprises a shaft rod, the circumferential surface of the shaft rod is detachably connected with a base material, the circumferential surface of the base material is fixedly connected with a plurality of rolling bristles, and the circumferential surface of the base material is detachably connected with a plurality of mounting plate assemblies; each mounting plate assembly comprises two groups of rib plates, the two groups of rib plates are detachably connected to the base material, and the two groups of rib plates are located on the two symmetrical sides of one rolling bristle respectively; horizontal bristles are fixedly connected to the ends, close to each other, of the two sets of rib plates, and the two horizontal bristles are located on the outer side of one rolling bristle; according to the cleaning device, every two horizontal bristles correspond to one rolling bristle, the rolling bristles are distributed around the shaft rod in the radial direction, the surfaces, parallel to the central axis of the shaft rod, of industrial products can be cleaned in a rolling mode, and the two horizontal bristles on each mounting plate assembly are coaxially arranged around the shaft rod and correspond to the two side faces of the industrial products to conduct horizontal rotating cleaning. Therefore, multi-surface cleaning of industrial products is realized.

title: Moistureproof and anti-condensation system for basement
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of moisture prevention and dehumidification, solves the technical problems that in the prior art, a plurality of circuits are needed to monitor and control a dehumidification motor, efficiency is low, cost is high, and electric energy is wasted, and particularly relates to a moisture prevention and condensation prevention system for a basement. The moisture-proof and anti-condensation system further comprises a dehumidification module, a temperature sensing module, a humidity sensing module, a power supply module and an early warning module, the humidity sensing module and the micro-processing module cooperate with each other, light sensation control is carried out through a light emitting diode of humidity, a photosensitive resistor is changed through light sensation, and the dehumidification motor is directly controlled to work, so that the moisture-proof and anti-condensation system is simple in structure and convenient to use. In this way, automatic temperature and humidity induction control can be achieved without using a chip to control the motor and without using a particularly complex circuit, the manufacturing cost can be saved, automatic temperature and humidity control over the dehumidification motor can be efficiently achieved, and maintenance and repair are very convenient.

title: One-step forming equipment for HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) polymer waterproof coiled material
abstract: The utility model relates to waterproof coiled material one-time forming equipment, belongs to the technical field of high polymer material processing, and particularly relates to HDPE high polymer waterproof coiled material one-time forming equipment which comprises extrusion equipment, a conveying table and a cooling table and is further provided with an alternate composite cooling mechanism, a lifting platform, a cutting device, a winding device and a coiled material conveying path. The alternate composite cooling mechanism realizes composite cooling of the coiled material through alternate arrangement of a water cooling tank and an air cooling tank; the lifting platform is matched with the cutting and winding device to realize double-layer layout and convenient maintenance of the equipment; the roller assembly and the guide roller component guarantee smooth transmission of the coiled material. According to the high-density polyethylene waterproof roll cooling device, the effects of improving the roll cooling quality, improving the space utilization rate of a plant and optimizing the production process are achieved, and the problems that an existing high-density polyethylene waterproof roll production device is poor in cooling effect, large in occupied space and not smooth in production process are solved.

title: Intelligent vacuum circuit breaker
abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent vacuum circuit breaker, which relates to the technical field of vacuum circuit breakers and comprises a protective frame, a vacuum circuit breaker body, a protective plate and a conveniently-disassembled assembly. A ventilation opening is formed in one side of the protection frame; the vacuum circuit breaker body passes through the top of the protective frame; the protection plate is embedded with the protection frame; the assembly convenient to disassemble is arranged in the protection plate and comprises a limiting mechanism used for fixing the protection plate and a transmission mechanism used for driving the limiting mechanism to move. According to the utility model, through the arrangement of the assembly convenient to disassemble, the protection plate can prevent an operation part on the vacuum circuit breaker body from being touched by mistake, and it is ensured that misoperation of the operation brake cannot be carried out under specific conditions, so that possible electrical accidents are avoided; and external pollutants such as dust, moisture, corrosive gas and the like can be shielded and prevented from invading the interior of the vacuum circuit breaker body, so that the risk of insulation performance reduction or mechanical jamming is reduced.

title: TRANSFORM DERIVATION USING DIMD FOR TIMD/DIMD MODE
abstract: Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are configured for transform derivation using decoder-side intra mode derivation (DIMD) for one or more of template-based intra mode derivation (TIMD) mode or DIMD mode. In examples, a video coding device may be configured to determine that a template-based intra mode derivation (TIMD) mode is enabled for a current block. The device may apply a decoder side intra mode derivation (DIMD) like process to derive a virtual intra prediction mode (VIPM) from a neighboring reconstructed template of a current block or a prediction block associated with the current block. The device may, based on the derived VIPM, determine a transform kernel set for predicted residual coding.

title: FEATURE PICTURE HEADER FOR FEATURE COMPRESSION BITSTREAMS
abstract: [0000] Systems, methods, and instrumentalities for a feature picture header (FPH) for feature compression bitstreams. An example video decoding device may receive a first FPH network abstraction layer (NAL) unit that indicates a first feature picture parameter set (FPPS) associated with a first frame. The device may decode the first frame. The device may reconstruct a first set of features associated with the first frame based on the first FPPS. The device may receive a second FPH NAL unit that indicates a second FPPS associated with a second frame. The device may decode the second frame. The device may reconstruct a second set of features associated with the second frame based on the second FPPS.

title: Espresso machine with residual water discharge and residual moisture removal functions
abstract: [0001a] [ 본 발명은 잔류수 배출 기능을 갖는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것으로, 보다 상세하게는 원통형 내압 용기의 내면에 접하여 길이 방향으로 이동하는 피스톤에 의하여 형성되는 압력 및 펌프를 동작시켜 발생하는 흡입력을 이용하여 피스톤의 저단면에 일측 개구부가 위치하고 피스톤의 상단부를 통해 원통형 내압 용기 외부로 연장되는 배수관으로 잔류수를 효율적으로 배출하는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것으로, 에스프레소를 추출하고 남은 용수(잔류수)가 브루 챔버(Brew Chamber) 내에 잔류하거나 포터필터의 하방으로 낙하되지 않도록 제거하는 것을 특징으로 하는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것이다. 아울러, 본 발명은 잔류수분 제거 기능을 갖는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것으로, 보다 상세하게는 원통형 내압 용기의 외면에 접하여 위치하는 히터와 원통형 내압 용기의 내면에 접하여 길이 방향으로 이동하는 피스톤을 이용하여 잔류수분을 효율적으로 제거하는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것으로, 에스프레소를 추출하고 잔류수를 배출 한 후에도 원통형 내압 용기나 피스톤의 표면 등에 남아 있는 잔류수분을 제거하여 기기의 수명을 연장함은 물론 위생성을 향상시키는 것을 특징으로 하는 에스프레소 머신에 관한 것이다. ]

title: CONTINUOUS BAROMETRIC ROLL-TO-ROLL EQUIPMENT
abstract: [0001a] [본 실시예는 원단을 열처리 및 냉각처리하는 롤투롤 설비에 있어서, 대기압 상태로부터 원단을 공급받아 제1차동배기부가 넓은 공간에서 좁은 공간으로 상기 원단을 이동시켜 설비 내부를 감압하는, 제1챔버, 상기 제1챔버와 연통되고, 상기 원단을 열처리하는 히터부 및 상기 히터부와 연통되고 열처리된 상기 원단을 냉각처리하는 냉각부를 포함하는, 제2챔버 및 상기 냉각부와 연통되고, 제2차동배기부를 통해 설비 내부를 추가감압하고 냉각처리된 상기 원단을 회수하여 상기 설비 외부로 배출하는, 제3챔버를 포함하는, 연속식 기압조절 롤투롤 설비를 제공할 수 있다.]

title: VIRTUAL INTRA PREDICTION MODE SELECTION IN MULTIPLE TRANSFORM SET SELECTION
abstract: [0001] A device (e.g., video encoder or video decoder) may determine transform sets for MTSS. For example, an MTSS indication (e.g., MTSS flag) may be obtained. The MTSS flag may be used to determine a transform set. A histogram of gradients (HoG) may be obtained. A VIPM (e.g., first VIPM) may be obtained, for example, based on the HoG. Whether the MTSS indication is enabled may be determined. Based on a determination that the MTSS indication is not enabled, a mode-specific transform set corresponding to VIPM may be obtained. Inverse transform may be performed based on the obtained transform set.

A VIPM (e.g., first VIPM) may be obtained, for example, based on the HoG. Whether the MTSS indication is enabled may be determined. Based on a determination that the MTSS indication is not enabled, a mode-specific transform set corresponding to VIPM may be obtained. Inverse transform may be performed based on the obtained transform set.

title: KEYPOINTS AND LANDMARKS IN AVATAR REPRESENTATION
abstract: Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are disclosed for avatar keypoints and landmarks representation. A file (e.g., an MPEG avatar representation format (MARF) file) may be received. The file may include a plurality of assets. The file may indicate keypoint and landmark component information. An asset may be selected from the plurality of assets in the file based on parsing the file. A container may be determined based on the selected asset and the keypoint and landmark component information. At least one of a keypoint or a landmark may be determined based on the determined container. At least one of a keypoint or a landmark may animate an avatar based on the at least one of the keypoint or landmark.

title: TRANSFORM DERIVATION USING DIMD FOR TIMD/DIMD MODE
abstract: [0001] Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are configured for transform derivation using decoder-side intra mode derivation (DIMD) for one or more of template-based intra mode derivation (TIMD) mode or DIMD mode. In examples, a video coding device may be configured to determine that a template-based intra mode derivation (TIMD) mode is enabled for a current block. The device may apply a decoder side intra mode derivation (DIMD) like process to derive a virtual intra prediction mode (VIPM) from a neighboring reconstructed template of a current block or a prediction block associated with the current block. The device may, based on the derived VIPM, determine a transform kernel set for predicted residual coding.

title: ADAPTIVE LOOP FILTER RESIDUALS SCALING WITH OPTIMAL INITIALIZATION
abstract: [0001] Systems, methods, and/or instrumentalities are disclosed herein for a device that may be related to adaptive loop filter residual scaling with optimal initialization. In examples, a device may include a processor. The device may determine a correction of a reconstructed picture sample. The device may determine a classification associated with the reconstructed picture sample. The device may, based on the classification, determine a first scaling parameter. The device may determine a second scaling parameter based on the first scaling parameter. The device may generate a scaled correction based on the second scaling parameter and the correction. The device may apply the scaled correction to the reconstructed picture sample.

title: EXTERNAL DATA IN AVATAR REPRESENTATION FORMATS
abstract: Systems, methods, and instrumentalities are disclosed related to external data in avatar representation formats. In examples, a decoding/encoding device may include a processor. The device may be configured to determine that a data file comprises a plurality of data components. The device may determine that a data component of the plurality of data components is associated with a first data format that an application does not support. The device may obtain a link to access an external data content associated with a second data format that the application supports. The device may obtain external data of the external data content using the link. The device may decode the external data.

title: Manual espresso machine
abstract: [0000] An espresso press for forcing hot water through coffee grounds into a container rests on a support surface, and is comprised of a base, a stand projecting upwardly from the support surface, an arbor assembly, a brewhead that includes a brewhead mount fixed with the stand, and an espresso chamber adapted to receive filter baskets of various sizes. The arbor assembly is comprised of an arbor mount, and an arbor that includes a movable shaft the arbor aperture and a plunger slidably fixed with the shaft. The arbor assembly further includes a rack-and-pinion arrangement that includes a rack gear fixed with the shaft of the arbor, and a pinion gear partially projecting into the arbor aperture and adapted to engage the rack gear of the arbor when the arbor is fixed within the arbor aperture. The pinion gear is rotatable with a manual lever.

title: Post-crosslinking type silane coupling agent suitable for silicone adhesive, water-resistant ultraviolet-resistant silicone adhesive and application of water-resistant ultraviolet-resistant silicone adhesive
abstract: The invention provides a post-crosslinking type silane coupling agent, a water-resistant ultraviolet-resistant silicone adhesive and application of the water-resistant ultraviolet-resistant silicone adhesive and belongs to the technical field of sealants, and the post-crosslinking type silane coupling agent suitable for the silicone adhesive is bis (diisopropyl ketoxime) dimethoxysilane. The water-resistant ultraviolet-resistant silicone adhesive is prepared from polysiloxane resin, polydimethylsiloxane, polyether modified silicone oil, an ethylenediamine tetraacetic acid chelating agent, color paste, reactive silicone oil, a first silane coupling agent, an organic tin catalyst and a post-crosslinking silane coupling agent.

title: Hot-melting waterproof roll edge banding machine
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of edge sealing machines, and discloses a hot melting waterproof roll edge sealing machine which comprises a support, a pulley is rotatably connected in the support, a push handle is arranged on the side wall of the support, a gas pipe is arranged in the support, a flame gun is arranged on the side wall of the support, and an edge sealing roller is arranged on the side wall of the support. An elastic assembly is arranged on the side wall of the support, and an adjusting assembly is arranged on the side wall of the support; the elastic assembly comprises a first spring, a fixing frame is fixedly connected to the upper surface of the support, a mounting plate is fixedly connected to the side wall of the fixing frame, and a sliding rod is slidably connected into the mounting plate. According to the edge sealing device, the sliding rod slides in the mounting plate, and the fixing block extrudes the first spring, so that the edge sealing roller fluctuates along with the surface of the coiled material through the mounting frame, the appropriate pressure between the edge sealing roller and the surface of the coiled material is kept all the time, it is ensured that the edge of the molten coiled material is rolled flat, a sealing joint is formed, and the edge sealing effect of the edge sealing roller is improved through the structure.

title: Surface treatment device for self-adhesive waterproof coiled material
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of waterproof coiled materials, and discloses a self-adhesion waterproof coiled material surface treatment device which comprises a supporting plate, a carrier roller fixing plate is fixedly connected to the inner wall of the supporting plate, a carrier roller is rotationally connected to the inner wall of the carrier roller fixing plate, and a conveying belt is arranged on the outer wall of the carrier roller. A vertical rod is fixedly connected to one side of the outer wall of the carrier roller fixing plate, a first cross beam is fixedly connected to the inner wall of the vertical rod, a telescopic assembly used for being connected with a second cross beam is fixedly connected to the surface of the first cross beam, and a support used for supporting a dust removal assembly is fixedly connected to one side of the outer wall of the carrier roller fixing plate. According to the device, impurities on the surface of the coiled material are swept through rotation of the brush, then the impurities are blown away by the blower, and the suction fan is started to enable the impurities to enter the dust storage bin through the air pipe, so that the impurities on the surface of the coiled material are removed, the problems of skin rolling, hollowing and the like after the coiled material is coated with a film are reduced to a great extent, and the practicability of the device is improved.

title: Special coating system for overlapping edge of asphalt waterproof coiled material
abstract: The utility model discloses a special coating system for an asphalt waterproof roll overlapping edge, which relates to the technical field of waterproofing, and comprises a bracket, and an upper thickness-fixing roller, a lower thickness-fixing roller and an overlapping edge coating box which are arranged on the bracket, and the upper thickness-fixing roller and the lower thickness-fixing roller are correspondingly arranged up and down; and an oil outlet is formed in the lower end of the overlap edge oiling box. According to the utility model, the upper thickness determining roller and the lower thickness determining roller are adopted to roll the whole asphalt waterproof coiled material, and then the lap joint edge is coated by the lap joint edge oil coating box. And the overall thickness of the asphalt waterproof coiled material and the thickness of the overlapping edge can be separately controlled, so that the weight of the coiled material is effectively reduced, and the waste of the coating material cost is reduced.

title: Ceramic and metal brazing method based on self-resistance heating metal foil
abstract: The invention discloses a ceramic and metal brazing method based on a self-resistance heating metal foil, and belongs to the technical field of dissimilar material connection and advanced manufacturing. The method aims at solving the problem that when materials such as Y2O3-MgO nano-composite ceramic and TC4 titanium alloy are connected through an existing Joule hot brazing method, interface reaction and residual stress are difficult to cooperatively regulate and control. The method comprises the steps of 1, assembling a to-be-welded part; 2, applying pre-pressing; 3, grading Joule hot brazing; and 4, cooling. The method is used for ceramic and metal brazing based on the self-resistance heating metal foil.

title: Permeability resistance testing device for waterproof coiled material
abstract: The invention discloses a waterproof roll permeability resistance test device, and belongs to the technical field of waterproof roll detection, the waterproof roll permeability resistance test device comprises a machine body, the inner side and the outer side of the machine body are jointly provided with a test part, the test part comprises a fixing ring fixedly connected in a water storage cavity, and the upper side of the machine body is hinged with hinged supports in a transverse linear array arrangement; according to the invention, after the second glass plate encounters water, the ink changing color when encountering water becomes transparent from white, real-time monitoring is carried out through the visual sensor, and when the impermeability of a material is detected, the ink changing color when encountering water smeared on the back side of the second glass plate becomes transparent from white after encountering water, so that the detection accuracy is improved. And the first glass plate in the pressing ring not only can be used for a worker to directly observe the state of the second glass plate, but also can be used for real-time monitoring by the visual sensor, and the water color-changing ink can be more intuitively captured by the visual sensor after being changed, so that the detection precision of the material is improved.
