title: Waterproof doubling structure cable containing coaxial line shielding layer
abstract: The utility model relates to a cable shielding layer waterproof technology, and discloses a waterproof doubling structure cable containing a coaxial line shielding layer, an outer sheath wraps the shielding layer, a waterproof protection layer is formed between an insulating layer and the outer sheath layer through winding glue of the shielding layer, the technical problem of waterproof of the coaxial line shielding layer is solved through the above technical scheme, and the waterproof doubling structure cable containing the coaxial line shielding layer is provided with a waterproof function. The waterproof technical effect of the coaxial line shielding layer is realized.

title: Wiring harness waterproof device of square cabin matched with airplane
abstract: The utility model discloses a wiring harness waterproof device of a square cabin matched with an airplane, which belongs to the technical field of aviation equipment and comprises a waterproof cover, a waterproof wire passing box, a water retaining edge and a wire outlet hole, an opening is formed in the middle of the waterproof wire passing box, the waterproof wire passing box is mounted at a position needing threading, the water retaining edge is fixed around the opening, a recess is formed in the top of the water retaining edge, and the waterproof cover is buckled on the water retaining edge. A wire outlet hole is formed in the bottom of the waterproof cover, and a penetrating through wire penetrates out of the wire outlet hole through the sinking of the water retaining edge. According to the utility model, waterproof sealing can be rapidly and effectively carried out on penetrating through wires, and the size of the waterproof device can be adjusted according to the number of the through wires. The waterproof connector is convenient to use, safe, reliable and stable in performance, has high stability and practicability compared with the prior art, can provide better waterproof sealing for the wire passing hole, and is convenient, fast and attractive.

title: Winding system with anti-wrinkling function
abstract: The utility model discloses a winding system with an anti-wrinkling function, which relates to the technical field of water prevention and comprises a frame and a reel arranged on the frame. The device further comprises a pair of telescopic mechanisms arranged on the rack, each telescopic mechanism comprises an upper telescopic unit and a lower telescopic unit, the upper telescopic units are located above the reels, and the lower telescopic units are located below the reels. The device further comprises a pair of pressure roller sets, each pressure roller set comprises an upper pressure roller and a lower pressure roller, the upper pressure rollers are connected with the upper telescopic units, and the lower pressure rollers are connected with the lower telescopic units. The upper pressure roller can be driven by the upper telescopic unit to move up and down, and the lower pressure roller can be driven by the lower telescopic unit to move up and down. And the reel is parallel to the upper pressure roller and the lower pressure roller. The wrinkling phenomenon generated in the production process of the waterproof coiled material can be effectively reduced.

title: Basement side wall composite waterproof structure and construction method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a basement side wall composite waterproof structure and a construction method thereof, and the construction method comprises the following steps: providing a high-strength anti-falling cured rubber asphalt coating and a self-adhesive waterproof coiled material, and treating a to-be-constructed wall base layer; high-strength anti-falling non-curing rubber asphalt paint is sprayed on the side wall body base layer in a large area in a segmented and partitioned mode to form a first waterproof layer; paving a self-adhesive waterproof roll on the sprayed first waterproof layer to form a second waterproof layer, and treating a closing part of the self-adhesive waterproof roll in the second waterproof layer and a lap joint part between the upper roll and the lower roll to prevent the self-adhesive waterproof roll from falling off; by means of the high-strength anti-falling non-cured rubber asphalt waterproof coating and self-adhesion waterproof coiled material composite waterproof technology, the problem of leakage of the basement side wall is effectively solved, and high popularization value is achieved.

title: Meat preservation method with self-assembled nanoparticles cooperating with three-layer controlled release film
abstract: The invention provides a meat preservation method with self-assembled nanoparticles cooperating with a three-layer controlled release film. The method comprises the following steps: S1, selecting fresh meat, removing impurities, cleaning, detecting the muscle fiber density and the total number of initial bacterial colonies, classifying the meat into I/II/III classes according to the standard, and pre-cooling and discharging acid for 18-24 hours under the conditions that the temperature is 0-2 DEG C, the air speed is 0.3-0.5 m/s and the humidity is 85-90%; s2.2, graded loading of dormant-state self-assembled nanoparticles at the temperature of 2-4 DEG C, I-type dip coating, II-type ultrasonic-assisted dip coating, III-type high-pressure atomization spraying and air drying in a blast environment after loading; s3, filling three layers of controlled release films, vacuumizing to-0.095 to-0.09 MPa, keeping for 20 seconds, filling customized controlled atmosphere according to grades, and then performing heat sealing; and S4.0, refrigerating at 0-4 DEG C. By constructing a synergistic mechanism that the self-assembled nano-particle adsorption layer recognizes a decay signal in a close range and the three layers of controlled release films release drugs in a linkage mode and strengthen barrier, the limitation that traditional preservation is passively inhibited and active ingredients are lost quickly is broken through, and the technical problems that bacteriostasis is not lasting, the water-retaining property is poor and sensory quality is prone to deterioration are fundamentally solved; and the fresh-keeping efficiency and the meat quality are both improved.

title: CONTINUOUS AIR PRESSURE CONTROL ROLL-TO-ROLL FACILITY
abstract: The present embodiment may provide a continuous air pressure control roll-to-roll facility for heat-treating and cooling a fabric, the roll-to-roll facility comprising: a first chamber which receives the fabric while in an atmospheric pressure state and in which a first differential exhaust unit moves the fabric from a wide space to a narrow space to reduce the pressure inside the facility; a second chamber which communicates with the first chamber, and includes a heater part for heat-treating the fabric and a cooling part that communicates with the heater part and cools the heat-treated fabric; and a third chamber which communicates with the cooling part, further reduces the pressure inside the facility via a second differential exhaust unit, and collects the cooled fabric and discharges same to the outside of the facility.

title: Pulley structure of sweeping robot
abstract: The utility model discloses a pulley structure of a floor mopping robot, which belongs to the technical field of floor mopping robots and comprises a fixed support, a connecting part, a universal support and a pulley assembly, a first opening and a second opening are formed in the fixed support in a penetrating manner, and the connecting part comprises a front end part and a rear end part. The connecting part is provided with a first opening and a second opening, the front end part extends into the universal support from the second opening and penetrates through the first opening, the rear end part is detachably connected with the upper end of the universal support, and the pulley assembly is detachably connected with the universal support. The connecting part and the fixing support do not need to be fixed through screws, the groove is formed in the position close to the umbrella-shaped protrusion, the rubber ring is arranged in the groove, damping can be conducted when the pulley assembly passes through the uneven ground, and damage to parts of the device is reduced.

The connecting part is provided with a first opening and a second opening, the front end part extends into the universal support from the second opening and penetrates through the first opening, the rear end part is detachably connected with the upper end of the universal support, and the pulley assembly is detachably connected with the universal support. The connecting part and the fixing support do not need to be fixed through screws, the groove is formed in the position close to the umbrella-shaped protrusion, the rubber ring is arranged in the groove, damping can be conducted when the pulley assembly passes through the uneven ground, and damage to parts of the device is reduced.

title: Manual coffee powder stirrer
abstract: The utility model provides a manual coffee powder stirrer, and relates to the technical field of coffee making tools. The powder stirrer comprises: a support body provided with an open accommodating space; the stirring structure is rotatably arranged in the open accommodating space; the pressing structure comprises a transmission rod, a pressing rod and a reset spring, one end of the transmission rod is connected with the stirring structure, the other end of the transmission rod penetrates through the supporting body and extends to the outer space of the supporting body, the pressing rod is arranged at the end, away from the stirring structure, of the transmission rod and is in telescopic fit with the transmission rod, and a rotation driving structure is arranged between the transmission rod and the pressing rod; the reset spring is used for resetting the transmission rod and the pressing rod after contraction; the positioning adjusting structure comprises a first limiting part and a second limiting part, and the first limiting part and the second limiting part are both arranged on the transmission rod; and the first limiting part is in magnetic attraction fit with the supporting body. The problem that the height of a stirring needle of a traditional powder stirrer cannot be adjusted is solved, and depth adjustment under different powder amounts and extraction requirements is met.

title: Cleaning method of cleaning equipment and cleaning equipment
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a cleaning method of cleaning equipment and the cleaning equipment, and relates to the technical field of intelligent equipment. The cleaning equipment is provided with a grabbing module, and the method comprises the steps that when the cleaning equipment cleans an operation area, multi-mode environment sensing data of the operation area is acquired; based on the multi-modal environment perception data, the semantic category and the spatial position of a grabbable article are recognized through a visual model, and the grabbable article is one of multiple preset articles; based on the semantic category and the spatial position, generating a grabbing decision instruction for grabbing the grabbable article; and based on the grabbing decision instruction, grabbing the grabbable articles through a grabbing module, and arranging the grabbable articles or placing the grabbable articles in a preset target storage area. Through the method, transition from passive obstacle avoidance to active environment transformation is achieved, the cleaning equipment can accurately recognize the grabbed objects and clean the grabbed objects, the cleaning comprehensiveness is improved, and the cleaning coverage rate and the user satisfaction degree are improved.

title: Fully-automatic multifunctional intelligent sitting toilet for medical nursing bed
abstract: The invention discloses a full-automatic multifunctional intelligent closestool for a medical nursing bed. The system comprises a full-automatic intelligent control device, an automatic seat forming device, a full-automatic toilet opening and closing-toilet bowl transferring device, an automatic hip flushing-warm air drying device, an automatic excrement crushing and stirring device, an automatic excrement water discharging and collecting device in a toilet bowl and an automatic toilet bowl cleaning device. A multifunctional ozone disinfection and sterilization device, a post-defecation stand-up assisting device, a head washing and bathing device, a defecation sensing alarm device, a wireless call alarm/request help device and a wireless audio and video mobile phone monitoring device are arranged, a patient can sit to defecate, and the anus of the patient can be easily cleaned. The closestool can be completely and automatically cleaned and disinfected, and the buttocks are dried by warm air. Excrement is automatically crushed and discharged into a collecting barrel. Automatic alarming is achieved during sitting hair washing, bed showering and urinating and defecating, ozone disinfection and sterilization, calling alarming and mobile phone remote monitoring are adopted, the self-care ability of a patient is remarkably improved, and the health of the patient is greatly facilitated.

title: Vacuum mixing structure
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of coffee machines, in particular to a vacuum coffee machine, a coffee bean quantifying structure of the coffee machine, a vacuum mixing structure, a sealing structure of the vacuum coffee machine and a coffee making method based on the vacuum coffee machine. The vacuum mixing structure comprises a processing structure, the processing structure comprises an integrated container, a blade assembly, a sealing and fixing cover and a rotating power device, the sealing and fixing cover completely shields an opening in the top end of the integrated container, and the integrated container is provided with a heating device, a rotating shaft hole, a water inlet, an air exhaust hole and a bottom outlet. According to the utility model, coffee beans and the like are ground, heated and extracted in a unique sealed space, and the opportunity that coffee powder is transferred among different units and is in contact with oxygen in air is avoided or reduced, so that the oxidation effect can be minimized, and the storage of volatile grease, antioxidants and enzymes in the coffee powder and the like can be maximized.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR EFFICIENT ATTENTION LAYER IMPLEMENTAITON FOR SPARSE VECTOR-QUANTIZED DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS
abstract: A method for generating vector-quantized deep neural networks that includes creating binary masks for the query vector and key vector, wherein creating the binary masks includes replacing each non-zero element with a value of 1, calculating a logical AND operator of the binary masks of the query and key vector, identifying the position of non-zero bits utilizing results from the logical AND operator of the binary masks of the query and key vector to obtain one or more non-zero indices, and for only the non-zero indices of the logical AND operator, outputting a dot-product value, creating binary masks of the value vector, wherein the binary masks are associated with non-zero values, and for only the non-zero indices of the value vector, multiplying the dot-product value with the value vector to generate a final value of the attention layer, and outputting the final value to a next layer.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD SPARSE VECTOR-QUANTIZED DEPP NEURAL NETWORKS
abstract: A method for generating vector-quantized deep neural networks includes receiving a training dataset that includes one or more image, text information, sound information, training a neural model with the training dataset to adjust one or more parameters associated with one or more deep neural network layers, segmenting the one or more parameters associated with each of the one or more deep neural network layers into one or more segments based on a type and a size of each of the one or more deep neural network layers, generating one or more fixed codebook, wherein the fixed codebook include a predetermined number of codewords, replacing each of the one or more segments with one of the codewords, and in response to replacing the one or more segments with one of the codewords, outputting a trained neural model that utilizes the one or more fixed codebooks.

title: High-manganese-iron-based welding wire for tailored blank laser welding and preparation method of high-manganese-iron-based welding wire
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of tailored blank laser welding, and particularly discloses a high-manganese-iron-based welding wire for tailored blank laser welding and a preparation method of the high-manganese-iron-based welding wire. The welding wire is composed of the following components: 0.2-0.6% of C; 5%-20% of Mn; 0.5%-1% of Si; 1 to 3 percent of Ni; 0.02 to 0.1 percent of Nb; 0.1 to 0.3 percent of V; and the balance of Fe and other impurities. The preparation method comprises the following steps that a welding wire blank is prepared through vacuum melting; carrying out gradient multi-pass drawing on the welding wire blank in a drawing die; before and/or after at least one drawing pass, the welding wire blank is subjected to gradient induction heating in an induction heating device; and after at least one drawing pass, an infrared detection device is adopted to carry out online real-time monitoring on the welding wire, and the drawing process parameters of the next pass are adjusted. According to the scheme, through collaborative optimization of the components and the process, the quality defect of aluminum-silicon coating steel welding is overcome, and efficient and low-cost preparation is achieved.

title: Water purifying and heating system
abstract: The water purifying and heating system comprises a water purifying assembly, a first heating assembly and a second heating assembly which are communicated in sequence, the water purification assembly is used for generating purified water; the first heating assembly is used for heating purified water generated by the water purifying assembly to a set temperature; the second heating assembly comprises an exothermic reaction chamber and is arranged in a heat exchange pipeline, and a water inlet of the heat exchange pipeline is communicated with a water outlet of the first heating assembly; a water injection port is formed in the exothermic reaction chamber, an exothermic reaction medium is arranged in the exothermic reaction chamber, the exothermic reaction medium is configured to generate exothermic reaction with water injected into the exothermic reaction chamber, and released heat can heat purified water in the heat exchange pipeline into boiling water, so that stable boiling water can be output without a pressure tank; the leakage and burst risks of the pressure tank are avoided; and meanwhile, chemical reaction is used as a heat source, so that quick response of instant boiling can be realized, and the problems of safety, energy consumption, volume, continuity and the like faced by boiling water generation in related technologies are effectively solved.

title: Autonomous cleaning robot with quick-release cleaning part
abstract: The autonomous cleaning robot comprises a robot body, a main cleaning brush, a rotating shaft and an auxiliary cleaning brush, one end of the top of the robot body is provided with a fixing cylinder through a rotating seat, a lifting sleeve is arranged in the fixing cylinder, one end of the lifting sleeve is provided with a driving box, and the other end of the lifting sleeve is provided with a rotating shaft. A main cleaning brush and an auxiliary cleaning brush are arranged at one end and the two sides of the driving box through rotating shafts correspondingly, mounting sleeves are arranged at the ends, close to the rotating shafts, of the main cleaning brush and the auxiliary cleaning brush correspondingly, and the ends, close to the mounting sleeves, of the rotating shafts are connected with the mounting sleeves through inserting blocks correspondingly. By installing the robot body, the fixing cylinder, the lifting sleeve, the driving box, the driving motor, the rotating shaft, the main cleaning brush, the auxiliary cleaning brush, the installing sleeve and the inserting block, during installation, the inserting block is aligned with the installing sleeve to be inserted, the inclined face of the inserting block pushes the buckle to compress the spring column till the adsorption head and the adsorption layer are attracted, the buckle is automatically clamped into the hook groove, and the rapid replacement requirement is met.

title: Internet-based hotel reservation management system and method
abstract: The invention discloses a hotel reservation management system and method based on the Internet, and belongs to the field of hotel management. The system comprises a block chain data storage module, an AI analysis decision module, an IoT sensing monitoring module and an AR user interaction module. The block chain data storage module adopts an alliance chain architecture comprising a plurality of sub-chains, realizes cross-chain transaction through an intelligent contract, and ensures non-tampering and credible sharing of reservation, evaluation, health and other data. And the AI analysis decision module performs personalized recommendation, dynamic pricing and resource optimization allocation by using a deep learning model. The IoT sensing and monitoring module collects environment, equipment and health data in real time through various sensors deployed in hotel rooms. And the AR user interaction module provides immersive hotel virtual roaming, information superposition display and interactive reservation functions for the user. According to the method, the modules are integrated, and the whole-process service from AR preview, intelligent recommendation and block chain evidence reservation to IoT environment guarantee is realized.

title: Dust suppression type totally-closed sweeping robot
abstract: The utility model discloses a dust suppression type totally-closed sweeping robot which comprises a main body, a top cover arranged at the top of the main body, a first extension piece arranged at the front end of the top cover, a second extension piece arranged at the front end of the top cover and symmetrical to the first extension piece, a flexible baffle arranged at the bottom of the first extension piece, a sweeping brush arranged at the bottom of the main body and driving wheels arranged at the bottom of the main body. A rolling brush is arranged at the bottom of the body, a dust box is arranged at the bottom of the body close to the rolling brush, and the rolling brush comprises a dust suppression cover, a protruding plate, a bearing, a flow guide groove, a connecting groove and an output groove. By arranging a first extension piece, a second extension piece, a flexible baffle, a dust suppression cover, a protruding plate, a flow guide groove, a connecting groove and an output groove, the position, corresponding to a cleaning brush, of the front end of a main body can be closed, dust flying can be avoided when the cleaning brush cleans dust, and centrifugal force generated when a rolling brush rotates to clean the dust can bring the dust into the flow guide groove; and finally, the dust is thrown out from the output groove and falls into the dust box.

title: Plant active ingredient drying device
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of plant active ingredient drying, and discloses a plant active ingredient drying device which comprises a drying box, a feeding and discharging assembly is arranged in an inner cavity of the drying box and comprises an electric push rod, a connecting rod is fixedly installed at the output end of the electric push rod, and the connecting rod is connected with the drying box. A baffle is fixedly installed at one end of the connecting rod, a discharging box is fixedly installed on one side of the baffle, and ventilation holes are formed in the bottom of the discharging box. By arranging the feeding and discharging assembly, the position of a discharging box can be adjusted by controlling stretching and retracting of an electric push rod, plant raw materials can be conveniently placed and taken out, ventilation is guaranteed through ventilation holes, drying is convenient, by arranging the dehumidifying assembly, air in the drying box can circulate to pass through the dehumidifying box by turning on a heat-resisting draught fan, and the drying effect is improved. And the adsorbent module can dry air, so that the drying efficiency is improved, and moisture is prevented from being deposited in the drying box to affect the drying effect.

title: Boiler type steam sweeping robot and using method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of cleaning equipment, in particular to a boiler type steam sweeping robot and a using method thereof.The boiler type steam sweeping robot comprises a sweeping robot host and a host base station, and an intelligent control module, a detection assembly, an action assembly, a power supply assembly, a sweeping module and a steam module are integrally installed in the sweeping robot host; the steam module comprises a heat insulation protection shell, a boiler installed in the heat insulation protection shell and a steam injection assembly connected with the boiler. A heating water cavity and a steam cavity are formed in the boiler, a heating body is arranged in the heating water cavity, a water vapor interlayer is arranged between the heating water cavity and the steam cavity, the host base station comprises a base station box body, and a water tank and a charging water injection assembly are arranged in the base station box body; the charging water injection assembly comprises a stepping motor and a lifting plate connected with the stepping motor. Through the reasonable structural design layout, sweeping, dust collection and high-temperature steam sterilization are integrated, multiple purposes are achieved through one machine, the cleaning efficiency is greatly improved, and use by a user is facilitated.

title: Low-noise self-circulation steam air conditioning device
abstract: The invention discloses a low-noise self-circulation steam air conditioning device, which relates to the technical field of indoor heat supply systems and comprises a case, and a water supply pipeline, a heat supply water tank, a water pump, a steam generator, a steam pipeline, a cooling fan, a heat exchange module and a water return pipeline which are integrated in the case. Sound-absorbing cotton is arranged on the inner wall of the machine box, a sound-proof cover is further fixedly arranged in the machine box, the water pump is installed in the sound-proof cover, and a plurality of elastic supporting pieces are arranged between the water pump and the inner wall of the sound-proof cover. The closed self-circulation system is integrated in the machine case, the problem that indoor humidity is too high is effectively avoided, the heat supply efficiency is high, and installation is easy and convenient; through the multiple noise reduction design of the sound absorption cotton, the sound insulation cover and the elastic supporting piece, operation noise of vibration components such as the water pump is effectively isolated and absorbed, and silent operation is achieved.
full_text: Low-noise self-circulation steam air conditioning device The invention discloses a low-noise self-circulation steam air conditioning device, which relates to the technical field of indoor heat supply systems and comprises a case, and a water supply pipeline, a heat supply water tank, a water pump, a steam generator, a steam pipeline, a cooling fan, a heat exchange module and a water return pipeline which are integrated in the case. Sound-absorbing cotton is arranged on the inner wall of the machine box, a sound-proof cover is further fixedly arranged in the machine box, the water pump is installed in the sound-proof cover, and a plurality of elastic supporting pieces are arranged between the water pump and the inner wall of the sound-proof cover. The closed self-circulation system is integrated in the machine case, the problem that indoor humidity is too high is effectively avoided, the heat supply efficiency is high, and installation is easy and convenient; through the multiple noise reduction design of the sound absorption cotton, the sound insulation cover and the elastic supporting piece, operation noise of vibration components such as the water pump is effectively isolated and absorbed, and silent operation is achieved.

title: Bluetooth device searching method and device and computer readable storage medium
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a Bluetooth device searching method and device and a computer readable storage medium, and the method can comprise the steps that an autonomous mobile device autonomously moves in a target area and detects a Bluetooth signal under the condition that a first condition is met, the first condition comprises at least one of the condition that the autonomous mobile device is in a preset working mode and the condition that the autonomous mobile device receives an object searching instruction; determining whether at least one Bluetooth device is found in the target area according to a Bluetooth signal detection result; under the condition that the Bluetooth equipment is found, determining the position information of the Bluetooth equipment; and outputting the position information and/or a prompt of the position information. In this way, manpower is saved, and operation convenience and execution efficiency are improved.

title: Lithium ion battery electrolyte conveying joint cleaning device
abstract: The utility model discloses a lithium ion battery electrolyte conveying joint cleaning device, which relates to the technical field of lithium ion batteries, and comprises a cleaning box, the side surface of the cleaning box is fixedly connected with a fixed block, the side surface of the fixed block is fixedly connected with a placing groove, the side surface of the cleaning box is provided with a multi-surface cleaning device, and the multi-surface cleaning device is fixedly connected with the placing groove. The multi-face cleaning device comprises a motor, the bottom of the motor is fixedly connected to the side face of the cleaning box, an output shaft of the motor is fixedly connected with a threaded rod, the circumferential face of the threaded rod is in threaded connection with a first threaded sleeve, and the circumferential face of the threaded rod is in threaded connection with a second threaded sleeve. A limiting rod is fixedly connected to the side face of the cleaning box, a water tank is fixedly connected to the side face of the cleaning box, and a water inlet is formed in the top of the water tank.

title: High-entropy oxide porous catalytic electrode and preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention provides a high-entropy oxide porous catalytic electrode and a preparation method and application thereof, and relates to the technical field of water electrolysis hydrogen production, and the preparation method comprises the following steps: carrying out spray pyrolysis on a precursor solution through a molten salt bath to obtain a precursor, taking the precursor, carrying out millisecond-level instantaneous curing on the precursor, depositing the precursor on foamed nickel, and carrying out electrochemical activation to obtain the high-entropy oxide porous catalytic electrode. And performing heat treatment to obtain the high-entropy oxide porous catalytic electrode. According to the invention, the technical problems of uneven element distribution, difficult pore structure regulation and poor binding force between the active layer and the metal substrate during preparation of the high-entropy oxide electrode in the prior art are solved, and the technical effects of high efficiency, energy conservation and high universality of electrode preparation are achieved.

title: Automatic timing device and method for monitoring working state of Italian coffee machine
abstract: The invention discloses an automatic timing device and method for monitoring the working state of an Italian coffee machine, and relates to the technical field of coffee appliances. The automatic timing device comprises a controller, a user interface and an acceleration sensor. The automatic timing device and the Italian coffee machine are independently arranged on the same rigid platform. The acceleration sensor is used for collecting vibration signals of the platform. And the controller is configured to identify the working state (start/stop) of the water pump of the Italian coffee machine according to the vibration signal, automatically control the timer to start/stop, and perform timing display on a user interface. According to the invention, the start and end of the extraction process can be detected in a non-lagging and high-precision manner, a timing function can be automatically linked, and the problems of errors and lagging caused by the fact that a traditional mode depends on manual judgment are solved. As an external vibration monitoring device, the scheme is high in universality, can be used in cooperation with an Italian coffee machine of any model, is low in cost, and does not depend on weighing data.

title: Data multi-language storage and query method and system, medium and equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a data multi-language storage and query method and system, a medium and equipment, and relates to the technical field of data processing. The method comprises the following steps: pre-establishing a data view corresponding to multiple languages for a physical table in a database; configuring a target field needing to be translated in the physical table; in response to data change in the physical table, generating a translation record for a target field which is configured to be changed and needs to be translated, and storing the translation record into a translation target table; automatically translating untranslated records in the translation target table, and updating a translation result; and in response to a data query request, mapping a query for the physical table to a corresponding data view according to a target language in the query request, so as to return a translated result. According to the method, data translation is completed under the condition that codes are non-invasive, a business system does not need to make more operations when a data physical model is changed, the data can be completely and directly completed by a translation system, certain universality is achieved, and query convenience and user experience are improved.

title: Base station cleaning structure
abstract: The utility model relates to the field of sweepers, in particular to a base station cleaning structure which comprises a cleaning area, the cleaning area is used for containing a to-be-cleaned component, a cleaning water outlet part is arranged in the cleaning area and comprises a water inlet and a flow guide groove, and the flow guide groove is of a groove structure and is of a strip-shaped structure; the water inlet is formed in one end in the flow guide groove, and the water outlet direction of the water inlet faces the other end of the flow guide groove; and a plurality of cleaning convex nails are arranged in the flow guide groove. The multiple cleaning convex nails are arranged in the flow guide groove, cleaning water enters the flow guide groove through the water inlet, the mop is wetted through the flow guide groove, and the problems of single wetting point, non-uniform mop cleaning and low wetting efficiency caused by sprayed water are solved; and the cleaning water entering the diversion trench is dispersed, so that the cleaning water can be distributed in the diversion trench in a larger area.

title: Content recommendation method, training method of content recommendation model and corresponding device
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a content recommendation method, a training method of a content recommendation model and a corresponding device. The content recommendation method comprises the steps of obtaining attribute data of a target user and behavior data generated in at least one source field; based on the attribute data of the target user and behavior data generated in at least one source field, a first description text for the target user is generated, and the first description text is used for describing attributes of the target user and behaviors in the at least one source field by adopting a natural language; and using a content recommendation model to determine recommended content of a target field based on the first description text of the target user. According to the method and the device, the attribute of the target user and the text of the behavior in the at least one source field are converted into a form which is better understood by the large language model, so that the content recommendation model can better understand and infer semantic association between user behaviors, and the content recommendation effect is effectively improved.

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The utility model discloses a heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a filtering system and a heat tank assembly. A first mounting space and a second mounting space are arranged in the shell assembly, and air convection is not carried out between the first mounting space and the second mounting space; the hot tank assembly is communicated with a water path of the filtering system; the filtering system is arranged in the first installation space, and the hot tank assembly is arranged in the second installation space. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine when the hot tank assembly works can be avoided.

title: Low-pressure crystallization equipment
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of photovoltaic cells, and discloses a low-pressure devitrification device, which comprises a flash evaporation mechanism, at least one extraction opening and at least one vacuum breaking opening are further formed in the inner wall of a closed cavity, the extraction opening is used for being connected with an external vacuumizing device, and the vacuum breaking opening is used for being connected with an external environment; the carrying table and the heating module are both located in the sealed cavity, a plurality of supporting pieces are further arranged on the upper surface of the carrying table, the upper ends of the supporting pieces are used for bearing a substrate, and the heating module is installed between the substrate and the carrying table. According to the low-pressure crystallization equipment provided by the utility model, the rapid heating technology is integrated in the flash evaporation mechanism, and temperature control can be matched in the low-pressure crystallization process, so that the two processes of low-pressure crystallization and annealing can be continuously carried out, the uncertainty in the intermediate circulation process is reduced, and the production efficiency is improved. It is ensured that annealing of the perovskite can be completed synchronously in the crystallization process, the grain size of the perovskite is increased, the defects of the perovskite are reduced, and the assembly efficiency is improved.

title: Preparation method of soft fine-grain high-purity oxygen-free copper bar
abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method of a soft fine-grain high-purity oxygen-free copper bar. The preparation method is suitable for TU0 and TU00 mark oxygen-free copper materials. The method comprises the steps of casting, saw cutting, heating, extruding, cooling, acid pickling, stretching, annealing and detecting, specifically, a phi 310 mm high-purity oxygen-free copper cast ingot serves as a raw material, is heated for 30 minutes at the temperature of 690-730 DEG C and then is extruded into a blank with the diameter of 50-100 mm through an H13 mold, the blank is rapidly cooled to 60 DEG C or below through full water seal, and after acid pickling is conducted through 12-20% HSOH, the blank is subjected to heat treatment for 30 minutes, and the high-purity oxygen-free copper with the diameter of 50-100 mm is obtained. And processing to a target size by two-pass cold stretching (the elongation coefficient of each pass is less than or equal to 1.4), and finally annealing for 2 hours at 480-520 DEG C in a nitrogen mixed atmosphere containing 4% of H. The problems that an existing bar is large in grain size and high in hardness are effectively solved, the average grain size of the prepared bar is smaller than or equal to 60 micrometers, the hardness ranges from 40 HV5 to 50 HV5, the extensibility is excellent, the cold machining requirements in the fields of electronics, electric power and the like can be met, and remarkable practical value and application prospects are achieved.

title: Heterogeneous module-based self-reconfiguration universal robot chassis architecture and control method
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of robots, and discloses a self-reconfiguration universal robot chassis architecture based on heterogeneous modules and a control method.The self-reconfiguration universal robot chassis architecture based on the heterogeneous modules comprises a chassis mechanism; the contact type detection structure is arranged on the bottom plate; the follow-up lifting mechanism is arranged on the bottom plate; the contact type detection mechanism and the follow-up lifting mechanism are adopted, whether a flexible obstacle located at the gap between the bottom plate and the ground exists on a moving path or not can be detected through the contact type detection mechanism, and the brush structure is lifted upwards in real time through the follow-up lifting mechanism and forced to be bent; therefore, the brush structure is prevented from being in contact with the flexible barrier, the risk that the flexible barrier is wound on the brush structure is reduced or avoided, and the bottom plate structure can be locally lifted when the wheel body is blocked, so that the wheel body can smoothly pass through the flexible barrier.

title: PRIVACY-ENHANCING GENERATION ON PRE-TRAINED GENERATIVE MODELS
abstract: Privacy-enhancing interaction with generative models is performed. Private input content is mixed with public input content to create a masked input, the mixing obfuscating the private input content. The masked input is sent to a server generative model for processing to receive a server result. The server result is received from the server generative model. The public input content is processed using a local generative model to generate a local result. The server result and the local result are combined to remove a contribution of the public input content from the server result, thereby resulting in a final output to the private input content.

title: System and method for adapting visual language model with hypernetwork
abstract: A computer-implemented method and system relates to a trained visual language model (VLM) comprising at least an image encoder and a text encoder. The VLM is trained with a data pair, wherein the data pair includes (i) image data of a digital image and (ii) textual data describing the corresponding image data. The text encoder generates a text embedding using the text data. The hypernetwork uses the text embedding to generate at least a subset of parameters for an image encoder. When at least a subset of the parameters is applied, the image encoder generates an image embedding using the image data. The present invention minimizes loss between image embedding and text embedding. The loss is used to update the VLM and the super network. The image encoder is relatively small scale, and can be employed on resource constrained devices, such as edge devices.

title: Path planning method and device, computer equipment and computer readable storage medium
abstract: The invention relates to a path planning method and device, computer equipment, a computer readable storage medium and a computer program product. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring obstacle information and traffic semantic element information in a target area; dividing the target area into at least one sub-area corresponding to the traffic semantic element according to the traffic semantic element information; for each sub-region, determining a passable region in the sub-region according to the obstacle information; according to the traffic semantic element information corresponding to the sub-region, determining a motion rule of the robot in a passable region in the sub-region; path planning is conducted on the robot in the passable area in the sub-area according to the motion rule, and a path planning result corresponding to the sub-area is obtained; and determining a target path of the robot in the target area according to the path planning result corresponding to each sub-area. By adopting the method, the working safety of the robot in complex traffic environments such as a garage can be improved.

title: Floor mopping gear box of floor sweeping robot
abstract: The utility model discloses a mopping gear box of a sweeping robot, which belongs to the field of sweeping robots and comprises a direct current motor, the surface of the output end of the direct current motor is rotatably sleeved with a mounting box, the output end of the direct current motor penetrates through the mounting box and is fixedly connected with a driving gear, and the driving gear is rotatably connected to the inside of the mounting box. A driving mechanism is mounted on the surface of the driving gear, and a clamping mechanism is mounted on the upper surface of the mounting box; through cooperative use of the devices, lubricating oil in the oil storage box enters the mounting box through the sealing box to lubricate the driving gear, and through rotation of the driving gear, the whole driving mechanism is lubricated, so that friction force among the gears is reduced, abrasion of the gears is reduced, and the service life of the gears is prolonged. And the driven gear rotates slowly through transmission among a plurality of gears, so that the pushing rod can be lubricated again after a period of time, and the automatic lubricating effect is achieved.

title: Orthodontic tool comprising hook, chewy and brush members
abstract: Disclosed is an orthodontic tool configured to assist users in managing orthodontic appliances. The tool comprises a hook member for removing the orthodontic appliance from a dental arch, a chewy member for seating the orthodontic appliance onto the dental arch, and a brush member for cleaning internal surfaces of the orthodontic appliance. The brush member includes a plurality of bristles arranged to access crevices and recessed portions of the orthodontic appliance. The hook member, chewy member, and brush member are integrated into a single portable structure, which is compactly sized to be stored within a standard orthodontic appliance case. The orthodontic tool enhances patient convenience by combining multiple orthodontic appliance management functions into a single, easily transportable device.

title: Small environment-friendly unmanned sweeping robot
abstract: The utility model discloses a small-sized environment-friendly unmanned sweeping robot, which relates to the technical field of unmanned sweeping machines and comprises an outer shell, rollers are mounted at the bottom of the outer shell, a dust inlet cavity is formed in the bottom of the outer shell, and the top end of the dust inlet cavity is communicated with a dust suction pipe. During use, a group of first cutting knives which are distributed at equal intervals in the axial line direction of the cleaning roller are arranged, and the distance between the cutting edge part of each first cutting knife and the peripheral surface of the cleaning roller is smaller than 1mm, so that a long-strip-shaped object wound on the peripheral surface of the cleaning roller can be cut off; thus, the long-strip-shaped objects can be smoothly sucked into the dust collection box in the outer shell through the dust suction pipe by the dust suction assembly, the situation that the long-strip-shaped objects are wound on the peripheral face of the sweeping roller to affect the cleaning capacity of the sweeping roller is avoided, and meanwhile the situation that the long-strip-shaped objects wound on the peripheral face of the sweeping roller are frequently cleaned is avoided; and the practicability and convenience of the sweeping robot are improved.

title: PERSONALIZED COFFEE BEAN RECOMMENDATION AND DELIVERY SERVER
abstract: [0001a] [본 발명의 다양한 실시예에 따른 개인 맞춤형 커피 원두 추천 및 배송을 수행하는 서버에 있어서, 사용자 단말 및 로스팅 및 배송 서버와 네트워크를 통해 데이터 송수신을 수행하는 통신 모듈과, 상기 통신 모듈과 연동되어 취향 데이터 처리, 추천 데이터 생성, 주문 데이터 관리 및 피드백 데이터 반영을 수행하는 프로세서와, 상기 프로세서가 실행할 수 있는 명령어를 저장하는 메모리를 포함하고, 상기 메모리는 상기 프로세서가 다음의 동작을 수행하도록 하는 명령어를 저장하며, 상기 프로세서는: 상기 사용자 단말로부터 사용자의 커피에 관련된 취향 데이터를 수신하고; 상기 커피에 관련된 취향 데이터에 기초하여 적어도 하나의 커피 원두 종류에 대한 추천 데이터를 생성하여 상기 사용자 단말에 전송하고; 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 추천 데이터에 포함된 적어도 하나의 커피 원두에 대응하는 적어도 하나의 항목 중 사용자 선택 항목을 주문 데이터로 수신하고; 상기 주문 데이터에 따라 상기 로스팅 및 배송 서버와 연동하여 사용자 선택 항목에 대응되는 커피 원두의 로스팅 및 배송을 제어하며; 사용자 선택 항목에 대응되는 커피의 배송 완료 후 상기 사용자 단말로부터 피드백 데이터를 수신하여, 상기 피드백 데이터를 상기 추천 데이터 생성에 반영할 수 있다. ]

title: System and method for enhancing end-to-end planning and evaluation in closed loop environment for autonomous driving
abstract: Methods and systems for training an end-to-end autonomous driving system in a closed-loop environment using a Visual Language Planning (VLP) machine learning model. An image associated with a vehicle surroundings is generated, and a BEV model is executed to generate a BEV view based on the image. The planning model predicts a navigation trajectory based on the BEV. The VLP model enhances the system by extracting vision-based planning features, generating text cues, and employing a language encoder to create text-based expected features. And comparing a learning model to identify the similarity between visual and text features, and enhancing the performance of the BEV and the planning model. The system experiences closed-loop evaluation in a simulated environment, obtaining metrics to improve the autonomous driving system.

title: Handheld intelligent dust collector
abstract: The invention discloses a handheld intelligent dust collector. The dust collector comprises a ground brush; a vacuum cleaner host; the telescopic connecting rod comprises a lower connecting rod and an upper connecting rod which are in mutual sliding butt joint, one end of the lower connecting rod is in butt joint with the floor brush, the other end of the lower connecting rod is provided with a button seat and a button assembly, the button assembly comprises a button body elastically hinged to a hinge seat of the button seat, a clamping block of the button body penetrates through a through hole of the button seat, and the inner end of the clamping block is provided with a first power connection contact; the first power connection contact is electrically connected with electric equipment on the ground brush, and the upper connecting rod is in butt joint with a dust collector main machine; the clamping plate is embedded into the groove of the upper connecting rod, and a plurality of bayonets corresponding to the clamping blocks are formed in the clamping plate at intervals in a penetrating manner; and the power connection seat is arranged in the groove, a plurality of second power connection contacts corresponding to the first power connection contacts are arranged on the power connection seat at intervals, and the second power connection contacts are electrically connected with a power supply control module of the dust collector host. The problem that an existing handheld dust collector is insufficient in intellectualization and use convenience can be solved.

title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR FINE-GRAINED ACTIVITY SENSING USING WIRELESS SIGNALS
abstract: [0000] A method for identifying an event in a room using wireless signals includes pre-processing channel state information to determine one or more aspects a person in a room based on selected channel state information segments, and identifying, using a machine learning model, an event in the room based on the one or more aspects of the person in the room. The method also includes determining, using the machine learning model and based on the event in the room, one or more settings of a machine, and controlling, using the one or more settings, operation of the machine in response to identifying the event in the room.

title: スマートプラグの動作のシステムおよび方法
abstract: [0001] 【課題】エンドユーザに最大の利益をもたらすために、エンドユーザが個々の装置の電力使用に関する正確な情報を受け取るように、より正確な用途分解法に対するニーズに応える。 【解決手段】スマートプラグが、スマートプラグに接続された装置の電力消費量に関する情報を含むスマートプラグ電力モニタリング信号を提供することができる。スマートプラグ電力モニタリング信号は、建物の電気の主管からの、建物内の装置の動作に関する情報を提供する電力モニタリング信号と共に使用することができる。たとえば、電力モニタリング信号を使用して、（ｉ）スマートプラグに電力を供給している住宅の主管を決定し、（ｉｉ）スマートプラグから電力を受け取っている装置を識別し、（ｉｉｉ）装置の状態変化を識別する精度を高め、（ｉｖ）装置および装置の状態変化を識別する数理モデルをトレーニングすることができる。 【選択図】図１

title: 磁気性能が改善又は回復されたＮＤ－ＦＥ－Ｂ磁石を形成するための磁石の再生
abstract: 【課題】磁性材料を再生して磁気性能を回復又は改善させるための、コンピュータ記憶媒体に符号化されたコンピュータプログラムを含む方法、システム及び装置を提供する。【解決手段】方法の１つは、廃棄磁石アセンブリ由来の磁性材料を、該磁性材料の周期的な加熱及び冷却によって消磁し、該磁性材料に付着した接着剤を断片化し、該磁性材料のコーティング層にひびを入れ、そして該磁性材料に（a）機械的な処理、又は（b）化学的な処理の少なくとも1つを行って、該コーティング層を除去して、不純物を含まない磁性材料を用意するステップ、該消磁磁性材料を断片化して粉末を形成するステップ並びに該粉末を希土類材料Ｒ及び元素添加物Ａと混合して均質な粉末を生成するステップを含む。該希土類材料Ｒは、Ｎｄ又はＰｒの少なくとも1つを含み、かつ、該元素添加物Ａは、Ｎｄ、Ｐｒ、Ｄｙ、Ｃｏ、Ｃｕ、及びＦｅの少なくとも1つを含む。【選択図】図５

title: KITCHEN DISPENSING ASSEMBLY
abstract: [0001] Provided is a kitchen dispensing assembly (100) having a brewing vessel (102) and a granular material dispenser for dispensing granular material (105) into the brewing vessel. A closure member is provided for closing the brewing vessel containing the granular material. A closing system is configured to cause relative movement of the closure member and the brewing vessel so that the closure member closes the brewing vessel. A user-actuatable element (LEV) is manually moveable by a user. The closing system is configured so that, in an operational mode of the kitchen dispensing assembly, the relative movement of the closure member and the brewing vessel to close the brewing vessel is implemented automatically in a delayed closing operation that is delayed relative to the movement of the user-actuatable element, to allow the dispensing of the granular material into the brewing vessel before the brewing vessel is closed by the closure member.

title: Charging pile, intelligent mobile device, voltage control method of intelligent mobile device and charging system
abstract: The invention provides a charging pile, an intelligent mobile device, a voltage control method of the intelligent mobile device and a charging system, and relates to the technical field of charging device.The charging pile comprises a controller, and the controller is configured to receive a pile leaving instruction of the intelligent mobile device and reduce the power supply voltage of the charging pile from a first power supply voltage to a second power supply voltage, the off-pile indication is used for indicating that the intelligent mobile device is about to leave the pile. According to the technical scheme, the situation of electric spark discharge in the pile leaving process of the intelligent mobile equipment can be reduced, and the service life of the charging system is prolonged.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR PERSON STATE DISTRIBUTION
abstract: A method for determining a state of a person using a wireless signal includes annotating a selected piece of channel state information with a category indicative of the state of the person based on a gait of the person and at least some of a plurality of biometric features. The method further includes identifying a state of the person based on a gait of the person and the at least some of the plurality of biometric features; determining one or more settings of the machine corresponding to the state of the person; and in response to detecting the state of the person, controlling, by the computer system and using the one or more settings, operation of the machine.

title: Urethral catheterization bag with variable pressure and speed control
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of urethral catheterization bags, and discloses a pressure-variable speed-controlled urethral catheterization bag which comprises a urethral catheterization bag and a guide tube installed at one end of the urethral catheterization bag, a catheter head is installed at one end of the guide tube, a cleaning component comprises a water tank and a fixed tube installed at the top end of the water tank in a penetrating mode, and a built-in tube is installed at the bottom end of the fixed tube. The handle is held by a hand to place the water tank at the top end of a cabinet on one side of a sickbed, the catheterization bag is hung at the bottom end of the sickbed, the height difference is formed between the water tank and the catheterization bag, the intelligent vacuum pump pumps water in the water tank through the interiors of the guide pipe, the connecting hose, the fixing pipe and the built-in pipe, the guide pipe is coiled on the sickbed, and after the water in the water tank is discharged into the guide pipe, the water tank is connected with the hospital bed. The intelligent vacuum pump and the liquid-proof block are closed, the water in the water tank can be continuously pumped by the guide pipe according to the siphon principle, the inner wall of the guide pipe is continuously cleaned by the water, manual operation is reduced, and manual touch by mistake is avoided.

title: High-plasticity ultrahigh-strength steel and rapid heat treatment preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to high-plasticity ultrahigh-strength steel and a rapid heat treatment preparation method thereof. The high-plasticity ultrahigh-strength steel comprises the following components in percentage by mass: 0.2-0.3% of C, 3-7% of Mn, 0.1-0.5% of Cr, 0-0.5% of Ni, 0-0.5% of Cu, 0-0.5% of Mo, 0-1% of Si, 0-1% of Al, 0-0.05% of Nb, 0-0.05% of V, 0-0.05% of Ti, 0-1% of Si and Al, 0-0.1% of Nb, V and Ti, and the balance of Fe and inevitable impurities. According to the high-plasticity ultrahigh-strength steel disclosed by the invention, on the basis of ensuring ultrahigh strength, the material cost and the carbon content are further reduced, and the 2000MPa-grade high-plasticity ultrahigh-strength steel with low-carbon and low-alloy components is developed.

title: Intelligent welding seam correcting device for vacuum electron beam welding and welding method
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent welding seam correcting device for vacuum electron beam welding and a welding method, and particularly relates to the technical field of vacuum electron beam welding correction.The intelligent welding seam correcting device comprises an electron beam welding cabin, and an adjusting module is arranged in the electron beam welding cabin and comprises two Y-direction modules; a plurality of mounting brackets are fixedly mounted on the outer sides of the two groups of Y-direction modules, the plurality of mounting brackets are fixedly mounted on the inner upper wall of the electron beam welding cabin, an X-direction module is fixedly mounted at the driving ends of the two groups of Y-direction modules, a Z-direction module is fixedly mounted at the driving end of the X-direction module, and a Z-direction module is fixedly mounted at the driving end of the Z-direction module. According to the intelligent welding seam correcting device, by arranging the protection part, the line laser vision camera can be surrounded, shielded and protected, the pollution influence of the steam environment on the line laser vision camera during electron beam welding is prevented, and therefore the using effect of the whole intelligent welding seam correcting device is improved.

title: Power transmission cable ground fault adaptive diagnosis method and system
abstract: The invention discloses a power transmission cable ground fault adaptive diagnosis method and system, and the method comprises the steps: collecting multi-modal data, and carrying out the preprocessing and extraction of the multi-modal data, and forming a statistical feature vector; the method comprises the following steps: adaptively decomposing sheath current data by adopting OVMD, calculating segmented TKEO energy operators, and realizing fault early warning through a ratio criterion of maximum values of TKEO derivatives of adjacent segments; inputting the real-time acquisition time sequence working condition class feature vector into a trained LSTM to obtain a fault probability, dynamically updating a fault probability threshold based on LSTM output, and judging that a fault occurs when the fault probability exceeds a continuous set period of the fault probability threshold; and inputting the statistical class feature vector into ANN, inputting the sheath current data into 1D-CNN for fault classification, and performing adaptive weighted voting integrated decision on the output of the two types of networks to identify the fault type. According to the invention, the problems of low fault detection sensitivity, poor positioning precision, lack of early warning capability and the like in the prior art are solved.

title: HYBRID COFFEE MACHINE WITH AUTOMATIC AND MANUAL MODES
abstract: A hybrid coffee machine can include a boiler configured to heat water from a water supply line, a brew group fluidically coupled to the boiler, and a dispensing subsystem fluidically coupled to the brew group. The coffee machine is operable in an automatic mode and in a manual mode. In the automatic mode, coffee grinds are automatically deposited into the brew group and heated water from the boiler is transmitted through the brew group to brew the coffee. The coffee is then dispensed into a receptacle via the dispensing subsystem. In the manual mode, the heated water from the boiler is transmitted through the dispensing subsystem to a portafilter to brew the coffee. The portafilter is removably coupled to the dispensing subsystem.

title: Cleaning module and cleaning equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a cleaning module and cleaning equipment. The cleaning module comprises a base, a swing arm, a driving assembly, a first transmission assembly and a cleaning assembly. The swing arm is rotationally connected to the base, the driving assembly is installed at one end of the swing arm, the cleaning assembly is installed at the other end of the swing arm, and the output end of a driving shaft of the driving assembly is connected with the cleaning assembly and can drive the cleaning assembly to rotate. A limiting piece is arranged on the swing arm, the first transmission assembly is connected with the output end of the driving shaft, the first transmission assembly can rotate around the driving shaft under the driving of the driving assembly, and the first transmission assembly can make contact with the limiting piece in the rotating process to drive the swing arm to swing relative to the base; and then the cleaning assembly is driven to move between the first cleaning position and the second cleaning position. According to the scheme, position movement of the cleaning assembly is stably achieved through a simple structure, the corner cleaning coverage rate is increased, and the space of an equipment body cannot be excessively occupied.

title: Laser radar housing dirt detection method and autonomous cleaning robot
abstract: The invention relates to a smudginess detection method for a laser radar housing and an autonomous cleaning robot. The smudginess detection method comprises the following steps: emitting a laser pulse to the housing; acquiring an echo signal of the laser pulse and generated three-dimensional point cloud data in real time; calibrating the echo signal of the laser radar in a clean state to obtain a reference feature; and according to the reference features, the echo signals and/or the features of the three-dimensional point cloud data, a control signal is sent to trigger an alarm or enable the autonomous cleaning robot to stop. By adopting the method, a high-reliability laser radar housing smudginess detection method can be provided, alarm or safe shutdown can be triggered in time, and the operation safety and continuity of the autonomous cleaning robot are guaranteed.

title: Control method of cleaning equipment and cleaning equipment
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a control method of cleaning equipment and the cleaning equipment, and relates to the technical field of intelligent control. The cleaning equipment comprises a grabbing device, the grabbing device comprises a mechanical arm, the mechanical arm is used for executing the grabbing action, and the method comprises the steps that a cleaning accessory replacement instruction is responded, and the cleaning accessory replacement instruction is used for instructing the cleaning equipment to replace cleaning accessories; determining whether a to-be-replaced cleaning accessory corresponding to the cleaning accessory replacement instruction is in a preset storage position in an accessory bin or not, wherein the accessory bin is used for storing the cleaning accessory; and if it is determined that the to-be-replaced cleaning accessory is located at the preset storage position, the mechanical arm is controlled to grab the to-be-replaced cleaning accessory, and the cleaning task is executed. Based on the method, whether the cleaning accessory to be replaced is in the preset storage position or not can be effectively detected when the cleaning accessory of the cleaning equipment needs to be replaced, cleaning accessory replacement is achieved, and the success rate of cleaning accessory replacement is increased.

title: Application of polypeptide GSLP or gene for coding polypeptide GSLP in vacuum preservation of berries
abstract: The invention relates to a berry preservation method and application thereof, and belongs to the technical field of berry preservation. The application value of the polypeptide GSLP from the grape genome in berry preservation is found for the first time, the shelf life of berries is remarkably prolonged by combining polypeptide GSLP aqueous solution contact treatment with a vacuum packaging technology, and a good preservation effect is shown. The embodiment verifies that compared with a control group, under the room temperature storage condition, the shelf life of hard-flesh grapes is prolonged by one time, the shelf life of soft-flesh grapes is prolonged by 50%, the shelf life of strawberries is prolonged by two times, and the shelf life of blueberries is prolonged by one time.

title: System, process and catalyst for driving rapid cold start of ammonia decomposition by magnetic induction heating
abstract: The invention discloses a system, a process and a catalyst for driving rapid cold start of ammonia decomposition through magnetic induction heating, and belongs to the technical field of hydrogen energy preparation. The system comprises a gas path unit, a catalyst bed filled with a magnetic cobalt-based catalyst, a detection unit, a magnetic induction heating device and a hydrogen fuel cell integration unit. The catalyst takes Al2O3 as a carrier, metal cobalt nanoparticles are loaded, and the catalyst has high saturation magnetization. When the system works, the magnetic induction heating device generates an alternating magnetic field, so that the catalyst quickly generates heat, the ammonia decomposition reaction temperature can be reached within 10 seconds, and second-level cold start is realized. Meanwhile, the catalyst has high activity on ammonia decomposition, and the ammonia conversion rate is close to 100%. The problems that a traditional ammonia decomposition system is slow in starting and high in energy consumption are solved, and the system is particularly suitable for mobile scenes such as ammonia power vehicles and portable fuel cells needing rapid and instant hydrogen production.

title: Filter detection method and device of clothes treatment equipment, equipment and storage medium
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of intelligent household appliances, and particularly relates to a filter detection method, device and equipment of clothes treatment equipment and a storage medium. After the dehydration stage is completed, firstly, the clothes information, the equipment information and the water vapor end temperature after dehydration are integrated, and the heat demand value needed in the drying stage is determined. Then, on the basis of the demand value, the theoretical drying duration of the clothes and the corresponding theoretical condensate water amount are predicted; in the actual drying process, the actual condensate water amount is monitored and recorded in real time and compared with the theoretical value. Through the comparison result, whether the filter of the clothes processing equipment is blocked or not can be effectively judged. According to the method, whether the filter of the clothes treatment equipment is blocked by accumulated impurities such as thread flocks and hair or not can be effectively judged, the problem that the circulating air volume is reduced due to blockage of the filter is solved, the drying efficiency is remarkably improved, and stable operation of the clothes treatment equipment is ensured.

title: A surface cleaner
abstract: A surface cleaner10 or dock comprising a liquid collection tank 222 for collecting liquid from a surface to be cleaned. The tank has an inlet for liquids and an outlet coupled to the positive displacement pump 250. Preferably, the pump removes air from the liquid collection tank to draw the liquid through the inlet. Preferably, the liquid collection tank has lower and upper portions 222y and 222x and the inlet is in the upper portion. Preferably, liquid flowing into the pump triggers dirty liquid being returned to the surface through overflow conduits 242(t). Preferably, the pump is a flexible vane pump comprising a cam ring and flexible vanes that are deformable about solid debris. Preferably, there is a clean liquid tank 26 and the clean water flows through sieve 84, conduit 44, pump 82 to switchable valve 86. From here the water may go through valve 92 to spray device 94 or to spray bar 88 and onto roller 30a. Preferably, an ingress conduit 240 is connected to a sieve 38 for straining the liquid. Preferably, the pumps and valves are controlled by controller 256.

title: A surface cleaner
abstract: A surface cleaner or surface cleaner dock including a waste liquid collection tank and a flexible vane pump 50 configured to draw the liquid from the surface to be cleaned into the tank. Preferably, the flexible vane pump has an inlet 66m and an outlet 66n and is upstream of the liquid collection tank. Preferably, the flexible vanes of the pump are deformable about debris between a cam ring 62, in pump housing 64, and the flexible vanes. Preferably, the pump comprises a rotor 60 having 4-8 flexible vanes with a Shore A hardness of 45-55. Preferably, each vane is 0.5-1.5mm thick, 5-10mm wide and have a diameter of 15-20mm. Preferably, there is an ingress conduit coupled between an inlet of the pump and a strainer for straining the liquid from the surface to be cleaned. Preferably, the pump motor stops in response to a current increase and the rotational direction of the pump is reversed to remove debris. Preferably there is a clean liquid distribution tank and a roller for removing liquid from the surface to be cleaned.

title: Cleaning robot and control method
abstract: The invention discloses a cleaning robot and a control method. The cleaning robot comprises a shell, an isolation piece and a cleaning piece. The isolation piece is installed at the bottom of the shell in a sliding mode, has a first state and a second state and can be switched between the first state and the second state through overall horizontal sliding, and in the first state, the isolation piece is located below the shell; in the second state, at least part of the isolation piece moves to the exterior of the vertical space where the cleaning piece is located; the cleaning piece is provided with a first position and a second position, and when the cleaning piece is located at the first position, the cleaning piece is located between the isolation piece and the shell; and when the cleaning piece is located at the second position, the cleaning piece is located below the isolation piece. The cleaning piece is covered through horizontal sliding of the isolation piece, the cleaning piece and the carpet are effectively isolated, and the situation that the cleaning piece has wrong cleaning actions under the condition that the lifting height is not high is avoided.

title: Product of manufacture and method for treating, ameliorating or preventing microbial infections
abstract: In alternative embodiments, manufactured products are provided that are made or manufactured as medical devices, such as inhalers, ionizers, asthma "blower-type" devices, nebulizers or nasal spray devices, respirators or respirators, warm air or hot air delivery devices, and/or CPAP (continuous positive air pressure) devices or equivalents, a drug delivery system for delivering a drug or one or combination of drugs, and optionally also warm or hot air, and optionally also ionized air. The manufactured product is used for treating, preventing and improving microbial infection, slowing down the progress of microbial infection, reducing the severity of microbial infection or preventing microbial infection. In alternative embodiments, a manufactured product as provided herein administers a combination or mixture of one or more drugs by inhalation, for example by using an aerosol, aerosol, liquid or powder formulation for inhalation.

title: Cleaning device
abstract: The utility model discloses a cleaning device. The cleaning device comprises a machine body, a cleaning assembly, a suction assembly and a dust collection box. Wherein a shell is arranged at the bottom of the machine body, and the shell is provided with a containing cavity and a dust opening communicated with the containing cavity; the cleaning assembly is rotatably arranged in the accommodating cavity and is communicated with the dust opening; the suction assembly is arranged on the machine body and comprises a suction part and an air outlet part, the suction part is provided with an air inlet end and an air outlet end, and the air outlet part communicates with the air outlet end and the containing cavity so that air flowing out of the air outlet end can be conveyed into the containing cavity; the dust collection box is arranged on the machine body and communicates with the dust opening and the air inlet end. The problem that in the prior art, noise generated when a sweeping robot works is large can be solved.

title: Method for rapidly determining content of hot water soluble substances in reconstituted tobacco
abstract: The invention discloses a method for rapidly determining the content of hot water soluble substances in reconstituted tobacco, and belongs to the technical field of tobacco analysis and detection. The method comprises the following steps: shredding a reconstituted tobacco sample, putting the shredded reconstituted tobacco sample into a rapid extraction device, continuously flushing and filtering with hot water for 5 times, and collecting filtrate; measuring the absorbance of the filtrate at 205nm and 700nm each time by using an ultraviolet-visible spectrograph, and calculating an accumulated absorbance transformation value; by establishing a standard working curve, an accumulated absorbance transformation value is associated with the content of the hot water soluble substances, so that rapid quantification is realized. The method does not need drying and constant weight, the total detection time is shortened to about 15 minutes, and the method has the advantages of being easy and convenient to operate, high in accuracy and good in repeatability and is suitable for rapid monitoring and quality control of the hot water soluble matter content in the reconstituted tobacco production process.

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The utility model discloses a heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a heat insulation structure, a filtering system and a heat tank assembly. The interior of the shell assembly is divided into a hot tank cavity and a filtering cavity. The heat insulation structure is arranged in the shell assembly and matched with the inner wall of the shell assembly to define a heat dissipation cavity, and the heat dissipation cavity communicates with the hot tank cavity. The filtering system is arranged in the filtering cavity; and the hot tank assembly is arranged in the hot tank cavity and is communicated with a water path of the filtering system. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine during working of the hot tank assembly is avoided.

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The utility model discloses a heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a heat tank assembly and a filtering system, the filtering system is communicated with a water path of the heat tank assembly, the filtering system and the heat tank assembly are both arranged in the shell assembly, a heat tank cavity is formed in the shell assembly, and the heat tank cavity is communicated with the heat tank assembly. The hot tank assembly is arranged in the hot tank cavity, and the filtering system is located outside the hot tank cavity; the shell assembly is further provided with an air inlet and a heat dissipation opening, the air inlet and the heat dissipation opening are both communicated with the hot tank cavity, and external airflow enters the hot tank cavity through the air inlet and flows out of the heat dissipation opening. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine when the hot tank assembly works can be avoided.
