title: Intelligent vacuum dehydration filter device
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of industrial filtration, in particular to an intelligent vacuum dehydration filter device which comprises a box body, an oil liquid treatment module, an on-line intelligent monitoring module and a data integration and analysis module, the oil liquid treatment module comprises a vacuum dehydration unit, a deacidification filtering unit and an oil sludge removal filtering unit which are sequentially mounted in the box body, and the adjacent units are connected through pipelines. The device can effectively carry out dehydration, deacidification, oil sludge removal and impurity filtration treatment on an oil product, the oil treatment effect can be monitored on line through a sensor, visual display and trend analysis can be carried out, personnel can conveniently and dynamically control the oil treatment effect, the device adopts modular design, and modular assembly can be carried out according to user requirements; the intelligent device can automatically operate, record and stop according to an oil measurement result, can be used as an oil station data signal center, can effectively combine oil station operation data and oil performance data, and has the advantages of intelligentization, digitization, unmanned management and the like.

title: Base station cleaning structure
abstract: The utility model relates to a base station cleaning structure which comprises a cleaning area, the cleaning area is used for containing a to-be-cleaned component, a cleaning water outlet part, a scraping plate and a sewage collecting tank are arranged in the cleaning area, the scraping plate is arranged between the cleaning water outlet part and the sewage collecting tank, and the to-be-cleaned component is located in the cleaning area and abuts against the scraping plate. When the to-be-cleaned component rotates, the cleaning water outlet part provides cleaning water for the to-be-cleaned component, and the scraping plate scrapes water stains on the to-be-cleaned component into the sewage collecting tank. By arranging the cleaning water outlet part, the scraping plate and the sewage collecting tank, cleaning water can be continuously provided for the mop for washing, water stains and stains on the mop can be scraped to the sewage collecting tank by the scraping plate in time, the cleaning degree of the mop and the cleaning quality of next cleaning can be improved, and the use experience of a user can be improved.

title: Intelligent autonomous cleaning robot for deep sea net cage and cultivation work ship and control method of intelligent autonomous cleaning robot
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent autonomous cleaning robot for deep and far sea net cages and cultivation work ships and a control method thereof.The intelligent autonomous cleaning robot comprises an environment sensing module used for obtaining environment sensing data, processing the environment sensing data and sending the environment sensing data to a control module; information of attachments on a deep sea net cage or a culture work ship and a three-dimensional outline of a netting or a ship body are obtained; the path planning and decision-making module is used for performing path planning according to the three-dimensional contour and the attachment information and embedding a cleaning instruction in a global path; the cooperative control module is used for distributing a cleaning task through communication among the multiple robots so that the multiple robots can work cooperatively, and the cleaning task comprises a global path and a cleaning instruction; and the motion control module is used for outputting a robot control signal in response to the cleaning instruction so as to control the robot to execute a cleaning task. According to the invention, the sewage degree can be accurately identified, intelligent planning and autonomous recharging can be realized, and complex sea conditions and all-weather operation requirements can be met.

title: Catalyst for hydrogen production by sludge drying coupled methanol steam reforming, and preparation method, application and system thereof
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of waste heat recycling, biomass resource utilization and hydrogen production, in particular to a catalyst for hydrogen production by coupling sludge drying with methanol steam reforming and a preparation method, application and system thereof. The catalyst comprises a composite carrier and active component particles, the composite carrier comprises V2O3, V8C7 and V2O3-V8C7, and the V2O3 and the V8C7 are in contact to form a V2O3-V8C7 heterojunction structure with a tight interface; the active component Ni is dispersed on the surface of the composite carrier in a nano-particle form. According to the catalyst for hydrogen production through methanol steam reforming, V2O3-V8C7 double components serve as a heterojunction composite carrier, Ni serves as an active metal, the activity of the catalyst is high, the hydrogen yield of hydrogen production through methanol steam reforming is up to 0.3924 mol/h.g <-1 >, and the methanol conversion rate is up to 93.3%.

title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS OF DATA STRUCTURING
abstract: Presented herein are system and methods for handling of sensor data in home security and automation applications to present as a single event multiple portions of the sensor data, and more particularly image data (e.g., clips), captured from a plurality of sensor devices, such as a plurality of image capture devices.

title: SOLID SORBENT DIRECT AIR CAPTURE AND DESORPTION
abstract: A system includes a vessel including an inlet configured to receive a thermal energy source, the vessel connected to a feeder for introducing a solid sorbent to an interior of the vessel and a collector configured to receive the solid sorbent for removal of the solid sorbent from the vessel. The system also includes a heat exchanger disposed within the vessel, the heat exchanger configured to hold the solid sorbent and facilitate a heat exchange process between the solid sorbent and the thermal energy source, and an isolation system configured to isolate the interior of the vessel during introducing the solid sorbent into the vessel and/or during removing the solid sorbent from the vessel.

title: METHOD FOR DETECTING AND REMOVING A BLOCKAGE
abstract: Es wird ein Verfahren zum Detektieren und Beheben einer Verstopfung eines Luftkanals eines mobilen, selbstfahrenden Geräts, das ein Sauggebläse (8) und eine Bürstenwalze (2) umfasst und einen Reinigungsauftrag ausführt, angegeben, mit folgenden Verfahrensschritten: Bestimmen zumindest eines Betriebsparameters des Sauggebläses (8) oder eines Sensormesswerts eines Sensors; Vergleichen des Betriebsparameters mit einem vorgegebenen Schwellwert oder Auswerten des Sensormesswerts; Abschalten des Sauggebläses (8), falls der Betriebsparameter den vorgegebenen Schwellwert überschreitet oder der Sensormesswert die Verstopfung anzeigt; Rotieren der Bürstenwalze (2) rückwärts; Rückwärtsfahrt des Geräts; und Einschalten des Sauggebläses (8) und anschließendes Bestimmen des aktuellen Betriebsparameters des Sauggebläses (8) oder des aktuellen Sensormesswerts.

title: Method and system for privacy protecting machine learning model
abstract: Training a ML model for protecting privacy of data by: extracting features from items in a training dataset S106, assigning a privacy parameter to each feature S108, generating a noisy item by adding noise to each feature S110, using a task-specific ML model to generate different outputs for the item and the noisy item S112, using a discriminative ML model to determine the features of the item and noisy item that caused the outputs to differ S114 and training the ML model with these outputs and features to optimise the privacy parameters S116. The privacy parameters can be random. Optimising them can comprise maximising differences between each item and its corresponding noisy item and minimising differences between outputs of the task. All the models can be trained simultaneously with a common backbone architecture. The task and discriminator MLs can be retrained each time the privacy parameter changes during optimisation. Noisy items can be generated by adding the privacy parameter for each feature to each element of its vector. The feature vectors can be normalised. Elements of the noisy feature vectors can be masked with a mask vector. The noise value and mask vector may be sampled from random distributions. Fig 4

title: Ultrathin high-precision reed type intelligent gasket and mounting structure thereof
abstract: The utility model discloses an ultrathin high-precision reed type intelligent gasket and an installation structure thereof, the intelligent gasket comprises a flat gasket, a disc reed and a fixed ring, a circuit board is installed in the fixed ring, a battery, a slide rheostat, a signal processing module and a signal sending module are integrated on the circuit board, a slide sheet of the slide rheostat is provided with a pull block, and the pull block is connected with the signal processing module and the signal sending module. And the pull block is connected with the disc spring stay wire seat through a stay wire. Even if the nut only generates tiny displacement, the slip sheet synchronously generates tiny displacement, so that the change of the resistance value of the slide rheostat is caused and is monitored in real time, and meanwhile, the real-time monitoring of the pressure value currently borne by the intelligent gasket can be realized through a conversion relation. The intelligent washer is suitable for application scenes with extremely high requirements for bolt looseness detection precision, early warning of possible looseness can be achieved by monitoring the pressure value of bolt installation in real time, and meanwhile the whole intelligent washer can be designed to be ultra-thin through the sliding rheostats arranged in the radial direction.

title: Water outlet control method and intelligent drinking water equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a water outlet control method and intelligent drinking water equipment. Comprising the steps that the target outlet water temperature of the intelligent drinking water equipment is obtained, opening degrees of a cold water path and a hot water path are determined based on the target outlet water temperature, and the cold water path and the hot water path are controlled to drain water based on the opening degrees; opening adjustment is periodically executed until the current temperature of the water mixing cavity reaches the target water outlet temperature; the opening degree adjustment comprises the steps that the current temperature of the water mixing cavity is obtained, an opening degree deviation correction value is determined based on the temperature difference value between the current temperature of the water mixing cavity and the target water outlet temperature, the opening degree is updated according to the opening degree deviation correction value, and drainage of the cold water path and the hot water path is controlled based on the updated opening degree. Based on the difference value between the real-time water mixing temperature in a water mixing cavity in the intelligent drinking water equipment and the target water outlet temperature, the waterway opening degree in the intelligent drinking water equipment is continuously adjusted, so that liquid in the water mixing cavity can finally reach the target water outlet temperature before being discharged out of the equipment. Therefore, the water outlet temperature of the intelligent drinking water equipment is accurately controlled.

title: Distributed Feed-forward Psychoacoustic Control
abstract: [0000] Distributed feedforward-circuitry that uses an environmental information as a feedforward variable includes an environmental-information source and remote circuitry that is remote from the environmental-information source and configured to receive environmental information from the environmental-information source. The remote circuitry includes a machine-learning system, a target-feature set, and a controller. The machine-learning system has been trained to correlate environmental information and psychoacoustic features with mental state. The target feature set, which is generated by the machine-learning system, comprises a psychoacoustic feature for inclusion in a music stimulus that is to be provided to the subject. The controller causes formation of the music stimulus based on the psychoacoustic feature.

title: SURFACE CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: [0000] A surface cleaning apparatus includes a housing including a base adapted for movement across a surface to be cleaned, a fluid delivery system, and a recovery system. The surface cleaning apparatus can be configured to clean multiple surfaces, including hard and soft surfaces, and for different cleaning modes, including wet cleaning, dry vacuum cleaning, and self-cleaning. A brushroll is provided on the base, along with various wipers, squeegees, and/or fluid dispensers.

title: Allergic rhinitis diagnosis and allergen tracing system based on dynamic text guidance
abstract: The invention discloses an allergic rhinitis diagnosis and allergen traceability system based on dynamic text guidance, and belongs to the technical field of intelligent medical treatment. According to the method, the problems that in the prior art, patient description is inaccurate, allergens are various in variety and have differences, and allergens are difficult to accurately determine and trace are solved, the initial situational sub-graph is verified by introducing periodic features of the patient, the causal contribution degree of the initial situational sub-graph is evaluated through a Bayesian reasoning algorithm, and a mode association result library is formed; according to the method, the crossing of the allergic rhinitis diagnosis and tracing from the traditional static judgment to the dynamic accurate inference is realized, and a personalized and scientific allergen avoidance scheme is provided for patients; through similarity retrieval, environmental information injection verification and calculation of a mode goodness-of-fit score, under the condition that patient symptoms are in multi-factor mixing, a mixed causal graph is created through a graph fusion technology, and the mode goodness-of-fit score is calculated again, so that the accuracy of obtaining an allergen traceability result in practical application is ensured.

title: Robot control method and device and robot control system
abstract: The invention provides a robot control method and device and a robot control system. The method comprises the steps that working information of a robot is acquired; an obstacle avoidance agent and an evaluation agent are constructed, the obstacle avoidance agent is an agent which is obtained through pre-training according to the work information and is used for generating a path of the obstacle avoidance action, and the evaluation agent is an agent which is obtained through pre-training according to the work information and is used for evaluating the advantages and disadvantages of the obstacle avoidance action and guiding the obstacle avoidance agent to update the path; the obstacle avoidance intelligent body and the evaluation intelligent body are adopted to cooperatively work for multiple times until a first iteration condition is met, the currently obtained path is determined as the optimal path, the robot is controlled to complete the task according to the optimal path, and the first iteration condition at least comprises the condition that a first preset iteration number is met. According to the method, the problem that in the prior art, the cleaning work efficiency is poor due to the fact that the autonomous planning and obstacle avoidance capacity of a cleaning robot is poor is solved.

title: システム
abstract: 【課題】実施形態に係るシステムは、ユーザの個別の好みや食事嗜好、アレルギー情報を考慮したレシピを提供することを目的とする。【解決手段】実施形態に係るシステムは、ユーザ情報収集部と、解析部と、レシピ生成部と、提供部とを備える。ユーザ情報収集部は、ユーザの好み、食事嗜好、アレルギー情報を収集する。解析部は、ユーザ情報収集部によって収集された情報を解析する。レシピ生成部は、解析部によって解析された情報に基づいてレシピを生成する。提供部は、レシピ生成部によって生成されたレシピをユーザに提供する。【選択図】図１

title: CLEANING ROBOT
abstract: This cleaning robot comprises: an object detection unit that detects the presence of a person in a cleaning area; a movement determination unit that determines a movement direction; a movement control unit that controls a movement direction and a movement speed; and a drive mechanism that moves the cleaning robot in accordance with a designated movement direction and movement speed. When the presence of a person in the cleaning area is detected, the movement determination unit sets the current position of the person as a target point. The movement control unit moves the cleaning robot toward the target point.

title: Ein neuer Lebensmittelbinder
abstract: Ein Lebensmittelbindemittel umfassende verarbeitetes Mehl und Leguminosae hohem Stärkegehalt Mehl (Leguminosae-HS-Mehl) in einem Verhältnis von 5:1 bis 1:5, wobei das Lebensmittelbindemittel 30 % - 70 % (Gew./Gew.) Stärke und 2,5 % - 12,5 % (Gew./Gew.) Wasser umfasst.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD TO INTEGRATE E-COMMERCE SOFTWARE WITH AUTOMATIC MACHINE OR VENDING MACHINE FOR AUTOMATIC MAKE OR DISPENSING ORDERED PRODUCTS
abstract: The present invention relates generally to e-commerce software enable customer make order and payment online use mobile device, after payment customer go to a compatible beverage dispenser machine or compatible vending machine to collect order by using the e-commerce software to scan the QR Code display on the front of the beverage machine or vending machine to collect their order.

title: Nanocrystalline envelope hardened austenitic stainless steel and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention provides nanocrystalline surface hardened austenitic stainless steel and a preparation method thereof.The microstructure of the stainless steel is an isomerous austenitic structure wrapped by nanometer isometric crystals, and the preparation method of the nanocrystalline surface hardened austenitic stainless steel comprises the following steps that firstly, the austenitic stainless steel plate is subjected to low-temperature cross rolling deformation treatment, and rolling deformation in different directions is controlled; inducing to form deformation-induced martensite strip structures which are uniformly distributed and mutually crossed; then a rapid heating technology is used for enabling deformation to induce the martensite to inversely change into hardened austenite; then nanosecond laser melting treatment is conducted on the surface of the stainless steel plate, so that nano-sized isometric crystals are obtained on the surface; and finally, the steel plate subjected to laser melting is subjected to warm rolling deformation treatment, residual tensile stress introduced to the melting surface is converted into pressure stress, and the surface corrosion resistance is further improved while the yield strength of the steel plate is improved. While the yield strength of the austenitic stainless steel is improved, good corrosion resistance and plasticity can also be considered.

title: Novel high-strength corrosion-resistant austenitic stainless steel and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to novel high-strength and corrosion-resistant austenitic stainless steel and a preparation method thereof.The preparation method comprises the steps that firstly, rolling treatment is conducted on the austenitic stainless steel in a low-temperature environment, martensite phase transformation is conducted on part of austenite by controlling deformation, and a double-phase structure of austenite and deformation-induced martensite is obtained; then, the experimental steel is heated to a specific temperature through a rapid heating process, so that martensite in the structure is inversely changed into hardened austenite through a shear mechanism; carrying out melting treatment on the surface of the stainless steel by using nanosecond laser to obtain a nano equiaxed crystal structure on the surface; and finally, the molten steel plate is subjected to stress relief annealing treatment, so that thermal stress, structure defects and the like generated in the laser machining process are eliminated. Therefore, the yield strength of the experimental steel is improved by utilizing the internal hardened austenite, and the corrosion resistance of the experimental steel after deformation strengthening is improved by utilizing the surface nanocrystalline layer. Therefore, the austenitic stainless steel with high strength, corrosion resistance and non-magnetic property can be obtained through the multi-stage coupling process treatment.

title: Self-moving surface cleaning robot
abstract: The present disclosure provides a self-moving surface cleaning robot including: a rotating roller configured to contact a floor when rotating clockwise or counterclockwise or to be away from the floor when stopping rotating; a controller configured to manage the driving system to move the self-moving surface cleaning robot within the determined to-be-cleaned area such that: the self-moving surface cleaning robot travels within the to-be-cleaned area at least in a nested mode; the nested mode includes movement of the self-moving surface cleaning robot in a first direction during a first travel during which a first area in which the rotating roller moves forms at least a first path, and movement of the self-moving surface cleaning robot in a second direction during a second travel during which the rotating roller moves in the first direction. A floor second area in which the rotating roller moves is adjacent to a floor first area in which the rotating roller moves during the first travel and forms a second path, at least one of which forms a closed path.

title: Capsule cabin structure for isolating patients with infectious diseases
abstract: A capsule cabin structure for isolating patients with infectious diseases depends on a special structure of a capsule cabin and environment control and biosafety technologies, not only has multiple advantages of sterility, convenience and the like, but also provides an independent private space for each patient, and enables the capsule cabin to generate center-of-gravity shift and posture deflection through a dynamic control device, so that the capsule cabin can be used for isolating the patients with infectious diseases. When the capsule cabin is in use, the external scenery displayed by the glass retaining wall at the entrance and exit is misplaced, the patient in the capsule cabin forms sensory stimulation changes of periodic gravity center change and landscape misplacement change, and in cooperation with visual stimulation and somatosensory stimulation brought by illumination and temperature and humidity changes, psychological stress caused by the fact that the patient is in an isolated environment for a long time and lacks sensory stimulation is effectively avoided; patient physical and psychological requirements are individually met, and the effect of accelerating patient recovery is achieved. Meanwhile, the occupied area of the capsule cabins is small, the arrangement number in unit area is effectively increased, the utilization rate of medical resources is improved, more patients are benefited, and medical treatment and emergency response pressure is reduced.

title: Contrast Therapy Machine
abstract: [0000] A contrast therapy machine is disclosed. The contrast therapy machine includes a cavity that is sized and shaped to accommodate one or more human bodies. Single user contrast therapy machines may include an opening through a top surface permitting the human body from the neck up to be outside of the contrast therapy machine while it is use. The contrast therapy machine includes a heater and a cooler. The contrast therapy machine can switch automatically or be manually switched between one or more cooling cycles and one or more heating cycles. Heating cycles and cooling cycles may be customized.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR ONE-SHOT NEURAL ARCHITECTURE SEARCH WITH UNLABELED DATA
abstract: A computer-implemented method of neural architecture search. The method includes: training a supermodel by sampling an architecture and training the supermodel with the sampled architecture on labeled training data and updating weights of the supermodel by gradients with respect to the sampled models; determining Pareto-optimal submodels of the supermodel based on at least two performance metrics by iteratively carrying out the following steps: computing outputs of a reference model for the unlabeled data, wherein the reference model a largest submodel of the supermodel; sampling a plurality of submodels from the supermodel; computing by the submodels their outputs of the unlabeled data; computing a difference between the outputs of the reference model and the submodels; employing an optimization algorithm to iteratively sample and evaluate submodels based on a plurality of objectives.

title: INTEGRATED SYSTEM FOR HEATING WATER
abstract: One variation of a water heater includes: a housing; a water tank arranged within the housing and configured to store water received from a cold water supply of a building; a heat pump arranged within the housing and configured to heat water stored in the water tank; an inline heater arranged within the housing and configured to heat water exiting the water tank; and a mixing valve arranged within the housing and configured to combine cold water from the cold water supply of the building with hot water exiting the water tank. The water heater is configured to: detect a water temperature of water stored in the water tank; and, in response to flow of water from the water tank, selectively activate the inline heater based on the water temperature to supply hot water, proximal the target supply temperature, to the building.

title: Systems And Methods For A Foldable Manual Brewing Press
abstract: [0000] Disclosed herein is a foldable hand-operated beverage press including an upper post, a plurality of legs, a press plate, a lever handle rotatably coupled to the upper post, and a locking mechanism to prevent rotation of at least the upper post when in a locked state and enable rotation of at least the upper post when in an unlocked state. The upper post and the plurality of legs are rotatably coupled to the press plate. A first leg may be rotatably coupled to the upper post and locked in downward state when the locking mechanism is in the locked state. The locking mechanism includes a locking button, a spring, a coupling bar, and a washer, wherein the locking button is biased in an outward position and the washer is biased in an inward position that prevents rotation of at least the upper post.

title: CONTROLLING AN EXERCISE MACHINE USING A VIDEO WORKOUT PROGRAM
abstract: [0001] A method for generating a personalized workout comprises receiving a video workout program for a user, the video workout program comprising a video portion and a plurality of exercise device parameters synchronized with the video portion, the video workout program having a difficulty level based at least in part on a setting of the plurality of exercise device parameters; receiving fitness information for the user; and based at least in part on the fitness information, adjusting the setting of the plurality of exercise device parameters to adjust the difficulty level of the video workout program.

title: System and method for enhanced data generation in fault diagnosis
abstract: The invention relates to a system and method for enhanced data generation in fault diagnosis. A method of generating audio to obtain manipulated audio data includes receiving a textual description of audio associated with an operation of a device; receiving audio data associated with an operation of the device; generating, based on the textual description, a descriptive textual input of an audio feature associated with the operation of the device; generating manipulated audio data based on the descriptive text input and the audio data, the manipulated audio data comprising one or more audio features indicative of a fault associated with the descriptive text input; training a machine learning (ML) model to diagnose a fault using the manipulated audio data, the ML model trained to generate an output indicative of the fault based on audio data obtained during operation of the device; and based on convergence during training, outputting a trained ML model configured to generate an output indicative of a fault.

title: Hydraulic brewing head structure and coffee machine comprising same
abstract: The invention relates to a hydraulic brewing head structure and a coffee machine comprising the same, and relates to the technical field of coffee machine brewing, the hydraulic brewing head structure comprises a fixed outer wall, a main body supporting structure forming a brewing head, a movable part which is arranged in the fixed outer wall in an up-and-down movable mode, and a closed hydraulic cavity formed between the movable part and the fixed outer wall, the shaft core assembly penetrates through the movable part, the upper end of the shaft core assembly is communicated with an external hot water source, the lower end of the shaft core assembly is communicated with the powder bowl, and the reset element provides elastic force enabling the movable part to reset upwards. And the pressurizing action of the hydraulic cavity and the liquid passing extraction action of the shaft core assembly form linkage control. According to the hydraulic brewing head structure and the coffee machine comprising the same, the technical problems that in the prior art, a coffee machine handle is poor in compatibility, and water is prone to leaking in the extraction process can be solved.

title: Intelligent air fryer
abstract: The utility model relates to an intelligent air fryer which comprises a machine body, a cooking cavity formed in an opening in the inner side portion of the machine body and a hot air circulating system communicated with the cooking cavity, and a frying basket with an opening in the top is arranged in the cooking cavity in a drawable mode through the opening in the side portion. A side opening is formed in the machine body, a protruding part extending in the direction of the outer side of the machine body is arranged above the side opening, a camera shooting assembly is arranged at the bottom of the protruding part, a control system electrically connected with the hot air circulating system and the camera shooting assembly is arranged in the machine body, and when the air fryer cooks, the camera shooting assembly is suitable for shooting information of food in the frying basket. The hot air circulating system is used for storing food information and transmitting the food information to the control system, so that the control system analyzes the type of the food according to the food information shot by the camera component, and controls the hot air circulating system to operate according to the corresponding preset menu, and therefore, intelligent cooking of the food can be realized; and the user use convenience and user use experience of the air fryer are effectively improved.

title: 가요성 절연 부재
abstract: 가요성 절연 부재가 기재된다. 절연 부재는 단일 층일 수 있거나, 또는 에어로겔 및 제1 섬유성 구성요소를 갖는 제1 층, 및 제2 섬유성 구성요소를 갖는 매트인 제2 층을 포함할 수 있다. 제1 층 및 제2 층은 함께 접착된다. 가요성 절연 부재는 UL94 V0에 따라 불연성이고 40 mW/m.K 미만의 25℃에서의 열 전도도를 갖고, 적어도 0.3 mm의 두께를 갖는다. 절연 부재의 제조 방법이 절연 부재를 위한 용도와 함께 추가로 기재된다.

title: Scraping strip assembly, floor brush and wet type surface cleaner
abstract: The invention provides a scraping strip assembly, which is used for a ground brush of a wet type surface cleaner, and comprises a main frame; the rolling piece is connected to the main frame and can freely rotate relative to the main frame; the scraping strip is pivotally connected to the main frame and can be pivotally rotated to a second position from a first position; the transmission part is pivotally connected to the scraping strip and is coaxially connected with the rolling part; the transmission part and the rolling part are connected through at least one static friction medium, so that static friction force is provided between the transmission part and the rolling part. The invention further provides a floor brush and a wet type surface cleaner.

title: INFERRING ASSISTANT ACTION(S) BASED ON AMBIENT SENSING BY ASSISTANT DEVICE(S)
abstract: [0000] Implementations can determine an ambient state that reflects a state of a user and/or an environment of the user based on an instance of sensor data. The ambient state can be processed, using an ambient sensing machine learning (ML) model, to generate suggested action(s) that are suggested to be performed, on behalf of the user, by an automated assistant. In some implementations, a corresponding representation of the suggested action(s) can be provided for presentation to the user, and the suggested action(s) can be performed by the automated assistant in response to a user selection of the suggested action(s). In additional or alternative implementations, the suggested action(s) can be automatically performed by the automated assistant. Implementations can additionally or alternatively generate training instances for training the ambient sensing ML model based on interactions with the automated assistant.

title: TRANSFERRING ACTIONS FROM A SHARED DEVICE TO A PERSONAL DEVICE ASSOCIATED WITH AN ACCOUNT OF A USER
abstract: [0000] Implementations relate to transferring actions from a shared device to a personal device that is associated with an account of a user. Some implementations relate to determining that a request is associated with sensitive information, determining that one or more other users are co-present with the shared device, and transferring the request that is related to sensitive information to a personal device of the user. Some implementations relate determining that a user is no longer co-present with a shared device that is currently performing one or more actions and transferring one or more of the actions to a personal device that is associated with an account of the user.

title: 500 MPa grade alloyed hot-galvanized automobile outer plate steel based on rapid heating technology and preparation method of 500 MPa grade alloyed hot-galvanized automobile outer plate steel
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of automobile steel production, and particularly relates to 500 MPa grade alloyed hot galvanizing automobile outer plate steel based on a rapid heating technology and a preparation method of the 500 MPa grade alloyed hot galvanizing automobile outer plate steel based on the rapid heating technology, and the 500 MPa grade alloyed hot galvanizing automobile outer plate steel based on the rapid heating technology comprises the following chemical components by weight percent: 0.05-0.11% of C; mn: 0.6% to 1.50%; 0.30% to 0.90% of Si; 0.1% to 0.5% of Al; n < = 0.002%; p is less than or equal to 0.030%; s < = 0.005%; the content of Nb, Ti and V is more than or equal to 0.01% and less than or equal to 0.02%; and the balance of Fe and inevitable impurities. The method has the advantages that precious metal elements are not added, so that the product has the advantage of low cost. Meanwhile, high strength and excellent forming performance of the steel for the automobile outer plate are realized by adopting a reasonable production process, the stamping forming requirement of an automobile covering part is met, and the lightweight design of an automobile is realized.

title: System and method for production fairness oriented hierarchical consistency federated learning method
abstract: A method for training a neural network using federated learning, the method comprising: sending a portion of a machine learning model maintained by a server to a client, generating a local model synchronized with the server; at each client, training a local model with local data, receiving model parameters from the server including a global shared encoder and a cluster shared prediction header, providing the cluster shared prediction header for the server for aggregating models from clients in the respective cluster; at each client, synchronizing with the server on its locally updated model; updating, at the server, the globally shared encoder by aggregating updates of the cross entropy loss from the clients; updating, at the server, the cluster shared prediction header by aggregating updates from the clients in each cluster; sending, at the server, the updated global and cluster shared model parameters to the client; repeating the steps until a threshold value is met; and outputting final parameters including the final globally shared encoder of each cluster and the cluster-shared model parameters.

title: Graphene ceramic substrate and preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention provides a graphene ceramic substrate as well as a preparation method and application thereof, and relates to the technical field of surface modification of ceramic-based composite materials. The preparation method of the graphene ceramic substrate comprises the following ceramic substrate pretreatment step: modifying the surface of the ceramic substrate with the smoothness Ra less than 0.008 mu m by adopting a silane coupling agent to form an amino functional group interface layer; the silane coupling agent is adopted to modify the surface of the ceramic substrate, an amino functional group interface layer is formed, the surface roughness of the ceramic substrate is remarkably reduced, the active site density is increased, the silane coupling agent reacts with hydroxyl groups on the surface of the substrate through organic functional groups in molecules to form covalent bonds, meanwhile, hydrolysable groups at the other end are hydrolyzed to generate silicon hydroxyl groups, and the surface roughness of the ceramic substrate is improved. Chemical bonding of the inorganic substrate and the organic carbon film is achieved, a powerful anchoring interface layer is formed, the interface bonding strength is improved, the graphene film grows on the surface of the ceramic substrate in situ, and the conductivity of the graphene ceramic substrate is effectively improved.

title: System and method for production fairness oriented hierarchical consistency federated learning method
abstract: A computer-implemented method of training a neural network with federated learning, the method comprising sending a portion of a server-maintained machine learning model to a client, using a local model without cluster tags at the client, estimating cluster tags at the server for potential features from the client using k-means, and training the neural network using federated learning. Using globally shared encoder parameters and cluster shared prediction headers, training a local model with client data, updating the global encoder parameters at the server by aggregating cross entropy loss updates from the clients, updating the cluster shared prediction headers at the server by aggregating updates from the clients within each cluster, and updating the cluster shared prediction headers at the server by aggregating cross entropy loss updates from the clients within each cluster. The updated global and cluster sharing model parameters are sent to the client, and final parameters, including global sharing encoder and cluster sharing model parameters, are output after a threshold is satisfied.

title: Programmable intelligent environment five-constant control system and controller thereof
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of building environment control, and discloses a programmable intelligent environment controller, which comprises a power supply module provided with a filtering voltage-reducing and voltage-stabilizing circuit and used for converting 220V AC input into at least 24VDC and 12VDC output and supplying power to internal modules of the controller; and the control module is electrically connected with the power supply module and used for data acquisition and data processing, the control module adopts a multi-core processor architecture and comprises a main processor and a coprocessor, and the main processor is used for logic operation and control instruction generation. On the basis of traditional three constants, monitoring and control over air cleanliness and environmental noise are newly added, a complete five-constants intelligent environment control system is constructed, the indoor environment quality and the living comfort are remarkably improved, and through the adoption of a multi-core processor architecture, a multi-path independent isolation power source, a high-density configurable I/O channel and an expansion interface module, the indoor environment quality and the living comfort are improved. High integration and flexible expansion of the controller are realized, and the controller can adapt to various environment sensors and execution devices.

title: Method and system for integrating high-flux steam exhaust, hot-pressing densification and controlled crystallization of water-based PHA (Polyhydroxyalkanoate) coating wet film
abstract: The invention discloses a method and a system for integrating high-flux steam exhaust, hot-pressing densification and controlled crystallization of a water-based PHA (Polyhydroxyalkanoate) coating wet film, belongs to the fields of high polymer material processing, transmission phenomena in chemical engineering and papermaking science, and is suitable for a high-speed production line of 50m/min to 1200m/min. In order to solve the problems that pinholes are easy to generate and densification is insufficient during high-speed coating of water-based PHA, by pre-adjusting and optimizing wet film rheology and utilizing a specific micro-nano structured interface and partition negative pressure technology, more than 80% of high-efficiency steam exhaust is realized, and the Leidenfrost effect caused by interface steam is thoroughly eliminated. Meanwhile, a heat source as high as 400 DEG C is adopted for dynamic thermal compensation to break through the thermodynamic bottleneck, and precise dew point difference is matched to regulate and control crystallization kinetics. Compared with a traditional process, the method has the advantages that defect-free densification and performance setting of the coating are achieved within a very short time, the obtained product is excellent in barrier property, high in heat sealing strength and easy to recycle, energy consumption is remarkably reduced, production efficiency is improved, and the method has great industrial application value.

title: Steel for 500MPa-grade hot-dip galvanized high-strength outer plate for automobile based on rapid heating technology and preparation method of steel
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of automobile steel manufacturing, and relates to 500 MPa grade automobile hot-dip galvanized high-strength outer plate steel based on a rapid heating technology and a preparation method of the 500 MPa grade automobile hot-dip galvanized high-strength outer plate steel. Mn: 0.6% to 1.50%; 0.30% to 0.9% of Si; p < = 0.030%, and N < = 0.002%; s < = 0.005%; als is less than or equal to 0.05%; the content of Nb, Ti and V is more than or equal to 0.01% and less than or equal to 0.02%; and the balance of Fe and inevitable impurities. The method has the advantages that the low-cost C-Mn-Si component design is adopted, precious metal elements such as Cr and Mo are not added, and the cost advantage is achieved; and a rapid heating continuous annealing galvanizing process is adopted, so that grains of the steel plate are refined, and the steel plate has high strength and excellent forming performance.

title: DYNAMIC LOAD CONTROL WITH EXTERNAL COORDINATION
abstract: [0001] Systems/methods for managing a load center (500) uses a thermal model of an overcurrent protection device to adjust the load center (500) energy level. The systems/methods provide an energy management system (EMS) that manages the amount of load energy in the load center (500) to allow the load center (500) to operate in an overloaded state without inducing thermal tripping. The EMS (512) includes a dynamic load control algorithm that can continuously determine in real time the amount of time remaining until load shedding is required to ensure thermal tripping is avoided, and coordinate with various loads (508) to reduce the amount of load center (500) energy. The EMS (512) can send a request to the loads (508) that includes the time remaining until load shedding is required to allow each load (518) to decide for itself how best to respond. In some embodiments, the request may also include a power margin by which each load (508) should reduce power consumption.

title: Mullite-based ceramic compounded on basis of transition metal oxides and method for preparing mullite-based ceramic
abstract: The invention relates to mullite-based ceramic based on transition metal oxide compounding and a preparation method. The mullite-based ceramic comprises a basic raw material and transition metal oxide, the basic raw materials comprise the following components in percentage by mass: 53-60% of kaolin and 40-47% of aluminum oxide; the transition metal oxide comprises a mixture of CuO, CoO and ZrO2; the total addition amount of the transition metal oxide is 0.5-9% of the mass of the basic raw material. By adding the mixture of CuO, CoO and ZrO2, diffusion and densification can be accelerated, the sintering temperature is reduced, and mullite formation is promoted; the effects of inhibiting crack propagation, pinning grain boundaries and inhibiting grain growth are synergistically realized, so that the mechanical property and the thermal shock resistance are improved while the density is maintained or improved; meanwhile, by adding the transition metal oxide, generation of second-phase corundum grains can be promoted, and mullite and corundum grains are interwoven and filled, so that the strength and the thermal shock resistance are further improved.

title: Pet Waste Detection and Analysis Cleaning Robot System through Video Sensing and Analysis
abstract: 본 발명은 반려동물의 배변을 영상으로 감지하고 분석하여 주변 사물과 대변 및 소변을 정확하게 식별하는 시스템에 관한 것이다. 청소 로봇 시스템(100)에 장착된 카메라 및 광학 스캐너(102)는 배변의 영상을 수집하고, 영상 처리 모듈(103)에서 실시간으로 분석한다. 인공지능 기반의 분석 알고리즘(104)은 배변의 형태, 크기, 색상 등을 분석하여 대변과 소변을 구분하며, 감지된 배변 정보는 청소 로봇 시스템에 전달되어 최적의 청소 경로 및 방법을 설정한다. LiDAR와 RGB-D 카메라를 통해 배변의 위치와 형태를 정밀하게 파악하고, 이를 기반으로 청소 로봇의 경로를 최적화한다. 또한, 고해상도 카메라를 이용하여 배변의 형태와 크기를 정확하게 감지하고, 딥러닝 기반 객체 인식 알고리즘을 통해 배변과 주변 사물을 구분하며, 3D 구조 광 스캐닝 모듈을 사용하여 배변의 위치와 형태를 3차원적으로 파악한다. 클라우드 기반 데이터 분석 시스템을 통해 배변 감지 및 분석 데이터를 클라우드 서버에 저장하고 이를 분석하여 보호자에게 정보를 제공한다. 이와 같이 본 발명은 인공지능과 첨단 센서 기술을 융합하여 배변 감지 및 분석의 정확도를 획기적으로 향상시키고, 배변 관리의 자동화를 통해 보호자의 시간과 노력을 절약하며, 실내 환경을 쾌적하게 유지하는 데 기여한다. 다양한 환경에서의 적용 가능성을 고려한 설계로, 다양한 형태와 크기의 배변을 정확히 감지하고 처리할 수 있는 능력을 보유하고 있다. 이러한 기술적 진보는 기존의 단순 감지 및 수작업 처리 방식과 차별화되며, 반려동물 케어 분야에서 새로운 표준을 제시할 수 있을 것이다.

title: Passive gasket type pressure sensor based on parametric negative resistance self-excitation and monitoring method
abstract: The invention discloses a passive gasket type pressure sensor based on parametric negative resistance self-excitation and a monitoring method, and belongs to the technical field of bolt loosening state monitoring. The sensor is improved based on a standard metal flat washer, a piezoelectric sensing unit, a pilot frequency response passive network and a passive heat-induced drift suppression circuit are embedded, and an embedding area is filled with organic silica gel. The pilot frequency response passive network uses parametric reactance to modulate nuclear strength nonlinearity to generate active negative resistance, weak radio frequency energy self-excitation is achieved, and bolt axial load change is mapped into echo frequency sideband drift; the thermally induced drift suppression circuit eliminates temperature drift. According to monitoring, the environment temperature is determined through temperature echoes, a frequency-load curve is matched, and then the bolt loosening state is determined through bolt loosening state echoes. Passive, wireless, maintenance-free and high-precision monitoring is realized, and the problems of high starting threshold, near communication, poor integration and the like in the prior art are solved.

title: Apparatus for making beverage and associated method and power management system
abstract: The present invention provides an apparatus and associated method of making a beverage and a power management system, the apparatus comprising: a first heating assembly and a second heating assembly configured to heat a liquid; the power management system comprises a controller and an energy storage device; and an electronic control circuit powered by the mains supply. Wherein the first heating assembly and the second heating assembly each comprise a first heater element configured to be powered by a mains supply and a second heater element configured to be powered by an energy storage device. When a beverage making function requires simultaneous operation of the first and second heating assemblies, the controller is configured to simultaneously supply mains supply to the first heater elements of the first and second heating assemblies, supply power from the energy storage device to the second heater elements of the first and second heating assemblies, control a total power drawn from the mains supply, and control the total power drawn from the mains supply. Such that the total power does not exceed a predetermined power limit, and retaining a portion of the mains power for powering the electronic control circuitry.

title: METHODS FOR EDGE CASE DETECTION AND FURTHER OPTIMIZATION OF OBJECT DETECTION MODELS
abstract: [0000] Methods for a machine learning network that provide efficient, scalable, and granular analyses during validation of an object detection model are disclosed. The system described herein is configured to use extraction of visual concepts to provide interpretable metadata to a data slice finding technique. The identified, poor-performing slices are then provided to a user for selection as to which slice or slices to focus on when preparing a subsequent training dataset that is to be used to further refine the object detection model. The system then coordinates with a large language model and with a vision and language foundational model to augment the original validation dataset with supplementary image samples that are determined to be associated with the problems currently causing poor performance of the model.

abstract: Mevcut buluş, makine, otomotiv, yapı ve havacılık endüstrilerinde kullanılan cıvata ve somun bağlantılarının eksenel yükünü izleyen, çalışması için gereken enerjiyi ortamdaki mekanik titreşimlerden piezoelektrik yöntemle kendi üreten ve gevşeme durumunda görsel veya dijital uyarı veren akıllı bir rondela mekanizması ile ilgilidir.

title: Unified model for 3D object detection and object-centric neural reconstruction
abstract: The invention relates to a unified model for 3D object detection and object-centric neural reconstruction. A method of performing pose estimation for an image includes, at one or more processing devices, receiving an input image, generating a pose code corresponding to an estimated pose of an object in the input image based on the input image, generating a box code corresponding to a bounding box of the object in the input image, and outputting the bounding box code to the one or more processing devices. The method further includes performing pose estimation for the input image by generating an improved pose of the object using the pose code and the frame code, generating a predicted output for the object in the input image based on the input image and the improved pose, and controlling one or more functions of the device based on the predicted output.

title: NON-INTRUSIVE MONITORING SYSTEM
abstract: [0000] Methods, devices and monitoring systems are described that include a hub in communication with sensors that aggregate activities in an enclosure, such as a building. The hub identifies when those activities are occurring more or less often than expected and classifies the activity to piece together and learn the user's or individual's daily activity. Additional satellite devices may be added that increase the range and capacity of the sensors for collecting more information and activity within the building. In this manner, the monitoring systems use a redundant array of sensors to consistently monitor activities occurring in or around a building to create a trail and heatmap of events and activities that the monitoring system's hub classifies, verifies with other sensors, learns, and then correctly processes.

title: NON-CORROSIVE OVEN DEGREASER CONCENTRATE
abstract: [0000] The invention relates to a non-corrosive degreasing concentrate and ready to use formulation. In particular, non-corrosive compositions capable of removing polymerized grease as effectively as some alkali metal hydroxide (i.e. caustic) based degreasers without requiring the use of personal protective equipment are disclosed.

title: Systems and methods for person identification using wireless signals
abstract: [0000] Systems and methods for person identification using wireless signals is disclosed. Channel state information is collected from wireless signals received by a wireless receiver. The channel state information (CSI) is pre-processed to determine a gait and biometric features including body shape and height associated with a particular person based on selected CSI segments, which are annotated with a class indicative of the gait. The particular person is identified, using a machine learning model, based on the gait and the other biometric features, wherein the machine learning model is trained using classifier training and training data including the gait and information from the CSI segments, from which one or more parameters is determined. After training, the person can be identified based on packets from received wireless signals. The method further includes controlling a machine, in response to detecting the presence of the person, based on established usage patterns.

title: セルフクリーニング機器の制御方法及び装置
abstract: 本発明は、セルフクリーニング機器の制御方法を提供する。当該セルフクリーニング機器の制御方法は、ユーザによって設定されたドントディスターブ時間情報を受信することと、ドントディスターブ有効範囲情報に基づいて、セルフクリーニング機器のドントディスターブ時間情報内におけるクリーニング動作を特定することと、を含む。

title: Manganese oxide material with surface defects as well as preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a manganese oxide material with surface defects as well as a preparation method and application thereof. The method comprises the following steps: soaking a manganese oxide in an ammonia water solution to obtain an ammonia-containing manganese oxide, placing the ammonia-containing manganese oxide in a fast heating tube furnace, and rapidly heating in a short time to vaporize, expand and escape ammonia to generate surface defects, thereby obtaining the manganese oxide with the surface defects. The manganese oxide material with the surface defects prepared by the method is simple and convenient in preparation method and controllable in preparation process, the prepared manganese oxide with the surface defects has excellent photo-thermal selective catalytic oxidation performance on ammonia gas, the performance of the manganese oxide material is obviously superior to that of a common photo-thermal catalytic material at present, and the manganese oxide material is applicable to purification of low-concentration ammonia gas.

title: Method for controlling self-moving cleaning robot and self-moving cleaning robot
abstract: The invention provides a method for controlling a self-moving cleaning robot and the self-moving cleaning robot. The method for controlling the self-moving type cleaning robot comprises the steps that the self-moving type cleaning robot is controlled to move, and a side brush assembly is made to be in a first operation mode; based on the signal of the second sensor, determining a to-be-cleaned edge in the moving process of the self-moving type cleaning robot; after the to-be-cleaned edge is determined, the first operation mode of the edge brush assembly is changed into a second operation mode to clean the to-be-cleaned edge; determining whether the to-be-cleaned edge is cleaned or not; and when the to-be-cleaned edge is cleaned, the second operation mode of the edge brush assembly is returned to the first operation mode.

title: Coffee grinder assembly method and manufacturing assembly for implementing method
abstract: A method for assembling a coffee grinder is provided. The coffee grinder comprises a first grinder member (100) and a second grinder member (102). When the coffee grinder is assembled, a grinding space in which beans can be ground is defined between the first grinder member and the second grinder member. The method includes evaluating one of the first and second grinder components independently of the other of the first and second grinder components prior to arranging the first and second grinder components to define a grinding space, to determine at least one parameter relating to the geometry of the evaluated grinder component. The subsequent arrangement of the first and second grinder members to define the grinding space is based on at least one parameter. Coffee grinders themselves and manufacturing assemblies for manufacturing coffee grinders are also provided.

title: Method for controlling self-moving cleaning robot and self-moving cleaning robot
abstract: The invention provides a method for controlling a self-moving cleaning robot and the self-moving cleaning robot. The method for controlling the self-moving type cleaning robot comprises the steps that the self-moving type cleaning robot is controlled to move, and a side brush assembly is kept in a first operation mode; determining a cleaning environment characteristic in a moving process of the self-moving type cleaning robot based on a signal from the first sensor; when the cleaning environment feature meets a first specified condition, the first operation mode of the side brush assembly is changed into a second operation mode to adapt to the cleaning environment feature; when the side brush assembly is in a second operation mode, a cleaning environment characteristic is obtained in real time through the first sensor, and when the cleaning environment characteristic meets a second specified condition, the second operation mode is changed to the first operation mode.

title: Pump and beverage supply device
abstract: A pump according to the present invention is provided with: a fixed part including an electromagnet; a movable part that is attracted to the fixed part side by a magnetic field generated by energization of the electromagnet, and that performs a vibration operation that, when the electromagnet is not energized, is separated from the fixed part by an urging force generated during attraction; a flow path through which a fluid flows, and a first pump chamber and a second pump chamber provided in the flow path; and a first piston and a second piston that operate so as to reduce the volume of the pump chamber in accordance with an operation in which the movable part is attracted by the fixed part, and that operate so as to increase the volume of the pump chamber in accordance with an operation in which the movable part is separated from the fixed part.

title: SYSTEM(S) AND METHOD(S) FOR UTILIZATION OF GENERATIVE MODEL(S) IN GENERATING, UPDATING, AND/OR EXECUTING USER ROUTINE(S)
abstract: Implementations relate to receiving user input from a user that describes at least one type of action to be routinely performed, but without identifying any device or application in association with the at least one action, and in response, utilizing generative model(s) to determine action(s) to be performed by device(s) and/or applications, that are associated with the user, and in furtherance of executing a user routine. The action(s) can be determined based on processing, using the generative model(s), the user input and metadata associated with device(s) and/or application(s) that indicates capabilities of the device(s) and/or application(s). The user routine can be periodically modified or updated based on additional user input(s) and/or based on monitored performance (or lack thereof) of the user routine.

title: SLICE-BASED METHODS FOR OPTIMIZING VALIDATION AND SUBSEQUENT RETRAINING PROCEDURES OF MACHINE LEARNING MODELS
abstract: Methods for a machine-learning network that provide efficient, scalable, and granular analyses during validation of a machine learning model are disclosed. Providing quantitative analysis information to machine learning experts when they are deciding how to proceed with further optimizing their given machine learning model allows for more directed procedures during edge case detection. Following the execution of a principal machine learning model using a validation dataset, a shallow learning model may be trained to provide simulations about how the principal model may be improved, or not, given different re-training scenarios. By using slice-based schemes, the validation dataset is divided into certain problematic data slices, and then, during inference of the shallow learning model, additional quantitative information about the effect on other data slices given a subsequent re-training of the principal model using a certain problematic data slice allows the ML expert to make more informed decisions.

title: SLICE-BASED METHODS FOR EDGE CASE DETECTION IN MACHINE LEARNING MODELS
abstract: Methods for a machine-learning network that provide efficient, scalable, and granular analyses during validation of a machine learning model are disclosed. Validation of models depends upon many factors, including the real-world application of the model, the type of model being trained, and the types of data samples it is being trained on. In order to provide relevant edge case information to users that pertains to their specific model, data slice finding techniques may be used to identify subsets of the dataset that are particularly problematic. By limiting a length of the slice description that the algorithm searches and by configuring the algorithm to target specific types of errors, users are provided with a more granular analysis that then allows them to determine how or if they need to retrain the model.

title: Preparation method and application of nanoscale transition metal phosphide heterojunction catalyst
abstract: The invention provides a preparation method and application of a nanoscale transition metal phosphide heterojunction catalyst, and belongs to the technical field of electrochemistry. The preparation method comprises the following steps: firstly dispersing cobalt acetylacetonate, nickel acetylacetonate, carbon black and trioctylphosphine oxide into a mixed solvent of oleylamine and 1-octadecene, then carrying out Joule heat treatment on the mixed solution in an argon atmosphere, and finally centrifuging, washing and drying to obtain the nanoscale transition metal phosphide heterojunction catalyst. The preparation method is low in cost and high in efficiency, and the prepared phosphide nano material is small in particle size, highly dispersed on carbon black, high in interface structure proportion and excellent in performance when used for hydrogen precipitation of alkaline electrolyzed water.

title: Cleaning robot for ventilation ducts
abstract: 본 발명은 환기 덕트용 청소 로봇를 개시한다. 본 발명에 따른 환기 덕트용 청소 로봇는, 환기 덕트의 일단 내부 일측으로 이온화된 공기와 함께 고압공기를 간헐적으로 공급하기 위한 것으로, 공급 본체의 내부 일측에 설치되어 외부로부터 흡입한 공기를 송풍시키는 송풍기 및 이 송풍기의 일측에 설치되어 정전기를 중화시키는 이온을 생성하는 제전모듈 및 송풍 공기와 이온이 혼합된 혼합공기를 공급받아 환기덕트의 내부에 토출시키는 에어푸시노즐 및 이 에어푸시노즐의 전방에 배치되어 고압의 공기를 주기적으로 분출시켜 환기덕트내부에 충격파를 일으키는 파동공기를 생성하는 펄스모듈로 이루어진 제전맥동 발생기; 상기 환기 덕트의 타단 내부 일측으로부터 공기를 흡입하여 공기 중의 먼지나 이물질을 포집하고 여과된 공기를 배출하는 집진기; 상기 이온 에어펄스기와 집진기에 제어신호를 인가하여 동작을 제어하는 컨트롤러;로 구성된다.

title: WATER DISTRIBUTION MECHANISM FOR CLEANING ROBOTS
abstract: A mobile cleaning robot can include a body, a drive system, a mopping pad assembly, and a fluid distribution system. The drive system can be connected to the body and can be operable to move the mobile cleaning robot about a floor surface of an environment. The mopping pad assembly can be connected to the body and can be configured to hold a mopping pad that is engageable with the floor surface. The fluid distribution system can be couplable to the body, and can include a plurality of outlets separated from each other and a plurality of pumps. The plurality of outlets can each be configured to provide fluid to the mopping map or the floor surface. The plurality of pumps can each be operable to independently deliver fluid to the plurality of outlets, respectively.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD OF CROSS-MODAL VISION-RADAR ALIGNMENT FOR OBJECT-LEVEL REPRESENTATION LEARNING
abstract: A method includes receiving a plurality of paired input images, wherein the paired images includes a first set of images from a first modality and a second set of images from a second modality, outputting a list of bounding boxes and labels in response to running an image-based object detection model, mapping each bounding box to a region of interest that is corresponding to the bounding box and associated with the second set of images, cropping the region of interest from the first and second set of images to generate a cropped first and second set of images, sending the cropped first set of images to a first encoder and a cropped second set of images to a second encoder, wherein the first encoder is configured for the first modality and the second encoder is configured for the second modality, outputting object-level embeddings for both the cropped first and second set of images utilizing encoders, identifying a loss function associated with the images, and in response to when a threshold is met, outputting final updated parameters.

title: Educational electronics systems and methods
abstract: Systems and methods for educational electronics devices such as may be assembled by non-manufacturer builders, including by personal or hobbyist individuals and by groups such as clubs or classes. Methods and systems relate to Surface Mount Device (SMD) use, measurement systems, communications skill acquisition, physical construction of educational electronics, builder construction/configuration and maintenance of devices, subsystem componentry designed for effective use in educational electronics, circuit designs that permit individual builders to construct professional quality devices, and cognitively adapted methods and systems to optimize learning and performance during and after builder assembly.

title: Side brush assembly and self-moving type cleaning robot
abstract: The invention provides a side brush assembly and a self-moving type cleaning robot. The side brush assembly comprises a base body part, a first motor, a bearing part, a gear unit, a hub and a second motor. The second motor is arranged on the base body part, and the second motor is used for driving the bearing part to swing between the first position and the second position; wherein the output shafts of the first motor and the second motor are arranged in parallel, and the projections of the first motor and the second motor on a plane perpendicular to the swinging axis at least partially coincide; the bearing part is provided with a first operation mode and a second operation mode, the hub is provided with a first operation mode and a second operation mode, and under the first operation mode and the second operation mode, the hub can keep the first operation mode or the second operation mode and can be switched between the first operation mode and the second operation mode.

title: DEGRADATION OF POLYETHYLENE TO FORM GASEOUS HYDROCARBON MIXTURE
abstract: [0000] A method of converting a polymer including contacting a catalyst with a low-density polyethylene polymer to form a mixture and heating the mixture to a temperature of 200 degrees Celsius (° C.) to 600° C. in a microwave reactor to form a product. The catalyst includes an HZSM-5 zeolite, and 1 weight percent (wt. %) to 10 wt. % gallium and 0.1% to 5 wt. % copper, based on the total weight of the catalyst.

title: A METHOD FOR MONITORING INSTALLATIONS COMPRISING JOINTS
abstract: [0001] The present invention relates to a method for monitoring an installation comprising joints wherein one or more of the joints comprise a washer and/or a nut and/or a bolt containing a sensor element, the method comprising the steps of: (I) sending an electrical signal defined on a selected frequency range to the sensor element, (II) receiving the electrical response signal from the sensor element and processing the signal to obtain the impedance signature of the coupled system, (III) feeding the impedance signature signal and/or some or all of its features to an unsupervised machine learning algorithm and processing of the fed data by the unsupervised machine learning algorithm, (IV) detecting and reporting anomalous conditions of the monitored installation, and to a system implementing said method.

title: High-formability and high-surface-quality 2100MPa-grade cold-rolled martensitic steel for automobiles and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of steel for automobiles, and particularly relates to high-formability 2100MPa-grade cold-rolled martensitic steel for automobiles and a preparation method. The steel comprises the following chemical components in percentage by weight: 0.26%-0.30% of C, 0.70%-0.80% of Si, 2.70%-2.80% of Mn, less than or equal to 0.010% of P, less than or equal to 0.0050% of S, less than or equal to 0.0050% of N, 0.40%-0.60% of Al, 0.030%-0.040% of Nb, 0.040%-0.050% of Ti, 0.0030%-0.0045% of B and the balance of Fe and other inevitable impurities. The tensile strength of the steel is 2100 MPa or above, the yield strength is 1850 MPa or above, the ductility is larger than or equal to 5%, and the performance requirements of relevant standards for the 2100 MPa-grade cold-rolled martensitic steel are met.

title: Side brush assembly and self-moving type cleaning robot
abstract: The invention provides a side brush assembly and a self-moving type cleaning robot. The side brush assembly comprises a base body part, a first motor, a bearing part, a gear unit, a hub, an arm-shaped brush body and an adjusting unit. The gear unit is configured to transmit the torque in the first direction output by the first motor to the hub through the adjusting unit when the first motor outputs the torque in the first direction, so that the hub rotates in a first posture; when the first motor outputs the torque in the second direction, the torque in the second direction output by the first motor is transmitted to the hub through the adjusting unit, the hub is made to rotate in a second posture, and when the hub is in the first posture, a first distance is formed between the second end of the arm-shaped brush body and the bearing part in the vertical direction; when the hub is in the second posture, a second distance is formed between the second end of the arm-shaped brush body and the bearing part in the vertical direction; the first distance is less than the second distance.

abstract: Bu buluş, özellikle mutfaklarda, temizlenmesi tercih edilen mutfak gereçlerinin yıkanması için uyarlanmış bulaşık makinesi (1) ile ilgilidir.

title: Water purifying and drinking machine with quick cooling function
abstract: The invention discloses a water purifying and drinking machine with a quick cooling function. The water purifying and drinking machine comprises a machine box with a liquid inlet and a waste water port, a liquid supply pipeline arranged in the machine box and provided with a starting end connected with the liquid inlet, and a first reversing valve arranged at the tail end of the liquid supply pipeline and connected with a quick cooling pipeline and a heating pipeline. The liquid supply pipeline is provided with a filtering component with a first liquid passing opening, a second liquid passing opening and a third liquid passing opening, a second reversing valve is arranged between the first liquid passing opening and the liquid inlet, a third reversing valve is arranged between the second liquid passing opening and the first reversing valve, and a flow dividing pipeline is connected between the second reversing valve and the third reversing valve; a drain valve of which the output end is communicated with the waste water port is arranged at the third liquid through port; a filtering path is formed between the first liquid passing opening and the second liquid passing opening in the filtering part, and a cleaning path is formed between the second liquid passing opening and the third liquid passing opening; according to the invention, not only can water be filtered, but also self-cleaning can be carried out, disassembly and assembly are reduced, and the use convenience is improved.

title: Aluminum plate cleaning device
abstract: The utility model discloses an aluminum plate cleaning device which comprises a cleaning tank, a cleaning basket, an advancing driving piece and a multi-face cleaning table. The cleaning basket is erected on the cleaning tank, and the cleaning basket is used for containing aluminum plates to be cleaned; the advancing driving part is mounted on the cleaning tank, and is used for driving the multi-surface cleaning table to advance and cleaning the aluminum plate to be cleaned; the multi-face cleaning table is detachably arranged on the advancing driving part and provided with a cleaning liquid spraying face in the shape of the side face of a quadrangular frustum pyramid. According to the aluminum plate cleaning device, the advancing driving part is used for driving the multi-face cleaning table to move, aluminum plates to be cleaned are comprehensively cleaned one by one, the aluminum plates can be fully cleaned, the cleaning quality of the aluminum plates is greatly improved, and the aluminum plate cleaning device has the advantages of being simple in structure and convenient and fast to operate.

title: Gas sampling system and medical gas transmission system
abstract: The invention provides a gas sampling system and a medical gas transmission system, and relates to the field of sampling monitoring equipment. The gas sampling system comprises a sampling pipe, one end of the sampling pipe is communicated with an inspiration branch of a mechanical ventilation loop, the other end of the sampling pipe is communicated with a gas detection system, and nitric oxide gas is injected into the inspiration branch; the sampling pipe is used for leading gas containing nitric oxide in the gas suction branch to the gas detection system; at least one part of the sampling pipe is a water vapor permeable section, and the pipe wall of the water vapor permeable section is made of a water vapor permeable material; water content is reduced after gas passes through the sampling pipe. The gas sampling system provided by the invention solves the technical problems of inconvenience in use caused by frequent water pouring of a water collection cup or infection risk caused by bacterium breeding caused by long-time water collection of a large-capacity appliance in the prior art.

title: FOOD BINDER AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING SAME
abstract: The present invention relates to the field of foods. What is disclosed herein is a method of producing binders for non-animal foods, which comprises the mixing of processed and unprocessed Leguminosae flours having a high starch content until they are homogeneous, and imitates the effect of conventional food binders. The food binder can be used for breadcrumb coating of foods, as a binder in novel vegan matrices, and as a binder in baked and confectionery products. The food binder is also of very good suitability for cold applications.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DETERMINING PREDICTED LIFETIME OF COMPONENT
abstract: To provide a system and a method for determining a predicted lifetime of a component.SOLUTION: A method includes a step of processing an image of a component in order to detect a particle structure on the component by a computing system including one or more processors. The method further includes a step of comparing the detected particle structure with a stress map of the component by the computing system. The method further includes a step of determining a predicted lifetime of the component on the basis of localization of the detected particle structure and the stress map by the computing system.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 9

title: Impeller for automated microfoaming
abstract: An impeller for automated microfoaming is disclosed. The impeller may comprise a base, a means for coupling the base to a motor, a support wall extending upward from the base, a blade extending upward from the support wall, a shroud disposed about the blade, and a screen coupled to the shroud. The support wall gradually curves inward toward the central axis of the base. The support wall defines a channel, wherein the support wall and base define an outlet in communication with the channel. The blade extends along the support wall. The blade defines an inlet in fluid communication with the channel. The shroud comprises a ring and a wall extending downward from the ring. The wall of the shroud engages the support wall. The coupling means may comprise a first set of magnets disposed about the impeller, and a second set of magnets disposed about the motor.

title: System and Method for Dispensing Fluid Cleanly Using Compression and Negative Pressure
abstract: A system and method for dispensing fluid from a reservoir cleanly using compression and negative pressure is disclosed. The system (herein referred to as ‘System”) is essentially comprised of a nozzle and a portable fluid jug (herein referred to as a ‘reservoir’). Two embodiments have a nozzle with a compression portion that when pushed against a tank neck allows fluid to flow from the reservoir. When the tank is full, fluid reaches the nozzle and blocks an internal vent line within the nozzle. This blockage builds negative pressure inside the reservoir, subsequently halting the flow of fluid through the nozzle. An object of the System is to allow fluid to flow quickly and cleanly into a fluid tank (such as those on vehicles, motor cycles, small engines, etc.) Other objects, details and embodiments of the System will be examined in further sections of this disclosure.
