title: SURFACE CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: The present disclosure provides a surface cleaning apparatus that includes a housing adapted for movement over a surface to be cleaned. A headlight of the apparatus may include at least one light emitting element internal to the housing and a light pipe integrated with a cover on the housing. A cover sensing mechanism may determine whether the cover is present on the housing, and the headlight may accordingly be deactivated if the cover is not present. The headlight may selectively illuminate upon the occurrence of a predetermined condition. A brushroll for the apparatus may include an agitation element, such as bristles and/or microfiber, and a hollow core brush bar supporting the agitation element.

title: Method for identifying astringency-causing phenolic acid in coffee and application of astringency-causing phenolic acid
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of analysis and detection, and provides a method for identifying astringent phenolic acids in coffee and application of the method, phenolic acid compounds in coffee are qualitatively and quantitatively determined through an LC-MS/MS technology, and astringent compounds with the greatest contribution in a coffee sample are determined according to a taste recognition threshold concentration so as to identify key astringent phenolic acids. On the basis, the interaction mechanism of key astringent phenolic acids with different structures and concentrations and salivary protein models is analyzed through binding constants, binding sites, interaction force and thermodynamic parameters. The astringent taste intensity of phenolic acid is evaluated by turbidity, particle size and Zeta potential, the structure-effect and dose-effect relationship between phenolic acid and astringent taste intensity is established, and an application basis is provided for regulation and control of astringent taste of coffee. Results show that in astringent phenolic acid, the astringent perception threshold value of isochlorogenic acid B is lowest, the Dot value is highest, the astringent ability of isochlorogenic acid B is highest, and the content of isochlorogenic acid B needs to be reduced or the reaction of isochlorogenic acid B and sialoprotein needs to be inhibited when astringent of coffee is regulated.

title: Digital twinning fused material-equipment collaborative crack repair design method and equipment
abstract: The invention relates to a digital twinning fused material-equipment collaborative crack repair design method and equipment, and the method comprises the following steps: building an electromagnetic-thermal field coupling model, and obtaining pavement temperature field distribution, the electromagnetic-thermal field coupling model being a system combining microwave heating equipment, an asphalt pavement, a crack and a repair material; based on the mapping relation between the pavement temperature and the dynamic modulus, a pavement compaction model under the action of a road roller is established through finite element simulation; actual pavement parameters are obtained, a key parameter combination of a crack repairing material and microwave heating equipment is inversely optimized according to the pavement compaction model, and the key parameter combination comprises an electromagnetic loss parameter E, heating power W, heating width b and heating time t; and designing a crack repairing material and microwave heating equipment based on the final optimized key parameter combination. Compared with the prior art, the method has the advantages of accurate repair, convenient construction, high repair efficiency, small environmental disturbance and the like.

title: Hand-held tool
abstract: A hand-held tool (100) comprises a tool housing (106) having a movable implement (105), and a gas generator (20) for operating the movable implement (105), the gas generator (20) being arranged in the tool housing (106) and comprising at least one electrolytic cell (30), where the at least one electrolytic cell (30) comprises at least one electrode pair. The electrolytic cell (30) provides oxyhydrogen gas (48) for operating the movable appliance (105).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR FORMING SEMICONDUCTOR DEVICE
abstract: The invention provides a method and apparatus for forming a semiconductor device. The method comprises the following steps: providing a substrate; mounting at least one electronic component on the surface of the substrate; forming a sealant on a surface of the substrate to seal the electronic component; loading the substrate into a semiconductor device cartridge; and irradiating the sealant with microwave radiation to cure the sealant.

title: Energy-saving steam cabinet
abstract: The utility model provides an energy-saving steam cabinet which comprises a base, a steam box is arranged on the upper surface of the base, a cabinet body is arranged on the upper surface of the steam box, sealing doors which are symmetrically distributed are rotationally arranged on the front side of the cabinet body, handles are arranged in the middles of the sealing doors, and wind scoopers which are symmetrically distributed are arranged in the cabinet body. Filter screens are arranged at avoiding grooves formed in the middle of the wind scooper, placing plates which are uniformly distributed are arranged in the cabinet body, and a steam heating module used for steam heating is further arranged on the cabinet body. According to the energy-saving steam cabinet, steam can be quickly and uniformly blown to food placed in the heating chamber when the steam in the energy-saving steam cabinet is heated, so that the heating state can be stably controlled at a constant temperature, and the heating efficiency of the food is ensured.

title: Low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel based on chemical heterogeneity regulation and control and preparation method of low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel
abstract: The invention particularly relates to low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel based on chemical heterogeneity regulation and control. The low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel comprises the following components of 0.25%-0.45% of C, 1.4%-2.2% of Si, 1.5%-3.0% of Mn, 1.0%-3.0% of Cr, 0.7%-2.0% of Ni, smaller than or equal to 0.01% of P, smaller than or equal to 0.01% of S and the balance Fe. The preparation method of the low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel comprises the following steps: sequentially carrying out smelting, hot rolling, homogenization, pearlisation and cold rolling treatment on the alloy steel containing the components to obtain a cold-rolled pearlitic initial structure with heterogeneous Mn/Cr distribution. And the cold-rolled sheet is rapidly heated to be austenitized for short-time heat preservation, and then isothermal quenching is conducted to complete isothermal phase change of the micro-nano structure bainite. According to the invention, the cold-rolled pearlite rapid heating technology is utilized to refine the original austenite grains and regulate and control the microchemical heterogeneity, so that the double targets of short preparation period and excellent obdurability matching of the low-carbon micro-nano structure bainite steel are achieved.

title: Disc reed type intelligent gasket based on slide rheostat and mounting structure of disc reed type intelligent gasket
abstract: The utility model discloses a disc reed type intelligent gasket based on a slide rheostat and a mounting structure thereof, each disc reed of the disc reed type intelligent gasket based on the slide rheostat is elastically supported between a flat gasket and a pressure plate, a circuit board is mounted in a fixing ring, and the pressure plate is mounted on the flat gasket. A battery, a slide rheostat, a signal processing module and a signal sending module are integrated on the circuit board, and the pressure plate is connected with a slip sheet of the slide rheostat through a connecting assembly. Even if the pressure plate only generates tiny displacement, the pressure plate can drive the slip sheet to synchronously generate equivalent tiny displacement through the connecting assembly, so that tiny looseness generated after the bolt is installed can be accurately monitored, and the bolt looseness detection device is suitable for application scenes with extremely high requirements on bolt looseness detection precision; and early warning of possible looseness can be realized by monitoring the pressure value of bolt mounting in real time, so that the bolt can be tightened again in advance before the bolt is loosened, and the bolt loosening condition is avoided.

title: Novel combined grill
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of gridiron, and particularly relates to a novel combined type gridiron. The novel combined type grill comprises a grill body and a lower heat conduction air plate, the whole grill body is formed by bending a metal rod, supporting feet of a V-shaped structure are arranged at the bottoms of the two sides of the grill body, a positioning inserting foot is arranged on one side of the supporting foot on one side, and the lower heat conduction air plate is arranged on the other side of the supporting foot on the other side. A plurality of supporting rods are arranged below the grill body; arc-shaped bends are arranged on the side face and the bottom of the lower heat-conducting air plate, a plurality of air outlets are evenly formed in the upper portion of the lower heat-conducting air plate, and corresponding positioning insertion holes are formed in the positions, located at the positioning insertion pins, of the two sides of the lower heat-conducting air plate so that the lower heat-conducting air plate can be fixed to the positioning insertion pins in an inserted mode.

title: Filtering device for essence extraction
abstract: The utility model discloses a filtering device for essence extraction, which comprises a tank body, the top of the tank body is fixedly provided with a tank cover, the inside of the tank body is fixedly connected with a bearing ring, the top of the bearing ring is provided with an end plate, the bottom of the end plate is fixedly connected with two scraping rods, and the scraping rods are fixedly connected with the bottom of the tank body. A plurality of first brushes are evenly and fixedly connected to the outer walls of the two scraping rods, a cleaning mechanism is arranged in the tank body, and an end base of a hollow structure is fixedly connected to the bottom of the stainless steel filter cylinder. Through the arrangement of the bearing ring, the end plate, the scraping rod, the first brush, the electric push rod, the stainless steel filter cartridge, the circular plate, the second brush, the end seat, the spline housing, the annular seat, the equipment frame, the motor and the spline shaft, the inner surface and the outer surface of the stainless steel filter cartridge are cleaned through the rotation of the stainless steel filter cartridge in cooperation with the first brush and the second brush; the purpose of multi-surface cleaning of the stainless steel filter cartridge is achieved, and the influence on the subsequent filtering effect due to incomplete cleaning of impurities is avoided.

title: Electric passenger car fastener state real-time monitoring device
abstract: The utility model discloses a real-time monitoring device for the state of a fastener of an electric passenger car, and solves the problem that the fastening stress of a bolt is inconvenient to monitor in real time in the prior art. The bolt fastening stress detection device comprises a bolt and further comprises a fixing plate used for being connected with vehicle bottom equipment, an intelligent gasket arranged on the fixing plate and used for detecting bolt fastening stress, and a data transmission module arranged in the intelligent gasket and connected with a vehicle-mounted host. The energy storage mechanism is arranged in the intelligent gasket and is respectively connected with the intelligent gasket and the data transmission module; the bolt penetrates through the fixing plate and is connected with the vehicle bottom equipment, and the intelligent gasket is pressed on the fixing plate. The bolt fastening stress is monitored in real time through the intelligent gasket, data detected by the intelligent gasket is transmitted to the vehicle-mounted host through the data transmission module and displayed, and monitoring personnel can judge whether the bolt falls off or loosens in the using process according to the pressure data monitored by the pressure sensor.

title: WORKGROUP HIERARCHICAL CORE STRUCTURES FOR BUILDING REAL-TIME WORKGROUP SYSTEMS
abstract: A workgroup-computing-entity-based fail-safe/evolvable hardware core structure is disclosed which includes a 3-hierarchical-level 6-workgroup-Basic-Building-Block (6-wBBB) created to supplant the node-computing-entity-based non-fail-safe/limited evolvable von-Neumann core structure of 3-hierarchical-level 3-node-BBB, (i.e., base-level IO-devices/mid-level main memory/top-level CPU) and all the first-time fail-safe workgroup systems can be subsequently generated in the second period along the workgroup-computing evolutionary timeline. Furthermore, based on the first 6-wBBB evolvable architecture, the workgroup evolutionary processes can go up to 7 generations in creating all the necessary workgroup-computing entity-based hardware core structures, so that all the real-time intelligent workgroup-computing systems can be generated in the third period along the workgroup-computing evolutionary timeline.

title: SLOTTED RETENTION TOOL FOR RETAINING ABRASIVE MATERIAL
abstract: A slotted retention tool for retaining an abrasive material for use with a power-driven tool that is compact and adaptable for use in confined or hard-to-reach areas, while also allowing for quick and easy replacement of worn abrasive components is provided. The slotted retention tool can include a slot at a first end where the slot can be configured to retain an abrasive material for use during operation of the slotted retention tool. The slot can include a transitional surface configured to minimize sharp edges that can contribute to premature tearing or degradation of the abrasive material during insertion and use. The slotted retention tool can also include a drive portion at a second end configured to be received by a power-driven tool. A method of using a slotted retention tool for retaining an abrasive material is also provided.

title: QUICK RELEASE CONNECTOR FOR BEVERAGE MACHINE AND CLEANING METHOD FOR THE BEVERAGE MACHINE
abstract: [0000] A quick release connector is configured to be connected between a discharging end of a raw material supply member and a feeding end of a beverage machine, and includes a connector body and a raw material connecting tube. The connector body has a raw material end tube portion, and a machine end tube portion for connecting with the feeding end. The raw material end tube portion includes an outer tube section, a branch tube section for connection with a cleaning system, and a pushing section disposed inside the outer tube section. The raw material connecting tube is disposed in and slidable relative to the outer tube section between a cleaning position and a material supply position, and is configured to be connected to the discharging end of the raw material supply member. A cleaning method for the beverage machine is also disclosed.

title: HOUSEHOLD APPLIANCE WITH MOTORIZED CLOSING ELEMENT
abstract: [0000] A household appliance with an interior space to receive at least one object to be treated through an access opening, having a closing element to close and unblock the access opening from the front, and having a motor designed to move the closing element back and forth between a closed position and an open position. The motor is fixedly connected to a clutch disc by a motor shaft in order to rotatably drive the clutch disc, wherein the clutch disc is connected to the closing element in a force-transmitting manner by means of a clutch pin. The clutch disc has a clutch-side guide contour that movably receives a first end of the clutch pin, wherein the clutch-side guide contour of the clutch disc has a manual operation guide and a motor operation guide. The motor operation guide is formed by one end of the manual operation guide.

title: Test furnace for testing surface oxidation rule of direct-fire heating strip steel
abstract: The invention discloses a test furnace for testing the surface oxidation law of direct-fire heating strip steel, and belongs to the technical field of direct-fire heating strip steel surface oxidation tests.The test furnace comprises a furnace body, a hearth is arranged in the furnace body, a supporting frame is fixed to the bottom end of the furnace body, a furnace cover is arranged at the top end of the furnace body, and a mounting opening is formed in the top face of the furnace cover; the furnace body is provided with a conveying assembly used for conveying workpieces into the furnace body, the furnace body is internally provided with a cooling pipeline, the cooling pipeline is located at the bottom of the hearth, and the two ends of the cooling pipeline penetrate out of the side faces of the furnace body respectively. One end of the cooling pipeline is a water inlet, the other end of the cooling pipeline is a water outlet, and first valves are arranged at the two ends of the cooling pipeline. The device has the effect that the temperature in the furnace body can conveniently reach the test temperature.

title: Coffee extraction method and device and coffee extraction equipment
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of coffee making, and discloses a coffee extraction method and device and coffee extraction equipment, and the method comprises the steps that flavor preferences selected by a user are obtained, and the flavor preferences comprise flavor types and flavor grades; constraint conditions of the extraction process are determined according to the flavor types, extraction parameters corresponding to different extraction stages in the extraction process are determined according to the constraint conditions and the flavor grades, and the extraction parameters comprise extraction flow rates; when coffee making enters an extraction process, extraction is carried out at different extraction stages according to corresponding extraction flow rates so as to obtain coffee conforming to flavor preference. The flow velocity in the extraction process is subjected to staged control based on the flavor preference of the user, so that the soluble substance extraction proportion of the coffee liquid in different extraction stages can be optimized, the flavor is accurately controlled, and the technical effects of improving the flavor expressive force of the coffee and enhancing the user experience and satisfaction are achieved.

title: GENERATING A RECIPE SUGGESTION REPRESENTATIVE OF A SETTING OF AT LEAST ONE PARAMETER OF A BEVERAGE MAKING PROCESS
abstract: In the context of beverage making, a beverage making device (100) is provided, comprising a controller arrangement (10) and a user interface (20). During operation of the beverage making device (100), an algorithm for selecting a user profile associated with the user of the beverage making device (100) is realized. Further, a set of beverage making data is recorded with the selected user profile, which beverage making data does not only include parameter settings of the beverage making process that are representative of the chosen recipe, but also time data representative of a time at which the beverage making process is performed. The recordal of the time data enables providing the user with a recipe suggestion which is chosen in relation to the time at which the recipe suggestion is generated.

title: Motor controller system fault processing method and device
abstract: The invention particularly relates to a motor controller system fault processing method and device. The method comprises the following steps: on the basis of an obtained fast charging boost current instruction, an actual charging current, a three-phase current, a fast charging boost voltage instruction, an actual charging voltage, an output voltage of a direct-current fast charging pile, a first voltage of a power battery pack, a second voltage of a second module in the power battery pack and a fast heating inductor temperature which are received by a current motor controller, performing fast charging on the basis of the acquired fast charging boost current instruction, the actual charging current, the three-phase current, the fast charging boost voltage instruction and the actual charging voltage; judging whether the motor controller has a quick charge boosting fault or a quick heating fault; and if the motor controller has the fast charging and boosting fault or the fast heating fault, driving the motor controller system to enter a preset safety state, and carrying out fault processing on the motor controller system based on a fault solving strategy corresponding to the fast charging and boosting fault or a fault solving strategy corresponding to the fast heating fault. Therefore, the problem that different faults are difficult to accurately judge when the vehicle is quickly charged, boosted and heated in the related technology is solved, and the system safety is improved.

title: Virtual Reality Energy Gamification Application
abstract: In some embodiments, an energy optimizer device includes a memory, one or more processors configured to execute one or more electronic games of energy saving and render the electronic games on a display. The energy optimizer device comprises hardware sensor or capturing device for obtaining equipment data from energy equipment associated with a user. A virtual reality energy gamification application is executed to render badge level associated with a user's use of energy equipment, tips of energy saving, enrollment options of a demand management program, implementation of recommendation for upgrading of energy equipment, renewable resources registered, amount of energy waste consumed and/or ability of behavioral changes by the energy equipment to improve energy performance of facility, and information about incentives/rebates. The energy optimizer device may communicate with other energy optimizer devices in a peer-to-peer manner and enable multiple users to play the electronic game together from respective energy optimizer devices.

title: Vending machine for fish-shaped bun
abstract: 본 발명은 냉동 붕어빵을 보관하였다가 가열하여 붕어빵을 자동 판매하도록 구현한 붕어빵 자판기에 관한 것으로, 구매자의 주문을 통보해 주는 본체부; 본체부에 내장 설치되어, 본체부로부터 통보되는 구매자 주문에 따라 구동을 제어해 주는 제어장치부; 본체부에 내장 설치되어, 제어장치부의 구동 제어에 따라 냉동 붕어빵을 보관하였다가 전달해 주는 냉동보관부; 및 본체부에 내장 설치되어, 제어장치부의 구동 제어에 따라 냉동보관부로부터 전달되는 냉동 붕어빵을 가열하여 가열한 붕어빵을 본체부의 출구로 배출해 주는 가열부를 포함한다.

title: GENERATING INSIGHTS BASED ON SIGNALS FROM MEASURING DEVICE
abstract: A system is described that generates insights on the consumption or usage behavior of a product by analyzing the real-time usage of the product by one or more users. The product is placed on the measuring device for continuous monitoring of the usage of the product by those one or more users in real-time. The measuring device includes a sensor unit that generates weigh data, motion data, location data, and time consumed data of the product and transmits to a computing device. A communication device records the consumption or usage of the product by a user, along with feedback from the user. The computing device generates insights based on the sensed data generated by the measuring device, and recording and feedback at the communication device. The computing device generates reports-one for the user, and one for a merchant of the product and/or similar products-including respective insights.

title: Compact air fryer
abstract: An air fryer includes: a cooking basket including an air accelerator vent configured to increase air velocity; a cooking chamber for receiving a cooking basket; the fan comprises fan blades used for generating airflow; an air manifold positioned between the fan and heater assembly and the cooking basket to direct airflow from the fan through the air accelerator vent and into the cooking basket; and a protruding feature on the bottom surface of the basket to facilitate airflow below the food item placed in the basket.

title: Haustechnikgerät zum Aufstellen im Inneren eines Gebäudes und Verfahren zum Betreiben eines solchen Haustechnikgeräts
abstract: Die Erfindung betrifft ein Haustechnikgerät (10) zum Aufstellen im Inneren eines Gebäudes, aufweisend ein Gehäuse (12), eine im Gehäuse (12) angeordnete Wärmepumpe (16), und ein im Gehäuse (12) angeordnetes Lüftungsmodul (18) zur gesteuerten Be- und/oder Entlüftung von mit dem Lüftungsmodul (18) fluidleitend verbundenen Räumen des Gebäudes, wobei dem Gehäuse (12) ein Zuluftstrang (30) zum Zuführen eines Außenluftstroms (AZ) in Richtung der Wärmepumpe (16) und des Lüftungsmoduls (18), und ein Abluftstrang (32) zum Abführen eines Abluftstroms (AF) aus Richtung der Wärmepumpe (16) und des Lüftungsmoduls (18) zugeordnet ist, und innerhalb des den Außenluftstrom (AZ) führenden Zuluftstrangs (30) ein Temperatursensor (48) angeordnet ist.

title: Management system of intelligent washing and drying all-in-one machine
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of intelligent equipment management, in particular to a management system of an intelligent washing and drying all-in-one machine, which adopts the intelligent washing and drying all-in-one machine to wash, disinfect and dry articles and comprises a local server, a user terminal and identification tags arranged on the articles, historical cleaning and tracing information of the article is stored in the local server, and the user terminal is used for scanning the identification tag and then automatically obtaining the historical cleaning and tracing information of the article from the local server; the system further comprises a detection module, and the detection module is arranged at the entrance and exit position close to the public place and used for detecting whether someone carries the articles to leave or not. According to the invention, the historical cleaning information of the article can be automatically traced, so that a user can use the corresponding article at ease, and the article can be prevented from being lost by arranging the detection module.

title: A DEVICE FOR ENERGY USAGE ANALYTICS AND A METHOD THEREOF
abstract: The present disclosure envisages a device (100) for energy usage analytics, The device (100) comprises a control unit (40) configured to generate at least one control signal based on a user input(s), a switching unit (50) configured to receive the control signal(s) and switch ON/OFF the electrical load(s) (20) by controlling a supply of power from the power source (10) to the electrical load(s) (20), a power metering unit (60) electrically coupled to the switching unit (50) and is configured to compute a value(s) corresponding to an real time active power drawn by the electrical load(s) (20), and a communication unit (70) configured to cooperate with the control unit (40) and the power metering unit (60) and to transmit the computed real time active energy value(s) to a user device (80) and display energy usage analytics after performing analytical computation of energy data in remote analytical server (90). The present disclosure envisages a system (200) for energy usage analytics.

title: Intelligent washing and drying all-in-one machine assembly and washing and drying all-in-one machine
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of washing and drying all-in-one machines, in particular to an intelligent washing and drying all-in-one machine assembly and a washing and drying all-in-one machine. Comprising a washing barrel in which a roller is movably connected; the drying channel is arranged on the washing barrel, the washing barrel, the drying channel and the roller communicate with one another, and the drying channel is used for circularly heating air in the roller so as to evaporate moisture on the clothes; the condensation assembly comprises at least two condensation steps, the at least two condensation steps are arranged on the inner side and the outer side of the washing barrel respectively, and the condensation steps are used for guiding condensed water to flow circuitously so as to condense humid and hot air in the washing barrel; a water outlet is formed in the bottom of the washing barrel and used for discharging water in the washing barrel. The condensation step is formed by alternately arranging a plurality of step ribs which are inclined downwards, so that the contact area between condensate water and humid and hot air can be effectively increased, the drying performance and efficiency are improved, and the use experience of a user is improved.

title: BEVERAGE MAKING MACHINE OPERATION
abstract: [0001] There is provided a method (100) for operating a beverage making machine. The method comprises receiving (102) a user selection and adjusting (104) a start-up operation of the beverage making machine based on the user selection. The user selection is indicative of a beverage to be prepared by the beverage making machine. The start-up operation is performed before a beverage making operation of the beverage making machine. The user selection is received and the start-up operation is adjusted before the beverage making machine begins the start-up operation.

abstract: Buluş; gıda/mama maddelerinin buharla pişirilmesini, püre haline getirilmesini, belirli şekillerde kesilmesini ve sıcak hava ile kurutulmasını sağlayan kompakt bir cihaz (A) ile ilgilidir.

title: Intelligent washing and drying control and management system, application terminal and intelligent washing and drying integrated equipment
abstract: The invention relates to intelligent washing and drying integrated equipment which comprises a cabinet body, a circulating conveying device carrying articles to move in the cabinet body is arranged in the cabinet body, the articles are washed and disinfected when moving on the lower portion of the cabinet body, and the articles are dried and disinfected when moving on the upper portion of the cabinet body; when the circulating conveying device carries the articles to move from the lower portion of the cabinet body to the upper portion of the cabinet body, the articles are firstly cleaned and disinfected and then enter the upper portion of the cabinet body to be dried and disinfected, and equivalently, cleaning disinfection and drying disinfection of the articles can be completed through single circulation in the cabinet body. Therefore, the intelligent cleaning and drying integrated equipment is higher in efficiency of cleaning, disinfecting and drying articles; meanwhile, in the moving process of the articles in the cabinet body, two disinfection modes of disinfection during cleaning and disinfection during drying are adopted, and compared with a single disinfection mode adopted in the prior art, the intelligent cleaning and drying integrated equipment is more thorough in disinfection, so that the hygienic standard of the articles is improved, and the intelligent cleaning and drying integrated equipment is applied to various industries.

title: Cooking device
abstract: COOKING DEVICE An oven for cooking a food item, the oven comprising: an oven cavity configured to receive the food item; a heater; a temperature sensor; a processor; and a memory storing instructions which, when executed by the processor, cause the oven to: receive food item information indicative of one or more characteristics of the food item; receive a desired food temperature; control the heater according to heater control information related to a set point temperature and a heater operation period; obtain a temperature measurement from the temperature sensor; determine a measurement of power delivered to the heater; determine one or more process parameters related to one or more corresponding physical characteristics of the oven based on at least one of the temperature measurement and the measurement of power; determine an estimate of a food temperature of the food item based on the one or more process parameters, the temperature measurement, and the measurement of power; determine updated heater control information based on the food temperature, the one or more process parameters, the temperature measurement, and the measurement of power such that: the food item substantially reaches the desired food temperature while maintaining or subceeding a predetermined acceptable temperature gradient across the food item; and after the heater operation period, an environment within the oven cools to substantially the desired food temperature within a predetermined time period, and the food item substantially reaches the desired food temperature within the predetermined time period; and control the heater according to the updated heater control information until the food temperature substantially reaches the desired food temperature. title: Full-automatic coffee machine extraction device
abstract: A core structure of an extraction device of a full-automatic coffee machine comprises a first motor (100), a swing arm (200), a brewing cup (300) and a support (400), the swing arm (200) comprises a D-shaped hole (201), a contact (202), a second motor (203) and a screw (204), and the support (400) comprises a powder loading brake switch (401), an extraction brake switch (402) and a deslagging brake switch (403); a second motor (203) and a brewing cup (300) are installed on a swing arm (200), a powder loading brake switch (401), an extraction brake switch (402), a slag pouring brake switch (403) and a first motor (100) are installed on a support (400), and then the swing arm (200) is installed on the first motor (100); the first motor (100) drives the swing arm (200) and the brewing cup (300) to rotate on the support (400), when the swing arm (200) or the contact (202) triggers the brake switches (401), (402) or (403) to stop successively, and a series of work can be completed according to the requirement of an electronic program after each stop.

title: Microwave heat pump coupling type high-moisture fruit drying equipment
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of drying equipment, and discloses microwave heat pump coupling type high-moisture fruit drying equipment which comprises a shell, a drying chamber formed in the shell, a rotating disc rotationally installed at the bottom of an inner cavity of the drying chamber and a microwave transmitting module arranged in the shell. An air outlet disc is arranged at the top of the inner cavity of the drying chamber; through cooperative arrangement of multiple technologies, multiple effects of high efficiency, energy conservation and high quality in the high-moisture fruit drying process are achieved, through cooperative arrangement of the rotating disc, the supporting frame and the heat pump, in the centrifugal dewatering stage, the rotating disc drives the supporting frame to rotate at a high speed, and meanwhile the heat pump blows out hot air through an air outlet disc; rapid centrifugal dewatering and surface hot air pre-drying of fruits are achieved, the moisture load of follow-up drying treatment is reduced, and damage to fruit tissue structures possibly caused by single centrifugal dewatering is avoided.

title: Quick-heating electromagnetic heating pipe
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of heating pipes, and provides a quick-heating electromagnetic heating pipe, which comprises a fixed seat and a connecting seat, a heating pipe is arranged at the top of the connecting seat, an electromagnetic coil is sleeved on the peripheral surface of the heating pipe, a top seat is fixedly arranged at the top of the heating pipe, and the top seat is fixedly arranged on the top of the heating pipe through structures such as a movable block and a clamping block. During mounting, the bottom of the connecting base is aligned with a mounting groove formed in the fixing base to be inserted, when two clamping blocks arranged in the connecting base in a sliding mode move to one side of a clamping groove formed in the mounting groove, first springs can eject the clamping blocks into the clamping groove, and fixing is completed at the moment; disassembly can be completed by pulling the movable block through the receding rod to pull the guide rod and the clamping block together, and the effect of convenient disassembly is achieved. By means of the technical scheme, the problems that in the prior art, rapid installation and disassembly cannot be achieved, and protectiveness is insufficient are solved.

title: Preparation method of lath martensite and/or bainite based hypereutectoid steel
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of heat treatment of steel and iron materials, and particularly relates to a preparation method of lath martensite and/or bainite-based hypereutectoid steel. The lath martensite and/or bainite-based hypereutectoid steel is obtained by pearlising, rapid austenitizing and subsequent heat treatment of granular pearlitic structure hypereutectoid steel without network carbide, and comprises a uniform structure with lath martensite and/or bainite as a main matrix. And residual austenite mainly in a sheet shape can be distributed in the middle, and undissolved spherical carbides are uniformly distributed on the residual austenite. And the structure uniformity is improved, and the retained austenite is stabilized, so that the toughness, the wear resistance and the fatigue property can be greatly improved on the premise of ensuring high strength and high hardness. The technology is suitable for hypereutectoid steel such as cold/hot work tool and die steel, bearing steel, high-speed steel, spring steel and gear steel.

title: CENTRALIZED HOME AUTOMATION SYSTEM AND METHOD OF USE THEREOF
abstract: A monitoring system for monitoring a home environment having a plurality of utility devices. The system comprises operation sensors generating operation data associated with performance measurements of the utility devices, environment sensors generating environment data associated with physical attributes of the home environment, and a central station connected to the utility device, operation sensors, and environment sensors. The central station determines an occurrence of at least one of the undesirable events based on at least the operation data and the environment data. The central station then manipulates at least one of the utility devices to remedy or eliminate the undesirable event.

title: NOVEL USE OF SHIKIMIC ACID IN HOUSEHOLD CHEMICALS PROVIDING LONGLASTING CLEANLINESS AND HEALTHFUL CLEANSING
abstract: The invention relates to the use of shikimic acid in the manufacture of a cleaning composition and a cleaning composition comprising 0.001-0.50% wt. of said shikimic acid and wherein the pH of said cleaning composition is in the range of 2.5-12.

title: Brewing extraction unit and beverage machine
abstract: The invention discloses a brewing extraction unit and a beverage machine, and relates to the technical field of beverage making. The brewing extraction unit comprises: an extraction bracket, which comprises a bracket main body and a supporting part arranged at one end of the bracket main body; the extraction container is provided with a supporting matching part, and the supporting matching part can slide along the supporting part from the first end of the supporting part so as to be matched with the supporting part in a supporting manner; the driving assembly is movably mounted on the extraction bracket; and the extraction device is connected with the driving assembly and is arranged to be capable of performing reciprocating translation relative to the extraction bracket under the driving of the driving assembly, so that the extraction device can be switched between a pressing position in sealing fit with the extraction container and a releasing position separated from the extraction container. The sealing effect between the extraction container and the extraction device of the brewing extraction unit is good.

title: Forging piece cleaning device for hardware machining forging machine
abstract: The invention discloses a forge piece cleaning device for a hardware machining forging machine, and relates to the technical field of hardware machining, the forge piece cleaning device comprises a stand column and a reinforcing beam, the reinforcing beam is movably connected with a driving sliding seat and a driven sliding seat driven by a first driving assembly and a polishing seat driven by a third driving assembly, a material turning mechanism is arranged on the driving sliding seat, clamping mechanisms are arranged on the driving sliding seat and the driven sliding seat respectively, a cleaning mechanism is further arranged on the grinding seat, the material turning mechanism comprises a driving rotating shaft, the driving sliding seat is connected with the clamping mechanisms through the driving rotating shaft, and one end of the driving rotating shaft is fixedly connected with a gear. During use, through the linkage design of the first driving assembly and the material overturning mechanism, the driving sliding base drives the driving rotating shaft to rotate when moving, automatic overturning of the forge piece is achieved, the position of the forge piece does not need to be manually disassembled and adjusted, the operation time of multi-face cleaning is greatly shortened, and the cleaning efficiency is effectively improved.

title: BEVERAGE MACHINE HAVING A GRANULAR MATERIAL DISPENSER AND A LIQUID DISPENSER
abstract: [0001] Provided is a beverage machine (100), such as a coffee machine. The beverage machine includes a brewing vessel assembly (101) that comprises a brewing vessel (102). The beverage machine also includes a granular material dispenser (105) having a granular material outlet through which granular material is dispensable into the brewing vessel, and a liquid dispenser (110) having a liquid outlet and a hydraulic system for delivering liquid into the brewing vessel via the liquid outlet. The brewing vessel assembly and the liquid outlet are moveable relative to each other to enable adoption of a brewing configuration in which the brewing vessel is arranged to receive the liquid via the liquid outlet. The hydraulic system comprises a hydraulic mechanism that is moveable via movement of liquid in the hydraulic system to cause the brewing vessel assembly and the granular material outlet to move away from each other during adoption of the brewing configuration.

title: BEVERAGE MACHINE HAVING A MECHANICAL ASSEMBLY AND A LIQUID DISPENSER
abstract: [0001] Provided is a beverage machine, such as a coffee machine. The beverage machine includes a mechanical assembly for implementing one or more mechanical operations of the beverage machine. The beverage machine also comprises a hydraulic system (112). The hydraulic system comprises a pump (113) and a valve assembly (122). The valve assembly comprises a valve member (122A) moveable by fluid displaced by the pump to cause movement of at least part of the mechanical assembly to implement at least one of said one or more mechanical operations. The valve assembly is arranged to provide a flow path for the fluid beyond the valve member prior to, during and/or following said movement of the valve member to cause movement of the at least part of the mechanical assembly.

title: Prediction of network vulnerability of a user's network-connected smart device using crowdsourced vulnerability profiles
abstract: Network vulnerability is predicted for a user's network-connected smart device, wherein the user's network-connected smart device has one or more device classifications. A memory stores a plurality of crowdsourced vulnerability profiles generated from individual vulnerability profiles of a plurality of network-connected smart devices, and anomalous behavior associated with each of the respective crowdsourced vulnerability profiles. Each crowdsourced vulnerability profile is generated from individual vulnerability profiles of a plurality of network-connected smart devices having one of the same device classifications, and each of the individual vulnerability profiles are created from network scans for the respective network-connected smart device. A vulnerability profile is generated of the user's network-connected smart device. One or more of the crowdsourced vulnerability profiles in the memory are identified that matches the vulnerability profile of the user's network-connected smart device by matching the one or more device classifications of the user's network-connected smart device with the device classifications of the crowdsourced vulnerability profiles in the memory. In this manner, anomalous behavior that the user's network-connected smart device is at risk of exhibiting is identified, the anomalous behavior being the same anomalous behavior identified by the respective matching one or more crowdsourced vulnerability profiles.

title: SURFACE CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: [0000] A surface cleaning apparatus includes a housing including an upright handle assembly, a base mounted to the upright handle assembly, a recovery system comprising a recovery pathway, a fluid delivery system, and a brushroll within the recovery pathway of the recovery system. The surface cleaning apparatus is further provided with a self-cleaning mode configured to clean the brushroll and the recovery pathway.

title: Multidirectional cleaning and nursing device in gastric cancer postoperative nursing
abstract: The invention discloses a multidirectional cleaning and nursing device in gastric cancer postoperative nursing, and belongs to the technical field of nursing. Through transmission of a reciprocating component and a bevel gear ring, the bevel gear ring drives a second gear and a third gear to transmit, the third gear drives a connecting cylinder and a polygonal rod to rotate, and a net cylinder rotates to drive a nursing tool to rotate; at the moment, the water conveying assembly carries out multi-face cleaning operation on the nursing tools through the spray head, then the reciprocating motion assembly and the swing type spray head assembly are in reciprocating transmission, so that the spray head carries out cleaning operation on the nursing tools at different angles, in the rotating process of a polygonal rod, a connecting disc drives a rolling wheel to rotate, and extrusion motion is generated between the rolling wheel and a convex ball; the multi-edge rod reciprocates in cooperation with the spring, the movement amplitude of the multi-edge rod can be changed due to the fact that the convex balls are different in size, then the net barrel can vibrate at different amplitudes, and the cleaning effect of the nursing tools can be greatly improved through cooperation of vibration at different amplitudes and rotation of the net barrel.

title: COOKING DEVICE
abstract: Predictive cooking systems and methods are disclosed. A representative system can include a cooking device submergible in a container of fluid and a memory device storing instructions for causing a processor to receive information and determine heater set point temperature and on time. The processor can receive information indicative of one or more characteristics of a food item to be cooked in the fluid and a desired food temperature. The processor can perform a control process that can include sending instructions for controlling a heater, obtaining a temperature measurement of the fluid from a temperature sensor, determining a measurement of power delivered to the heater, determining constants related to corresponding physical characteristics of the fluid and/or the container based on at least one of the temperature measurement and the measurement of power, and determining a food temperature of the food item.

title: Photovoltaic cleaner road planning method and device
abstract: The invention relates to a photovoltaic cleaner road planning method and device, and belongs to the technical field of photovoltaic cleaners, and the method comprises the steps: dividing a photovoltaic power station into a plurality of to-be-cleaned photovoltaic regions, and determining the cleaning priority of each to-be-cleaned photovoltaic region according to the pollution degree and power generation efficiency of a photovoltaic panel of the photovoltaic power station; and taking the plurality of photovoltaic areas to be cleaned as vertexes, taking the Manhattan distance between the photovoltaic areas to be cleaned as an edge, taking the cleaning priority of each photovoltaic area to be cleaned as a limiting condition, and adopting a preset multi-target evaluation function to dynamically correct an initial cleaning path obtained based on a genetic algorithm to obtain a shortest cleaning path. The technical problem that in the prior art, an intelligent cleaner is difficult to accurately position and navigate, so that repeated cleaning or cleaning omission easily occurs in a photovoltaic panel cleaning route, and the cleaning efficiency is low is solved.

title: Full-automatic coffee machine extraction device
abstract: An extraction device of a full-automatic coffee machine structurally and mainly comprises a gear box 100, a magnetic control switch 200, a push rod assembly 300, a waste water box 400, an extraction head 500, high-pressure hot water 600 and a bean grinder 700. The soybean milk machine is characterized in that a powder filling position 111 of the gear box 100 is connected with a bean grinder 700, and powder is filled into a powder cup 116; the gear box 100 drives the powder cup 116 to rotate for cyclic operation of pressing powder, extracting, discharging slag and filling powder; an extraction position 113 of the gear box 100 is connected with an extraction head 500, a water pipe 501 of the extraction head 500 is connected with high-pressure hot water 600, hot water of 9-15 bar is input, and coffee liquid 800 is extracted; under pushing and pressing of the push rod assembly 300, on one hand, powder pressing is conducted at the powder pressing position 112 of the gearbox 100, and on the other hand, powder residues 702 are discharged into the waste water box 400 from the residue discharging position 114 of the gearbox 100.

title: Method for rapidly removing impurities such as PVDF (Polyvinylidene Fluoride) from graphite negative electrode material of waste lithium battery through electric pulse
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of recycling of waste lithium ion batteries, in particular to a method for rapidly removing impurities such as PVDF (Polyvinylidene Fluoride) from a graphite negative electrode material of a waste lithium battery through electric pulse. The method comprises the following steps: applying a single pulse current to the graphite negative electrode material of the waste lithium battery, and heating the graphite negative electrode material of the waste lithium battery to 500-2500 DEG C so as to remove organic impurities in the graphite negative electrode material; cooling the treated waste lithium battery graphite negative electrode material to obtain a graphite material; wherein the heating rate is 102 to 104 DEG C/s. Compared with a traditional method, the method has the advantages of being short in process, low in cost, capable of saving energy, environmentally friendly and the like, the treated graphite material can be used in various fields, high-valued utilization of the waste graphite negative electrode is achieved, and remarkable economic and environmental benefits are achieved.

title: Method for driving pyrolusite reduction and carbon-manganese co-production through rapid coal pyrolysis
abstract: The invention relates to a method for driving pyrolusite reduction and carbon-manganese co-production through rapid coal pyrolysis, which is characterized in that rapid coal pyrolysis is realized based on an infrared radiation heating technology, and high-activity reductive volatile components in the early stage of pyrolysis are synchronously utilized to carry out reduction reaction with pyrolusite, so that the synergistic preparation of a carbon-based product and a manganese resource is realized. The method comprises the following steps: performing pyrolysis on coal in an infrared pyrolysis reactor under the action of a high-intensity radiation heat source at 500-800 DEG C within milliseconds to second-level time to generate high-reducibility volatile components rich in H2, CO, CH4 and short-chain hydrocarbons and semicoke; the volatile component is directly introduced into a pyrolusite reduction reaction zone and is subjected to a gas-solid reduction reaction with MnO2 in pyrolusite at 600-900 DEG C, high-valence manganese oxide is converted into MnO or manganese metal, and meanwhile semicoke is produced to serve as a high value-added carbon material. According to the method, the reduction potential energy of volatile components is reserved to the maximum extent, more than 90% of active components directionally act on pyrolusite reduction, and the problems of high energy consumption, low reduction efficiency and insufficient added value of products in a traditional process are solved.

title: Manual Brewing Press with Lever Hook
abstract: A manual brewing press with a lever assembly including a post, a base, a press plate extending from the post, and an elongated lever with an attached lever hook. A brew head is configured to be inserted into a top of the press plate and comprises a cylinder and a piston with a plunger disposed inside the cylinder and a stem integrating a pressure gauge. A sealing element is disposed adjacent to at least one of the stem and the plunger. A portafilter attaches to the press plate underside. The lever hook engages the stem of the piston, moves the plunger down and up inside the cylinder as the elongated lever is lowered and raised respectively, pushing water inside the cylinder down through coffee grounds in the portafilter when the elongated lever is lowered, and pulling the plunger back up when the elongated lever is raised for a subsequent brewing.

title: OAT PRODUCT AND PROCESS
abstract: This invention generally relates to compositions comprising whole oats. More particularly, but not exclusively, this invention relates to an oat base comprising whole oats, and nutritional compositions such as oat milk and oat cream comprising whole oats. Methods for producing an oat base and nutritional compositions are also provided.

title: BEVERAGE OUTLET ASSEMBLY FOR A KITCHEN BREWING VESSEL
abstract: [0001] Provided is a beverage outlet assembly (114) for a kitchen brewing vessel. The beverage outlet assembly comprises an outlet member (111) that delimits an orifice (112) through which a beverage brewed in the brewing vessel is deliverable. The outlet member has a flange portion (111A) and a neck portion (111B) that protrudes from the flange portion. The orifice extends between a first exterior opening delimited by the flange portion and a second exterior opening delimited by the neck portion so as to define an axial flow path for the beverage through the orifice. The orifice becomes increasingly narrower from the first exterior opening towards the second exterior opening. Also provided is a brewing vessel assembly, e.g. a portafilter, that comprises the beverage outlet assembly and the kitchen brewing vessel. Further provided is a beverage machine comprising the brewing vessel assembly and a liquid dispenser for dispensing liquid into the brewing vessel.

title: Spring steel with high strength, high plasticity and excellent stress relaxation resistance as well as rapid induction heating preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention relates to spring steel with high strength, high plasticity and excellent stress relaxation resistance as well as a rapid induction heating preparation method and application thereof. The steel comprises the following chemical components in percentage by weight: 0.53%-0.64% of C, 1.45%-1.49% of Si, 0.63%-0.68% of Mn, 0.62%-0.69% of Cr, 0.019%-0.03% of Cu, 0.02%-0.04% of Ni and 0%-0.12% of V. And through the rapid induction heating technology, the steel can be rapidly heated within a short time, and the heat preservation time is kept short. The production efficiency is remarkably improved, the tensile property and the stress relaxation resistance of the steel are improved by refining the grains, and the stress relaxation resistance of the steel at the high temperature is further improved by adding the V element. And the efficient and economical method is provided for production of the high-performance spring steel, and the remarkable industrial application value is achieved.

title: Building material
abstract: REZUMATPrezenta invenţie se referă la un material de construcţie care conţine alge moarte zdrobite sau plante acvatice şi un liant de origine vegetală, caracterizat prin aceea că conţine o soluţie apoasă de acid organic. Utilizarea unei soluţii apoase de acid organic îmbunătăţeşte proprietăţile mecanice ale materialului şi, pe de altă parte, acţionează ca un agent antimicrobian. Materialul de construcţie al prezentei invenţii poate fi utilizat pentru fabricarea de piese prefabricate pentru clădiri modulare sau în calitate de biociment pentru etanşarea rosturilor şi în calitate de fixator.

title: DEVICE FOR HEATING A MEDIUM, PARTICULARLY WATER
abstract: A device for heating a medium, particularly water, comprising at least one accumulation tank (3) for receiving the medium, equipped with an inlet (7) for the medium and an outlet (8) for the medium, and at least one heat exchanger (2) provided with a tubular coil (1), where the heat exchanger (2) includes an inlet (5) and an outlet (6) for the medium. The device further comprises at least one accumulation layer (13) for energy storage located in proximity to the accumulation tank (3). The accumulation layer (13) is separated from the accumulation tank (3) by a primary insulation layer (16) with variable heat permeability, and where the accumulation layer (13) comprises at least one heating element (17) powered by a photovoltaic system (4) and/or a battery (12) and/or via an input (10) for electrical energy from the power grid. The accumulation tank (3) and the accumulation layer (13) are at least partially embedded in a secondary insulation layer (22) provided with a protective casing (15), and a working insulation chamber (20) is created between the primary insulation layer (16) and the accumulation tank (3).

title: Suggesting coffee bean grind size for beverage machines
abstract: [0000] Various illustrative systems, devices, and methods for beverage machines (e.g., drip coffee machines, espresso machines, etc.) are provided. In an exemplary implementation, an espresso machine is configured to brew and dispense espresso. In an exemplary implementation, the espresso machine is configured to determine a recommended coffee bean grind size for a beverage, e.g., an espresso or a sprover-style drink, selected by a user and to provide the recommended coffee bean grind size to the user.

title: Preventing coffee bean grinder jamming
abstract: [0000] Various illustrative systems, devices, and methods for espresso machines are provided. In general, an espresso machine is configured to brew and dispense espresso. In an exemplary implementation, the espresso machine includes a grinder configured to grind coffee beans. The grinder is configured to be adjustable to allow for adjustment of coffee bean grind size, which may help that ensure that a particular beverage brewed and dispensed by the espresso machine is prepared using an optimal grind size. The espresso machine is configured to prevent jamming of the grinder automatically in response to grind size adjustment.

abstract: Buluş, yurt, hastane, otel, askeriye, cezaevleri gibi toplu kullanım alanlarında bulunan yatakların temizlenmesi ve sterilize edilmesinde kullanılan yatak temizleme ve sterilizasyon sistemi ile ilgilidir.

title: BOOSTED BOILER ESPRESSO MACHINE
abstract: An espresso machine can include a pump, preheating component, low volume boiler, and group head. The pump can provide pressurized water to the preheating component, which can preheat the pressurized water to a first temperature and deliver the preheated water. The low volume boiler can have a heating arrangement, water inlet, internal volume, and water outlet, and can receive the preheated water, heat the preheated water to a second temperature that is equal to or greater than the first temperature, and deliver a portion of the heated water. The group head can couple with a portafilter having espresso grounds therein, receive the portion of heated water from the low volume boiler, and force the portion of heated water through the espresso grounds in the portafilter. The portion of heated water can remain substantially at or within about 1° C. of the second temperature as it exits the group head.

title: Heating and temperature supplementing system of semi-automatic Italian coffee machine
abstract: The utility model discloses a semi-automatic Italian coffee machine heating and temperature compensation system which comprises a heating furnace and a liquid inlet pipe, a liquid inlet pump is arranged outside the heating furnace, a brewing head is arranged on the side, away from the liquid inlet pump, outside the heating furnace, and an electromagnetic valve is arranged between the heating furnace and the brewing head. A coffee brewing opening is formed in the center of the bottom end of the brewing head, electric heating pieces are symmetrically installed in the brewing head and fixedly connected with the brewing head, and a plurality of sets of heating pipes are installed in the heating furnace at equal intervals. According to the heating and temperature compensation system of the semi-automatic Italian coffee machine, the coffee liquid is output in a multi-stage temperature detection heating mode, the cooled coffee liquid in the conveying pipe can be conveniently and timely heated, the situation that the temperature of the output coffee liquid is too low, and the taste is affected is avoided, and the coffee liquid with the preset temperature can be conveniently, continuously and stably provided.

title: Method for expanding user portraits based on time sequence modeling technology
abstract: The invention discloses a method for expanding a user portrait based on a time sequence modeling technology, which comprises the following steps of: collecting data such as user behavior data, article information, timestamps and the like, and carrying out cleaning and standardization processing; performing embedding representation by combining user behaviors, article contents and timestamp data, and combining the information to generate multi-modal embedding of each time step; the method comprises the following steps: processing behavior data of a user at different time steps by using a time sequence convolutional network (TCN), and capturing a local dependency relationship in time sequence data; processing the global dependency relationship in the time sequence by using a self-attention mechanism, distributing a weighted representation for each time point, and dynamically adjusting the weight according to the relationship between time steps; new user behavior predictions are generated through self-attention and timing convolution, and interest tags of the user are extended based on these predictions.

title: TRANSFER FILM AND METHOD FOR TRANSFERRING A BARRIER LAYER ONTO A SUBSTRATE
abstract: The present invention relates to a transfer film for applying a barrier layer onto a substrate. The transfer film comprises a carrier film, on which a layer sequence is applied consisting of at least one lacquer layer, made of a barrier lacquer, and an inorganic layer, wherein the adhesive forces between the lacquer layer and the carrier film are lower than the adhesive forces between the lacquer layer and the inorganic layer. The transfer film is characterized in that the barrier lacquer comprises a polymer matrix having a hydrophilic component and a hydrophobic component, of which the hydrophilic component significantly outweighs the hydrophobic component. The transfer film allows a barrier layer having effective barrier properties to be transferred onto target substrates, for which this was previously technically impossible or economically impractical.

title: AVOIDING DOUBLE DOSING IN A COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: [0001] In the context of coffee making, a coffee machine is provided, comprising a main unit and a portafilter (20), wherein the portafilter (20) is removably mounted to the main unit and is emptied externally by a user as part of the normal operation of the coffee machine. After there has been a first instance of the portafilter (20) being positioned at a coffee receiving position, the portafilter (20) is blocked from reaching the coffee receiving position again after having been moved from the coffee receiving position to a brewing position. To this end, the coffee machine comprises a suitable blocking arrangement (80). On the basis of the functionality of the blocking arrangement (80), the chance that the coffee machine is operated to supply ground coffee to the portafilter (20) while a used coffee puck from a previous coffee making process is still present in the portafilter (20) is minimized.

title: GROUND COFFEE DISPENSING DEVICE AND COFFEE MACHINE COMPRISING THE SAME
abstract: Provided is a ground coffee dispensing device (100) for dispensing ground coffee into a coffee brewing vessel (102). The ground coffee dispensing device comprises a receptacle (120) having an outlet through which ground coffee is deliverable from the receptacle. A shutter (126) is movable between an open position that allows the ground coffee to be delivered via the outlet and a closed position that blocks delivery of ground coffee via the outlet. A position determination element (130) is arranged to be triggered by the outlet and the coffee brewing vessel adopting a defined position relative to each other. A shutter mover (132) is arranged to cause movement of the shutter from the closed position to the open position in response to the position determination element being triggered. The defined position permits delivery of ground coffee into the coffee brewing vessel when the shutter is in the open position. Further provided is a coffee machine (116) comprising the ground coffee dispensing device.

title: GUIDED DISPLACEMENT OF A PORTAFILTER IN A COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: A coffee machine is provided, comprising a main unit and a portafilter (20), wherein the portafilter (20) in a functional condition is removably mounted to the main unit. When the portafilter (20) is in the functional condition, displacement of the portafilter (20) between a coffee receiving position and a brewing position takes place along a guide path, for instance a curved guide path. Such a guide path may for instance be defined by a rail-like component (12). A portafilter carrier (24) may be provided for receiving and accommodating the portafilter (20) in the functional condition. In such case, actions of mounting the portafilter (20) to the main unit and removing the portafilter (20) from the main unit can be done via a linear movement of the portafilter (20) towards the main unit and away from the main unit, respectively.

title: ROTATABLE ARRANGEMENT OF A PORTAFILTER RELATIVE TO A MAIN HOUSING OF A MAIN UNIT OF A COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: A coffee machine (100) is provided, comprising a main unit (10) and a portafilter (20), wherein the portafilter (20) is removably mounted to the main unit (10). In the coffee machine (100), rotating the portafilter (20) about a rotation axis (R) is what is done to displace the portafilter (20) from a placement and removal position to a coffee receiving position, from the coffee receiving position to a brewing position, and from the brewing position back to the placement and removal position. It is possible to use the rotary movement of the portafilter (20) to bring about movement of a ground coffee outlet in the main unit (10) and/or to bring about displacement of the portafilter (20) in a direction in which the rotation axis (R) extends.

title: AMBIENT MULTI-DEVICE FRAMEWORK FOR AGENT COMPANIONS
abstract: [0001] Systems and methods for generating and providing outputs in a multi-device system can include leveraging environment-based prompt generation and generative model response generation to provide dynamic response generation and display. The systems and methods can obtain input data associated with one or more computing devices within an environment, can obtain environment data descriptive of the plurality of computing devices within the environment, and can generate a prompt based on the input data and environment data. The prompt can be processed with a generative model to generate a model-generated output. The model-generated output can then be transmitted to a particular computing device of the plurality of computing devices.

title: High-strength and high-toughness medium-manganese thermoforming steel and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to high-strength and high-toughness medium-manganese hot forming steel and a preparation method thereof. The medium-manganese hot forming steel comprises the following chemical components in percentage by mass: 0.12-0.17% of C, 6.0-9.0% of Mn, 0.2-0.3% of Si and the balance of Fe and inevitable impurities. The preparation method comprises the steps that a medium manganese steel cast ingot is sequentially subjected to forging, hot rolling, softening annealing, cold rolling, one-step annealing, two-step annealing, rapid heating, quenching and low-temperature tempering, and the high-strength and high-toughness medium manganese hot forming steel is obtained. Compared with the prior art, the method has the advantages that the mechanical property of the hot-formed medium manganese steel can be remarkably improved, and the like.

title: Heating medium oil heat exchanger based on multi-stage temperature regulation and control mechanism
abstract: The invention discloses a heating medium oil heat exchanger based on a multi-stage temperature regulation and control mechanism, and relates to the technical field of heat exchange.The heating medium oil heat exchanger based on the multi-stage temperature regulation and control mechanism comprises a shell and a cleaning mechanism, the cleaning mechanism is arranged in the shell, and the cleaning mechanism comprises a worm, a cleaning strip, a crown gear, a cleaning brush, a filter plate and a stripping brush; when the crown gear is driven to rotate, the cleaning strip is synchronously driven to rotate, the rotating cleaning strip removes attachments on the inner wall of the pipe, meanwhile, the crown gear drives the cleaning brush to conduct secondary removal on the inner wall of the pipe, cleaning dead corners are avoided, the cleaning effect is ensured, and therefore coke and carbon deposit crystal substances which are prone to being generated in heating medium oil in equipment are removed. And the problems that the heat exchanger cannot work normally, the working efficiency is affected and the maintenance cost is increased due to the fact that crystals are attached to the inner wall of the heat exchange tube and the heat exchanger is blocked are solved.

title: Method for extracting lithium from lithium ore and lithium product
abstract: The invention relates to the field of mineral processing and efficient utilization of lithium resources, and provides a method for extracting lithium from lithium ore and a lithium product.The method comprises the following steps that lithium ore containing an alpha phase is ground, and lithium ore powder is obtained; contacting the lithium ore powder with a conductive carbon-based material, and performing flash Joule heat treatment to quickly convert an alpha phase in the lithium ore into a beta phase; and carrying out leaching treatment on a product obtained by the flash Joule heat treatment to realize lithium extraction. According to the method, the lithium ore alpha-phase to beta-phase rapid conversion is achieved through flash Joule heat treatment, the treatment time is shortened to 1-60 seconds from several hours of a traditional technology, energy consumption is reduced by 70% or above compared with that of the traditional technology, and the lithium leaching rate can reach 95% or above. The method has the advantages of being efficient, low in energy consumption, environmentally friendly and the like, rapid phase change and efficient lithium extraction of the lithium ore can be achieved, and a brand new technical path is provided for large-scale low-cost development and utilization of lithium resources.

title: COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: A coffee machine is for preparing an espresso coffee drink, but it also enables filtered coffee to be produced. An external water delivery nozzle is provided, and it provides water to a coffee jug comprising a filter holder for holding a coffee filter and contained coffee grinds. The coffee jug and the external water delivery nozzle can be coupled and decoupled.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR INFUSING NITROGEN VIA PRESSURIZED LIQUID
abstract: A beverage machine includes a nitrogen or gas infusion system operable to infuse nitrogen or other gas into a beverage by pressurizing the beverage as it is exposed to the nitrogen and/or gas, e.g., sourced from atmospheric air. The infusion system may include a fluid motive device and an infusion housing receiving a flow of the beverage via the fluid motive device. An obstruction, e.g., a restricting plate, may be positioned in the infusion housing that can exert a shear force on the flow of the beverage and create turbulence in the flow of the beverage in the infusion housing. The shear and turbulence of the flow of the beverage can promote infusion of nitrogen and/or gas into the beverage.

title: AUTOMATED TOTAL NAIL CARE SYSTEM, DEVICE AND METHOD
abstract: To provide a system, device and method for nail care.SOLUTION: A nail care system includes a shaping system, a polish removal system and/or a cuticle management system; a vision system; a nail polish application system; and a mobility system. The nail system may further include an accelerated drying system, a hand massage system, a nail identification/diagnosis/estimation of conditions system, an enclosure, a hand/foot rest system, a computer software system, a computer hardware system, a cartridge/pod system, and a multi-tool system.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title: TRANSDUCER-HORN ASSEMBLIES AND APPLICATIONS THEREOF
abstract: Extraction devices are provided comprising for the extraction of at least one component of a first phase into a second phase. A holding device is provided for receiving and holding the phases. One or more transducer-horn assemblies are provided, each transducer-horn assembly comprising a transducer and a horn, the horn comprising a base portion and an engagement portion comprising a holding device engaging edge configured for engaging the holding device.

title: Molding equipment for intelligent stirrer
abstract: The invention discloses forming equipment for an intelligent stirrer, and belongs to the technical field of injection molding, the forming equipment comprises a forming injection molding table and an injection molding device, the forming injection molding table is provided with an assembling mold base, the assembling mold base is provided with a lower mold cylinder part, and the assembling mold base is connected with a mold base matched with the lower mold cylinder part through an electric control driving part; the forming injection molding table is connected with an upper injection molding table through a support piece, the upper injection molding table is connected with an outer assembly sleeve through a mold closing push rod, and the outer assembly sleeve is connected with an upper mold barrel piece through a pressure linkage piece. Accessories of the stirring machine are directly combined with the chopping blade and the stirring shaft through an integrated injection molding technology, gaps generated by traditional clamping or screw assembling are avoided, the problems of difficult cleaning and sanitation dead angles are solved, the use sanitation and experience are remarkably improved, seamless connection is formed between the chopping blade and the stirring shaft through the integrated molding technology, and the service life of the stirring machine is prolonged. The hidden danger that accessories are loosened in long-term use is eradicated fundamentally, and the durability and the safety of equipment are improved.

title: Pressurizing and heating espresso coffee machine
abstract: An espresso coffee machine may include a pump, a pre-heating component, a low volume boiler, and a group head. The pump may provide pressurized water to a preheating component that preheats the pressurized water to a first temperature and delivers the preheated water. The low volume boiler may have a heating arrangement, a water inlet, an interior volume, and a water outlet, and may receive preheated water, heat the preheated water to a second temperature equal to or greater than the first temperature, and deliver a portion of the heated water. The group head may be coupled with a mobile filter having espresso coffee grounds therein, receive a portion of the heated water from the low volume boiler, and force the portion of the heated water through the espresso coffee grounds in the mobile filter. The portion of heated water may be substantially maintained at or within about 1 DEG C of the second temperature when exiting the group head.
