title: Method for improving strength and plasticity of TB17 titanium alloy
abstract: The invention relates to a method for improving the strength and plasticity of TB17 titanium alloy, in particular to a method for regulating and controlling structure precipitation of the TB17 titanium alloy based on solid solution and multi-stage aging treatment so as to improve the strength and plasticity of the TB17 titanium alloy, a four-scale lath structure is obtained in the TB17 titanium alloy, and by means of the structure characteristic, alloy plastic deformation can be coordinated, the alloy plasticity can be improved, and meanwhile the strength and plasticity of the TB17 titanium alloy can be improved. Dislocation motion is hindered, the alloy strength is improved, and the TB17 titanium alloy obtains excellent strength and plasticity matching performance. The obtained TB17 titanium alloy has the structure morphology with the four-scale characteristic and is composed of a small number of primary alpha phases, a large number of lath alpha phases and a beta matrix, mechanical property tests prove that the strength and plasticity matching of the TB17 titanium alloy is obviously optimized, and the plasticity can be obviously improved while high strength is obtained. According to the method, the purpose of regulating and controlling four-scale structure precipitation is achieved through optimized technological parameters, the mechanical property of the TB17 titanium alloy is improved, good strength and plasticity matching is achieved, and the method has high guiding significance for actual production.

title: Methods and systems for providing a secure automated assistant
abstract: Implementations described herein relate to receiving user input directed to an automated assistant, processing the user input to determine whether data from a server and/or third-party application is needed to perform certain fulfillment of an assistant command included in the user input, and generating a prompt that requests a user consent to transmitting of a request to the server and/or the third-party application to obtain the data needed to perform the certain fulfillment. In implementations where the user consents, the data can be obtained and utilized to perform the certain fulfillment. In implementations where the user does not consent, client data can be generated locally at a client device and utilized to perform alternate fulfillment of the assistant command. In various implementations, the request transmitted to the server and/or third-party application can be modified based on ambient noise captured when the user input is received.

title: UTILIZING A CONTINGENT ASSET SECURE TOKEN
abstract: A method includes a computing entity issuing a request to select and authenticate a digital record that represents a secure first token representing utilization of a contingent asset to securely establish a contingent asset solution for a first pending transaction associated with a transaction item. The method further includes generating a contingent asset digital record representing the contingent asset that includes applicability information associated with justification for selection of a particular contingent asset. The method further includes determining that the particular contingent asset provides the contingent asset solution and generating a smart contract to facilitate completion of the first pending transaction. The method further includes inclusion of the smart contract on an object distributed ledger to represent the contingent asset solution.

title: Glass and ceramic tile surface adsorption type multi-surface cleaning executing mechanism
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of surface cleaning devices, and discloses a glass and ceramic tile surface adsorption type multi-surface cleaning executing mechanism which comprises a cross block and a connecting column, one end of the cross block is fixedly connected with a limiting block, the periphery of the limiting block is rotatably connected with a sleeve, and the middle of the sleeve is fixedly connected with a connecting block; a first motor is fixedly connected to one side of the connecting block, a second motor is fixedly connected to the side, away from the first motor, of the connecting block, one end of the cross block is fixedly connected to the output end of the second motor, and a connecting frame is fixedly connected to the output end of the first motor. A large suction cup can be conveniently driven to move downwards through an air cylinder, so that the whole executing mechanism can be conveniently fixed, after the whole executing mechanism is fixed, a first motor drives a connecting frame to turn over, meanwhile, a plurality of organ type suction cups can be conveniently driven to move, and therefore the organ type suction cups can be adsorbed to the wall surface; therefore, wall climbing operation is achieved.

title: AI METHOD SERVER AND COMPUTER PROGRAM FOR GENERATING AI-BASED ADVERTISEMENT IMAGES
abstract: Disclosed is a method for generating an ai-based advertisement image according to various embodiments of the present invention for realizing the above-described problem. The method comprises the steps of: obtaining image information and product description information; generating a product promotion image based on the image information and the product description information; generating an advertisement sentence based on the product promotion image and the product description information; and generating an advertisement image based on the product promotion image and the advertisement sentence, wherein the image information includes at least one of product image information, logo image information, and reference image information, and the product description information is an input in a natural language form obtained from a user, and may include product name information and product characteristic information.

title: Novel method for preparing AlON transparent ceramic with high infrared transmittance
abstract: The invention relates to a novel method for preparing AlON transparent ceramic with high infrared transmittance, and belongs to the field of transparent ceramic preparation. The preparation method comprises the following steps: carrying out ball milling and mixing on nano gamma-Al2O3 and micron AlN powder, synthesizing AlON powder taking AlON as a main phase through a high-temperature solid-phase reaction, then adding a sintering aid CaCO3, carrying out ball milling to regulate and control the particle size of the powder, and finally preparing the pure-phase AlON transparent ceramic with high infrared transmittance by adopting a pressureless sintering method. According to the preparation method, the chemical composition is controllable, pure-phase AlON powder does not need to be obtained firstly, and the powder synthesis process is low in cost, simple and easy to implement; the synthesized powder is small in primary particle size and uniform in element distribution, and particle refinement can be easily achieved through ball milling. Therefore, the prepared ceramic is high in infrared transmittance, small in grain size and high in hardness, the ceramic sintering process has the advantages of being short in heat preservation time, high in efficiency, capable of saving energy, environmentally friendly and low in cost, and the method is suitable for industrial production.

title: Multi-mode hot continuous rolling production line, production process and cross production control method
abstract: The invention relates to a multi-mode hot continuous rolling production line, a production process and a cross production control method, and belongs to the technical field of steel hot rolling. The production line has a single plate blank rolling production mode and a semi-endless plate blank rolling production mode and is composed of a multi-strand continuous casting machine and a rolling line on the downstream of the continuous casting machine, and a temperature compensation device is arranged between an outlet of the continuous casting machine and a rolling line gas heating furnace, and the center line of the continuous casting machine and the rolling line gas heating furnace coincide. And at least one space for discharging the plate blank from the rolling line gas heating furnace to the rolling line is reserved between the tail end of the temperature compensation device and the downstream rough descaling machine. When the semi-headless mode is adopted for production, only the first coil is threaded, and the last coil is thrown, so that high-proportion production of 1.2 mm thin strip steel on the basis of traditional hot continuous rolling is facilitated, even the lower limit of 1.2 mm thickness is broken through, and stable coiling production of the hot continuous rolling thin strip steel is realized. And meanwhile, the situation that a semi-endless rolling gap is long and is supplemented by single block rolling is fully considered, the situation that a rolling mill waits for continuous casting is avoided, and the influence of introduction of a semi-endless mode on the productivity of a production line is reduced to the maximum extent.

title: SYSTEM FOR PROCESSING FOOD WASTE
abstract: The present invention relates to an under-the-sink system for accepting and processing food waste and comprising a removable decomposable food waste container and an appliance comprising screw conveyors above one another and running in opposite directions to move waste from an inlet to the decomposable container, wherein the waste is shredded and compressed to remove liquid on moving from inlet to outlet., the appliance further comprising a plurality of fixed cutting members adapted to further chop said waste in a first auger chamber and one or more perforated plates for further shredding and compacting the waste to remove more liquid, wherein the pitch increases over the length of the first screw conveyor and the first and second screw conveyors each comprise a spiral wall to reduce the available volume in the auger flights.

title: 3D cameras or sensors inputting to multi-modal generative artificial intelligence models trained on images or videos
abstract: [0000] 3D cameras may serve as an input to a multi-modal generative artificial intelligence (GAI) model operating on a processor coupled to a non-transitory computer readable medium. Examples of 3D cameras include direct or indirect time-of-flight sensors or structured light systems and may also be coupled to 2D cameras. The GAI comprises a vision transformer configured to analyze an item in an input video or image. The vision transformer comprises self-attention and positional encoding layers. The GAI may be trained using reinforcement learning or fine-tuning involving training images or videos, and it may perform data fusion by combining the 3D information with data from other sensors. The GAI may perform anomalous occurrence detection by training on images or videos corresponding to normal occurrences. The GAI detects differences in an image or video that fall outside of a threshold value. The GAI may also provide safeguards for privacy issues.

title: ADVERTISING SERVICE SERVER TO OPERATE AN ADVERTISING SERVICE THAT PROVIDES CUSTOMIZED ADVERTISING TAKING USER PREFERENCES INTO ACCOUNT AND THE OPERATING METHOD THEREOF
abstract: The present invention proposes an advertisement providing service server for operating an advertisement providing service for providing a customized advertisement in consideration of the preference of a user and an operating method thereof, so that the user can receive only advertisement information suitable for his or her preference, thereby increasing the advertisement concentration of the user.

title: High-speed line multi-pin parallel resistance welding machine
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of core wire welding, and particularly relates to a high-speed wire multi-pin parallel resistance welding machine which comprises a base, a first shell fixedly connected to the upper end of the base and a welding unit fixedly connected to the upper end of the base. The welding unit comprises an X-axis displacement module, a Z-axis displacement module, a welding machine head and a Y-axis displacement module, wherein the X-axis displacement module and the Z-axis displacement module are fixedly connected to the upper end of the base, the welding machine head is fixedly connected to the Z-axis displacement module, and the Y-axis displacement module is fixedly connected into the base. The upper end of the base is further fixedly connected with an electrode cleaning unit, and the electrode cleaning unit comprises a box body fixedly connected to the upper end of the base and a fourth motor fixedly connected to one side of the box body. The brush is rotationally connected to the wall of the box body, and an output shaft of the fourth motor penetrates through the box body and is fixedly connected with one end of the brush; by means of automatic cleaning, the step and time for disassembling and assembling the electrode are omitted, meanwhile, compared with manual cleaning, the cleaning efficiency of the electrode is higher, the cleaning time of the electrode is shorter, the situation of long-time shutdown is avoided, and therefore the influence on a core wire production line can be reduced.

title: Method for preparing biochar through self-propagating pyrolysis
abstract: The invention discloses a method for preparing biochar by self-propagating pyrolysis, which comprises the following steps: selecting agricultural waste or wood waste with cellulose content of more than 30%, crushing until the particle size is 0.5-5mm, mixing the material and aluminum sulfate according to the ratio of 10-20% of the mass of the raw material, promoting low-temperature pyrolysis by an activator and increasing the specific surface area of the biochar, and preparing the biochar by self-propagating pyrolysis. A resistance heating device is adopted to heat materials to 300-400 DEG C within one minute, volatile components are rapidly released, microwave radiation with the frequency of 2.45 GHz and far infrared radiation are combined for heating, microwave radiation is used for internal heating, far infrared radiation is used for external heating, and the pyrolysis efficiency is improved. Therefore, the stability and the structural integrity of the biochar are kept through accurate cooling, the yield and the quality of the biochar are improved through the whole process, gas generated by pyrolysis is effectively recycled and utilized, energy waste and emission are reduced to the maximum extent, and the problems of uneven heating, long reaction time, low energy efficiency and the like in the prior art are fundamentally solved.

title: FOOD BINDER AND METHOD FOR PRODUCTION THEREOF
abstract: The present invention lies in the field of foodstuffs. It discloses a method for producing binders for non-animal foodstuffs, which comprises the mixing of processed and unprocessed leguminosae flours with a high starch content until they are uniform, and imitates the effect of conventional food binders. The food binder can be used to bread foodstuffs, as a binder in new vegan matrices, and as a binder in baked and confectionery products. The food binder is also highly suitable for cold applications.

title: AUTOMATED SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR GENERATING A PRESCRIPTION FOR ORTHODONTIC APPLIANCES
abstract: [0000] A system and method for automatically generating orthodontic appliance prescriptions and designs, which utilizes a cloud-based platform integrated with technologies such as machine learning, natural language processing, and 3D printing. The system operates by receiving Standard Tessellation Language (STL) files from user devices, analyzing these files using STL logic, and comparing them against a comprehensive database of stored STL files. Orthodontic appliance prescriptions are generated incorporating user input and utilizing natural language processing to interpret textual data. Upon selection of a prescription, graphical 3D logic generates a visual representation of the appliance, which is then translated into a 3D-printable STL file optimized for medical-grade materials. The platform may employ feedback mechanisms and AI-enabled features for additional functionalities, such as billing, case tracking, and customer support, while ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations and quality assurance protocols for the production of orthodontic appliances.

title: Identification of one or more services for a user's network-connected smart device using a smart device fingerprint of the network-connected smart device
abstract: One or more services are identified for a user's network-connected smart device by generating a smart device fingerprint for the network-connected smart device, electronically communicating the smart device fingerprint for the network-connected smart device to a processor, and analyzing the data in the smart device fingerprint for the network-connected smart device in the processor and identifying one or more services based on the data in the smart device fingerprint for the network-connected smart device. The smart device fingerprint including at least device metadata of the network-connected smart device, a vulnerability profile of the network-connected smart device, and anomaly and/or behavior metadata of the network-connected smart device.

title: Power bus insulation processing equipment
abstract: The invention discloses power bus insulation processing equipment, and relates to the technical field of power bus insulation processing. The power bus insulation treatment processing equipment comprises a processing table and a placing part which is arranged on the processing table and used for placing a power bus conductor, and an annular bearing frame is provided with a multi-face cleaning mechanism which is used for conducting self-adaptive attaching cleaning according to the surface shape of a power bus so that follow-up coating of an insulating layer can be facilitated. The arc-shaped base and the arc-shaped expanding and supporting plate are matched in an arc-shaped mode so as to trigger the grinding belt set to be unfolded to be completely attached along the path of the wall of the power bus heat dissipation groove so that dead-corner-free cleaning can be achieved. A jacking and moving piece used for jacking and pressing the sliding rod to move towards the circle center of the annular bearing frame is jointly arranged between the right portion of the inner wall of the circumference of the annular bearing frame and the sliding rod. Through cooperative work of the surface cleaning part and the directional cleaning part, the outer wall of the power bus is comprehensively cleaned, no dead angle and no omission are ensured, and subsequent uniform and tight coating of a heat shrink tube is ensured, so that the insulation stability of the power bus is ensured.

title: Heat treatment method for wear-resistant accessory of ultra-large mining excavator
abstract: The invention discloses a heat treatment method for wear-resistant accessories of an ultra-large mining excavator, which comprises the following steps: heating the wear-resistant accessories of the ultra-large mining excavator to austenitizing temperature, and homogenizing; quenching the wear-resistant accessory subjected to homogenization treatment to room temperature to obtain the wear-resistant accessory with a martensitic structure; the wear-resistant accessory subjected to primary quenching is rapidly heated again to the temperature above the austenitizing temperature, heat preservation is conducted for a short time, complete austenitizing treatment is conducted, and the austenite structure does not grow obviously; secondary quenching is conducted, specifically, the abrasion-resistant accessory subjected to complete austenitizing treatment is rapidly cooled, so that the structure further contains a certain amount of retained austenite; the wear-resistant accessory subjected to secondary quenching is subjected to partitioning treatment, and air cooling is conducted to the room temperature after partitioning; carrying out subzero treatment on the wear-resistant accessory subjected to partitioning treatment, and then heating to room temperature; and tempering. Through the heat treatment process easy to implement, the wear-resistant accessory product with excellent performance is obtained, and the performance requirement of the wear-resistant accessory of the oversized excavator is met.

title: PROVIDING CERTAIN REASONING WITH RESPECT TO FULFILLMENT OF AN ASSISTANT COMMAND
abstract: Implementations described herein relate to causing certain reasoning with respect to why an automated assistant performed (or did not perform) certain fulfillment and/or alternate fulfillment of an assistant command. For example, implementations can receive user input that includes the assistant command, process the user input to determine data to be utilized in performance of the certain fulfillment or the alternate fulfillment of the assistant command, and cause the automated assistant to utilize the data to perform the certain fulfillment or the alternate fulfillment of the assistant command. In some implementations, output that includes the certain reasoning can be provided for presentation to a user in response to additional user input that requests the certain reasoning. In some implementations, a selectable element can be visually rendered and, when selected by the user, the output that includes the certain reasoning can be provided for presentation to the user.

title: EMBEDDED CONVERSATIONAL ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AI)-BASED SMART APPLIANCES
abstract: [0000] One embodiment of the invention provides a computer-implemented method for an interactive embedded conversational artificial intelligence (AI) agent on an electronic device. The method comprises obtaining a diagnostic report for the electronic device, establishing a communication channel with a remote chatbot, and sending, to the remote chatbot over the communication channel, the diagnostic report. The method further comprises receiving, from the remote chatbot over the communication channel, instructions for resolving at least one potential fault of the electronic device. The instructions are indicative of at least one potential fault of the electronic device and at least one preventative measure to resolve the at least one potential fault. The method further comprises dynamically taking at least one action to automatically resolve the at least one potential fault if the at least one potential fault is resolvable without human intervention. The at least one action is based on the instructions.

title: COFFEE BEAN GRINDER
abstract: A grinder (10) adapted for ready disassembly for cleaning includes a rotary output (37) that rotates about an axis (17) and is disposed in a recess (16) in a housing (11, 211). A carrier (20, 220) is mounted to the housing (11, 211) and is also part of an adjustment mechanism for adjusting the fineness of ground product. A cup (27, 227), in which a first grinding element (28) is supported for rotation about axis (17), is insertable axially into the recess (16) through an opening (19) of the recess. A second grinding element (29, 229) insertable axially into a mouth of the cup cooperates with the first grinding element (28) and defines an adjustable annular gap therebetween. A coupling (49, 249) connects the cup (27, 227) and the second grinding element (29, 229) to restrain relative rotation while accommodating relative axial displacement. For removal, outward axial displacement of the second grinding element (29, 229) brings respective abutment faces (59, 60, 84) on the cup and the second grinding element into mutual engagement before further outward axial displacement withdraws the cup (27, 227) from the recess (16).

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The invention discloses a purifying and heating all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a heat tank assembly, a filtering system and an electric control assembly, the filtering system is communicated with a water path of the heat tank assembly, the filtering system and the heat tank assembly are both arranged in the shell assembly, a heat tank cavity is formed in the shell assembly, and the electric control assembly is arranged in the heat tank cavity. The hot tank assembly is arranged in the hot tank cavity, the filtering system and the electric control assembly are both located outside the hot tank cavity, and the hot tank assembly is electrically connected with the electric control assembly; the shell assembly is further provided with an air inlet and a heat dissipation opening, the air inlet and the heat dissipation opening are both communicated with the hot tank cavity, and external airflow enters the hot tank cavity through the air inlet and flows out of the heat dissipation opening. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine when the hot tank assembly works can be avoided.

title: ELECTRONIC TERMINAL APPARATUS THAT CAN DISPLAY ELECTRONIC DOCUMENTS AND MULTIPLE ADVERTISEMENT INFORMATION TOGETHER ON ONE SCREEN AND THE OPERATING METHOD THEREOF

The electronic terminal device includes an interface display unit; a document display unit; a display event generation unit; a URL request unit; a preview generation unit; and an advertising display unit.

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The invention discloses a purifying and heating all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a filtering system, a hot tank assembly and an electric control assembly. A first mounting space and a second mounting space are arranged in the shell assembly, and air convection is not carried out between the first mounting space and the second mounting space; the hot tank assembly is communicated with a water path of the filtering system; the electric control assembly is arranged in the first mounting space, and the hot tank assembly is electrically connected with the electric control assembly; the filtering system is arranged in the first installation space, and the hot tank assembly is arranged in the second installation space. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine when the hot tank assembly works can be avoided.

title: HOME APPLIANCE AND METHOD FOR THE SAME
abstract: The present invention provides a method for controlling a home appliance including a fan and an air filter provided on an airflow generated by the operation of the fan, wherein the control unit includes a driving step of driving the fan by applying a rotation speed control command for the rotation speed of the fan to the fan, and a first judgment step of determining whether the fan is broken or the air filter is plugged based on a feedback rotation speed (X) and a feedback power value (Y) of the fan read out from the fan.

title: Selecting device to respond to device-independent user request
abstract: Implementations relate to selecting a particular device from an ecosystem of devices to provide a response to a device-independent request of a user when a scene is occurring. A user specifies a scene, and a contextual feature is identified from one or more devices in the ecosystem to generate a scene feature indicative of the occurrence of the scene. The scene features are stored along with relevance of a device specified by a user to handle a response while the scene is occurring. When a subsequent device-independent request is received, a current contextual feature is identified and compared to a scene feature. Based on the comparison, a designated assistant device is selected to respond to a device-independent request.

title: Heat purifying and purifying all-in-one machine
abstract: The invention discloses a purifying and heating all-in-one machine which comprises a shell assembly, a heat insulation structure, a filtering system, a hot tank assembly and an electric control assembly. The interior of the shell assembly is divided into a hot tank cavity and a filtering cavity. The heat insulation structure is arranged in the shell assembly and matched with the inner wall of the shell assembly to define a heat dissipation cavity, and the heat dissipation cavity communicates with the hot tank cavity. The filtering system is arranged in the filtering cavity; the hot tank assembly is arranged in the hot tank cavity and is communicated with a water path of the filtering system; the electric control assembly is arranged in the filtering cavity and electrically connected with the hot tank assembly. According to the technical scheme, the influence of heat radiation on other electric devices in the purifying and heating all-in-one machine during working of the hot tank assembly is avoided.

title: WATER PIPE WITH CONNECTION BETWEEN RECEPTACLE AND HOUSING
abstract: A water pipe comprises a housing into which a receptacle, which has a suction connection and which can be filled with a liquid medium, and a heating chamber, which is connected to the receptacle via a suction hose, are integrated. The receptacle and a housing part, which is located between the receptacle and the heating chamber and accommodates an electronic unit, are detachably connected to one another. Furthermore, a valve is mounted in the area where the mouth of the suction hose leads into the receptacle.

title: COOKTOP SYSTEM
abstract: [0001] Ein Kochfeldsystem (1) mit einem Kochgutträger (4) zum Tragen von Kochgut (6), mindestens einer an dem Kochgutträger (4) angeordneten Heizeinheit (5) zum Erwärmen des Kochguts (6) und einer Dunstabzugsvorrichtung (3) zum Abzug von Kochdünsten nach unten, wobei eine Gesamtbreite (B) des Kochfeldsystems (1) maximal 600 mm beträgt.

title: Prism surface cleaning device
abstract: The utility model discloses a prism surface cleaning device, which comprises a fixed seat, two groups of symmetrically distributed mounting racks are arranged in the fixed seat, the two groups of mounting racks are connected with the fixed seat in a sliding manner, and two groups of symmetrically distributed mounting rods are arranged on the mounting racks. The two ends of the two sets of mounting rods penetrate through the mounting frames correspondingly and are rotationally connected with the mounting frames, the two sets of mounting rods are each sleeved with two sets of symmetrically-distributed transmission wheels, each set of mounting frames is provided with two sets of symmetrically-distributed transmission belts, and the two sets of transmission belts are in transmission connection with the corresponding transmission wheels correspondingly; a mounting mesh belt is fixedly mounted between the two groups of transmission belts, multi-surface cleaning of a prism is realized through two groups of symmetrically distributed mounting frames, the mounting mesh belt on the mounting frames and brushes distributed on the mounting mesh belt at equal intervals, and the distance between the two groups of mounting frames can be adjusted through a bidirectional screw rod; therefore, the cleaning device can be suitable for cleaning prisms of different models.

title: Biodegradable Absorbent Materials and Articles of Manufacture Formed Therefrom
abstract: The present invention provides biodegradable absorbent materials comprising a cellulosic substrate material comprising a lignocellulose material, one or more water-swellable absorbent substances, and one or more additives selected from the group consisting of performance-improving additives, additives to produce specific functionalities, plasticizers, and surfactants; and also provides useful articles of manufacture incorporating such materials. The present invention further provides methods for producing such materials and methods for producing such useful articles of manufacture.

title: 建築材料
abstract: 本発明は、藻類または水生植物の死骸の粉砕物と、植物由来のバインダーとを含む建築材料であって、有機酸水溶液を含むことを特徴とする建築材料に関する。有機酸水溶液を使用することにより、材料の機械的特性が向上し、他方、抗菌剤として作用する。本発明の建築材料は、モジュラー建築用のプレハブ部品の製造や、目地をシールするバイオセメントおよび固定材として使用することができる。

title: Cleaning device for waste metal recovery
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of waste metal recovery, and discloses a cleaning device for waste metal recovery, which comprises a cleaning box, a cleaning cylinder is arranged in the cleaning box, waste metal is arranged in the cleaning cylinder, and a T-shaped chute is arranged on the inner wall of the upper surface of the cleaning box. The mechanism used for conducting reciprocating swing cleaning on the cleaning cylinder is located in the T-shaped sliding groove and comprises a T-shaped sliding block, a rack, an electric telescopic rod, a first rotating shaft, a gear, a high-pressure spray head, two fixing supports and two fixing plates, and the T-shaped sliding block is slidably connected to the inner wall of the T-shaped sliding groove; the rack is fixedly installed on the face, close to the T-shaped sliding groove, of the T-shaped sliding block, the rack is in sliding connection with the upper surface of the inner wall of the cleaning box, the fan-shaped swing design enables the high-pressure spray head to spray cleaning liquid in a larger range, and it is guaranteed that all parts, including the edges, corners and gaps which are difficult to touch, of waste metal can be fully cleaned.

title: Intelligent cleaner
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent pedestal pan which comprises a pedestal pan body, the pedestal pan body is provided with a urinal area, a turning cover and a storage device, the storage device is provided with a plurality of cleaning assemblies, each cleaning assembly comprises a cleaning cover and a cleaning cover, and the cleaning cover in one cleaning assembly corresponds to one user. The intelligent pedestal pan further comprises a movement assembly, a liquid supply assembly and a control system, the movement assembly comprises a movement unit, the control system is connected with and controls the movement assembly and the liquid supply assembly, and the control system comprises an information collection device and a cleaning control device. According to the embodiment of the invention, each group of cleaning covers can be automatically stored and taken by the movement assembly, and the movement assembly can drive the corresponding cleaning covers to move so as to clean the buttocks of the users, so that each user can enjoy the special cleaning assembly independently, and cross infection is avoided; and meanwhile, the cleaning assembly comprises a cleaning cover, the cleaning cover can be automatically cleaned before and after use, and cleanliness of the cleaning cover is guaranteed.

title: Boosted heating espresso machine
abstract: [0000] An espresso machine can include a pump, preheating component, low volume boiler, and group head. The pump can provide pressurized water to the preheating component, which can preheat the pressurized water to a first temperature and deliver the preheated water. The low volume boiler can have a heating arrangement, water inlet, internal volume, and water outlet, and can receive the preheated water, heat the preheated water to a second temperature that is equal to or greater than the first temperature, and deliver a portion of the heated water. The group head can couple with a portafilter having espresso grounds therein, receive the portion of heated water from the low volume boiler, and force the portion of heated water through the espresso grounds in the portafilter. The portion of heated water can remain substantially at or within about 1° C. of the second temperature as it exits the group head.

title: Bolt looseness monitoring gasket and monitoring method
abstract: The invention relates to a bolt looseness monitoring gasket and a bolt looseness monitoring method. The gasket comprises a gasket assembly (1), a triboelectric annular structure (2) and a connecting wire (3). The gasket assembly (1) comprises large gaskets (101) and small gaskets (102), the triboelectric annular structure (2) is arranged on the periphery of the small gaskets (102), and the large gaskets (101) are located on the two sides of the triboelectric annular structure (2) and the small gaskets (102); the triboelectric annular structure (2) comprises a positive electrode layer, a rubber dielectric layer and a negative electrode layer, and the connecting wire (3) is connected with the positive electrode layer and the negative electrode layer of the triboelectric annular structure (2) and used for transmitting signals of electrode surface potential difference. Compared with the prior art, the gasket is high in applicability and simple in structure, and a convenient and practical method is provided for health monitoring of bolt connecting components in engineering.

title: Equipment for cleaning adhesive on surface of prebaked anode carbon block
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of carbon block surface cleaning, in particular to prebaked anode carbon block surface adhesive cleaning equipment which comprises a portal frame arranged on the periphery of the upper portion of a belt conveyor, and a two-way stretching mechanism is installed in the middle space between an upper-layer belt and a lower-layer belt of the belt conveyor. The top of the upper-layer belt is used for conveying prebaked anode carbon blocks, lifting electric cylinders are arranged at the bottoms of the two ends of the two-way stretching mechanism correspondingly, and side face cleaning units are symmetrically installed at the positions, corresponding to the tops of the sliding seats, of the two sides of the two-way stretching mechanism correspondingly. The device can be installed on the two sides of a belt conveyor in an existing workshop in a matched mode, and multi-face cleaning and scraping treatment on all large-size and large-weight prebaked anode carbon blocks in the conveying state of the belt conveyor can be completed in a matched mode. Impurity particle filling materials adhered to the corresponding surface portions of the prebaked anode carbon blocks are effectively removed in a scraping mode, multi-face cleaning is achieved in the conveying process, and the cleaning efficiency can be effectively improved.

title: Systems and methods for generating meal recommendations
abstract: [0000] Disclosed embodiments may include a method for generating meal recommendations by receiving first data and user input data. The system may generate a food profile and estimate of ingredients based on the first data and the user input data. The system may generate, based on the estimate of ingredients, one or more cooking instructions or an output that the user does not have sufficient ingredients. If cooking instructions are generated, the system may generate and transmit a graphical user interface comprising the one or more cooking instructions based on the estimate of ingredients for display. If it is determined the user does not have sufficient ingredients, the system may generate and transmit a graphical user interface comprising one or more dining options for the user for display.

title: METHODS, APPARATUSES AND COMPUTER PROGRAM PRODUCTS FOR NATURAL LANGUAGE GENERATION
abstract: Methods, apparatuses, and computer program products for a natural language generation system are described herein. An example method may include receiving, originating from a client computing device, an input data object. In some embodiments, the example method may include generating, based at least in part by applying a configuration model to the input data object, an intermediate natural language configuration data object. In some embodiments, the example method may include generating, based at least in part on applying a synthesis model to the intermediate natural language configuration data object, a natural language configuration data object. In some embodiments, the example method may include configuring the natural language configuration data object for use by a large language model in generating a natural language output representative of the input data object.

title: A METHOD FOR PREPARING A BEVERAGE SUCH AS COFFEE AND A BEVERAGE BREWING MACHINE FOR PREPARING A BEVERAGE
abstract: A method for preparing a beverage such as coffee from an ingredient such as ground coffee using a beverage making machine. The machine comprises a brewing chamber having an inlet and an outlet, a pump and a fluid connection extending between the pump and the inlet. The pump is of a type which, in use, is operated by an AC-voltage wherein each cycle of the AC voltage causes the pump to make one stroke wherein a predetermined amount of liquid is released by the pump, the AC-voltage having a cycle time T. The method comprises the following steps:(b) feeding a liquid such as water under pressure by means of the pump and via the fluid connection and the inlet towards and into the ingredient in the brewing chamber;(c) interrupting the pump for a time period ts, wherein ts lays in a time-interval of 0.02-0.9 seconds, preferably between 0.4-0.85 seconds, more preferably between 0.6 and 0.8 seconds and wherein ts= n1<sup>∗</sup>T wherein n1 is an integer larger than 1;(d) resuming the operation of the pump for a time tr wherein tr is smaller than ts and tr=n2<sup>∗</sup>T wherein n2 is an integer larger than 0 and smaller than n1;(e) repeating a combination of first step (c) and subsequently step (d) for N times wherein N is an integer larger than 1; and(f) after step (e) continuing the operation of the pump.

title: DEVICE FOR FEEDING COFFEE POWDER INTO A BREWING CHAMBER OF A COFFEE MACHINE
abstract: [0001a] [본 발명은 커피 머신의 추출 챔버에 커피 가루(a)를 공급하는 장치로서, 충전 개구(2)를 포함하고, 커피 분말(a)을 받고 추출하기 위한 추출 챔버 용기(1); 및 커피 분말(a)을 충전 개구(2)를 통해 추출 챔버 용기(1)로 공급하기 위한 공급 장치(3);를 포함하고, 커피 분말을 채우는 동안 및/또는 채운 후에 추출 챔버 용기(1)를 진동시키기 위하여 추출 챔버 용기(1)에 결합되는 쉐이킹 장치(4)를 특징으로 하는 장치에 관한 것이다. 그 결과, 추출 챔버 용기에 주입된 커피 가루는 압축되어 균일하게 펴지며, 특히 추출 챔버 용기에 커피 분말이 주입될 때, 커피 가루가 언덕 모양으로 쌓이는 것을 방지할 수 있다.]

title: INTERNET OF THINGS (IOT) SYSTEMS AND METHODS
abstract: In some implementations, an onboarding device may enable an onboarding application running on a platform. The onboarding device may receive configuration data for a desired device to determine compatibility with a network. The onboarding device may determine, based on a comparison between configuration data and a configuration criteria for the network, whether a compatibility threshold has been satisfied. The onboarding device may determine, when the compatibility threshold has been satisfied, whether the desired device is compatible with the particular network.

title: 野菜飲料およびその製造方法
abstract: 【課題】非常に味が良く、栄養価が高い野菜飲料およびその製造方法を提供する。【解決手段】野菜飲料は、長ネギ、アスパラガス、キャベツ、ブロッコリー、カリフラワー、ほうれん草、ショウガ、ワカメまたはウチワサボテン、およびキウイまたは青リンゴ、を含有する。【選択図】なし

title: Method and device for performing intelligent temperature control on intelligent cooking equipment based on voice information
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of equipment intelligent control, and discloses a method and device for performing intelligent temperature control on intelligent cooking equipment based on voice information, and the method comprises the steps: collecting cooking voice data outputted by user voice based on a voice pickup device corresponding to the intelligent cooking equipment; analyzing the cooking voice data to obtain a corresponding cooking voice analysis result; and executing corresponding regulation and control operation on the intelligent cooking equipment according to the cooking voice analysis result. Therefore, the comprehensiveness and rationality of the regulation and control mode of the intelligent cooking equipment based on the voice information can be improved, the regulation and control accuracy and reliability of the intelligent cooking equipment are improved, the regulation and control timeliness, efficiency and convenience of the intelligent cooking equipment are improved, the cooking accuracy and reliability of food materials are improved, and the user experience is improved. The cooking self-adaptive adjustment function of the intelligent cooking equipment based on man-machine voice interaction is realized.

title: SURFACE CLEANING APPARATUS
abstract: [0000] A surface cleaning apparatus includes an upright body and a base adapted for movement across a surface to be cleaned, a fluid delivery system, and a recovery system. The surface cleaning apparatus can be configured to clean multiple surfaces, including hard and soft surfaces, and for different cleaning modes, including wet cleaning, dry vacuum cleaning, and self-cleaning. Methods for self-cleaning a surface cleaning apparatus are also provided.

title: Neutral pH cleaning formulation
abstract: A substantially neutral base multi-surface cleaning formulation. The formulation comprises an alkyl amine oxide surfactant, a levulinate solvent, a chelator and/or salt, and water. In some disclosed embodiments, the formulation further includes a buffer. The formulation has a substantially neutral pH from about 5 to about 8, from about 6 to about 8, or from about 6.5 to about 7.5. The formulation may be used as a spray, dosed on cleaning wipes, as a concentrate, in a soaps, or a wide variety of other forms.

title: FOAMED ARTICLES AND METHODS OF MAKING THE SAME
abstract: A foamed article, comprising: a foamed fibrous element comprising or consisting essentially of a first plurality of yarns, wherein each of the first plurality of yarns is an individual foamed yarn, comprising a first foamed material which is a physically-expanded foam formed of a thermoplastic elastomeric material comprising one or more first thermoplastic elastomers. Also related products and methods.

title: Rail cleaning mechanical device for rail transit
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of rail traffic, in particular to a rail cleaning mechanical device for rail traffic, which comprises a rail body, a mounting shell is arranged at the top of the rail body, a guide rod is fixedly connected to the rear side of an inner cavity of the mounting shell, and a mounting seat is slidably sleeved on the surface of the guide rod. A crushing block is fixedly mounted at the bottom of the mounting base, and a toothed plate is fixedly connected to the front surface of the mounting base. Through the arrangement of the auxiliary heating cleaning assembly, the toothed plate and the electric push rod, the multi-face cleaning device has the advantage of multi-face cleaning, and the aim of multi-face cleaning of the track body can be achieved through rotation of the rotating block under the assistance of the broken corrugated tooth grooves; through the arrangement of the toothed plate, the electric push rod, the mounting seat, the crushing block and the cleaning brush, the snow sweeping and ice breaking device has the advantages of sweeping snow and breaking ice, and the toothed plate can move to drive the crushing block and the cleaning brush to act, so that the purposes of sweeping accumulated floating snow and breaking condensed ice layers are achieved.

title: Lighting device, and storage compartment
abstract: A larger amount of light generated by a light source is emitted to the interior of an accommodation chamber. A lighting device provided on a side wall of an accommodation chamber of a refrigerator includes a light source that generates light, and a cover including a light incident portion on which the light generated by the light source is incident. The cover includes a light exit portion that includes a protrusion formed at a front surface facing the interior of a storage compartment, and causes light to exit to the interior of the storage compartment, and a light reflection diffusion portion that is formed on the back side of the light exit portion at a back surface facing the light source side, includes a plurality of recesses each having an inner peripheral surface, and directs light toward the protrusion.

title: - MULTI-MODAL INTERACTION WITH INTELLIGENT ASSISTANTS IN VOICE COMMAND DEVICES
abstract: 방법은 전자 디바이스에서 지능형 어시스턴트(intelligent assistant)의 활성화를 검출하는 동작, 상기 활성화에 응답하여 상기 지능형 어시스턴트를 슬립 모드로부터 웨이크 업 하는 동작, 및 상기 활성화의 타입에 기반하여 청취 모드 동안 상기 지능형 어시스턴트가 작용하는 어휘의 양을 결정하는 동작을 포함한다.

title: Haushaltsgeschirrspülmaschine mit einem Sorptionstrocknungssystem sowie zugehöriges Verfahren zum Durchführen eines Energiespar-Geschirrspülprogramms
abstract: Haushaltsgeschirrspülmaschine (GS) mit einem Sorptionstrocknungssystem (SY) und einer Steuerlogik (LO) zum Betreiben von Geschirrspülprogrammen (GP1, GP2, EP) derart, dass die Geschirrspülprogramme (GP1, GP2, EP) am Ende ihrer jeweils mittels einer Desorptions- Heizungsvorrichtung (HV) durchgeführten Regenerations-Aufheizphasen (HP1, HP2, HP3) nach dem jeweiligen Abschalten der Desorptions-Heizungsvorrichtung (HV) unterschiedlich lange Nachlaufphasen (NP1, NP2, NP3) aufweisen, während denen eine Luftfördereinheit (LF) jeweils Spülraumluft (PL') aus dem Spülraum (SR) der Haushaltsgeschirrspülmaschine weiter durch den Sorptionsbehälter (SOB) des Sorptionstrocknungssystems (SY) zwangsfördert.

title: Electrified railway overhead line system insulator cleaning equipment
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of railway overhead line system insulator cleaning, and discloses electrified railway overhead line system insulator cleaning equipment which comprises a bottom plate and a connecting belt, the top of the bottom plate is fixedly connected with a fixing frame, the middle of the fixing frame is rotationally connected with an installation ring, and a hydraulic cylinder is installed on the inner side of the installation ring; the left end of the hydraulic cylinder is fixedly connected with an extension plate, the front side and the rear side of the extension plate are fixedly connected with springs, the other ends of the springs are fixedly connected with first high-pressure spray heads, and the outer sides of the first high-pressure spray heads communicate with rubber pipes. According to the utility model, the rotation of the driving belt pulley is linked with the driven belt pulley through the connecting belt to synchronously rotate, so that the steel wire rope is wound, the limiting ring is driven to ascend, and the nozzle angle of the high-pressure spray head I is subjected to inclination adjustment; and the inclined angle can be used for cleaning the back surface and the side surface of the electrified railway overhead line system insulator.

title: Brush with wide application range
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of brushes, in particular to a brush wide in application range, which comprises a brush plate, a brush handle and a connecting block, bristles are fixedly connected on the surface of the brush plate, a connecting rod is fixedly connected on the surface of the brush plate, a through groove is arranged on the surface of the brush handle, and a slot is arranged on the surface of the brush handle. Through the connection of the connecting rod, the connecting block and the inserting groove, when the position of the brush handle needs to be replaced, the effect of changing the position of the brush handle can be achieved by pulling out the inserting groove, replacing the direction of the inserting groove and then inserting the connecting block, a user can conveniently clean the brush handle in a small range without being affected by the brush handle, and the cleaning efficiency is guaranteed; by means of connection of the inserting grooves and the connecting blocks and connection of the connecting blocks and the connecting rods, when semi-closed objects such as shoes are cleaned, the inserting grooves can be pulled out, then one set of connecting rods are inserted, the two sets of connecting rods are combined, the multi-face cleaning effect can be achieved, and small areas can be cleaned conveniently.

title: Compositions and methods of producing cooked egg products
abstract: The instant application describes cooked egg products with distinct egg yolk and white components that have a leavened, soft texture, and methods of producing them.
full_text: Compositions and methods of producing cooked egg products The instant application describes cooked egg products with distinct egg yolk and white components that have a leavened, soft texture, and methods of producing them.

title: INDOOR AIR QUALITY APPLIANCE
abstract: A self-regulating appliance operable as an air-exchanger, humidifier, dehumidifier, air scrubber, and air sterilizer. The appliance includes a cabinet defining an interior with a plurality of fluid passageways, a first inlet configured to receive a first air flow from a dwelling interior, a second inlet configured to receive a second air flow from a dwelling exterior, a first outlet configured to deliver a third air flow to the dwelling interior, and a second outlet configured to deliver a fourth air flow to the dwelling exterior. At least one blower is fluidically coupled to the first and second outlets to expel the third air flow to the dwelling interior and the fourth air flow to the dwelling exterior. The cabinet also includes an energy exchange core and a desiccant wheel. The desiccant wheel configured to rotate to transfer moisture and sensible energy between at least two air streams.

title: Spraying and cleaning device for steel rolling
abstract: The spraying and cleaning device comprises a conveying belt, a dust suction pipe, a first high-pressure nozzle, a second high-pressure nozzle and a third high-pressure nozzle, a first support is fixedly installed on the upper left portion of the conveying belt, a fan is arranged on the top of the first support, the air inlet end of the fan is fixedly connected with the dust suction pipe, and the dust suction pipe is fixedly connected with the dust suction pipe. A water guide pipe is fixedly connected to the high-pressure water pump, a first high-pressure nozzle, a second high-pressure nozzle and a third high-pressure nozzle are fixedly installed on the water guide pipe, and a water collecting tank is arranged at the bottom of the conveying belt. Through the arrangement of the fan and the dust hood, most loose particles, dust and light pollutants on the surface of steel can be effectively sucked away through the combination of the fan and the dust hood, and the surface of the steel subjected to dust collection pretreatment is cleaner, so that a better foundation is provided for subsequent spray cleaning and surface treatment; therefore, the spraying and cleaning efficiency and cleanliness can be greatly improved.

title: BASIC LEGUME COMPOSITION FOR BAKING GOODS AND CONFECTIONERY
abstract: The present invention relates to a food product that is based on upgrading side product streams of legumes. The food product can be used as a basis for baking goods and confectionery. Said food product consists of a homogeneous mixture of heated high-starch legume flour, fat, sugar and water.

title: Automatically suggesting routines based on detected user actions via multiple applications
abstract: Implementations relate to identifying actions performed by a user while the user is interacting with multiple applications and providing a routine suggestion to the user based on the identified actions. While a user is interacting with one or more applications, the user actions are determined. The user actions are compared to one or more template routines and a template routine is selected that matches the actions of the user and provided to the user as a suggested routine. The suggested routine can be implemented by an automated assistant to perform the actions of the template by providing a corresponding command.

title: SUGGESTING AUTOMATED ASSISTANT ROUTINES BASED ON DETECTED USER ACTIONS
abstract: Implementations relate to identifying actions performed by a user while the user is interacting with an application and providing a routine suggestion to the user based on the identified actions. While a user is interacting with an application, screenshots of the user actions are captured and processed to determine what actions were performed by the user. The identified actions are compared to one or more template routines and a template routine is selected that matches the actions and intent of the user and provided to the user as a suggested routine. The suggested routine can be implemented by an automated assistant to perform the actions of the template by providing a corresponding command.

title: Motion based systems, apparatuses and methods for establishing 3 axis coordinate systems for mobile devices and writing with virtual keyboards
abstract: [0000] Systems, interfaces, and methods for implementing the systems and interfaces include a dynamic environment generation subsystem that changes objects and subobjects based on locations of the motion sensors and/or the nature, time and/or location of sensed motion and include selection attractive movement as the selection protocol, where a selection object is used to discriminate between selectable objects and attract a target object toward the selection objects, where the direction and speed of the motion controls, discriminates, attracts, and activates the selected objects.

title: DETERMINING A GENERALIZED ROUTINE BASED ON IDENTIFIED USER ACTIONS
abstract: [0000] Implementations relate to determining a general routine when an automated assistant is not configured to fulfill a user request. When the user submits a request to an automated assistant to perform a routine and the automated assistant is not configured to fulfill the request, the user demonstrates the actions that are included in the routine. The automated assistant generates a routine based on the actions of the user and stores the routine with the request that was initially submitted by the user. In some implementations, a general routine can include one or more parameters and the user provides a value for the parameters with the request. General routines can additionally be generated based on previous routines performed by the user and/or other users.

title: Automatically executing application routines with user inputs
abstract: [0000] Implementations relate to determining a rendering type for an application that is executing automatically. Based on user interactions with an application that is associated with specified input from the user while the user is interacting with the application, a confidence metric is generated for each specified input and a rendering type is determined based on the confidence metrics. Subsequently, when the user requests that a sequence of actions be performed, the application will be displayed according to the rendering type.

title: MOTION BASED SYSTEMS, APPARATUSES AND METHODS FOR IMPLEMENTING 3D CONTROLS USING 2D CONSTRUCTS, USING REAL OR VIRTUAL CONTROLLERS, USING PREVIEW FRAMING, AND BLOB DATA CONTROLLERS
abstract: Systems, interfaces, and methods for implementing the systems and interfaces include a dynamic environment generation subsystem that changes objects and subobjects based on locations of the motion sensors and/or the nature, time and/or location of sensed motion and include selection attractive movement as the selection protocol, where a selection object is used to discriminate between selectable objects and attract a target object toward the selection objects, where the direction and speed of the motion controls, discriminates, attracts, and activates the selected objects.

title: DYNAMICALLY PROVIDING A MACRO TO A USER BASED ON PREVIOUS USER INTERACTIONS
abstract: [0000] Implementations relate to providing a macro to a user to instruct the user regarding how to perform an action. When a user submits a request to perform an action, an option is provided that indicates a macro is available. Upon selecting the macro, one or more elements are displayed, with a corresponding application displayed in the background. The next element is displayed after a period of time, depending on the user familiarity with the action.

title: ELECTRONIC TERMINAL APPARATUS CAPABLE OF DISPLAYING ELECTRONIC DOCUMENTS TOGETHER WITH ADVERTISING INFORMATION AND THE OPERATING METHOD THEREOF
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide an electronic terminal device capable of displaying an electronic document together with advertisement information and an operating method thereof, thereby supporting a user to naturally acquire advertisement information while reading the electronic document. An electronic terminal device includes: an interface display unit which generates an interface divided into a document display area and an advertisement display area and displays the interface on a screen; a document display unit which displays a first electronic document on the document display area of the interface; a display event generation unit which generates an advertisement display event; a url request unit which requests a predetermined advertisement server to transmit a url of an advertisement web page; a preview generation unit which generates a preview screen for the first advertisement web page; and an advertisement display unit which displays the preview screen for the first advertisement web page.

title: Multifunctional posterior tooth locking appliance
abstract: The utility model provides a multifunctional posterior tooth locking appliance. The multifunctional posterior tooth locking appliance comprises a cast crown installed on molars on the two sides, brackets and buccal tubes are arranged on the outer side of the cast crown, a traction hook is arranged on the inner side of the metal cast crown, a hook part is arranged at the tail end of the traction hook, the traction hook is in an L shape, and a torsional spring is arranged at the joint of the traction hook. The cast crowns on the two sides are fixedly connected through a connecting rod, the middle of the connecting rod is bent towards the incisor, and a plane or slope guide plate located on the palatal side is fixedly installed on the connecting rod and covers the palatal sides of the central incisor, the lateral incisor and the canine. The multifunctional rear tooth locking appliance provided by the utility model has the advantages of accurate force application, multifunctional design, high comfort level, strong adaptability and the like, solves the problems in the prior art, provides a new effective means for locking tooth correction, and has important clinical application value.

title: PAIRING USER HEADPHONES WITH A LOCATION-BASED AUTOMATED ASSISTANT
abstract: Implementations described herein relate to pairing a location-based automated assistant with a user device. The user device can include, for example, a headphones apparatus and/or a device that is paired with the headphones apparatus. The user device provides an indication that it is present at a location that is associated with a location-based automated assistant. A trust measure is determined that is indicative of trust between the user device and the location-based automated assistant. User information is provided by the user device to the location-based automated assistant. The location-based automated assistant determines response data to provide, via one or more speakers associated with the user device, that is specific to the location and further based on the user information.

title: Hair styling appliance
abstract: A hair styling appliance comprising an optical sensor configured to make two or more measurements of light received from a section of hair being styled by the hair styling appliance, and a processor configured to determine a speed of movement of the section of hair relative to the hair styling appliance based on the two or more measurements. The measurements produce successive images of the section of hair (figs. 12a-12b). The times at which the images were generated are obtained and used with determined displacements of the section of hair in the images to determine a relative speed of movement of the hair. The optical sensor may be e.g. a camera or an array of photosensors. The appliance may be a hair straightener, curler or brush.

title: Electric passenger car fastener state real-time monitoring device
abstract: The invention discloses a real-time monitoring device for the state of a fastener of an electric passenger car, and solves the problem that the fastening stress of a bolt is inconvenient to monitor in real time in the prior art. The system comprises a bolt, and further comprises a fixing plate used for being connected with vehicle bottom equipment, an intelligent gasket arranged on the fixing plate and used for detecting the fastening stress of the bolt, a data transmission module arranged in the intelligent gasket and connected with a vehicle-mounted host, and an energy storage mechanism arranged in the intelligent gasket and connected with the intelligent gasket and the data transmission module. The bolt penetrates through the fixing plate and is connected with the vehicle bottom equipment, and the intelligent gasket is pressed on the fixing plate. The bolt fastening stress is monitored in real time through the intelligent gasket, data detected by the intelligent gasket is transmitted into the vehicle-mounted host through the data transmission module and displayed, and monitoring personnel can judge whether the bolt falls off or loosens in the using process according to the pressure data monitored by the pressure sensor.

title: MEASUREMENTS USING CAMERA SENSOR COUPLED TO A CHEMICAL DETECTION SYSTEM
abstract: A measurement system comprises near-infrared semiconductor diodes operating in pulsed mode and a detection system comprising a camera configured to be synchronized to the diodes and to capture light reflected from bodily tissue. The measurement system may also comprise a time-of-flight sensor or a beam splitter to separate the diode light into a plurality of spatially separated lights. The measurement system including a processor is further coupled to a chemical detection system comprising a thermal or lamp based infrared light source and a multi-path spectroscopy system, comprising a first arm performing spectroscopy on a first gas and a second arm performing spectroscopy on a second gas. The processor is configured to process the image from the camera system and the information from the spectroscopy system. The first gas may comprise carbon dioxide, while the second gas may comprise hydrocarbons. The measurement system may be mounted in a vehicle.

title: Magnetic type surface-changing mop
abstract: The invention discloses a magnetic type surface-changing mop which comprises a mop head, a mop rod and a turnover type cleaning sleeve, the mop head comprises a convex block buckle, a clamping strip and a water scraping plate, and after the mop head is connected with the mop rod through a screw rod, the mop head can be used as a water scraper; the cleaning cloth sleeve on the upper portion of the turnover cleaning sleeve is fixed on the mop head through the hook-and-loop fastener, the two magnets are sewn in the bottom end of the turnover cleaning cloth on the lower portion, and the two magnets in the bottom end of the cleaning cloth can be firmly attracted by the two cylindrical magnets in the clamping strip of the mop head no matter whether the front face is turned upwards or the back face is turned upwards. And a front cleaning surface and a rear cleaning surface can be formed under the support of the water scraping plate.

title: TIME-OF-FLIGHT MEASUREMENT ON USER WITH CAMERAS AND POSITION SENSOR
abstract: A remote sensing system comprising laser diodes with Bragg reflectors generating pulsed light that is directed to an object. A detection system receiving some of the light reflected from the object and coupled to a processor configured to measure a time-of-flight. The pulsing may have a phase associated with the modulation frequency, or nanosecond pulses may be used for the measurement. The remote sensing system including the processor is further configured to provide time and position data for a user. The object may comprise the user capable of laying on a supporting surface. The remote sensing system may also be coupled to a camera system to capture images, which may be combined with the time-of-flight measurement. Artificial intelligence may be used to make decisions associated with the images or the time-of-flight measurement. The processor may be coupled to non-transitory computer readable medium and may communicate data to a cloud server.

title: REMOTE SENSING SYSTEM WITH TIME-OF-FLIGHT SENSOR, ACTIVE ILLUMINATOR AND LIGHT SENSING SYSTEM
abstract: [0000] A remote sensing system comprises a time-of-flight sensor including an array of near-infrared laser diodes comprising Bragg reflectors and pulsed with durations approximately 0.5 to 2 nanoseconds whose light is directed to an object. The detection system comprises a photodiode array coupled to a processor, and the time-of-flight measurement is calculated from the temporal distribution of photons reflected from the object. The sensor is coupled to an optical system comprising an active illuminator with a plurality of light emitting diodes and a camera system configured to be synchronized to the illuminator. Furthermore, the sensor is coupled to a light sensing system comprising a multi-wavelength filter to separate incoming ambient light into a series of wavelength bands, and a detector array configured to capture some of the wavelength bands to generate a color output. The processor may be configured to control the active illuminator based on the received color output.

title: Systems, methods, and apparatuses for secure hybrid based communications
abstract: [0000] Systems, methods, and apparatuses for securing a communication network are provided. Transmitting a first signal including encoding a first timestamp, a first identifier, and a message authentication component. Obtaining a message signal comprising one or more service variables associated and an encrypted unique identifier. Authenticating the encrypted unique identifier based on a comparison of the encrypted unique identifier against a plurality of stored unique identifiers in a lookup table. Generating a second signal comprising an encoding of a subset of the service variables, the encrypted unique identifier, and a second timestamp. Transmitting the second signal to each remote receiver in a subset of the plurality of remote receivers.

title: Oral cavity cleaning brush
abstract: The utility model discloses an oral cavity cleaning brush, which belongs to the technical field of medical instruments and comprises a toothbrush handle body, a multi-surface cleaning piece and a suction connecting seat, a suction cavity is arranged inside the toothbrush handle body, the multi-surface cleaning piece is arranged at the top end of the toothbrush handle body and comprises a support rod and a brush head, and the support rod is connected with the suction connecting seat. The supporting rods are vertically and fixedly arranged at the top of the toothbrush handle body, each brush head is arranged at the top of the corresponding supporting rod, the back face of each brush head is provided with a cleaning part capable of brushing the tongue coating, the suction connecting base is arranged at the bottom of the toothbrush handle body, and the suction connecting base is arranged at the bottom of the toothbrush handle body. A medical worker can clean teeth in the oral cavity of a dangerous patient in multiple aspects by using the three brush heads of the device, and can clean the coating on the tongue of the dangerous patient through the cleaning parts arranged on the back surfaces of the brush heads, so that the cleaning degree of the oral cavity of the dangerous patient is improved.

title: DYNAMICALLY ADAPTING FULFILLMENT OF A GIVEN SPOKEN UTTERANCE BASED ON A USER THAT PROVIDED THE GIVEN SPOKEN UTTERANCE
abstract: Implementations described herein relate to determining how to fulfill a spoken utterance based on a user that provided the spoken utterance. For example, implementations can receive a spoken utterance from a user, determine a set of fulfillment actions for the spoken utterance, and determine whether the user that provided the spoken utterance corresponds to a first user or a second user. Further, and in response to determining that the user corresponds to the first user, implementations can select a subset of first fulfillment action(s) from the set, and cause the subset of first fulfillment action(s) to be implemented to satisfy the spoken utterance. Moreover, and in response to determining that the user corresponds to the second user, implementations can select a subset of distinct, second fulfillment action(s) from the set, and cause the subset of second fulfillment action(s) to be implemented to satisfy the spoken utterance.

title: MULTIMODAL INTENT UNDERSTANDING FOR AUTOMATED ASSISTANT
abstract: Implementations described herein include detecting a stream of audio data that captures a spoken utterance of the user and that captures ambient noise occurring within a threshold time period of the spoken utterance being spoken by the user. Implementations further include processing a portion of the audio data that includes the ambient noise to determine ambient noise classification(s), processing a portion of the audio data that includes the spoken utterance to generate a transcription, processing both the transcription and the ambient noise classification(s) with a machine learning model to generate a user intent and parameter(s) for the user intent, and performing one or more automated assistant actions based on the user intent and using the parameter(s).

title: Appliance with modified proportional-integral control
abstract: An electrical appliance includes a controller operatively connected to a power circuit, a control circuit, a power source, a sensor for sensing a parameter level, and an active element.The controller is configured to receive an input of the parameter level from the sensor and to output a duty cycle for controlling a power level of the active element via the control circuit at various times to achieve a target set point of the parameter, the duty cycle based on proportional and integral control. The controller uses the proportional control and the integral control when the control circuit is energized, and controls the power source at a loop iteration time that is shorter than a cycle time of the duty cycle.
